We're sure you've noticed that there are a few things about our country that have changed under Joe Biden:
* He has turned our economy on its head
* He has let the woke mob run unchecked in indoctrinating children
* He has stripped away parents' rights from the classroom
* He has failed to stop the invasion at our southern border

We have a lot of thoughts about the state of our union, and Gov. DeSantis has a lot of plans he will be putting into action to reverse the effects of Biden's presidency on Day 1. **Governor DeSantis isn't running for President to manage the decline; he's running to reverse it.** We want to know what you think, Friend. **_We have a survey we're sending out to a select group of patriots to ensure we've gathered the input we need to shape our strategy, and we're making this a donation-required response to show the radical Left that our team is willing to put our money where our mouth is to restore the freedom of this nation._**

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a2c47ef6b9d34b59be2b97967830eb58&_e=BxRfi-oljH1Et51EGa3U0N3zjgos_HI-Em0XtkDTQOssVyvzWXDOjRWnqbJBjvn6crLNMYH1iZ89sSTQ4oVF0WU396u5BO7qZL2mySGDtP8rVGHSwePgSNj5Gtqi7Umpthfu27yGo3k9ccJoNldNYKp7fB-lvEAcTL-qQyUBu0Z9g11F8OJ48N9X7J8LdmaHOMfxqqYqiGA_M-El3_EV7S0PGsTCUwPu8RII8Ab1JepikbhB-dkvWPqgbKJ6RFXmNI2ANaHL7SzPNkHX_qp8KAlVzwMXmOPME-4iLYPZG0uWPb3exO6I7vSgSVXK5lZ6oCNBBPz43to5pV8xU_BRDT3LdPhsprlHsXgfuMfusNeYMpRw9D5WdgXTfVEcTyuDbsmUiWzYujeTUi44tFwkJh3XE5qsapnHMlb5zdq6JlO8VDaLFJTgruGY_k1z0Rb1j4srIHCuvQ8jtVmFto899Q%3D%3D)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Sherrod needs your grassroots support now more than ever!

With Senate control on the line, we need an immediate surge of grassroots support to pull ahead and win. That’s why we just set a $30k rapid-response goal to make sure we have the resources to defend this must-win seat, and we need your help to get there by midnight:

| | Friend,

---
On Sunday night, while I was with my family, my attorneys gave me HORRIFYING news.

---
_The deranged prosecutor with Biden’s Department of Justice sent a letter, stating that**I AM A TARGET OF THE JANUARY 6TH GRAND JURY INVESTIGATION**.
_
---
**They gave me a very short time period of 4 DAYS to report to the Grand Jury, which almost always means an** _**ARREST**_**and** _**INDICTMENT**_**.**
---
Let me be perfectly clear: _I DID NOTHING WRONG. I AM COMPLETELY INNOCENT._

---
This is just another vicious act of Election Interference on behalf of the Deep State to try and stop the Silent Majority from having a voice in your own country.

---
It’s quite the coincidence that this news comes JUST AFTER a series of polls show that all of our Republican opponents are LOSING BADLY to Crooked Joe Biden – and that I AM THE _ONLY_ CANDIDATE projected to beat him in a free and fair election.

---
This letter also comes just after our FEC report revealed a TREMENDOUS number of small-dollar donors, proving that the _AMERICAN PEOPLE_ stand by our movement.

---
The Special Counsel’s office has already wasted $9 MILLION of YOUR taxpayer money on never-ending witch hunts to try and destroy our movement – not to mention the $32 MILLION wasted in Mueller’s Russia, Russia, Russia witch hunt.

---
When I keep touring the country and hear voters tell me, “President Trump, you’re our only hope!” “President Trump, we NEED you back in the White House!” – I know that I could never stop fighting to save our country, no matter how vicious these witch hunts ever become.

---
**The fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. It’s not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well – and I will**** _NEVER_****let them take it from you.**

---
_If you’re doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day._

---
But if not, I don’t have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now.

clean_body: Stating I am the target of a GRAND JURY investigation| | | | | Friend, On Sunday night, while I was with my family, my attorneys gave me HORRIFYING news. The deranged prosecutor with Biden’s Department of Justice sent a letter, stating thatI AM A TARGET OF THE JANUARY 6TH GRAND JURY INVESTIGATION. They gave me a very short time period of 4 DAYS to report to the Grand Jury, which almost always means an ARRESTand INDICTMENT. Let me be perfectly clear: I DID NOTHING WRONG. I AM COMPLETELY INNOCENT. This is just another vicious act of Election Interference on behalf of the Deep State to try and stop the Silent Majority from having a voice in your own country. It’s quite the coincidence that this news comes JUST AFTER a series of polls show that all of our Republican opponents are LOSING BADLY to Crooked Joe Biden – and that I AM THE ONLY CANDIDATE projected to beat him in a free and fair election. This letter also comes just after our FEC report revealed a TREMENDOUS number of small-dollar donors, proving that the AMERICAN PEOPLE stand by our movement. The Special Counsel’s office has already wasted $9 MILLION of YOUR taxpayer money on never-ending witch hunts to try and destroy our movement – not to mention the $32 MILLION wasted in Mueller’s Russia, Russia, Russia witch hunt. When I keep touring the country and hear voters tell me, “President Trump, you’re our only hope!” “President Trump, we NEED you back in the White House!” – I know that I could never stop fighting to save our country, no matter how vicious these witch hunts ever become. The fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. It’s not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well – and I will NEVERlet them take it from you. If you’re doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day. But if not, I don’t have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now. | | Thank you, Donald J. Fellow Conservative,

I’ve always known that I was meant to live a life of service, but I could never have imagined that perhaps **the toughest mission of my life wouldn’t be as a Navy SEAL but rather as a combat veteran preparing to run for the United States Senate.**

[**Today, I’m reaching out to ask you to personally endorse my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Montana.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4d7801f44f6b47459862a112e3c8b2c6&_e=DG_qv6xGn3ZRm6W4Pq6cOGVna-eCBZ06GhzkKaaf69TRcIlsPlsVJPYw1QXwVRy1QYa-QD34twH10y-d3w63fA-A4H1XSlMOti-1TVUnBUSWriqDPilYhgzUDbycALVohxN49RefU9uHh5KI-6AVKFFDhLAdvXT_PqE_ovV0Wu-QkAMD16Fw73Eigbg8V3ATLIM0sHFsTwTEL6LruhlOGs_hF1CFp36_iBPRcdgRaUP_ebI2d_qsOukL8FMKjFBnWC4gVqZmly9GuBvie6tCkJThE3niI6nbxU4duKwSJQpB4fiUqu2twBqPAODxoIC4Gy22wQrVcCxd_31tFqqHPfgBx2D150PWMtMTHIpU0pYNh5ZR2RUuIJxzXd_T9ioLI9qbifvUP3IOaptaFtWdng%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will back my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that **anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it.**

**I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read.**

In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis.

[**ENDORSE FMR. NAVY SEAL TIM SHEEHY FOR U.S. SENATE** ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4d7801f44f6b47459862a112e3c8b2c6&_e=DG_qv6xGn3ZRm6W4Pq6cOGVna-eCBZ06GhzkKaaf69TRcIlsPlsVJPYw1QXwVRy1QYa-QD34twH10y-d3w63fA-A4H1XSlMOti-1TVUnBUSWriqDPilYhgzUDbycALVohxN49RefU9uHh5KI-6AVKFFDhLAdvXT_PqE_ovV0Wu-QkAMD16Fw73Eigbg8V3ATLIM0sHFsTwTEL6LruhlOGs_hF1CFp36_iBPRcdgRaUP_ebI2d_qsOukL8FMKjFBnd1g6I9yZVcQMPHmxx1_SyzlWq1ad3Myfhm4TdWd4MFUhcdFQ7vWGhYOwyqJZcRFtCFsXaiKVg-hJPX2cHfWApagtHQv8XusLGFBUhSvBWvKBHoJWJHcxlQ6xlPg8obE55a4TZDwTzGWPpTJhBgmu9w%3D%3D)

Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. **When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you.**

I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. _And believe me, there are some tales._

**I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism.** I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why [**I am determined to take on the anti-American, radical Left in Washington as Montana’s next U.S. Senator.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4d7801f44f6b47459862a112e3c8b2c6&_e=DG_qv6xGn3ZRm6W4Pq6cOGVna-eCBZ06GhzkKaaf69TRcIlsPlsVJPYw1QXwVRy1QYa-QD34twH10y-d3w63fA-A4H1XSlMOti-1TVUnBUSWriqDPilYhgzUDbycALVohxN49RefU9uHh5KI-6AVKFFDhLAdvXT_PqE_ovV0Wu-QkAMD16Fw73Eigbg8V3ATLIM0sHFsTwTEL6LruhlOGs_hF1CFp36_iBPRcdgRaUP_ebI2d_qsOukL8FMKjFBnmMP-mM79_kIg8P23IXPKm2C6d_26ns6cMqg34fTRuo82xCYUR7RQJ4tdT_B_iDQBtirD6dmLVan4tjWT1retxItQLGPRYGNNctfCDKG6w6SPW04D2MZl6YVbLznyIS6bfqjP4Op2NSeef0B6BKrWZQ%3D%3D)

[**ENDORSE FMR. Our homeland is in danger. Not from overseas terrorists but Washington’s radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. This FAR-LEFT liberal agenda is assaulting our society, communities, and the American Dream.

**The Democrats’ grip on power is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security.**

**The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the Senate in 2024, and our path to the Majority runs through this race in Montana.**

[**We need a proven warrior to take back this Senate seat and take on the Democrats in Washington. I hope hearing my story proves I am the man for the job.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4d7801f44f6b47459862a112e3c8b2c6&_e=DG_qv6xGn3ZRm6W4Pq6cOGVna-eCBZ06GhzkKaaf69TRcIlsPlsVJPYw1QXwVRy1QYa-QD34twH10y-d3w63fA-A4H1XSlMOti-1TVUnBUSWriqDPilYhgzUDbycALVohxN49RefU9uHh5KI-6AVKFFDhLAdvXT_PqE_ovV0Wu-QkAMD16Fw73Eigbg8V3ATLIM0sHFsTwTEL6LruhlOGs_hF1CFp36_iBPRcdgRaUP_ebI2d_qsOukL8FMKjFBn_EteBzZrVUShLzxNggqGPA68fJo7Hc65WZwKUw5fzlDy2x4wJ8B0cf_xkSIUgLLTMPgc3g9fFh8B4TnX59VyZDHtM8WiqPTOHjMsRDPsIsZnrL2ESaqP5VQ3pS2tB4RjrcVswSRLA2bkdEfxXRbkSQ%3D%3D)

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4d7801f44f6b47459862a112e3c8b2c6&_e=DG_qv6xGn3ZRm6W4Pq6cOGVna-eCBZ06GhzkKaaf69TRcIlsPlsVJPYw1QXwVRy1QYa-QD34twH10y-d3w63fA-A4H1XSlMOti-1TVUnBUSWriqDPilYhgzUDbycALVohxN49RefU9uHh5KI-6AVKFFDhLAdvXT_PqE_ovV0Wu-QkAMD16Fw73Eigbg8V3ATLIM0sHFsTwTEL6LruhlOGs_hF1CFp36_iBPRcdgRaUP_ebI2d_qsOukL8FMKjFBnmHU0TN7_kNiOjAG37v5KJXIwdfvwB-fyAkp5oJJSL3m42ppAP358EoOrNATsNJiT9QGK-zLGM2KBGPGp1XzVDV2P8N4gtlmhf4-86qRWsWGJherJxChVWhWnecbM-u3fC88zIL5iMW3WtfNoY8kSVg%3D%3D)

Over the days and weeks ahead, you’ll receive emails from me and my team as we build our campaign. While I don’t want you to feel obligated to interact with each piece of content you receive in your inbox, **I kindly ask you to refrain from unsubscribing from our contact list.** The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong Republican candidate who can defeat a Democrat in the General Election.

_***If we fail to flip this Montana seat RED next November, we lose our best chance at a Senate Majority for the next DECADE due to the election map at play.***_

This is my most critical mission to date, and [**I am counting on you to enlist in the fight.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4d7801f44f6b47459862a112e3c8b2c6&_e=DG_qv6xGn3ZRm6W4Pq6cOGVna-eCBZ06GhzkKaaf69TRcIlsPlsVJPYw1QXwVRy1QYa-QD34twH10y-d3w63fA-A4H1XSlMOti-1TVUnBUSWriqDPilYhgzUDbycALVohxN49RefU9uHh5KI-6AVKFFDhLAdvXT_PqE_ovV0Wu-QkAMD16Fw73Eigbg8V3ATLIM0sHFsTwTEL6LruhlOGs_hF1CFp36_iBPRcdgRaUP_ebI2d_qsOukL8FMKjFBn2ANrqmPiJ1N3mryL47df1nHouev_N54XwjfrUfx_oJwUzrMCF712c7Hb-WtYBSpxL9LP7VVX_ICPgLRy6qkwBEXxMud7BOIxKGaTFF3oBnphFR7b5I1aJrLmmDDc_0kbnO7Eo-wlwkteQn4zYD44zw%3D%3D)

This is my most critical mission to date, and Thank you, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: This isn’t something I expected to do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Hi Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce.
As a kid from a working-class neighborhood in mid-Missouri, running for office and becoming a politician was never part of my plan. So I wanted to take just a few moments today to share a little more about how we got here and why I’m running for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.
**Will you please let me explain?**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35137?refcode=em20230718-3415&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3415%2E614464%2E2uQ89k)
Like so many other American families, mine lived paycheck-to-paycheck — and when my little sister was born with a heart condition, we went bankrupt.
Thanks to the generosity of our neighbors and people around town, we were able to get by. They helped me go to college, and after that I joined the Marines to honor everything they gave to me growing up.
But when I came home between tours in Iraq and Afghanistan, I found a neighborhood that had been picked for parts — our neighborhood corner store boarded up, our first family home bulldozed to the ground. **Now it’s an empty lot.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35137?refcode=em20230718-3415&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3415%2E614464%2E2uQ89k)
While all of us were risking our lives to build up towns like Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Herat, career politicians and corporate elites like Josh Hawley let towns and neighborhoods at home waste away. And then, after spending 20 years and $6.4 trillion on pointless forever wars and defense contractors, they couldn’t figure out how to invest a fraction of that amount back into our own country.
**I’m running for U.S. Senate because it’s time everyday Missourians — people who know how to take care of each other — called the shots in this country.[And today, I’m asking for your support to make it happen.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35137?refcode=em20230718-3415&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3415%2E614464%2E2uQ89k)**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35137?refcode=em20230718-3415&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3415%2E614464%2E2uQ89k)
**If you’re ready to take back power from the giant corporations and corrupt, career politicians who’ve waged economic warfare on our country, I need you on this team.[Can you add a $10 donation right now so we’ll have the resources we need to get our message in front of voters and flip this U.S. Senate seat? I don’t take any money from corporate PACs, so I mean it when I say anything makes a big impact.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35137?refcode=em20230718-3415&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3415%2E614464%2E2uQ89k)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35138?refcode=em20230718-3415&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=6&akid=3415%2E614464%2E2uQ89k) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35138?refcode=em20230718-3415&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=7&akid=3415%2E614464%2E2uQ89k) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35138?refcode=em20230718-3415&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=8&akid=3415%2E614464%2E2uQ89k) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35138?refcode=em20230718-3415&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=9&akid=3415%2E614464%2E2uQ89k) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35138?refcode=em20230718-3415&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=10&akid=3415%2E614464%2E2uQ89k) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35138?refcode=em20230718-3415&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=11&akid=3415%2E614464%2E2uQ89k) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35137?refcode=em20230718-3415&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=3415%2E614464%2E2uQ89k)
---
Thanks for having my back in this fight, Peter. Together, we’ll take back power for working people and fundamentally change who calls the shots in our country.
Let’s flip this seat,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230718-3415-footer&t=13&refcode2=3415_614464_2uQ89k&akid=3415%2E614464%2E2uQ89k)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matthew=20Barton?=
subject: Have you seen this 📺 ?
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bartonfordesoto/sound-of-freedom?e=3c5d31b5ad)
---
| |
---
| Megan and I took the night off from walking doors and visiting with voters to watch the "Sound of Freedom". If you haven’t watched it yet, you should. Human trafficking isn’t just in third world countries. It’s right here in Mississippi. But I have a plan to combat it here in DeSoto County.
We simply cannot take any chances with Memphis as our neighbor.
As D.A., I will modernize the office with state-of-the art technology that allows us to keep up with the more advanced ways criminals operate and protect our children from sexual predators.
I will hire investigators with specialized skill sets, and cross train ALL employees to serve as victim assistance coordinators and human trafficking advocates.
Our great AG Lynn Fitch is doing phenomenal work to move Mississippi ahead of the curve, and we will join her efforts by sending our employees to their integrated trainings, so we can dissolve their networks.
And finally, as D.A., I will be out in the public and join our new sheriff in educating the public in ways to stay vigilant, aware, and protect our children from sexual exploitation.
These methodologies will allow us to strengthen our responsiveness to this form of modern slavery and eradicate it from north Mississippi.

---
| | | | [HELP MATTHEW WIN AUGUST 8](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=90b04ec888&e=3c5d31b5ad)
---

Thank you and God Bless you,
---
| | |
---
| Matthew Barton
_Sent from my iPhone_

PS: _If you believe you’ve received this email message in error - or do not wish to receive future updates from me or my team for any reason - [you can click here to unsubscribe](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=efb9dc8233&e=3c5d31b5ad)[.](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=4b8d0c7c55&e=3c5d31b5ad)_
---
| |
---

**Meet Matthew Barton**
---

Matthew Barton grew up in Petal, Mississippi in a blue-collar family. His mother was a director at Tupperware and his father owned the small, family business – Barton Fence Company – where Matthew worked growing up.
After attending public school, Matthew attended Pearl River Community College and Warner University, where he studied Business Administration. He holds a law degree from Ole Miss Law, where he graduated Cum Laude and received the interviewing and counseling award.
In 2011, Matthew married his high school sweetheart, Megan. After graduating from Ole Miss Law in 2015, they moved to DeSoto County where Matthew started a law firm and Megan continued working at the Desoto County Schools as a Certified Occupational Therapy Assistant.
During law school, Matthew served as an intern in the DeSoto County District Attorney’s Office where he presented cases to grand jury, tried cases to verdict, and performed all functions of a practicing attorney. He has served as a prosecutor for the City of Southaven and the City of Horn Lake and now serves as a special prosecutor for Southaven, Horn Lake, and DeSoto County Justice Courts – where he’s established a strict, tough on crime reputation.
As an attorney, Mathew has dealt with every type of criminal matter ranging from DUI to capital murder, in more than 37 courts across Mississippi.
Matthew is a member of the Federalist Society, a conservative legal association, an enhanced conceal carry permit holder, Krewe of Hernando member, NRA member, and donates his time serving as a pro bono attorney to Veterans every year.
Today, Matthew, his wife Megan, and their daughter Eleanor live in Hernando where Matthew owns his private law firm. Eleanor attends Pre-K at Hernando United Methodist Church and Megan is a stay at home mom after seven years with DeSoto County schools.
| | | | | | | [](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=d69a9a46ad&e=3c5d31b5ad)
---

name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: This is my most critical mission to date
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
I could never have imagined that perhaps the toughest mission of my life wouldn’t be as a Navy SEAL but rather as a combat veteran preparing to run for the United States Senate. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=209ea2eccc6f4e3a9218c5f1fc079486&_t=PlHayTI6ivXpg8IoofbwreIYNLXb4_5BuanL9TI1Y07AAl6ln0_080TotTElzF5uF_YPA2JgJDSpK67EBr08iNkrso38FlME1x72P3UeTvs%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=209ea2eccc6f4e3a9218c5f1fc079486&_t=PlHayTI6ivXpg8IoofbwreIYNLXb4_5BuanL9TI1Y07AAl6ln0_080TotTElzF5uF_YPA2JgJDSpK67EBr08iNkrso38FlME1x72P3UeTvs%3D)
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=209ea2eccc6f4e3a9218c5f1fc079486&_e=_WD-UTddYxwb9-nCu1IgEGXQ0DgwJd5F00z60eg-RMbwMqbzZn0fdtajB03JWhYKTAayXZTk5IzA90fY_Iv_Op0EOJDQ4sXRNNDWn1nNyZMYGhh76b6vBX1EMlu9nYrArDXiDZNug1OnXZGuk-mKN1UEnuPxrBsvT7Pw5JY7PUMe-buzKJCoPSz-yo3Ui9ATPoed8Uhp3WZe1EJ_otyVqfILBvFoyhK1EZvPJIyFtMPGWPID-DE_v3oDKpf1KBroWyQD0zj9Ud8T7__ymtbkDzq2LtT7sG7DVDmqR_w5kzm1dLD99LrlaT8o46uhOvpLAySSwR6zyxhgrFtUAua_jHsCQRgs_8KM3PWbT1nCWmQsXMzDXrpvD75zP6Kay7_YdKITwPy53_QM0VinDngbZQ%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve always known that I was meant to live a life of service, but I could never have imagined that perhaps **the toughest mission of my life wouldn’t be as a Navy SEAL but rather as a combat veteran preparing to run for the United States Senate.**

[**Today, I’m reaching out to ask you to personally endorse my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Montana.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=209ea2eccc6f4e3a9218c5f1fc079486&_e=_WD-UTddYxwb9-nCu1IgEGXQ0DgwJd5F00z60eg-RMbwMqbzZn0fdtajB03JWhYKTAayXZTk5IzA90fY_Iv_Op0EOJDQ4sXRNNDWn1nNyZMYGhh76b6vBX1EMlu9nYrArDXiDZNug1OnXZGuk-mKN1UEnuPxrBsvT7Pw5JY7PUMe-buzKJCoPSz-yo3Ui9ATPoed8Uhp3WZe1EJ_otyVqfILBvFoyhK1EZvPJIyFtMPGWPID-DE_v3oDKpf1KBroJrXmAqYE3kWXHHPIDNJtnE8pyOF8GgMJ3CJQQu4N2zCKPkBNVOhgB-EUjyiQsyw8AmBN-oha1T60saDSz39ABXB4mZ7xY88RejOgDBvdFqP1yp0q6GB5-5ae2URSPAykzrf4KBfQdnNuB5niftR-bw%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will back my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that **anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it.**

**I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read.**

In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis.

[**ENDORSE FMR. NAVY SEAL TIM SHEEHY FOR U.S. SENATE** ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=209ea2eccc6f4e3a9218c5f1fc079486&_e=_WD-UTddYxwb9-nCu1IgEGXQ0DgwJd5F00z60eg-RMbwMqbzZn0fdtajB03JWhYKTAayXZTk5IzA90fY_Iv_Op0EOJDQ4sXRNNDWn1nNyZMYGhh76b6vBX1EMlu9nYrArDXiDZNug1OnXZGuk-mKN1UEnuPxrBsvT7Pw5JY7PUMe-buzKJCoPSz-yo3Ui9ATPoed8Uhp3WZe1EJ_otyVqfILBvFoyhK1EZvPJIyFtMPGWPID-DE_v3oDKpf1KBroS6Gx7Q35-nz5hzmZTjDv_hJzc6FLT9HGJGQbYdSPgA1vdTbU_-zQx1aRaa5VqDOe-BNehhriaDqqLfLDeYWbaMqQlLUcfRrtT6MbbgOKHwZ1qX0VFHYWXYreurvwolzxEFa9PeRscCi3hH-3oty7Tw%3D%3D)

Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. **When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you.**

I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. _And believe me, there are some tales._

clean_body: I am determined to take on the anti-American, radical Left in Washington as Montana’s next U.S. Senator. | | Fellow Conservative, I’ve always known that I was meant to live a life of service, but I could never have imagined that perhaps the toughest mission of my life wouldn’t be as a Navy SEAL but rather as a combat veteran preparing to run for the United States Senate. Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will back my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it. I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read. In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis. Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you. I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. And believe me, there are some tales. I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism. I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why Our homeland is in danger. Not from overseas terrorists but Washington’s radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. This FAR-LEFT liberal agenda is assaulting our society, communities, and the American Dream. The Democrats’ grip on power is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the Senate in 2024, and our path to the Majority runs through this race in Montana. Over the days and weeks ahead, you’ll receive emails from me and my team as we build our campaign. While I don’t want you to feel obligated to interact with each piece of content you receive in your inbox, I kindly ask you to refrain from unsubscribing from our contact list. The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong Republican candidate who can defeat a Democrat in the General Election. *If we fail to flip this Montana seat RED next November, we lose our best chance at a Senate Majority for the next DECADE due to the election map at play. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: Let’s show them where the power REALLY is
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
We deserve a President who’s willing to tell the truth, especially when it’s difficult.

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=it_is_time_to_end_their_smear3&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, **We deserve a President who’s willing to tell the truth** , especially when it’s difficult. Last week I sat down for a private, “off the record” dinner, with members of the press in New York. Since then, the media has launched a desperate smear campaign to continue their efforts to marginalize me in the eyes of the public. These attacks are baseless and fly in the face of my own decades-long history of strong support for the Jewish community, as well as my family’s lifelong support for civil rights. As we all know, the more that my campaign catches on with the American public, the more I will be attacked and smeared by a press whose job it is to marginalize anyone who challenges entrenched interests, such as the military-industrial complex with its endless wars, and Big Pharma with its hijacking of American healthcare. The intensity of their attacks shows they are taking me — and my chances of winning — seriously. **They have stooped to this because their other efforts at silencing me have failed.** We can show them that **these smear tactics won’t work** outside the echo chamber of corporate media. They won’t work, because of supporters like you who see through these tactics that have been used over decades to smear one peace advocate after another. Imagine what they will think when their vicious smear campaign results in **MORE support, not less!** **Peter, I’m asking you to help make that happen.[Let’s show them where the real power is — in the millions of Americans like you who support a presidential candidate willing to tell them the truth. ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=it_is_time_to_end_their_smear3&n=2)** | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=it_is_time_to_end_their_smear3&n=3 "Give $5 ->") [Give $5 ->](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=it_is_time_to_end_their_smear3&n=3)

[Organization trains Veterans, service members in yoga, meditation to alleviate military stressors](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z19m37hh27o2vv316nr2s1eh6r4hfo4imkfdtqno_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr2d9j6kprct9jmkrncst66uqrf8j0c9j6f837cui61pt7m9rj8ctkmbq32t5nmeqq2sjk6iprctd3ekonacjk6er7b9jl69pn9dhl6miraddi6kp7ctd4meqq9ttn6gqqbd9h6ion8cbkmuprb8bnmmi33cdl6dqb8cbl6mir9cdkm5q34t7lkpon4t9meprr4tjnk8gq48bi4bh28or0sjjm2or1c9ge49fg)

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Colorado Politics Exposed PART 2: The Well-Oiled (and Well-Funded) Democrat Machine
body:
Episode #15 of Unleashed with Heidi Ganahl is LIVE!
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aaiyn-tkwdjuidt-r/) Hi Peter, In 2006 and 2008, Colorado experienced a political shift like never before. While the Republican Party was facing challenges nationwide, what occurred in Colorado was a unique phenomenon. A group of four wealthy progressive donors disregarded the state Democratic establishment and established a privately funded political infrastructure.For Part 2 of Colorado Politics Exposed, I did a deep dive into the well-oiled (and well-funded) Democrat machine here in Colorado and how it's become a potential model for political change nationwide. We're following the money, as well as looking at the consultants, the non-profits, the fake media, and so much more.Stay tuned for this next week's episode where I'll wrap up the series by talking about what conservatives can do to turn things around and find some balance once again in our state.
### **Episode #15 - COLORADO POLITICS EXPOSED (PART 2):
THE WELL-OILED (AND WELL-FUNDED) DEMOCRAT MACHINE**
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aaiyn-tkwdjuidt-y/) [WATCH ON YOUTUBE](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aaiyn-tkwdjuidt-j/) [WATCH ON RUMBLE](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aaiyn-tkwdjuidt-t/) [LISTEN HERE](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aaiyn-tkwdjuidt-i/) _Not into podcasts? I post transcripts of my monologues and full episode breakdowns every week on my Substack.[You can subscribe here!](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aaiyn-tkwdjuidt-d/)_
## **" TOP KITTY" MAVERICK SAYS TO VOTE WITH YOUR DOLLAR:**
Our new *Top Gun* kitty Maverick definitely approves of [Ultra Right Dad's Woke-Free Beer](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aaiyn-tkwdjuidt-h/)! Remember, friends. Hold the line and VOTE WITH YOUR DOLLAR. Find local freedom-loving businesses through apps like [PublicSq.](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aaiyn-tkwdjuidt-k/) and switch all of your household products to American-made products (including hormone + antibiotic-free beef) by going to [https://patriotswitch.com/heidi](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aaiyn-tkwdjuidt-b/). Someone from my team will get you set up! [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aaiyn-tkwdjuidt-n/) Have a great week, folks!Heidi [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aaiyn-tkwdjuidt-p/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aaiyn-tkwdjuidt-x/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aaiyn-tkwdjuidt-m/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aaiyn-tkwdjuidt-c/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aaiyn-tkwdjuidt-q/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aaiyn-tkwdjuidt-a/) | Heidi GanahlLone Tree, CO [Preferences](https://heidi4gov.updatemyprofile.com/i-aaiyn-66AAC70D-tkwdjuidt-f) | [Unsubscribe](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-u-aaiyn-tkwdjuidt-z/)

There’s nothing quite like being with the PATRIOTS of our country who are fired up to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! That’s what our movement is all about: a pure and unapologetic love for our country. On Inauguration Day 2025, we will have a tough job ahead of ourselves to fix the horrendous mess left by Crooked Joe and Kamala Harris. But I have complete faith that our America First movement will get the job done and SAVE AMERICA! With a near 40-POINT LEAD in the Republican primary, now is the time for Republicans EVERYWHERE to unite behind the frontrunner and the ONLY candidate who can beat Crooked Joe – your all-time favorite president, me. | Thank you, | Donald J. | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T49422119-da4f-4ccb-902e-63f3854990d1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Team Parkinson
subject: 2023 Q2 VA-US-Sen Fundraising Report
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Parkinson for Senate
body:
| | |
---
FROM: Ethan Zorfas- Axiom StrategiesRE: 2023 Q2 VA-US-Sen Fundraising ReportDate: July 19, 2023
---
|
---
_**Overview**_** ** Just months into his campaign, Scott Parkinson is already the front runner to receive the Republican nomination for US Senate in Virginia. In his first fundraising quarter since announcing his candidacy on April 3, Scott Parkinson dominated the rest of the Virginia Republican US Senate field and raised over $362,000, which is twice as much as all of the money raised this quarter by the rest of the Republican field -- combined. Parkinson had a burn rate of only 7.5% which resulted in over $335,000 cash-on-hand, which is also more cash-on-hand than the rest of the Republican field -- combined. The graph below shows the total receipts from Q2 as well as the cash-on-hand for each candidate at the conclusion of the quarter on June 30. **Virginia US Senate- 2023 Q2: April 1 to June 30 Fundraising Totals**
---
---
Below is a compilation of the announced candidates for U.S. Senate in Virginia who had to file an FEC report in accordance with quarterly filing deadlines. Outside of Scott Parkinson who has $335,250, no one else in the race has over $57,350 cash-on-hand. This indicates Scott’s determination to raise money while saving a large amount to run a robust “get-out-the-vote” (GOTV) strategy as well as execute a strong media plan. While Jonathan Emord was the only other candidate to reach $100,000 this quarter, he only raised $18,185 from individual donors, giving $103,000 to his own campaign over the course of the fundraising quarter. In addition, Emord has already spent over $500,000, spending nearly $80,000 printing books for his campaign. When comparing the burn rate of Scott with that of his competitors, it shows that Scott has done the best job of establishing a foundation for his campaign. His campaign continues to build while the other candidates are spending as fast as they can raise the money. According to his filings, Garcia raised just over $40,000 this quarter from individuals and paid nearly $50,000 in disbursements before donating $2,000 to his campaign in May and loaning his campaign $30,000 at the end of the quarter. Scott’s strong quarter will also make things very difficult for former Congressional candidate Hung Cao, who just announced the official launch of his campaign on July 18, 2023. Cao will start with just $57,350 cash-on-hand.
---
---
_**Conclusion**_ Through his first fundraising quarter since entering the race, Scott Parkinson is clearly in the strongest position to not just win the Primary Election, but also defeat Tim Kaine to become the next Senator from Virginia. The strong cash-on-hand, coupled with the momentum surrounding the campaign puts Scott in the best position moving forward as he now will have more ability to amplify his message to reach all Virginians headed into 2024.
---
###
---

subject: Together, we just made history
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/q-cutaVRLFthh-29JFJCSaZavseetnyQ4Ekf6xggh2Q=/oZ8ZuYjBhQwPQK3TjvHly7tS6s2cHuzNRhl7VhsqPYc=) Dear Peter, **We just made history.** I am proud to announce that we have raised a quarter of a million dollars in our first NYS filing of the campaign. This is the most money _EVER _raised in this filing period for North Hempstead Town Supervisor.
> There is a palpable energy in North Hempstead and voters are ready to bring honesty and integrity back to local government. It takes an incredible group of individuals like you, coming together, to achieve extraordinary things. I am humbled by your support, and will continue to work as hard as I can for our community.
Thank you, Jon Kaiman

# WEDNESday, JULY 19, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** Today in 1980, the Moscow Summer Olympics held its opening ceremony, boycotted by 66 nations in protest over the Soviet invasion of Afghanistan. When it comes to Russia, some things never change.

In today's edition, we're talking about prosecutors targeting Donald Trump in their investigation into the events of Jan. 6, 2021, the end of the trademark battle over "Taco Tuesday," and the sale of an antique, never-used iPhone for $190,000.

## Trump Targeted by Jan. 6 Grand Jury
Donald Trump said on Tuesday that he received a [letter from the Special Counsel's office ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2SsyAUQJ8GOxx-FENB8TV2-dotHcRLvFkUB2508vY72Xrbc5oz5-s-3T0m3B___QaOYp58IDxhEgOXlis9qWZxEUCBbsBJc7OD6Qatm9Wp6LulDzcppfRBxt4amK2wuuv9PFto0CmhtBjkB5petxFADspLLYJY5mhYJ2BByqV9ZtxphZje-YTShrw1ya1ER2X6H1MjU-N1Xe0-hx2u-vFMjUdOSBgqUyOV13bw6t-VV14gAJ6wcPLlAcQTEEHh9YCAPvGQX3uFxJ8-fPO6Ia28hN1bZaxsiluOC1PCagbWicfmMf3m0N93fgIAAP__52Ro_Q)naming him a "target" of the ongoing Grand Jury investigation into the events of Jan. 6, 2021.

A target letter often means an indictment will soon follow. Trump said the letter gave him four days to report to the grand jury. If it happens, this would be his third indictment this year.

An indictment in this case would be [the most serious](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2O6yAQRp8GOiL-AnFBcRt3ue2WFguDPREGy554lbdfJfW23yedI52v-3SPWLHN_-MKgUqfYiI8YZJeqEFoM2meQwHQYDgE5W6Dd9Ybw5dQrLyVmOQ1laJvYNM1-phcHkDG4orlGLTURno1yMG4q7kUAOV1VEYmmb-LY1ZCRur75dGx0QKlvvoJ-yX1ldewEG0HM_-YHpkeaYEFa31_TI9br5heTI8tEvYWqzggPXek92aVNEoaQftz3UTrhAUhiwUEHoLiPgMJbCL3xyEesQknsJ1wEM4fGNMj30PefrBWPJxnVs5rxI-a09-VfgMAAP__R2FrDA) Trump has faced because it involves potential charges of "insurrection" at the Capitol. A conviction could mean Trump would be ineligible to hold office again.
## FAA Approves Air Taxi Plan for 2028
Federal regulators released a five-year plan Tuesday that would allow air-taxi services to be [flying passengers around U.S. cities](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7Fu7CAQQNGvwR0WDBjsguI17va1KS1sBnsiDCtDdrP5-iip01_p6rzdlpunRHn_7090LZbFb40euAjL5cRBLdAFFxEBVYdOmnGyRlulusMBjGs0qx5BSrPGiCKqMG7jNFi5hWA7ciBACSsnMSkzqD4iSgteKrGJsEbDtMBArVz9e6HcDozpVR549Vs5u-SO1u6VqX8MZgZzpOzzhv3LH6X8FAzmjM_KYPZ08eY_qfKKmPlXKSflnX9ULkc9DEZr2x_tTN3lwv1JKVE1lmmxn57S76z9bf8OAAD__wDeWsw) by 2028.

The Federal Aviation Administration proposal would essentially use existing flight rules for helicopters and low-flying aircraft to set up "taxi corridors" in the skies for new VTOL (Vertical Takeoff and Landing) passenger crafts.

The plan addresses [various crucial issues](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGOpSAUgOGnwQ4DBxUpLLaxu9tuaY540LPBiwHmOvftJzP19H_yJ9-_x_JAjvzc_-JJUw1pQV_5RYuyUjsJZoFmmwIRkGlo0sPo7NBZY5pjWrswOhhNb512euz8qpWz2IfVeFDj0PAECoyy2ilnht60gUhbQG2UV9saBtEp2rim3P5P_KwHhfhOL8qtT2cTp6PWqwjzR8AsYL7vuw2R96PuMa0YvyMBM3IOGU_KRcAcEGWmSFioyCviU9Yky8d1pVwlcpYVP7lIrLJ4jCTXtwQFo4BZ950edIu5so_U5Gm7bo6Ry2BFp_YT-WfY1N-RvgIAAP__fLFoxg), including certifying pilots and aircraft, managing airspace access, developing infrastructure, and maintaining security.
## Powerball Hits $1 Billion for Tonight's Drawing
The Powerball jackpot [reached $1 billion](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LtuwyAUgOGnwRsWF8eEgaGLt3TtaHE5jkkxxzIk1G9fpXP3b_j1f93mm40p5vun3cDUBWfra3zBzBTlmgo5iy6YBUCA7MDw8arVOCgpu9XYYXTiGgITWsJFW629GkRwnklgnrsuGsGEZIprpuV4kf0CwJWwXDLPgltGMjAIseLRPzDmusKSTnzB0XvcumTWWvdC5AcRExFTa61f8Mc9S8xQytsQMYHHjNtJxLRjg8PZlOjD-u8dK-XUxZQiZrphDvYsNBy2xXynkEOhLdYVn5W2mDMc3WHC3t6-jIoM7L7ZmP5C6v9ffgMAAP__r15n8w) for tonight's drawing after no winning tickets were drawn on Monday -- though eight people won $1 million or more by having five of the correct numbers.

This is only the third time the Powerball lottery has hit $1 billion. The winner [would receive $516 million](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO6yAQRb_G7hwNDIZQULwmXV67pTXAkJAlxsIoVv5-la23uro6zdH5ui5XyiWvt__0ZNdTXSj0_OIFzCTsJHGRY3SJWTKO7IQ-W6OVQRzv7ozAFKWCEFUgTgqFSuA9RPR6TnbMToJEMMKCRT3jKTELI0kgBIg-6UEBx9xrOz1qXvudU3nXF7dTqM-xuHvv2z7gv0FeBnmhbeVj_6DPaT2HwoO8bPXg5qmUqdTeub2n2OjI621qef_Mg8L3VvvkyQNJAqEi2llGUsr6GfVZcAozqbG5uB25lLxrMyi4PSmXX5P-d5ifAAAA__90HWUB) before taxes if taken as a one-time lump sum.

The largest Powerball payout in history was a $2 billion payout last November, but no one has won since April. The odds of buying the winning ticket is 1 in 292 million.

clean_body: Donald Trump said on Tuesday that he received a letter from the Special Counsel's office naming him a "target" of the ongoing Grand Jury investigation into the events of Jan. 6, 2021. | | | - | | | WEDNESday, JULY 19, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today in 1980, the Moscow Summer Olympics held its opening ceremony, boycotted by 66 nations in protest over the Soviet invasion of Afghanistan. When it comes to Russia, some things never change. In today's edition, we're talking about prosecutors targeting Donald Trump in their investigation into the events of Jan. 6, 2021, the end of the trademark battle over "Taco Tuesday," and the sale of an antique, never-used iPhone for $190,000. Think we could improve something? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover** and let us know. We appreciate hearing from our readers! If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying The Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, -. | Trump Targeted by Jan. 6 Grand Jury Donald Trump said on Tuesday that he received a him a "target" of the ongoing Grand Jury investigation into the events of Jan. 6, 2021. A target letter often means an indictment will soon follow. Trump said the letter gave him four days to report to the grand jury. If it happens, this would be his third indictment this year. An indictment in this case would be Trump has faced because it involves potential charges of "insurrection" at the Capitol. A conviction could mean Trump would be ineligible to hold office again. FAA Approves Air Taxi Plan for 2028 Federal regulators released a five-year plan Tuesday that would allow air-taxi services to be by 2028. The Federal Aviation Administration proposal would essentially use existing flight rules for helicopters and low-flying aircraft to set up "taxi corridors" in the skies for new VTOL (Vertical Takeoff and Landing) passenger crafts. The plan addresses , including certifying pilots and aircraft, managing airspace access, developing infrastructure, and maintaining security. Powerball Hits $1 Billion for Tonight's Drawing The Powerball jackpot for tonight's drawing after no winning tickets were drawn on Monday -- though eight people won $1 million or more by having five of the correct numbers. This is only the third time the Powerball lottery has hit $1 billion. The winner before taxes if taken as a one-time lump sum. The largest Powerball payout in history was a $2 billion payout last November, but no one has won since April. The odds of buying the winning ticket is 1 in 292 million. Democratic Rep. Pramila Jayapal labeled Israel a "racist state" over the weekend, sparking the move. () ➤ A U.S. soldier facing military discipline for assault was arrested by North Korea after he fled across the border from South Korea. The soldier is the first American detained by North Korea in nearly five years. () ➤ The White House will announce $1.3 billion in new military aid to Ukraine this week. The weapons include air defenses and exploding drones and will be bought from contractors rather than pulled from military inventory. () ➤ Democrats are planning another push to censure GOP Rep. George Santos, who faces federal election charges. This time, enough Republicans have agreed to give the Democrats hope the disciplinary measure will pass. () Flying together with: - Stay Salty? Since the 1940s, we've been told to drink 8 glasses of water a day, but hydrating only with plain water can dilute your electrolyte levels. That can lead to headaches, low energy, brain fog, and more. , pronounced "element," an electrolyte drink mix that has everything you need and nothing you don't. NO Sugar NO Gluten NO Dodgy Ingredients restore health through hydration and has created a formula perfectly suited for folks doing intermittent fasting or following a low-carb, whole-food diet. Ready to hydrate your body the right way? All Flyover readers pack of eight flavors today with any purchase, with a no-questions-asked refund policy. ➤ Daniel**Weinman won the 2023 World Series of Poker against a field of over 10,000 players, taking home $12.1 million in prize money. He won the final hand after going all-in with a $38 million bet. () ➤ Australia** canceled its plans to host the 2026 Commonwealth Games, potentially sounding the death knell for the international competition. Officials said the cost had ballooned to over $4 billion, too much to justify. (-) ➤ Soccer superstar Lionel Messi showed up for his first practice with his new Inter Miami teammates, bringing news drones and 200 reporters along with him. His first game will be Friday, with the best seats going for nearly $20,000. () Market Report 7/18/23 | ▲ | NASDAQ Natl. The stock has dropped nearly 50% in two days. () ➤ The phrase "Taco Tuesday" is now free for use by anyone, as long as it's not in New Jersey. Taco John's gave up its fight against Taco Bell to protect its trademark on the phrase, but Gregory's Restaurant & Bar in New Jersey is still battling. () ➤ Microsoft stock rose nearly 6% after the company announced a new AI subscription service for Microsoft 365. The company will charge an extra $30 to add generative AI to tools like Word, Excel, and Teams. () Flying together with our sponsor After years of making his own electrolyte blends, frustrated with healthy options on the market, Wolf used his experience as a biochemist to create his own product. Scientists have devised a new strategy for ensuring that any messages we receive from outer space come from the stars and not from earthly radio interference. Llama can be downloaded at no charge by developers to build into other applications. () Flying together with our sponsor ➤ Love the Flyover? name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Animal abuse by Big Ag
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1883516?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Animals are enduring UNIMAGINABLE CRUELTY at factory farms right now!** **It could get even worse without your help! >>** **[Take action now! ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1883517?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** Picture this: mama pigs shoved into crates so small they _**can’t even turn around!**_ Hens confined to cages too that _**don’t allow them to spread their wings!**_ Some of these animals will never feel the sun or the freedom of an open pasture before they’re _**mercilessly slaughtered.**_ The good news is that many states have animal welfare laws preventing factory farms from committing some of the most abusive practices. **But a bill in Congress could REVERSE HUNDREDS of state laws, including these protections for animals.** [**Please, Friend, take just 30 seconds to tell Congress to oppose the EATS Act and SAVE innocent animals from inhumane treatment! Add your name by 11:59pm TONIGHT!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1883518?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1883519?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The filthy, cramped conditions in these industrial operations are **prime breeding grounds for bacteria and disease.** And the diseases won’t just affect animals – they can spread to people too. In fact, some scientists predict this could be the _**source of the next pandemic!**_
We can’t allow Republicans in Congress to repeal the few anti-animal cruelty laws for farm animals that exist. But this is a _**DANGEROUSLY REAL**_ possibility – and **that’s why we need your help!** [**Tell Congress: OPPOSE the EATS Act and keep animal welfare laws intact! >> **](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1883520?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1883519?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Chloë Waterman
Climate-friendly food senior program manager,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Alan Dershowitz
subject: The Sun's re-emergence is a gift...
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWFEYGXDHN

In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced
first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad
journalism....

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWFEYGXDHN

FROM THE
DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ

Dear
friend,

In over
sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand
the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism - mostly
the latter - and just how important and rare it is to get things
right.

In
today's media landscape there are far too many publications that
get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political
implications of a story than the basic facts.

The New
York Sun is different. It's a paper that places principle over
politics and people over party.

Its
in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President
Trump serve as a case in point.

When I
defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an
avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to
fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun's
deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky
and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the
Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be
first rate.

It will
be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can
be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that
its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments
in American journalism.

I've been
impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an
uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

The Sun's
success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of
truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage
you to join the Sun today.

Join the
Sun Now →

Every
person matters in this effort.

Don't
wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.

Alan
Dershowitz

Columnist, The New York Sun

Join the
Sun Now →

| | Save Virginia, Save America Weekly Roundup
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | Friend, The campaign to Save Virginia and Save America continued this past week with a presentation at the Staunton Conservative Lunch; a meeting with Augusta County Sheriff Donald L. Smith; an appearance at the Do No Harm conference; an interview on the Robert Scott Bell Show; a meeting with the Falun Gong; a presentation at the Nhan Huynh for Delegate Kick-Off Event;and an appearance at the Regional Republicans Picnic.
---
| | |
---
| | Straw Poll Results
---
| | [](https://www.emordforva.com/so/beObbMufT/c?w=1u9qovn1zCioz0IlwFuAUJ-JMD9xGqX9iqwdeQrHLuU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9lbW9yZGZvcnZhL2RvbmF0ZSIsInIiOiIyODRiMWI1OS00NmEyLTQ2NmYtZjYzMi02MWUxNjI2ZmQ3NDQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI4MTAwMWVmMi0xODkxLTQwZjAtYmY3ZC1iMmE2YzZmNWNlZTIifQ)
---
| | |
---
| | | [**Contribute Now**](https://www.emordforva.com/so/beObbMufT/c?w=zL08bQmcxlzwISKvGznQ74ljRAtd-byxUHFXCSpbs9s.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9lbW9yZGZvcnZhL2RvbmF0ZSIsInIiOiI3NjJhN2JiNC03ZWZlLTRlNGUtZTAyMy1jMzU2Y2IxMmYwYzgiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI4MTAwMWVmMi0xODkxLTQwZjAtYmY3ZC1iMmE2YzZmNWNlZTIifQ)
---
| | |
---
| | Visit to Staunton
---
| | On July 12, I addressed some sixty patriots at the Staunton Conservative Lunch in Staunton, Virginia. I am so very grateful for their strong statements of support for our campaign.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | Back the Blue Initiative
---
| |
---
|
---
| | On July 12, I had the privilege of meeting a great law enforcement leader who serves the people of Augusta County faithfully and well, Augusta County Sheriff Donald L. Smith. I was introduced to Sheriff Smith by another remarkable Augusta County leader, County Chair David Bourne. Sheriff Smith provided me keen insights into problems confronting the Sheriff’s office, which will be resolved in part by measures instituted under our Back the Blue Initiative and by additional measures we are pleased to sponsor in support of more effective policing, arrest of criminals, and prosecutions in the Commonwealth and across the nation. See my press release,[ US Senate Candidate Emord announces Back the Blue Legislative Initiative to provide support for law enforcement.](https://www.emordforva.com/so/beObbMufT/c?w=S7zrNYzU4tGWvhMLax3DidCyHv3O-TU2YyAB12mLtBA.)
---
| | |
---
| | Ban Gender-Affirming Care for Our Youths
---
| | On July 12, we expressed our support for, and we're edified by, Dr. Stanley Goldfarb of Do No Harm. Dr. Goldfarb explained the ruinous effects of woke policies in medical education. Among the acts of destruction of quality medical care he described were those pertaining to the performance of hysterectomies, mastectomies, and castration on childrenin “gender-affirming care.” Dr. Goldfarb considers those practices abhorrent and contrary to the duty of physicians to “do no harm.” We explained to Dr. Goldfarb that as Virginia’s next U.S.Senator, I will sponsor legislation to make it a federal felony for anyone to aid or cause the transitioning of anyone under the age of 18.
---
| | |
---
| | In The News
---
| | On July 13, I was interviewed, as I am weekly, on the Robert Scott Bell Show. We discussed pressing national and international issues affecting government, law, and policy.
---
| | | [**Watch the Interview Here**](https://www.emordforva.com/so/beObbMufT/c?w=xy4k_qIiMdrMUjIz5oK-kIND7b_SMSdTsigrB0rojbk.)
---
| | |
---
| | Meeting with Falun Gong
---
| |
---
| | On July 14, I had the privilege of meeting representatives of Falun Gong, a religion practiced by tens of millions in China. Falun Gong members are being denied religious liberty and are being imprisoned in “re-education” and labor camps by the Chinese Communist Party (CCP). Those in CCP camps are subjected to torture, slave labor, and organ harvesting, among other atrocities. Certain products sold in the United States are derived from slave labor. It is high time we denied profit from slave labor by vigorously enforcing Section 307 of the Tariff Act of 1930 (19 USC Sect. 1307) which prohibits the importation of merchandise produced in whole or part by forcedlabor.
---
| | |
---
| | My Endorsement for VA-9
---
| | On July 15, I was privileged to endorse Nhan Huynh for VA-9 Delegate at his campaign kick-off event in Chantilly, Virginia. Nhan fled communist Vietnam having been subjected to brutalcommunist indoctrination, slave labor and starvation conditions in one of the Vietnam Communitst Party’s “New Economic Zones.” His experience under communism led him to an unwavering love of liberty, the Declaration of Independence, and the U.S. Constitution. He became an American citizen and is now seeking to defend Virginians against the ravages of wokeindoctrination in the schools, to defend Virginia parents’ rights, and to end the anti-incarceration agenda. He is a strong advocate of free enterprise.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | Regional Republican Picnic in Staunton, Virginia
---
| | On July 15, the Emord Team attended the Regional Republican Picnic in Staunton, Virginia. Many of the attendees met us at the Staunton Conservatives Lunch. They and several individualswe met for the first time expressed support for our campaign. We are grateful for that support. One gentleman in attendance suffered a fall and lacerations, bled profusely, and was in need ofmedical attention. Nurses at the event gave him excellent first aid. Among those assisting were Emord Team members Jackie Solomon and Marilyn Edwards. Jackie not only drove the injuredman to Augusta Health Center in a driving rain, but stayed with him during his stay in the ER. We are grateful for the great example set by Jackie Solomon. She provided a vital act ofcompassionate service. We are monitoring the health of the patient and can report that he is recovering at home.
---

**VIDEO TRANSCRIPT:**
**Loomer:** Hey, everybody. Welcome to a new episode of Loomer Unleashed. I'm your host, Laura Loomer. And on today's episode, we're going to be talking about how Fox News owner Rupert Murdoch has soured on Ron DeSantis, who was once his pick to defeat Donald Trump as the GOP nominee in 2024. Now, if you've been following my Substack and reading my investigative reports over these last few months, then you know, and you're very well aware of the fact that Rupert Murdoch is extremely anti-Trump.
**Loomer:** In fact, some of Murdoch's leaked text messages from the Dominion versus Fox News lawsuit in the discovery dump reveal text messages that Rupert Murdoch sent his son, as well as other board members of Fox News, including Paul Ryan, that said he wanted to "unperson" Donald Trump ahead of the 2024 election. These text messages also revealed that Rupert Murdoch does not believe that the 2020 election was stolen, and he proclaimed that he wanted to do everything in his power to make sure Donald Trump was not the nominee in 2024.
**Loomer:** And then, of course, there were news reports that showed Rupert Murdoch invited Ron DeSantis out to his ranch in California, where he promised the Governor of Florida that he could count on Rupert Murdoch's entire media empire, the News Corp empire, which includes Fox News, New York Post, HarperCollins Publishing and the Wall Street Journal to get behind his campaign for president.
**Loomer:** But, now it looks like Rupert Murdoch is changing his tune, because as every single day goes by, Ron DeSantis continues to fall in the polls. And now recent polling shows that Ron DeSantis only has about 17% support from Republican primary voters. Ouch! National polling currently shows Donald Trump with a 40 point lead over Ron DeSantis, and as the undisputed GOP front runner leading up to the 2024 GOP convention.
**Loomer:** Now, it doesn't take a rocket scientist or a high dollar political strategist to tell you that Ron DeSantis has no shot in hell up against Donald Trump of securing the nomination. But you see, that's where Ron DeSantis, his advisors and donors, and people like Rupert Murdoch went wrong. These people greatly underestimated Donald Trump the same way that they underestimated him in 2016.
**Loomer:** They thought to themselves, gee, you know, Donald Trump's going to get indicted. Maybe he'll get convicted, he's going to get arrested, and that's going to make his poll numbers drop. But the exact opposite happened, actually. And the more that Donald Trump gets persecuted...and the more indictments that he receives...and the more times that President Trump is targeted in these egregious witch hunts, the more he continues to skyrocket in the polls.
**Loomer:** So this has backfired gloriously on Rupert Murdoch and all of the other billionaire GOP establishment donors who are working overtime to make sure that Donald Trump is not the nominee. Adding insult to injury in what looks like, in my opinion, to be a planted story, who knows? Maybe Rupert Murdoch planted the story with Rolling Stone. There's a report out that shows that Murdoch is souring on Ron DeSantis because he can "smell a loser", and isn't impressed with Ron DeSantis and his inability to connect with the voters.
**Loomer:** If you've been following my report over these last few months, you'll see I've been documenting how biased Fox News has been towards Donald Trump, even going so far as refusing to cover his rallies while they cover all of Ron DeSantis' events on the campaign trail live. But now, even Fox News hosts are taking shots at Ron DeSantis.
**Loomer:** And this week, Ron DeSantis faced additional questions from other Fox News hosts who pressed the Governor of Florida on his inability to connect with voters and how he sees this panning out on a long term basis throughout the campaign trail. In fact, Ron DeSantis' poll numbers are so abysmal that Vivek Ramaswamy, who's also running for president on the GOP ticket and doesn't have nearly as much of a campaign war chest as Ron DeSantis, is only six points behind Ron DeSantis.
**Loomer:** So perhaps he's going to come up the middle and snag second place from Ron DeSantis, and maybe we'll see Ron DeSantis finish third or perhaps even fourth behind Chris Christie in the GOP primary. It's rather ironic that Rupert Murdoch is now all of a sudden souring on Ron DeSantis, because as I also previously reported, it was Rupert Murdoch who owns HarperCollins Publishing that gave Ron DeSantis his multimillion dollar book deal and book advance during his shadow presidential campaign, which he, of course, pretended was a book tour.
**Loomer:** And if you recall, on the very first day of Ron DeSantis's book release on the first day of his book tour, he visited Leesburg, Florida, just 15 minutes down the road from where I live. He actually had the cops called on me and a fellow group of Trump supporters who decided to show up outside of his book signing with Trump signs.
**Loomer:** So from the very beginning, Ron DeSantis was always running for President. And his little book deal from Rupert Murdoch was clearly just a way to line his pockets. Because if you look at the recent expenditure reports, Ron DeSantis went from having a net worth as Governor of Florida of $350,000, and just months later he's now worth over $1,000,000.
**Loomer:** Talk about a payday! And I'm sure over time that the financial disclosure forms are going to reveal Ron DeSantis received an even bigger payout than just $1,000,000. Ron DeSantis's inability to communicate with everyday Americans on the campaign trail is so glaring and so shocking that it has even prompted autism advocates to pen articles and question whether or not Governor Ron DeSantis is on the spectrum and has a form of autism.
**Loomer:** No, this isn't a joke. There are actually mainstream media articles written about whether or not it's appropriate to talk about Ron DeSantis being on the spectrum. These are serious issues that Ron DeSantis and his advisors are going to have to come to terms with. Is the Governor of Florida going to continue to abandon Floridians and be an absentee Governor?
**Loomer:** Is he going to continue to waste hundreds of millions of dollars of donors' hard earned money? Or will he come to his senses and step aside and recognize the fact that Donald Trump is the only choice and the best choice for the 2024 GOP nominee for president? Now that the writing is on the wall for Ron DeSantis, it's only a matter of time before Rupert Murdoch and News Corp get behind another GOP establishment RINO.
**Loomer:** Perhaps they'll put their money and their resources behind Georgia Governor Brian Kemp. Or maybe they'll put their resources behind Virginia Governor Glenn Youngkin. The fact of the matter is, we know from Rupert Murdoch's own text messages that his mission is to make Donald Trump a non-person. And so you can guarantee Rupert Murdoch, Fox News, the New York Post, Wall Street Journal and all of the other Rupert Murdoch owned publications are going to commit their resources and attention to defeating Donald Trump and preventing him from securing the GOP nomination in 2024. You can take it to the bank.
**Loomer:** And that's why investigative journalism, like the journalism I'm providing you with now, is so important, because it's crucial that voters like you have these facts so you can understand how you're being manipulated by the media. How many of you knew that Rupert Murdoch owned not just Fox News, but also owned The New York Post, Wall Street Journal, as well as the publishing company that gave Ron DeSantis his multimillion dollar book deal?
**Loomer:** These are egregious conflicts of interest, and it's one of the many ways that the media shovels their propaganda, their bias and their election interference down our throats in an effort to have selections as opposed to uninhibited elections in this country decided by We the People.

| Dear Reader, If you have any U.S. dollars in your bank account... You must see **[this shocking video exposing the government's new plan to recall the U.S. dollar.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28344%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vzvTLIzDWLF9DOEw9EmPTQ&sysid=1)** The official announcement could come as soon as July 26. clean_body: Introducing my Lieutenant Governor! | | | | | Friends, I’m so excited to announce State Senator Robby Mills of Henderson as my pick to serve as the next lieutenant governor of the Commonwealth of Kentucky. Kentucky deserves a lieutenant governor who will champion Conservative values, safeguard our freedoms, and serve with the utmost integrity. That person is Robby Mills. For Kentucky, Daniel Cameron | | | | Paid For By Cameron For Kentucky
