name: Jon Tester
subject: I have an opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Folks,

A self-funding GOP recruit hand-picked by Mitch McConnell just jumped in
the race for Montana’s Senate seat. Experts are saying Montana could
decide Senate control, so we have to act ASAP.

This is a critical turning point in our race and we’re about to see a
flood of outside money and attacks rush into Montana. You can bet
far-right groups will spend unprecedented amounts to attack me and mislead
voters.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19001?t=1001&akid=3412%2E346206%2EG_df_V ]Montana is 2024’s most important Senate race and with so much on the
line, we cannot afford to lose. Rush a split donation between Charles
Booker and my campaign to help us raise the funds we need to beat the GOP
and protect this seat.

CHIP IN →

There has never been a more important time for you to step up than right
now.

— Jon

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19001?t=1002&akid=3412%2E346206%2EG_df_V ][IMG]

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3412%2E346206%2EG_df_V

From: CAPT Hung Cao

Subject: MAJOR Announcement
---
[](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=ad56ba17a8ad4ced8afc9f93b891ec7d&_e=T7yv5FZGiJZxpBA3rzEwId7qupZ39ACH_BFW28whgC7ZOCO_CD0dkZDvFFeX89EbzxFIBBovjLIcv53FQsy2yCu_0hg13YT7ngrU5JcstxF6C5fZ_iZJ9Rox9UTqJ1q2e-Ni1m2M899tDlGSYIVEq0E4Iuv_fdewzQJANKZTY8byCK0YiS8knLWWj4iWJENPVblUqGa1IYnusvxGQUYL0pkm2NXTl9BVi7HWt6sK5geH9pUDWOlxYadBzLmTTj7tdf40x6xtMdDqE7CTpUUGQYcDPbnT-6MN4KXmZNMeiOPYRAVIzOQHXhlfTOYpuFyw5kkppadsGBMOZ68GfaKuYfWwbYoCsbMMZDZP69xoKmg%3D)

Peter, I would like for you to be the first to know about a major decision I have made.

**After much prayer with my family, I am announcing today, my campaign for the U.S. Senate for the Commonwealth of Virginia.**

As a Navy Special Operations Officer, I put my life on the line defending this country and led our troops into some of the most dangerous corners of the world, from Iraq to Afghanistan to Somalia.

But after a 25-year naval career, I’m taking our fight to our homeland to defend our freedom and the American Dream against radical Left politicians who want to destroy them.

You were an incredible part of our last mission, and now, we’re on a new one that I can’t wait to embark on with you.

It’s time we restore OUR Virginia and save OUR country. [**Will you watch our announcement video now and help me stand up for America?**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=ad56ba17a8ad4ced8afc9f93b891ec7d&_e=T7yv5FZGiJZxpBA3rzEwId7qupZ39ACH_BFW28whgC7ZOCO_CD0dkZDvFFeX89EbzxFIBBovjLIcv53FQsy2yCu_0hg13YT7ngrU5JcstxF6C5fZ_iZJ9Rox9UTqJ1q2e-Ni1m2M899tDlGSYIVEq0E4Iuv_fdewzQJANKZTY8byCK0YiS8knLWWj4iWJENPVblUqGa1IYnusvxGQUYL0it90JGvMUJUYtSeYjnBQwPIHP8oEqsacuveLa5n-DIsFC0k-4vw5SAc-wIPWRp3Uh8pJ6cal3Jlpwl5jZ7rPkWWR2gcZjTzolbrvXQXCUCJ2XwpzuMiEiHV41cksWe3qAWMvV9aRsK-GGqewSejXu8%3D)

clean_body: | | | Peter, We wanted to make sure you didn’t miss the first EVER email from Hung on his mission to take back the U.S. Senate. Our team could not be more grateful for the incredible work you’ve done so far and the response we’ve gotten. Hundreds of patriots have stepped up to join this campaign, and each one is a critical part of our mission. Thank you! Team Cao \-------Forwarded Message------- From: CAPT Hung Cao Date: July 18, 2023 Subject: MAJOR Announcement Peter, I would like for you to be the first to know about a major decision I have made. After much prayer with my family, I am announcing today, my campaign for the U.S. Senate for the Commonwealth of Virginia. As a Navy Special Operations Officer, I put my life on the line defending this country and led our troops into some of the most dangerous corners of the world, from Iraq to Afghanistan to Somalia. But after a 25-year naval career, I’m taking our fight to our homeland to defend our freedom and the American Dream against radical Left politicians who want to destroy them. You were an incredible part of our last mission, and now, we’re on a new one that I can’t wait to embark on with you. It’s time we restore OUR Virginia and save OUR country. As a founding member of Team Cao, your support will be the driving force behind our victory in 2024. We may not have the backing of the entrenched special interest donors that the swamp relies on, but we have something far more powerful: Patriots like YOU. Your unwavering dedication to freedom, the Constitution, and our way of life has been an inspiration, and for that, I am incredibly grateful. With you standing by me, I know we can defeat the Left and take back the U.S. Senate. Let's do this! 🇺🇸💪 In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret)Former Navy Special OperationsCandidate, U.S. Senate (VA) | TEXT HUNG TO 21412 Hung knows the American Dream is worth saving - because he’s lived it. Now, he’s running for Senate to defend it for the next generation. Hung Cao came to America with little besides the clothes on his back, and after his 25-year career in the Navy, he’s not done fighting for our future. If you’re on board for our fight for Virginia, | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. name: Jahana Hayes
subject: Why we’re fundraising now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
Elections are so expensive, especially when we’re fighting against outside money...
I want to send a quick update to my top supporters about why we’re fundraising for my 2024 re-election campaign now.
2024 may sound far away, but in reality, we need to start fundraising now in order to grow a grassroots, people-powered campaign that can oppose the hundreds of thousands' worth of attacks that are already being spent in my district.
As one of the most vulnerable Democrats in the House, we know this race will draw a lot of attention, and your support is so important in having the resources necessary to win!
We did it before and we will do it again. But we need your support now more than ever to ensure I win in 2024 and that we take back the House.
So, if you can, consider chipping in whatever you are able to make sure we keep up with our July fundraising projections.
DONATE » **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCT-05-Email-July2023-FR-July?refcode=E3397-20230719-WhyWeFR-SL-CampaignFinance&amount=25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66701128/417287712/974063209?refcode=E3397-20230719-WhyWeFR-SL-CampaignFinance&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWQzYTcyZC0zNDI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zDaNWW76GTrbL-K6DrVEiwBjvRc2TayRZfvZLdvBBPI=)**

clean_body: | | | | | Friend, I just announced my run for Michigan's 7th Congressional District, and already we're making waves. If you haven't had a chance to see it yet, I really hope you will take a moment to see my first campaign video, titled "Crossroads." America is at a crossroads. Right now we have the choice of allowing Joe Biden to continue taking us down this destructive path, or we can get back on track, and on a path that will put America first and preserve the freedoms that make our country great. We JUST announced, but this race is already getting national attention. The pollsters over at Roll Call have rated this campaign as a pure toss-up, one of the most competitive races in the country. We came just a few points away from winning last year against Biden's top ally in Michigan, Elissa Slotkin. With her looking for a promotion to the U.S. Senate, I believe this is our time to strike, and our chance to make our community safe, grow our economy, secure our border, and get the government out of the way so EVERY American can meet their full potential. Thank you, Tom Barrett | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---

name: Bryce Reeves
subject: Alarming Crime Rates
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS OF BRYCE REEVES
body:
Peter, I wanted to take some time to share something alarming with you that I think my constituents deserve to know. I got a report on my desk earlier this week from the Virginia State Police covering crime statistics in our Commonwealth.
| | |
---
| | [](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/010001896e3eebaf-31341e96-caea-4516-ab72-a7d57231038f-000000/RghfOtgx4U5VcUr0rLY5IfWzM8Q=331)
---
|
---
| Peter, I wanted to take some time to share something alarming with you that I think my constituents deserve to know. I got a report on my desk earlier this week from the Virginia State Police covering crime statistics in our Commonwealth. Unfortunately, as many of us are aware, _things are not looking good._ The murder rate in Virginia has increased, as have instances of crimes such as human trafficking, robbery, and automobile theft. These numbers _continue to balloon_ as the _Democrats in Richmond fight to give cop-killers an early parole._ Not all hope is lost, though. The Republican-controlled Virginia House of Delegates held their own against the extreme, woke-Democrat agenda, but we need help in the Senate. _This November's election is more vital than ever_ before, and we need all the support we can get. Every single member of the Virginia General Assembly is up for re-election, and **it's time to kick the Democrats out.**
---
| As Senate Republican Whip, _it is my responsibility to ensure that we gain the majority this November._ That means assisting our nominees in every way possible, whether it is helping them find good campaign staff or assisting them financially to ensure they are able to get out the vote in their district. In order to be sure I have the funds necessary to guarantee victory this election cycle, _I need your help!_ Please, consider contributing whatever you may be able to via the links below. Virginia is begging for change, and that change requires a Republican-controlled legislature. I plan on doing everything within my power to ensure a red wave this November, but **I can't do it without your help.** Thank you for taking the time to read this, and God bless. Yours in service,
---
| | |
---
| Bryce E. ReevesSenator17th Senatorial District of VA(540) 645-8440

name: Adam Schiff via Blue Amp Action
subject: re: censure vote...
body:
MAGA Republicans officially passed their resolution to censure me.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf750eb73-ce56-4d1a-a7b7-f8aa0d3b2067/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Last month, Kevin McCarthy took up the resolution attacking me for holding Trump accountable. After Trump threatened a primary challenge against any Republican who refused to vote for it, MAGA Republicans officially passed their resolution to censure me. Why? Because I upheld my oath of office and held Donald Trump accountable for his many abuses of power. [They will never silence me — not now and not ever — but I need your help to fight back. If you can, split an urgent $10 contribution to Blue Amp Action and our campaign right now to help us respond to this unprecedented political attack and show the strength of our campaign.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3454c59c-4070-4616-a274-b8619076d1aa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [DONATE NOW >>>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T62e4430c-aba9-4ce1-adb4-7575c0a17aad/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We face many pressing challenges as a country — affordable housing, access to health care, creating jobs, and so much more. Instead of addressing any of these challenges, Kevin McCarthy chose to take up this MAGA effort to distract from Donald Trump’s legal problems. They will never stop doing his bidding. We've already known that the GOP is completely unhinged and beholden to Donald Trump. With his call now to imprison me and primary any Republican who didn’t vote to censure me, Trump is telling the entire Republican Party that they must seek retribution against me politically and do whatever they can to prevent me from being elected to the Senate. This is not just a political stunt to rile up the MAGA base — it’s an attack on all accountability and constitutional oversight. But make no mistake: If they thought this was going to deter me from holding Trump and his accomplices accountable or delivering real results for California and our nation, they thought wrong. I will not stop my fight to put truth and our democracy first — even if it means standing up to a twice-impeached ex-president and his lackeys. [With Kevin McCarthy and MAGA Republicans ramping up their attacks against me, I’m going to need you by my side more than ever. Will you split a grassroots donation of $10 to help Blue Amp Action and me stand up to the GOP’s attacks?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T31f2d005-e60f-499a-b621-937d41133ddd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|

| | | | |
---

---
|

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: American Update
subject: Mandatory U.S. Dollar Recall to Begin on July 26?
body:
If you have any U.S. dollars in your bank account...

| Dear Reader, If you have any U.S. dollars in your bank account... You must see **[this shocking video exposing the government's new plan to recall the U.S. dollar.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662948%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UJx08%2bLmb0ttXWahS1qspQ&sysid=1)** The official announcement could come as soon as July 26. As _Business Insider_ says, this dollar recall "could be imminent." That means if you don’t prepare now... You could end up holding a bunch of worthless U.S. dollars. **[Click here to see the three simple steps you must take now to protect your life savings.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662949%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sD79KuwuxskwzuZfh4%2fuZA&sysid=1)** Regards, Kendall Castillo

name: Andy Kim
subject: Bipartisan legislation sold out for politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
Last week we ended with Republicans clapping and shouting on the House floor after passing a disgusting defense bill that injects the worst elements of partisanship into our national security.

Their legislation contaminates what is traditionally a fiercely bipartisan effort.

A month ago, we passed a defense bill out of the Armed Services Committee with an overwhelming 58-1 bipartisan vote. But then Speaker McCarthy got his hands on it, and he sold it out for politics.

I've been on the Armed Services Committee since I started in Congress. I treasure this process of working to be responsible stewards of our military and national security.

Last week, that tradition was trampled by McCarthy and his caucus.

The hypocrisy of it all is staggering as House Republicans go from "supporting our troops" to jeopardizing military health care and child care.

I have hope that the Senate will stop this toxic effort.

And ultimately, we all will have the power to put an end to this extremism as we head to the ballot box next Fall. We must be ready. We've seen what happens when we don't make our voices heard.

More soon,

Andy

name: =?utf-8?Q?Derek=20Lyons=20=2D=20RITE?=
subject: Happy Anniversary to RITE: One-Year Defending Elections!
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| RITE launched a year ago this month. In its first year, RITE went to court in 13 states to defend elections from partisan influence. Right now, we are litigating lawsuits in ten politically strategic states to preserve elections as the democratic voice of the people.
Below we are highlighting four of our newer initiatives. Read the latest ⬇️ ⬇️ ⬇️
---
|
---
|
# **In Kansas, RITE will Help Halt the Harvest...of Ballots **

In 2021, the Kansas legislature passed House Bill 2332, a law prohibiting out-of-state organizations from sending pre-filled ballot applications. Vote America, an activist organization with a sordid history (involving misappropriated COVID money and being steered by a _**[fraudster who was convicted](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=6515d74ff3&e=ea91f782ea)**_ of stealing money from public schools), says the U.S. Constitution gives them a right to fill out ballot information even for people who have not requested their assistance. In addition to threatening to degrade ballot security further, the case _Vote America v. Schwab_ is another dangerous example of leftists trying to use courts to overturn democracy by forcing legislators who want to protect our elections to overcome an impossibly high bar known as “strict scrutiny.” If successful, this campaign would be the end of the ability of state legislatures to act to protect our elections from fraud and abuse. RITE has been at the forefront of this battle, including most recently coming to the defense of Montana’s commonsense identity verification measures.

# **In Arizona, RITE Works to Enforce Signature Match Integrity **

In Arizona, RITE is working to force state officials to follow the law when administering elections and to protect absentee ballots from fraud and abuse. The problem began in 2018 when then-Secretary of State Katie Hobbs illegally expanded the signature database that verifies the authenticity of mail ballots. Since then, against the precise prescription of Arizona law, election officials have been amassing a database of voters’ signatures pulled from unauthorized (and often unreliable) documents and then using those signatures to authenticate mail ballots. State law is explicit that this is illegal. A mail ballot is verified by comparing the signature on the ballot only with the signatures on the voter’s registration record—and no others. _**_[RITE v. Fontes](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=0c5685644b&e=ea91f782ea)_**_ was filed in March, and the case is ongoing.

# **RITE Supports Colorado Citizens to Defend Mail Ballot Security **

Colorado was one of the first states to adopt universal voting by mail. To ensure there is some integrity in its all-mail voting system, Colorado law mandates that election officials compare the signature on the mail ballot to the one on the voter's registration file, similar to Arizona's law. For Colorado, this signature match is the primary security measure to verify the identity of a mail voter. But the left is intent on eliminating any law, no matter how sensible, that protects the integrity of the ballot. That’s why, in December of last year, an out-of-state dark money group claiming to represent veterans and backed by left-wing law firm Perkins Coie filed a lawsuit, _Vet Voices v. Griswold_ , to try and eliminate signature matching – first in Colorado, but certainly not stopping there.
RITE is currently _**[working to defend Colorado's law](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=2009b890ca&e=ea91f782ea)**_ on behalf of two Colorado citizens. Stay tuned for updates on this critical case.

# **What We’re Watching: New York’s Unconstitutional Mail-Vote Bill**

The New York State Legislature recently sent a bill creating universal absentee voting to Governor Kathy Hochul’s desk. Problem is, the New York Constitution prohibits universal absentee voting, and New York voters overwhelmingly voted to keep that constitutional prohibition just two years ago. RITE and its allies throughout the state are watching and stand ready to fight for trust in New York elections.
---
|
---
| | RITE stands to preserve elections as the democratic voice of the people. Do you know someone who wants to help us defend American elections? Please **[forward this email](https://us12.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=7e6065d2ee&e=ea91f782ea)** to them so they can **[subscribe to our newsletter](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/subscribe?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=735bdaf382)**.
---
|
---
| | | | | [](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=0fc2488fe8&e=ea91f782ea)

[](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=0c07168186&e=ea91f782ea)

You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Restoring Integrity and Trust in Elections1233 20th St NWSte 350Washington, DC 20036

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/profile?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=735bdaf382&e=ea91f782ea&c=7e6065d2ee) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=735bdaf382&e=ea91f782ea&c=7e6065d2ee).

name: Shamaine Daniels
subject: Are you up to the challenge?
body:
www.danielsforcongress.org [www.danielsforcongress.org]
Dear Friend,
As you know, I was the Democrat who challenged Scott Perry in 2022. With the help of supporters like you, my campaign came close to defeating Scott Perry AND we did it without support from the DCCC and the National Party.
Our 2022 performance demonstrated that they made a mistake by not targeting Perry in 2022, and they have already announced that PA-10 is a top target in 2024.
This is exciting news, but it means that we need to work even harder and be even better than we were last year. That’s why I announced my campaign early, so we would have the time to build the strongest operation possible.
July and August are among the toughest months for campaign fundraising, but we can’t take our foot off the gas. A handful of supporters have stepped up and asked us to challenge our online team to raise $15,000 by the end of July. These generous donors will match your donation. That’s right, your support will have double the impact, but only if you donate before July 31st!
CLICK HERE to make a contribution today and DOUBLE you impact [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
Why have these donors stepped up? Because they know that Scott Perry is every bit as dangerous as we’ve been telling you - maybe more dangerous.
The radical Freedom Caucus has been behind the extremism in Congress that has threatened our institutions, economic stability and national security and Scott Perry is their leader.
Over the next week and a half we are going to give all the details on the ways in which Scott Perry is a very real threat to our country. When you’ve heard the facts, we are confident you will help us meet the challenge and reach our fundraising goal.
Heard enough? CLICK HERE to donate NOW (remember, your contribution will be MATCHED! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
Together, we will end the threat to our Democracy that is Congressman Scott Perry!
With Gratitude,
Shamaine
P.S. If you missed my announcement video, you can check it out below.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lQXcyDlej8Y [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lQXcyDlej8Y]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/99379/images/PaidForByDanielsForCongressB.jpg]
Daniels For Congress
P.O. Box 60654
Harrisburg, PA 17106

body:
If you have any U.S. dollars in your bank account...

| Dear Reader, If you have any U.S. dollars in your bank account... **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Granite Solutions Press
subject: RELEASE: Barry "Stacie" Laughton Belongs in Prison for the Rest of His Life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions
body:
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

| | | | |
---
| | | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:**
July 19, 2023
---
| | **CONTACT:** Rep. Joe Sweeneyinfo@GraniteSolutions.org
---
| **Barry "Stacie" Laughton Belongs in Prison for the Rest of His Life**
---
**Salem, NH -** State** ** Representative Joe Sweeney, Founder of Granite Solutions, issued the following statement regarding the troubling new text messages revealed in the Barry Laughton case that shows him confessing to sexual activity with children:

"Vile. Evil. My stomach turns reading these texts. May Barry Laughton never feel freedom again in exchange for the freedom and innocence stolen from defenseless children. The survivors of Laughton’s sexual abuse deserve a speedy & thorough trial."

###
**BACKGROUND:** NH Journal - Former NH House Dem Appears to Admit Having Sex With Children in Text [https://nhjournal.com/former-nh-house-dem-appears-to-admit-having-sex-with-children-in-text/](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fnhjournal.com%2Fformer-nh-house-dem-appears-to-admit-having-sex-with-children-in-text%2F/1/010001896e577491-cd22988c-1a4d-4704-9d45-6ba6d5b23b82-000000/DGQuPBaWcS69ONk2yF5RT5KneYQ=331)

body:
Republicans are emboldened by every law they see their counterparts pass across the country. Virginia is the last southern state without a abortion ban, and we’re not giving up this fight. | | |
---
| | Republicans are emboldened by each and every law they see their counterparts pass across the country. Take Virginia’s extreme Republican governor, Glenn Youngkin. He revived calls for an abortion ban _after_ watching Republicans in North Carolina strip away reproductive freedom and the right to choose: [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yoKG8CTelWWDHki88pvURtxM-7M6lx0tBvbL0QK0PU4iOmAICobpA97qxWTghD6P_O4roMIlZJYYLGJQozFEATUWqtkIbJWczMJj7UWaBl35wybpEu-HBXNgNlhrqYG0pyoeDGgvVfW8RfDfcCQylSUY3QyZN7F1Lfd_zapCXkyHYe-CsvNB6UmOm4SAWKMTINYZ9OV5ZR7vD-pGPCHRcZBLqBkg2xashZM24var3SyBM-ZCBHcw3_dxpXOTDKXU5CI42QozddAaZWdDw3GJKUOyDQ-A_w_5QXC_hgyCoxiVhet-DawCblb4D9CjwruYjSUuawBkTDllG3c5Qaoe9M1F2cEK8BaUOWpdSQLDy341EzROpwBwEgTpWorJTE_PBhW5HK-da8Zc1IZ2NyWevT0g2SzDgEl69PSvb6BXazM2VzlUVd1Z3JzODWJttAJCMWOvCFPslGM6yxfgT0F3I-n8AARr76GE7-hY58zzQEQbWGVFroFmkjfdBhJyOqquKDDCRmbCubkWUSlUo4-eSXUXl3fVvieFaoOqSl8NGz3Sdxj1AKXgb9oFtHUYPA04faqK0YOQ1pHmhW5TDmKsj4HkwHaL9ouLLX3oLw60mhbQ/3y0/cjRCHaiHQiquy38GFtA5iw/h0/wRD2JN7_-lulZst6WElS63XS-Aq9qKkMk5UdqpsIPCg) Youngkin saw Republicans in neighboring states get away with it, and now he thinks he can do the same in Virginia – despite the fact that a vast majority of Virginians (and Americans) oppose abortion bans. **But there’s hope: We’re just a _few_ seats away from flipping the state House and protecting reproductive freedom in Virginia.** [Can you make a $7 donation right now to help defeat anti-abortion Republicans in states like Virginia? We’ve seen the GOP destroy our fundamental freedoms, and we cannot let their cruel and unpopular agenda go unchecked. ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yoKG8CTelWWDHki88pvURtxM-7M6lx0tBvbL0QK0PU4iOmAICobpA97qxWTghD6P_O4roMIlZJYYLGJQozFEATUWqtkIbJWczMJj7UWaBl35wybpEu-HBXNgNlhrqYG0pyoeDGgvVfW8RfDfcCQylSUY3QyZN7F1Lfd_zapCXkyHEv1l_D4H0vaNLh42wHxzrY7SBLAiORR70v4Rvy5TM5X2Tuf4FCuOSOlEL-khyLnJBGHrpUJjEx1-oNIzmR0uLNDuPnkO20bk-lYeV9ks1pHRpGUxTJsUoBZx_grqBS6oPvzBrK258dehxkqv31RvPolKhYQdV1U9JtpiugOXNed-2pNuWKsjccOexO2B6sW-H0kZJ6vH2PSVnkg-i_UeAoAp2rNfcnDskeARoy74lTWYSAV5qwMCxYqp7j-UH-c4bw51PXknSyMwKScvYyccex1UkB1eLbko2QKeE7mvwtF8fnBngIaZ8HN8HlHaUTjj5ImGeuNQTJPkq_PSSSWHthlB6RElVWL3Rw8Pjw9KtXk4320ihixpzad7FKbf8hqDLEVPWyq2uhymWJuGNoVNUxIkosTz7dEIA1KCQyxZBa6Os-DoTkgNrAAjAmPArUfLHQGsGsA2YSMahlh_yGVVQ/3y0/cjRCHaiHQiquy38GFtA5iw/h1/l-t0v1h179ZpA2BbGaythoB4n--OWBNMwBaS-B1WJuQ) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

If you’re already outraged, wait until you hear this: Glenn Youngkin said he would _“happily and gleefully”_ sign an abortion ban if it reaches his desk. He’s even endorsed plans that could threaten doctors with jail time – _it's terrible!_
That’s why the DLCC is laying the groundwork _now_ to win. Virginia is the last southern state without an abortion ban, and we’re not giving up this fight.
We’re investing heavily in our state programs to chip away at the GOP’s gains, supporting GOTV efforts to put organizers and volunteers on the ground, launching digital campaigns to get our message out to voters, and so much more.
But first, we need the resources to push back – especially considering Glenn Youngkin raised a record-breaking almost $2.7 million in the first three months of the year.
**Frankly, we cannot afford for Republicans to out-raise us with less than four months until Election Day – not with our fundamental rights on the line.**
[So can you chip in $7 to stop state Republicans from destroying our freedoms in states like Virginia? name: Cornel West 24
subject: Climate Justice is People's Justice - Let's End Ecocide!
body:
Help us fight for the habitability of our planet.

| | | [ ](https://www.cornelwest24.org/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=071923_climate&n=1)
---
Peter - With boundless passion and unwavering confidence, I reach out to you as a guardian of our precious planet. Our shared responsibility to future generations demands that we leave behind a world that is healthy, safe, and full of promise. It is with this conviction that I write to you today. It is disheartening to witness the disregard for the catastrophic reality of ecocide displayed by both Democrats and Republicans. Corporate greed has driven fossil fuel companies and politicians to prioritize short-term profits over the well-being of people. The impact is especially devastating for the marginalized and vulnerable communities of color, bearing the disproportionate burden of this crisis. If we truly commit ourselves to combating climate change, we must recognize that our current economy revolves around extraction and emissions. Instead, let us embrace regenerative technologies and renewable energy sources that will create millions of family-sustaining unionized jobs. Understanding the immense influence the oil and gas industry wields is crucial, with billions of dollars funneled into campaign contributions and lobbying efforts over the past decade. Educating and organizing for change will require dedication and effort, and we must fight to reclaim power on behalf of the people. Together, we possess the strength to transform our energy systems and safeguard the habitability of our planet. Together, we will end the destructive practice of exporting crude oil, fostering environmental degradation, and contributing to the climate crisis. The Green New Deal must not be diluted or co-opted; it requires a steadfast commitment to dismantle the systems perpetuating this crisis. Handouts to the fossil fuel industry cannot be tolerated in our serious pursuit of a sustainable future. My comprehensive plan will address climate change and its intertwined implications, but I can only achieve this with your support. Please consider [contributing](https://www.cornelwest24.org/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=071923_climate&n=2) to our campaign as we forge a path toward climate justice and a sustainable future for all. Thank you for your unwavering commitment to a fair and just world. With deep gratitude and solidarity, Cornel West Team Cornel West 2024 [](https://www.cornelwest24.org/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=071923_climate&n=3)[https://www.cornelwest24.org/](https://www.cornelwest24.org/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=071923_climate&n=4)
---
| [](https://www.cornelwest24.org/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=071923_climate&n=5 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.cornelwest24.org/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=071923_climate&n=5)

clean_body: Let’s defeat my opponent for a second time. | Peter, Democrats are plotting to reclaim the House majority by looking toward races like ours that will face a rematch against those that lost in 2022. After the DCCC successfully recruited my liberal opponent from 2022 to run against me again this cycle, the Democrats have set the stage for another tight race that could determine which party controls the House. After winning by less than 2 percentage points last year and our race labeled as a toss-up again, we have our work cut out for us. But with my army of grassroots conservatives fighting alongside me, I know we can secure another victory in 2024. Within days of announcing her campaign, my opponent announced a huge influx of cash – proving this race will be a hard-fought battle. But their initial fundraising is no match for us, thanks to dedicated supporters like you. Now, as we get closer and closer to the heat of the cycle, we can’t afford to lose our momentum with the liberal fundraising machine in full force against me. Every second and every dollar counts with the future of this country and the American Dream on the line. That’s why I am asking for your continued support to help me combat the Left’s attacks and my liberal opponent to continue the fight for the American Dream. Thank you, Rep. name: Amanda Edwards
subject: One Month Since Our Launch!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Edwards for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake-cd18-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake-cd18-email]
Hi Friend,
Can you believe it’s been one month since I announced my campaign for Congress on Juneteenth? I know I’ve mentioned this a few times over the past few weeks, but I just cannot thank everyone enough for the incredible amount of support I’ve received.
Carrying forward the legacy of strong servant leadership in the 18th Congressional District is critical, and I am ready for this challenge.
We were fortunate enough to capture footage of my announcement, and I’m so excited to share that with you today!
Watch some highlights from our campaign’s launch event below!
https://youtu.be/zJN5Xl-7zk8 [https://youtu.be/zJN5Xl-7zk8]
I couldn’t run this campaign without you. Thank you!
With gratitude,
Amanda
Amanda K. Edwards has the experience and innovative vision to move Houston forward. To learn more, visit our website. name: Andy Beshear
subject: Recap: This weekend on the road 🛣️
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
[PHOTOS INSIDE!] Peter,

This weekend, I hit the road again with Lt. Gov. Jacqueline Coleman for a campaign swing through Shelbyville, Bardstown, Bowling Green, Georgetown, Lexington, and Richmond!

Let me tell you — being on the road to meet with Kentuckians and sharing my vision for the future of our Commonwealth is one of my favorite parts of this job. Here are some of my highlights from this weekend's trip: **Day One:**

On Friday, we pulled into Sixth & Main Coffeehouse in Shelbyville, where I was greeted by dozens of smiling faces. Next, we headed to Bardstown and met a packed house at Scout & Scholar Brewery. Our last stop on Friday was in Bowling Green, where we opened a new field office and got a team of grassroots supporters ready to knock on doors and start phone banking for Team Beshear!

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66707608/417314380/950424521?refcode=em23_230719_tour_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230719_tour_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=5f02a991-3c26-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjAyYTk5MS0zYzI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VHtMRll9UUMRxw8S7mQ1OTdXDKbTyQbgQuQ5yk-42BE=) **Day Two:**

Our first stop on Saturday was at Fava's Restaurant in Georgetown — Scott County residents weathered the storms and showed up to support! The next stop was in Lexington, where we opened another field office for an energized crowd who was fired up and ready to get to work. Last _and absolutely not least,_ we made our way to Dreaming Creek Brewery in Richmond and closed the tour with a perfect pint and an incredible crowd! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66707615/417314383/950424521?refcode=em23_230719_tour_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230719_tour_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=5f02a991-3c26-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjAyYTk5MS0zYzI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VHtMRll9UUMRxw8S7mQ1OTdXDKbTyQbgQuQ5yk-42BE=) My main takeaway from this trip: People in every county across the Commonwealth are ready to fight for a Kentucky that works for everyone. This team of grassroots supporters is the heart and soul of this campaign, and I know that together we can win again in November.

[**Peter — I can't do this without you. We're going to need all hands on deck to defeat my opponent and keep making progress for Kentucky. If you can, contribute any amount today and help ensure I can win this close race >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66707618/417314391/950424521?refcode=em23_230719_tour_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230719_tour_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=5f02a991-3c26-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjAyYTk5MS0zYzI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VHtMRll9UUMRxw8S7mQ1OTdXDKbTyQbgQuQ5yk-42BE=)

Until next time,

Andy [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66707622/417314396/950424521?refcode=em23_230719_tour_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230719_tour_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=5f02a991-3c26-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjAyYTk5MS0zYzI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VHtMRll9UUMRxw8S7mQ1OTdXDKbTyQbgQuQ5yk-42BE=) | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign?** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66707624/417314400/950424521?refcode=em23_230719_tour_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230719_tour_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=5f02a991-3c26-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjAyYTk5MS0zYzI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VHtMRll9UUMRxw8S7mQ1OTdXDKbTyQbgQuQ5yk-42BE=)

clean_body: | | | George Will's recent column opened some eyes, folks. | | | | THIS is why Will Hurd joined the race. We cannot keep recycling the same talking points and ideas if we want to win again... But George is right, the bickering and performative politics we're seeing from Ronald & Donald is downright embarrassing. Will is promising something different. Common sense and modern solutions to Russia, China, the border crisis, our economy, and more is how we win. | | Thanks for giving Will a chance to share his vision for America. Chaz Digital Team | Hurd for America | | www.hurdforamerica.com | | |

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Big news in the fight against Big Tech
body:
I need you to read these exchanges, friend.

| |
---
| | I need you to read these exchanges, friend.
---
_“Cannot stress the degree to which this needs to be resolved immediately. Please remove this account immediately.”_ _ __“We want to make sure YouTube has a handle on vaccine hesitancy and is working toward making the problem better. Noted that vaccine hesitancy was a concern. That is shared by the highest (‘and I mean the highest’) levels of the White House.”_ _ __ “Not to sound like a broken record, but how much content is being demoted, and how effective are you at mitigating reach and how quickly?”_ _ __ “Hey folks, wanted to flag the below tweet and am wondering if we can get moving on the process of having it removed. ASAP”_
---
These are all messages White House officials sent to Big Tech employees that have now come to light because of the _Missouri v. Biden_ case making national headlines - and I needed you to see this with your own eyes. The collusion between Big Tech Big Government runs even deeper than we previously knew - and we need your help to put an end to it once for all. **[Will you give a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today, and help us protect free speech from Big Government?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28462%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f41jgwDxTQEHTj4x1LRmog&sysid=1)** My name is Harmeet Dhillon and I’m the Founder and CEO of the Center for American Liberty--non-profit law firm dedicated to defending the freedom of speech, civil liberties, and fighting back against government overreach. Thanks to patriotic Americans like you, we’re currently suing Twitter and the state of California for their unconstitutional collusion to censor the political speech of political opponents. Rogan O’Handley (known to some by his social media name “DC_Draino”) found himself in the crosshairs of this collusion when the State of California leveraged its power to force Twitter to remove Rogan’s tweets calling for an audit of the 2020 election. The bad news is that the collusion is even worse than we knew when we filed Rogan’s case. **But the good news is that a federal judge recognized these threats to our free speech and enjoined numerous federal agencies from colluding with social media platforms to censor Americans’ speech.** This is huge. _This federal judge even cited our lawsuit, O’Handley v. Weber, where we are suing Twitter and the California Secretary of State’s office over a factually similar circumstance._ The momentum is on our side, {\var:first_name Friend} -- and we need to take full advantage. **[Will you make a generous, one-time donation of $35 or more right away as we prepare our case for the Supreme Court?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28463%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ke%2fBg42Qc5a4o3%2b1c5eNtA&sysid=1)** As you may have heard, in Rogan's case we recently filed a petition for certiorari at the Supreme Court of the United States. This is the perfect time for the Court to hear Rogan’s case challenging Big Government and Big Tech’s collusion to censor conservatives online. And while Judge Doughty’s decision is only a preliminary injunction, it’s one of the strongest signals we’ve seen in favor of free speech. This is an incredible step in the right direction, and what I hope will be one of many victories for First Amendment rights.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon
---
Founder & CEO
---
|
---
| | [**DONATE**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28464%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E0Y%2fMTrSe6l05VclBwg1Eg&sysid=1)
---
| | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28475%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=idnre1BhGvJFk3UDHLRxnw&sysid=1)
---
The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
---

---
PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251
---

Your America News

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: The spiral of our country ends now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWklZvXDNb

I am not accepting a woke America.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWklZvXDNb

Friend,

Over the past few years, I've watched our country spiral. Across
the country, the Left has taken advantage of a weak executive and
lit the fire of cultural Marxism.

The
fire has smoldered in our schools; it has smoldered in corporate
boardrooms; it has smoldered in the halls of government.

Right now, America needs an energetic executive who has the will
to fight back and WIN against the woke agenda that is
infiltrating our businesses, military, and children's schools. In
Florida, we got it done and beat the woke agenda, it's time we do
it for all of America.

DONATE TODAY TO DEFEAT THE WOKE MOB

Why
do Joe Biden and the Left think it's common sense to salute the
Pride Flag? Or fly it equal to our American Flag?

Why
does the Left find it appropriate to applaud a group of topless
transgender women on the White House lawn at a "family friendly
event" where children were present?

Why
have our federal leaders stood idly by while American children
and adults have been told by the woke mob that we must accept
that men can get pregnant?

Why
is America accepting decline as a choice, when success is
attainable?

Enough is enough. I think about why I entered this race and look,
I've got kids, we want to leave America in a better place for the
next generation than where we found it. When elected your next
President, we will restore sanity to this nation, we will return
normalcy to our communities, and we will reinstate integrity
across institutions. No excuses.

The
time is now and I need your support. I'm humbly asking for your
support to show this country our momentum. Please consider
chipping in $10, $25, $47, or any other amount you can afford.

CHIP IN
$25

CHIP IN
$47

CHIP IN
$75

CHIP IN
$100

CHIP IN
$150

CHIP IN
$250

Please chip in any amount support my campaign.

In
Freedom,

Ron
DeSantis

Chip in any amount to Ron DeSantis

Meet Ron DeSantis

A native Floridian with
blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a
nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin
High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he
was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated
with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission
in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service,
Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah,
Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military
decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service
and the Iraq Campaign Medal.

Ron
also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child
predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a
platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits
and a balanced budget amendment.

In
Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the
weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to
hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in
manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a
veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our
country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans
and expand support for mental health.

In
2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As
governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for
the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when
the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media
united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis
stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding
principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to
transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival.
Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative
priorities:

Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine
mandates,

Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border
crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against
illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured
professors accountable,

Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital
currency,

Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

Protecting the unborn,

Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a
constitutional carry state,

Expanding education freedom,

Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and
entities,

Lowering prescription drug costs,

Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

Creating a universal school choice program,

Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme
Court,

...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout
his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of
nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the
largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than
1.5 million votes.

But
history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the
majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional
wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently
as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30
points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red,
including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties
overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor
DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics,
and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with
battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing
down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his
inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense
suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of
sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even
for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we
choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than
cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe
place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership,
Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education
opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden
Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that
seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to
the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered
the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's
history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:

Record tax relief

ESG prohibitions

Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering
transparency

Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

Improvements to our state's infrastructure

Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death
penalty for child rapists

The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border
crisis

Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward
school unions

Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No
leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor
DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country,
leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron
is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television
anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters,
Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as
charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without
"green cards"), federal government contractors, and national
banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best
efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address,
occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose
aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The
maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600
($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple
using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary &
$6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute
$10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident
(i.e., green card holder).

This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not
being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose
of making this contribution.

I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card
and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued
to another person.

I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this
contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization,
national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal
contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron
DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his
military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not
imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department
of Defense.

Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President

PO Box 3696

Tallahassee, FL 32315

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWklZvXDNb

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWklZvXDNb

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-72559225229-echo3-BC45B0C007C40678AFA8032AF49575B9@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Scott Parkinson
subject: I thank God every day that I was born an American.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Parkinson for Senate
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/638ea676cdd05cb5dc9f99905c540ea9/42903/2ccd2be61bce56de/a551230b24cb08b2c3d6b838967d376c/42903)
---
Dear Peter, I’m **no politician**. I’m just a **dad** , a **husband** , and a **neighbor**. Our communities are **under siege** from violent crime, dangerous drugs and illegal immigrants. If you’ve seen what’s happening in Europe, **how long before that happens in America?** I’m a strong believer in **American exceptionalism.** I **thank God every day** that I was born an American. The United States is the **greatest country in the history of the world** , but **too many Democrats like Tim Kaine disagree** and want to fundamentally change America. That change is underway... **UNLESS we step up and make a difference to stop it.** You can **be that change** by **joining our fight** to bring conservative values back to the United States Senate. [**PITCH IN anything you can to our fight against Tim Kaine today >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/638ea676cdd05cb5dc9f99905c540ea9/42903/2ccd2be61bce56de/3857de4b467c0658c3d6b838967d376c/42903)

Kaine is enabling the radical transformation of America because he’s lost his way. He’s not a moderate. name: Angela
subject: meet for coffee?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/sign/EM_BS_AAL_230719_EN_CoffeeSurvey_A0_na_U2_X2_M1?t=1006&akid=275%2E52803%2ES5wTk5 ][IMG]

Hey Peter, it’s Angela.

I’m just sitting here enjoying my morning cup of coffee thinking about how
nice it would be if you and I were able to meet up for a cup of coffee
soon so I could get to know you better.

What’s the biggest concern facing your community right now?
How can I best serve your interests as Maryland’s next U.S. Senator?
And which binge-worthy TV show do you recommend my daughter and I watch
next?

These are just some of the important, hard-hitting questions I’d ask you
over a cup of coffee,
Peter. Unfortunately, I’m not sure
I’ll be able to meet with each one of you individually.

So instead, I asked my team to come up with the next-best solution.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/sign/EM_BS_AAL_230719_EN_CoffeeSurvey_A0_na_U2_X2_M1?t=1007&akid=275%2E52803%2ES5wTk5 ]Please, Peter,
will you take just one minute of your day to fill out our campaign’s
updated Issues Survey and let me know what’s on your mind? If I’m going to
represent you in the U.S. Senate, then it’s time you and I get to know
each other a little bit better.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/sign/EM_BS_AAL_230719_EN_CoffeeSurvey_A0_na_U2_X2_M1?t=1008&akid=275%2E52803%2ES5wTk5 ]Take Our Survey →

Thanks for your input,

Angela

P.S. — I wasn’t kidding about the TV shows,
Peter. [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/sign/EM_BS_AAL_230719_EN_CoffeeSurvey_A0_na_U2_X2_M1?t=1009&akid=275%2E52803%2ES5wTk5 ]There’s a place at
the bottom of the survey to drop your recommendations. So come on, click
here and let’s hear them! →

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/sign/EM_BS_AAL_230719_EN_CoffeeSurvey_A0_na_U2_X2_M1?t=1010&akid=275%2E52803%2ES5wTk5 ]Take Our Survey →

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/89?t=1001&akid=275%2E52803%2ES5wTk5 ][IMG]

We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,

name: Jen Kiggans, Navy Veteran
subject: My call sign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kiggans for Congress
body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from the Kiggans for Congress, click here https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=d8f52761a594d556489c4100923a2562faeb54f6b86c35dc75165e6515beec19a0fb1348e2c79da413122e09292c4484b74467b4d645825060bf3299821102d7 That’s a picture of me from when I flew H-46 and H-3 helicopters in the U.S. Navy. If you look to my left, you can see my call sign…Blossom. People often ask…how did I get that name? Well, my roommate in flight school and I went on a bit of a “girl power” kick one day and bought old bathtub non-skid flower stickers from the store, cut out that flower shape in reflective tape from our squadron, and stuck those reflective flowers on our helmets. There is very little room for making a Navy flight suit more “feminine,” but on cruise we were able to be a little more creative and came to love those girly flowers on our helmets. Although the helicopter community doesn’t use call signs as much as some of the fixed wing squadrons, the “Blossom” stuck and was painted on the side of a CH-46 for part of my first cruise. Made for a great photo and story! It was my experience in the Navy that helped instill in me the importance of service. Far too often, our elected officials today forget that their job is to SERVE. They think it is their job to tell everyone what to do and why everyone else is wrong….but that’s not service. As a Navy veteran and nurse practitioner, I got so frustrated and decided to run for Congress because I wanted to actually SERVE my country and my community. While for some it is all about power, for me it is all about service. Sadly, this has made me some enemies in Washington. After I pulled off a historic victory in 2022 and helped flip the House from Democrat to Republican control, I’ve had a target on my back… Democrats have made me their #1 target because they know I won’t just go along with the party line. No one is going to buy me off or tell me what to do…I’m going to keep serving the people I represent, not serve some “master” in Washington, D.C. If you are also tired of leaders who care more about power than service, https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=d8f52761a594d556489c4100923a2562faeb54f6b86c35dc75165e6515beec19a0fb1348e2c79da413122e09292c4484b74467b4d645825060bf3299821102d7 I’m asking you to send me some help today. Because I’m a veteran and not a career politician, I need all the help I can get to defeat my Democrat opponent. Democrats are already spending BIG on ads and billboards attacking me, so it is critical our campaign has the resources to FIGHT back. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=d8f52761a594d556489c4100923a2562faeb54f6b86c35dc75165e6515beec19a0fb1348e2c79da413122e09292c4484b74467b4d645825060bf3299821102d7 RUSH SUPPORT TO JEN I know this was a longer message than you are probably used to getting, but I want you to know where I’m coming from and why I need your help. Whether it’s $100 or just $10, anything you can contribute will help this Navy veteran keep fighting back business as usual in D.C. It’s time we support leaders who truly want to serve our country, and that’s what I promise to always do…are you with me, Peter? With the courage to fight, https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=d8f52761a594d556489c4100923a2562faeb54f6b86c35dc75165e6515beec19a0fb1348e2c79da413122e09292c4484b74467b4d645825060bf3299821102d7 -Jen Paid for by Kiggans for Congress USE OF MILITARY IMAGES OR RANK DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT BY THE U.S. DEPT. OF DEFENSE OR THE U.S. NAVY P.O. Box 5042 Virginia Beach, VA 23471 https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=d8f52761a594d5569056c75c0547f075bc9be9149a69f70282eb6fc526f776d776d4c9997a70190fac1860c11888dd7cb6c36b9ccf1e480d3b3fa0b058495ae5 Privacy Policy To unsubscribe from the Kiggans for Congress, click here

name: Mari at United We Dream Action
subject: If my sister had DACA…
body:
We need permanent protections now. | | | Peter: Who’s an undocumented person in your life without DACA? What would their life look like with DACA status? I think about my little sister who doesn’t qualify for DACA and can’t apply for the program’s temporary protections and benefits. If she had DACA protections, my sister would be able to go to school and get financial aid. Her immigration status wouldn’t get in the way of her applying for jobs, and she would be able to live her life free of worrying about deportation. We could even travel abroad together and see the world like we always wanted to. DACA is life-changing, Peter. But now more than ever, it’s not enough for undocumented youth. Millions of people like my sister are shut out from DACA, and even DACA recipients could be left without protections with an anti-immigrant judge preparing to rule on the future of the program. **We need permanent protections now — so we can apply for jobs, get an affordable education, access health care, and live our lives proudly and free from the threat of deportation.** United We Dream Action was part of the coalition that helped win DACA back in 2012, and we’re leading the charge to secure a pathway to citizenship for DACA recipients and all undocumented people. **This fight isn’t easy, which is why I’m asking for your support today: Will you chip in $7 or more to join our immigrant youth-led movement and support our fight for permanent protections?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $7](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wQnDd_Nss4mB9Lx5PfYm8abmfU4ev5NwdniYDfQMEqt5XJ-Y7rUr1_VfSnjZmqklYvRvctirpjaqGF5biJ4ERE3lO0awr6ciZvSjqAoHjXM-8rD5yr7aGh-SjatLjZVE_wt0L4uMD4xvFBFXWcbIaUk_UhuqlJiJ-UEt_W8Cj74wiHu4eQE5Vgw0xj3-S51sHNdkpA_7REhMdyc8tYP717iJmAJRKXN3qIGLkjMh_qFV49TDsqcTnZbTAzv8_fY9UvJpprI27ZP1QaKJBbixEOIXToHnT-ykKL-qilC9CGE0qyz3VKKERQNcNUauBdgJEMEhdLbOa3hgs_JV6Nge5SaJvb7TvQbFFHnoeI1iOZWgz6yOckmGOYLmASpcevLwAUhoGPm1zCKkETI0HEJp3u8oB-Gurp71hvSC4PBrMBo-ZWJNo2JnW7296HVFPo-nQ/3y0/BvavGZQbTim1TolcE9GivA/h0/yEFx9g8VsX_8ptm1YGtbVrVVmS9uRj2iH0G55pxB8Hw)

clean_body: We need permanent protections now. | | | Peter: Who’s an undocumented person in your life without DACA? What would their life look like with DACA status? I think about my little sister who doesn’t qualify for DACA and can’t apply for the program’s temporary protections and benefits. If she had DACA protections, my sister would be able to go to school and get financial aid. Her immigration status wouldn’t get in the way of her applying for jobs, and she would be able to live her life free of worrying about deportation. We could even travel abroad together and see the world like we always wanted to. DACA is life-changing, Peter. But now more than ever, it’s not enough for undocumented youth. Millions of people like my sister are shut out from DACA, and even DACA recipients could be left without protections with an anti-immigrant judge preparing to rule on the future of the program. We need permanent protections now — so we can apply for jobs, get an affordable education, access health care, and live our lives proudly and free from the threat of deportation. United We Dream Action was part of the coalition that helped win DACA back in 2012, and we’re leading the charge to secure a pathway to citizenship for DACA recipients and all undocumented people. This fight isn’t easy, which is why I’m asking for your support today: Will you chip in $7 or more to join our immigrant youth-led movement and support our fight for permanent protections? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for standing with immigrant youth. Mari, United We Dream Action

name: Caleb Max
subject: We Must Win
body:
You are invited to an event with former Congressman Frank Wolf
| | |

|
---
| We Must Win!
---
| Dear Peter,
Are you sick of Virginia Senate Democrats raining on Governor Youngkin's agenda?
I know I am.
All the major legislation that we need here in Virginia dies when it hits the Senate. That is because we are two seats down (21-19) and constantly hit the Democrats' "Blue Wall". The only way to fix this is to win the majority and [Senate District 31](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017befaIxONatgEcn7A3fZF9kzdow9XHdY7sECuHg6Ojt2-pTwuToYktuCio1YSsyiGmyhvnbfOxGPJFsm220qMR27h5WHhs6evtqckSKg11bQkO9bV4GUsBmJTXRHDHt4OgjQZnR652kVr7h_XUZDdQ==&c=b2ZSSMMWteo-8JTJfWyniNfFsGnCzzxDNntZKQoHqnV-_n7qkJQ0sA==&ch=iBmCLsMbOfdRe38OOdqpXByvRJD9HwcryVf6NNE5iCqQ0arJbuHxpg==) (Loudoun and Fauquier) is a must win seat.
That is why I ask you to join me in supporting Juan Pablo Segura (website [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017befaIxONatgEcn7A3fZF9kzdow9XHdY7sECuHg6Ojt2-pTwuToYktuCio1YSsyiGmyhvnbfOxGPJFsm220qMR27h5WHhs6evtqckSKg11bQkO9bV4GUsBmJTXRHDHt4OgjQZnR652kVr7h_XUZDdQ==&c=b2ZSSMMWteo-8JTJfWyniNfFsGnCzzxDNntZKQoHqnV-_n7qkJQ0sA==&ch=iBmCLsMbOfdRe38OOdqpXByvRJD9HwcryVf6NNE5iCqQ0arJbuHxpg==)). Juan Pablo is a family man, an entrepreneur, and a problem solver. He will work to relieve traffic congestion, take on the ever increasing Tolls, defend our Children in schools, protect Religious liberty, decide what happens to the 3.6 Billion dollar surplus that Democrats want to spend on Green boondoggles and much more. We need him in Richmond and in the State Senate to help pass the Governor's important legislation.
Next Thursday, July 27th, I am hosting an event for Juan Pablo with my Grandfather, former Congressman Frank Wolf, at my farm in Round Hill. Tickets start at $31 for the 31st District.
Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017befaIxONatgEcn7A3fZF9kzdow9XHdY7sECuHg6Ojt2-pTwuToYktuCio1YSsyiTbnsiOppWQ2MOHAYwWP5MV_bm93m8d1MqkXcW3iEqsWG8glHCbCKF42gXCSdvfY2jCmOAKAxfeAfl1Y1oa0ORDYGih6I6oiWQeFdqZJhYQSFw428xas-rQ==&c=b2ZSSMMWteo-8JTJfWyniNfFsGnCzzxDNntZKQoHqnV-_n7qkJQ0sA==&ch=iBmCLsMbOfdRe38OOdqpXByvRJD9HwcryVf6NNE5iCqQ0arJbuHxpg==) or below for more details and to donate.
I hope you will come meet Juan Pablo, consider becoming a sponsor of the event at $500, $1,000 or $2,500 levels and see how hard he is working to win the majority for Governor Youngkin and all Virginians.
Thank You and God Bless! Caleb
---

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DR BOB**](https://www
body:
Friend As a retired Master Sergeant from the United States Air Force, I have had the privilege of serving my country and witnessing firsthand the impact of effective leadership. I used to vote Republican, until I cam across candidates like this. Now, I put the character and integrity above party loyalty. Many politicians tend to overlook the needs of small towns and rural areas, leaving us feeling neglected and disconnected. But when I watched him speak at the library, that perception was shattered. I urge you to consider supporting him at the polls in 2024 and right now with a generous contribution, if you’re able. He will be an exceptional leader who will prioritize the needs of small towns and rural areas like ours.

| | Friend, I am writing to enthusiastically endorse Dr. Bob Lorinser as a Congressional candidate for our district, and ask you to [join me in my support.](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/2aObkUMhH/c?w=Gb67Ke8Q_ABeYLJG7oLwfzBzrUyTfYUdwpIyM8aD4w4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JsYWlyYm9iIiwiciI6IjlmMTZmZmRiLWJhOWEtNDg4OS1hYzE4LWM3ZGY3YjIzZjIxYyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9) As a retired Master Sergeant from the United States Air Force, I have had the privilege of serving my country and witnessing firsthand the impact of effective leadership. Dr. Bob embodies the qualities we need in a representative who will prioritize the concerns and interests of small towns and rural areas like Crystal Falls.

| | A Candidate Who Truly Listens and Understands
Putting Our Community First Many politicians tend to overlook the needs of small towns and rural areas, leaving us feeling neglected and disconnected. However, my first encounter with Dr. Bob Lorinser at the Crystal Falls Library shattered this perception.
His thoughtful words and genuine concern for our community indicated that he had meticulously considered our unique challenges and had everyone's best interests at heart.
"Dr. Bob’s policies are spot on." Policies That Align With Our Values Dr. Bob's policies resonated deeply with me and many others in our district. He recognizes the importance of supporting the ideas that are specific to our area. It is refreshing to have a candidate who genuinely understands the issues faced by our community and is committed to addressing them effectively.
A Leader with an Unwavering Commitment to Service
Beyond his policies, it is [Dr. Bob's character that truly sets him apart.](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/2aObkUMhH/c?w=rOQL1KCqOZTzKa3d2xJBrvlPEUb3cyWChtf-bbWu2IU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JsYWlyYm9iIiwiciI6IjdiNTY1ODA4LTM5ZTktNGVjNC1iYmRlLTg4MGVhNjdjOTM2NiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9) As someone who has dedicated my life to serving my country, I value integrity and a deep sense of service.
Dr. Bob's extensive experience as a family physician across the Upper Peninsula — including here in Crystal Falls — coupled with his foreign service, demonstrates his unwavering commitment to serving others.
Having personally experienced the challenges of combat, I find solace in knowing that Dr. Bob understands and empathizes with the struggles faced by veterans.
A Candidate Who Embodies Core Values Dr. Bob's embodiment of the core values of the Air Force — integrity, service before self, and excellence — further solidifies my endorsement. These values are crucial for effective leadership, especially in Congress.
For most of my early adult life, I voted for Republicans. Having shifted my focus from party affiliation to the character of the individual, I firmly believe that Dr. Bob's commitment to integrity and service will bring much-needed change to Washington. Friend, I am confident that Dr. Bob Lorinser is the ideal candidate to represent our district in Congress. His dedication to our community, understanding of our unique challenges, and alignment with our values make him the clear choice.
I urge you to consider supporting Dr. Bob at the polls in 2024 and [right now with a generous contribution](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/2aObkUMhH/c?w=rOQL1KCqOZTzKa3d2xJBrvlPEUb3cyWChtf-bbWu2IU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JsYWlyYm9iIiwiciI6IjdiNTY1ODA4LTM5ZTktNGVjNC1iYmRlLTg4MGVhNjdjOTM2NiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9), if you’re able. He will be an exceptional leader who will prioritize the needs of small towns and rural areas like ours. Warm regards, Blair AndersonRet. Greg Abbott must be stopped,** ** Peter.

A bombshell new story in the San Antonio Express News just exposed the immense cruelty Greg Abbott is inflicting on asylum seekers at the Texas border.

A state trooper deployed to the border under Abbott’s “Operation Lone Star” sham has come forward to say that**state officers are being ordered to push young children into the Rio Grande River—which Abbott has filled with buoys covered in razor wire.**

_Children. Ordered to be pushed into a river with razor wire. _

It’s unfathomably cruel and barbaric. As one of Greg Abbott’s own officers put it, “we have stepped over the line into the inhumane.”

We must stop Greg Abbott. My team and I are going to continue calling out Abbott’s despicable games at the border—and pushing for a more humane immigration system.**[Can you chip in $10 or $15 today to help us fight back, while I and other Democrats demand an immediate end to Abbott’s cruelty?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66711329/417327948/593283671?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjRlMmIzNC00MzI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oVixKk3jmzvBfuX--O_RoONePOfSpaFEK9JtD58-oYg=)**

Peter, Greg Abbott isn’t interested in fixing our immigration system. He has spent nearly $5 billion in taxpayer dollars to do nothing but harm on the border —all so he can raise money from wealthy corporate donors and audition to be the next Trump on Fox News.

But he’s crossed the line.
Abbott deployed buoys across the Rio Grande River that are covered in razor wire— these are death and drowning devices. And thanks to the Texas trooper who has come forward, we now know of multiple incidents created by Abbott’s cruelty, including:
* A pregnant woman who had a miscarriage after being tangled in the wire
* A four-year-old girl who was pushed back into the razor wire and passed out
* A teenager who broke his leg trying to navigate the waters around the buoys

**Help us fight back against Greg Abbott’s inhumane immigration stunt and deliver a more humane immigration system.[Chip in $10, $15, or whatever you can to support Team Casar’s work.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66711342/417327962/593283671?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjRlMmIzNC00MzI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oVixKk3jmzvBfuX--O_RoONePOfSpaFEK9JtD58-oYg=)**
