PAID FOR BY GREG CASAR FOR CONGRESS
clean_body: Greg Abbott must be stopped, Peter. A bombshell new story in the San Antonio Express News just exposed the immense cruelty Greg Abbott is inflicting on asylum seekers at the Texas border. A state trooper deployed to the border under Abbott’s “Operation Lone Star” sham has come forward to say thatstate officers are being ordered to push young children into the Rio Grande River—which Abbott has filled with buoys covered in razor wire. Children. Ordered to be pushed into a river with razor wire. It’s unfathomably cruel and barbaric. As one of Greg Abbott’s own officers put it, “we have stepped over the line into the inhumane.” We must stop Greg Abbott. My team and I are going to continue calling out Abbott’s despicable games at the border—and pushing for a more humane immigration system.= = **= Peter, Greg Abbott isn’t interested in fixing our immigration system. He has spent nearly $5 billion in taxpayer dollars to do nothing but harm on the border —all so he can raise money from wealthy corporate donors and audition to be the next Trump on Fox News. But he’s crossed the line. Abbott deployed buoys across the Rio Grande River that are covered in razor wire— these are death and drowning devices. And thanks to the Texas trooper who has come forward, we now know of multiple incidents created by Abbott’s cruelty, including: A pregnant woman who had a miscarriage after being tangled in the wire A four-year-old girl who was pushed back into the razor wire and passed out A teenager who broke his leg trying to navigate the waters around the buoys Help us fight back against Greg Abbott’s inhumane immigration stunt and deliver a more humane immigration system.= Thank you, -Greg ** Greg Casar Congressman Texas Congressional District 35 ****=** | ****** ---|---

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: Eight. Two. Zero.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
A few quick numbers for you this morning.
#

Peter: A few quick numbers for you this morning.
**Eight.**
That’s the number of competitive Senate races there are in 2024. Arizona is one of them. Republicans are on offense in each of those races, and they’ll do whatever it takes to win.
**Two.**
That’s our edge over Republicans in the Senate right now. We have 51 seats, and they have 49. If they gain one seat we’re tied. And with Kyrsten Sinema as that 51st vote, nothing is guaranteed.
**Zero.**
That’s our margin of error. We have to win in Arizona. If Ruben is defeated it’ll be MAGA Republicans like Kari Lake controlling the Senate.
**$3.**
That’s how much we need you to donate to Ruben Gallego’s campaign today to hold the Senate.
[**Can you make that $3 donation? If $3 is not the right amount for you today, anything you can give helps. subject: Fmr State Rep & Current Steilacoom Mayor Dick Muri endorses Carmen Goers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carmen for Congress]( "Paid for by Carmen for Congress")
body:
“Carmen was not only a military spouse but she also supported our military's families by volunteering” | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3dfde7a0cc46/im-announcing-my-run-for-us-congress-in-the-8th-congressional-district-13561135?e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=6af8be9e1e&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | Peter,
---
| **I’m excited to announce that Fmr State Rep & current Steilacoom Mayor Dick Muri has endorsed my campaign to serve Washingtonians in Congress!**
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=a6ae4437e0&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| **Mayor Muri shared the following statement: **

_"As a 22 year military veteran, I enthusiastically endorse Carmen Goers to be our next member of congress representing Washington's' 8th Congressional District. Carmen shared with me that she and her family moved to Washington State following the completion of their military service. Carmen was not only a military spouse but she also supported our military's families by volunteering throughout the community to help improve our military families lives."_

**_I am deeply grateful to receive Mayor Muri’s endorsement_. **Mayor Muri’s service to our nation didn’t end with his military career. As a civilian and elected official, he has remained committed to the advocacy of his brothers and sisters in the military.

**As a military spouse, service members, their spouses and children became my family.** Those bonds strengthened through adversity and time, inspiring me to act as a volunteer for military families when the need arises.

Not only have these experiences enriched my life, they have strengthened a motto that I have learned to live by: **_“When duty calls...”_**

The necessity of responding to our patriotic duty now is on par with the era in which this nation was born. Across our state and nation – the very ideals of liberty, morality, and righteousness that help a self-governing people endure – are under attack.

**Duty calls! Join me in the fight of defending our freedoms, prosperity and values at this 11th hour in our nation. [Can I count on the support of a $25, $50 or $75 contribution so that I succeed in my efforts to serve We The People in Congress?](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=dd9bcd0360&e=0e51d1e991) **

These military-style firearms, designed for rapid fire and maximum destruction, have no place in civilian hands. = | = | = Passing an assault weapons ban is not about infringing on our Second Amendment rights; it’s about prioritizing the lives and safety of our fellow citizens. It’s about protecting our children in schools, our friends in places of worship, and our neighbors in public spaces. Since Roe was overturned,**25 states** have moved to ban nearly all abortion, but that's not enough for Donald Trump.
Trump and the Republican Party want patients in all 50 states to be refused potentially lifesaving abortion care – that would include here in Washington state. ICYMI: Conservative Outlets Praise Chris Christie As He Moves Into Second Place In NH | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2aad7db215df/what-they-are-saying-about-chris-christie-13559784?e=d0a9afa930)

**ICYMI: Conservative Outlets Praise Chris Christie As He Moves Into Second Place In NH**
Recent polling out of New Hampshire shows that Governor Christie has moved up into a statistical tie for [second place](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=3f97056072&e=d0a9afa930) in the Granite State – just six weeks after announcing his run for president.
Conservative commentators and outlets are also taking notice of Christie’s argument that he is the conservative alternative to Donald Trump who can actually defeat Joe Biden:
_**“Chris Christie Could Easily Defeat Joe Biden.”**_ – Peggy Noonan, The Wall Street Journal, 7/13/23
_**“Christie Deserves His Spot On The Stage. He’s Been Running, By Far, The Most Noteworthy Campaign.”**_ – Michael Brendan Dougherty, National Review, 7/13/23
_**“Christie Has One Job: To Expose Trump’s Incontinence, Ignorance, Incompetence, And Narcissism...”**_ “Christie has one job: to expose Trump’s incontinence, ignorance, incompetence, and narcissism and thus show Republican primary voters and other Republican primaries that the only hope for the GOP and conservatism is abandoning this wretched man.”
– Tim Carney, The Washington Examiner, 7/13/23

Last night, Governor Christie joined Eric Bolling on Newsmax to talk about the change in leadership America needs and the upcoming RNC debate in August.
Watch the highlights below:
**“Are You A Psychiatrist Today?** ”
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=3be224830d&e=d0a9afa930)
**“He’s About To Be Uncrowned”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=83524c1e2f&e=d0a9afa930)
| [DONATE](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=b88b168e72&e=d0a9afa930)

name: VoteVets.org
subject: 📯 Roll call: Need your response 📯
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Tuberville found 5000 Veterans. Let’s beat that.
#
Derek,
Take a look at this:
[](https://act.votevets.org/signup/230719_vv_em_tub/?source=em230719-1-15&source2=12743.3013755.aFckuQ&akid=12743%2E3013755%2EaFckuQ)
This is from an article on AL.com. Apparently Senator Tuberville found a bunch of Veterans who support his blockade of senior military promotions.
If you ask us, those are rookie numbers.
There are more than a million people on this list. Thousands and thousands of you have confirmed to us that you’re Veterans over the years.
So here’s a challenge:
Tuberville found 5000 Veterans. Let’s beat that.
**[If you OPPOSE Tuberville and everything he stands for, add your name to this email. And if you’re a Veteran, or if you know one, it is ESPECIALLY important that you respond.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/230719_vv_em_tub/?source=em230719-1-15&source2=12743.3013755.aFckuQ&akid=12743%2E3013755%2EaFckuQ)

---
Once you sign, send this to a buddy — especially if they’re a Veteran. Get them to sign it, too. Make sure they do.
Let’s run up the score on Coach Tuberville.
Appreciate your help,
The team at VoteVets

name: Blair Anderson
subject: Friend, I meant every word in this video.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
Blair Anderson — decorated veteran, independent voter — endorses Bob Lorinser for Congress
Friend,
I am writing to enthusiastically endorse Dr. Bob Lorinser as a Congressional candidate for our district, and ask you to join me in my support. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blairbob] As a retired Master Sergeant from the United States Air Force, I have had the privilege of serving my country and witnessing firsthand the impact of effective leadership.
Dr. Bob embodies the qualities we need in a representative who will prioritize the concerns and interests of small towns and rural areas like Crystal Falls.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blairbob]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/Blair%20Anderson%20Video%20Image.png]
A Candidate Who Truly Listens and Understands
Putting Our Community First
Many politicians tend to overlook the needs of small towns and rural areas, leaving us feeling neglected and disconnected. However, my first encounter with Dr. Bob Lorinser at the Crystal Falls Library shattered this perception.
His thoughtful words and genuine concern for our community indicated that he had meticulously considered our unique challenges and had everyone's best interests at heart.
"Dr. Bob’s policies are spot on."
Policies That Align With Our Values
Dr. Bob's policies resonated deeply with me and many others in our district. He recognizes the importance of supporting the ideas that are specific to our area.
It is refreshing to have a candidate who genuinely understands the issues faced by our community and is committed to addressing them effectively.
A Leader with an Unwavering Commitment to Service
Beyond his policies, it is Dr. Bob's character that truly sets him apart. [https://www.votedrbob.com/so/2aObkUMhH/c?w=NVizBeXbnNQsTK7eKbR9jBLFnsUk2awQZ-asv0A4pIk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JsYWlyYm9iIiwiciI6IjdiNTY1ODA4LTM5ZTktNGVjNC1iYmRlLTg4MGVhNjdjOTM2NiIsIm0iOiJscCJ9] As someone who has dedicated my life to serving my country, I value integrity and a deep sense of service.
Dr. Bob's extensive experience as a family physician across the Upper Peninsula — including here in Crystal Falls — coupled with his foreign service, demonstrates his unwavering commitment to serving others.
Having personally experienced the challenges of combat, I find solace in knowing that Dr. Bob understands and empathizes with the struggles faced by veterans.
A Candidate Who Embodies Core Values
Dr. Bob's embodiment of the core values of the Air Force — integrity, service before self, and excellence — further solidifies my endorsement. These values are crucial for effective leadership, especially in Congress.
For most of my early adult life, I voted for Republicans. Having shifted my focus from party affiliation to the character of the individual, I firmly believe that Dr. Bob's commitment to integrity and service will bring much-needed change to Washington.
Friend, I am confident that Dr. Bob Lorinser is the ideal candidate to represent our district in Congress. His dedication to our community, understanding of our unique challenges, and alignment with our values make him the clear choice.
I urge you to consider supporting Dr. Bob at the polls in 2024 and right now with a generous contribution [https://www.votedrbob.com/so/2aObkUMhH/c?w=NVizBeXbnNQsTK7eKbR9jBLFnsUk2awQZ-asv0A4pIk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JsYWlyYm9iIiwiciI6IjdiNTY1ODA4LTM5ZTktNGVjNC1iYmRlLTg4MGVhNjdjOTM2NiIsIm0iOiJscCJ9] , if you’re able. He will be an exceptional leader who will prioritize the needs of small towns and rural areas like ours.
Warm regards,
Blair Anderson
Ret. Master Sergeant, US Air Force
Any mention or depiction of service does not imply an endorsement from the United States Air Force, the State Department, or the Department of Defense.

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Josh Hawley’s weird “Manhood” book
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
This guy thinks the only way to be a man is to be exactly like him.
#
Peter — Josh Hawley thinks the only way to be a man is to be just like him.
**He even wrote a whole book about it.**
But Missouri is the Show Me State — and the only thing Josh Hawley has shown us is how to be a fraud and a coward.

name: Team Cori
subject: Signatures needed against abortion ban nationwide
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Republicans in Congress recently proposed a national abortion ban, trying to take us back to the time before Roe v. Wade when the leading cause of death for Black women was sepsis from unsafe abortions. | |
---
Peter, Yesterday, Congresswoman Cori Bush led a roundtable discussion about what’s at stake as Republicans try to pass a nationwide abortion ban, including their attempts to restrict medication abortion. As Cori explained, abortion is a racial justice, economic justice, and public health issue. She’s introduced legislation to protect access to medication abortion, which is a lifeline for already-marginalized people who can’t afford to take time off work or get childcare or arrange to travel hundreds of miles to an abortion clinic. About 45% of U.S. Black women live in the 14 states that have banned abortion in the past year since the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_. **And Republicans in Congress recently proposed a national abortion ban, trying to take us back to the time before _Roe v. Wade_ when the leading cause of death for Black women was sepsis from unsafe abortions.** [**Please sign the petition now to say NO to Republicans’ national abortion ban.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mMS_OfriUezMKzY5P7zuS0PtDDf0nPx1H-P6Zl3tjBY4iHegqT5Mk_q48O2HoJzgG9htEldiTJEHH6EK2P9yOlRoKsGO3zxUuBjhKLME0MdLVTM7YSUGpdrAGxbS6ynRdIoL6MVg8Qfotr54pN23T2RQF5iJLXs6wpRdX6VjGYA8nThrcUap_mnMjGl2k3i1xIWtY9bj9d7u6R9ec3Lmokew4UvWWoIcfC3rpZyax78CdxDALdUGuclcDg4hoQmYAgXb7_bjr4jHFX-O97O9BfBOXkjxXLiOjL4ecVD09jy6Ygp1TAnZ96G5HndOj9E9p7D3xmpuLFKYHA0wFnEMEodgNsoGuKidIKJ9FonRnYvdUBHb2qsydOtT-eohnAo-hl3ewzh8UDKnafC2JZA8bCEGObPYML0fOGvqRt5AwZiuvaGAWVvMfXS64ceaYobpf1M_tQFM6faya0useZhcxw0mmSo-b7MoL1TQOA-oUGDQ/3y0/RgbktqGLQbGKL3vmtGUNgg/h0/07QUCTSQHM4B-IDwE_Dfbdi9_USXWAu6VpmCoDRQ4p4) **[SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mMS_OfriUezMKzY5P7zuS0PtDDf0nPx1H-P6Zl3tjBY4iHegqT5Mk_q48O2HoJzgG9htEldiTJEHH6EK2P9yOlRoKsGO3zxUuBjhKLME0MdLVTM7YSUGpdrAGxbS6ynRdIoL6MVg8Qfotr54pN23T2RQF5iJLXs6wpRdX6VjGYA8nThrcUap_mnMjGl2k3i1xIWtY9bj9d7u6R9ec3Lmokew4UvWWoIcfC3rpZyax78CdxDALdUGuclcDg4hoQmYAxq0tEGsnmlHIex5mJPXR9Zi_IzM7JC1EsTWxHkXRvjPonI5V1nskhzH5dR__r4PTvG9EapRZbkSMV_pcIOQCYW4Fj75OOpjKOtJVEEZzYuWDgJ0xfvwI1ny26-hFGBgOBAvfGYlFoiRM0bqw-LL5e-gtLZqFTwlMw6GIj7yDEIo6F4VaPXT4hRyJsB_uUkaYSNxTVvXUYx2jG9Snh21_v4jkd60wEKnxOtekndvOm_E/3y0/RgbktqGLQbGKL3vmtGUNgg/h1/1bzS5VUoEGo3BdseOImLI3jBPBULGpz3L_QTebaAVsc) ** In yesterday’s round table discussion about medication abortion, Cori joined House Oversight Democrats and a leader with Abortion Action Missouri who has personally navigated the risk of criminalization for having an abortion. Of course, the people who are already over-criminalized and under-served in our current legal system -- Black, brown, Indigenous, disabled, trans, and low-income folks -- are most at threat as state and federal lawmakers crack down on access to abortion care. Cori has personally faced systemic racism and financial barriers when she needed an abortion, and that was while _Roe v. Wade_ was still in place. The situation is more dire and urgent now. Together, we will keep advocating for our fundamental rights, including our right to make decisions about our own bodies. name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: This isn’t what we want to share
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We missed our mid-month fundraising goal.
#

Team -
We’ll be direct: We missed our mid-month fundraising goal.
[**If you know you’re able to chip in $3 today to help us close the gap, you can click here to rush a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july23.pfB_59&refcode=em230719-1-15&t=1&akid=6159%2E3935704%2EZuxJjV)
Let us explain why it’s so important to catch up when we miss a goal:
We set our fundraising benchmarks because we need to raise a certain amount to be able to compete with the gun lobby and their heavy influence on our politics. When we don’t raise the funds we need, our adversaries take it as a sign of weakness.
But we know that our movement to end gun violence is stronger than ever. Your contribution is the best way to show that we’re not backing down in the fight to keep our communities safe from gun violence.
[**So please, chip in $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july23.pfB_59&refcode=em230719-1-15&t=2&akid=6159%2E3935704%2EZuxJjV)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-july23.np0YAl&amount=3&t=21&akid=6159%2E3935704%2EZuxJjV)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-july23.0BPTHR&refcode=em230719-1-15&t=22&akid=6159%2E3935704%2EZuxJjV)**

Thank you for your support,
The team at GIFFORDS PAC

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

clean_body: I’m sharing it with YOU first. Not even the Fake News has seen it.| | | | | Friend, I’m often asked: Mr. President, how do you get the motivation to keep fighting all of these vicious witch hunts? The truth is: my supporters like YOU are my motivation to keep fighting all of the false attacks aimed at destroying our movement. You are the source of my courage, my hope, and my resolution. You are the reason I will never give up our mission to save America. That’s why I decided it would be right to deliver my FIRST recorded statement toYOU – NOT the Fake News. | | The first unlawful indictment didn’t break us. The second unlawful indictment didn’t break us. Now, the Deep State is hoping that a THIRD unlawful indictment will finally bring us down. But these left-wing radicals who hate our country will NEVER understand the courage and patriotism of countless patriots like YOU who will do anything to save America. This movement is much bigger than me. Our movement is about giving a voice to the millions of Americans who feel betrayed by the Washington ruling class – and who feel that America has become a rigged system that benefits political insiders at the expense of the rest of us. They can try to stop me all they want with threats, indictments, and even arrests, but they can NEVER crush the spirits of 74 million patriots who want to make our country great again! NOTHING can stand in the way of a patriot’s desire to be free. As always, if you and your family are getting crushed by the very sinister and evil people who are sadly now in charge of Washington, D.C., then simply ignore what I’m about to ask... ...But if you can chip in, our movement can certainly use your support right now. | | Thank you, Donald J. body:
We should not tolerate racism or oppression anywhere. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvC44oQMsv3Efgw1Pp8yRZTtjPVkqtpr3xN6svvqc50KzHBhlMbURGKS0bkJZn6Za1lphHpNaXdwcICqKyuLyJmHO7VYne5F48Wxi3190QJpCq8Lel4ftHUAD_jnPf66MewEbAoRE810i_92QApO6_vdXTnNuPWd09fmeK7p4PGTFaDi3Z9qDpWuDCtwFApHgw/3y0/x53crJJiQx-zniRPGSOTpQ/h0/ZGtqOBEO10ZWq0QvPHlv6aGIunnaxb9zSU3I6KTWTmI)

Friend, Today, I will not be attending Israeli President Herzog’s address to Congress. A joint address to Congress is a rare honor, which should not be granted while Israel’s government commits apartheid and enables brutal racist attacks on Palestinians. This regime has even murdered Americans in the last year with impunity. We should not tolerate racism or oppression here in the United States, or anywhere else in the world. And just like I speak up against injustices here in America, I am speaking up against the Israeli government’s violence of ethnic cleansing and apartheid. [**Please sign the petition to urge all Members of Congress who stand for human rights to join me in boycotting apartheid by boycotting President Herzog’s address to Congress and speaking up for Palestinians’ human rights.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QaxOnWZsVd4Mwm6CYpAD3boFgdMjIF-ZS6IWNNSj-555WhLl6DUplM5gCpkbFrXH-r_wxqJr7peS05RWsIGme2ZULZPKAL20ewN8N70y1Gji6zj9u0CXwwhm3KuCENZm7cwtHYQ78i6RvAQ_kh-zzoWJZxh_o5hnJzV2zHwah5s8UAZCxeGRfr2PJm8PApS65EI7mexPZM3ts1qQEvvZbfqQBr7-s1kXUWILhQUeX93Ilk5c73Gpp0WBpP71s0Y6lapCU33WAWt_rusK1FJMZ59Vv5N7uZ_3BXv7Z_0zlu5pUUbW6ax1FXsgjikuaxosiqnzUNvCW4AsMqflmx0R0yEt46bg7mI_CVDMlqt-BgA4me1MngJTKlsnoKjzX6qrUWn_cB-qi1bQspqKWDDDCzw/3y0/x53crJJiQx-zniRPGSOTpQ/h1/jy28NyWZCHTa3ykO4RLJK6IZ86Omkg8pKgWNTvKfSDA) | [SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QaxOnWZsVd4Mwm6CYpAD3boFgdMjIF-ZS6IWNNSj-555WhLl6DUplM5gCpkbFrXH-r_wxqJr7peS05RWsIGme2ZULZPKAL20ewN8N70y1Gji6zj9u0CXwwhm3KuCENZm7cwtHYQ78i6RvAQ_kh-zzoU6X6qHKgkXIlO22U3JX_oz0aBI1iX2TeV3Syzf_cjMxDVXIF4Ym3hBlVknQCf2Gcn-pSCjPsuSMvtSvuZGEEn_0RHfREFnReO94UxSRDguLxbGAu69mYKZqx7qZ-5NjoVZ9XUTwilRIjKauLkyHSqAYzrWMQ3aO1wy8WiL1nzBTMAZO-VbTv5ZMKSLe7t0mcItKHWp00htRfH6LuBfcBk_-lZXSfbvzGDpNdg_KHFRndz5IIbvs7R5lRpukjAWHKg/3y0/x53crJJiQx-zniRPGSOTpQ/h2/-A4u-ScpMziGpTG1orgo8r-R-U1lLhTHDQA_mr5QJnk)

To honor any member of this far-right Israeli government with a joint address to Congress is to deny, ignore, and normalize the racist oppression and violence of apartheid. It enables human rights abuses.
**Members of Congress who care about human rights need to speak up about the human rights violations that the Israeli government is committing. Congress must also stop funding and arming apartheid.**
Instead of criticizing human rights abuses, Members of Congress on both sides of the aisle have been attacking progressive women of color who dare to speak up about the racist laws in the government of Israel.
**Yesterday the House of Representatives even passed a resolution reaffirming support for Israel’s apartheid government.**
**On the House floor, I spoke up as the only Palestinian American serving in Congress, with family members throughout the West Bank in what many people call the illegally occupied territories.**
I directly quoted extreme Israeli politicians who have denied the humanity of people like my grandmother, so my colleagues in Congress could hear the racism in their own words.
I shared how a former defense minister said that Palestinians are “beasts” and “not human.” A former justice minister called Palestinians “snakes.” A senior official has called to “erase” Palestinian villages while denying Palestinian existence. The leaders in Israel’s government are outright racists, and they’re open about trying to make Palestinians’ lives “unbearable” and to “crush” Palestinians’ hopes for a sovereign state.
[**Please sign the petition now to ask Members of Congress to join me in boycotting apartheid by boycotting the Israeli President’s speech to Congress today.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QaxOnWZsVd4Mwm6CYpAD3boFgdMjIF-ZS6IWNNSj-555WhLl6DUplM5gCpkbFrXH-r_wxqJr7peS05RWsIGme2ZULZPKAL20ewN8N70y1Gji6zj9u0CXwwhm3KuCENZm7cwtHYQ78i6RvAQ_kh-zzodHzC3anVORVpgzu845qOgYxZyT961g76hqpq6twqxB5U5anWHYcvfTz9jTFuV1quL9movOGU6bKfCVVXVAOruuSuDMxNIENi6KhjisYkf5vKBONYLgyOPJEdo0liBFuQgNp_hHw64U8sZK5MuumSoeK2mF3dLlTV_hZoxnh-aAfmz1Jqpn2Ftke5VdfI9y8WEBcfhi2SomTZ3-JCaYHyIcQ-1IE5OrJ65w2WK6ig72yrkvkY1Sxb_bM3ScFvOKeaQ/3y0/x53crJJiQx-zniRPGSOTpQ/h3/141WaEQ6b8povSeH7il2KJCdX3LIisISaK0oh6N_nus)
I will continue to act in solidarity with the Palestinian people and all those who have been harmed by the Israeli apartheid government and their policies. Thank you for joining me in the fight for Palestinian freedom and against oppression everywhere.
In service,
Rashida

clean_body: We should not tolerate racism or oppression anywhere. | | | Friend, Today, I will not be attending Israeli President Herzog’s address to Congress. A joint address to Congress is a rare honor, which should not be granted while Israel’s government commits apartheid and enables brutal racist attacks on Palestinians. This regime has even murdered Americans in the last year with impunity. We should not tolerate racism or oppression here in the United States, or anywhere else in the world. And just like I speak up against injustices here in America, I am speaking up against the Israeli government’s violence of ethnic cleansing and apartheid. | To honor any member of this far-right Israeli government with a joint address to Congress is to deny, ignore, and normalize the racist oppression and violence of apartheid. It enables human rights abuses. Members of Congress who care about human rights need to speak up about the human rights violations that the Israeli government is committing. Congress must also stop funding and arming apartheid. Instead of criticizing human rights abuses, Members of Congress on both sides of the aisle have been attacking progressive women of color who dare to speak up about the racist laws in the government of Israel. Yesterday the House of Representatives even passed a resolution reaffirming support for Israel’s apartheid government. On the House floor, I spoke up as the only Palestinian American serving in Congress, with family members throughout the West Bank in what many people call the illegally occupied territories. I directly quoted extreme Israeli politicians who have denied the humanity of people like my grandmother, so my colleagues in Congress could hear the racism in their own words. I shared how a former defense minister said that Palestinians are “beasts” and “not human.” A former justice minister called Palestinians “snakes.” A senior official has called to “erase” Palestinian villages while denying Palestinian existence. The leaders in Israel’s government are outright racists, and they’re open about trying to make Palestinians’ lives “unbearable” and to “crush” Palestinians’ hopes for a sovereign state. I will continue to act in solidarity with the Palestinian people and all those who have been harmed by the Israeli apartheid government and their policies. Thank you for joining me in the fight for Palestinian freedom and against oppression everywhere. In service, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

For this week's Hold The Line Podcast, I talk with California State Senator Shannon Grove. Senator Grove is one of the early supporters of Let Us Worship. She invited us to bring worship to the Sacramento capitol in 2020! You may recognize her name because she was in the news last week. She authored a bill to increase penalties on child traffickers, a bill which was inexplicably killed by Democrats in a legislative committee.

After Democrats initially ensured the bill's defeat, we jumped into action and put out a call to pray for this important bill to be revived. If you prayed, then YOU are a part of this story, and YOU are part of the miracle!! God answered our prayers, and the bill was passed and signed into law a few days later.

subject: Mike Lawler and House Republicans are platforming antisemitism
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Once again, Mike Lawler sided with Kevin McCarthy and the most extreme faction of the Republican Party by refusing to denounce antisemitic and racist comments made by Robert F. Kennedy Jr. **(In case you missed it, RFK, Jr. is peddling an outrageous claim that COVID-19 was "ethnically targeted" to attack certain ethnic groups while sparing Ashkenazi Jews and Chinese people).**

Immediately, Mondaire and other Democrats spoke up and denounced RFK, Jr.’s actions, but Lyin’ Lawler and other extremists in Kevin McCarthy’s GOP stayed silent.

**Instead, they’re giving RFK, Jr. a platform to spread his dangerous views at a House Judiciary Committee hearing on Thursday.**

This isn’t the first time Lyin’ Lawler has been tied to antisemitism. In 2019, the Chairman of the Rockland County GOP credited him with the strategy that produced a viral campaign video attacking Rockland’s orthodox Jewish community. Then, in his campaign for Congress, he received the maximum allowable donation from Carl Paladino, who expressed admiration for Adolf Hitler.

[**It’s time Lyin’ Lawler and House Republicans do their job and revoke RFK, Jr.’s invite to speak before Congress. He needs to stand up for the people of our district >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66716643/417347298/-1348987665?ms=em23_230719_RFKJR_adv_gq_act___tm_ettx&refcode=em23_230719_RFKJR_adv_gq_act___tm_ettx&source=em23_230719_RFKJR_adv_gq_act___tm_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230719_RFKJR_adv_gq_act___tm_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=Jbc5bZ6JLB9K35DNZsY+KlUwuWNm3CCADal/DGPbcTqrl1ciRpMXLNCWa8yr5awnLT9R7QA5QZQBenr+gTdi3jRh04DlQ1RYknjudJj3/UQ=&refcode2=01a71d55-4d26-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWE3MWQ1NS00ZDI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V2OI-OnnGvn7ul1bXsbVugJYlaLNHN_6W-VM5qZjWtQ=&emci=952cc785-4226-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=01a71d55-4d26-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=24719896)

Stating I am the target of a GRAND JURY investigation

Friend,
On Sunday night, while I was with my family, my attorneys gave me HORRIFYING news.
The deranged prosecutor with Biden’s Department of Justice sent a letter, stating that **I AM A TARGET OF THE JANUARY 6TH GRAND JURY INVESTIGATION.**
**They gave me a very short time period of 4 DAYS to report to the Grand Jury, which almost always means an ARREST and INDICTMENT.**
Let me be perfectly clear: I DID NOTHING WRONG. I AM COMPLETELY INNOCENT.
This is just another vicious act of Election Interference on behalf of the Deep State to try and stop the Silent Majority from having a voice in your own country.
It’s quite the coincidence that this news comes JUST AFTER a series of polls show that all of our Republican opponents are LOSING BADLY to Crooked Joe Biden – and that I AM THE ONLY CANDIDATE projected to beat him in a free and fair election.
This letter also comes just after our FEC report revealed a TREMENDOUS number of small-dollar donors, proving that the _AMERICAN PEOPLE_ stand by our movement.
The Special Counsel’s office has already wasted $9 MILLION of YOUR taxpayer money on never-ending witch hunts to try and destroy our movement – not to mention the $32 MILLION wasted in Mueller’s Russia, Russia, Russia witch hunt.
When I keep touring the country and hear voters tell me, “President Trump, you’re our only hope!” “President Trump, we NEED you back in the White House!” – I know that I could never stop fighting to save our country, no matter how vicious these witch hunts ever become.
**The fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. It’s not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well – and I will _NEVER_ let them take it from you.**
_If you’re doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day._
But if not, I don’t have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now.

clean_body: Stating I am the target of a GRAND JURY investigation | | | Friend, On Sunday night, while I was with my family, my attorneys gave me HORRIFYING news. The deranged prosecutor with Biden’s Department of Justice sent a letter, stating that I AM A TARGET OF THE JANUARY 6TH GRAND JURY INVESTIGATION. They gave me a very short time period of 4 DAYS to report to the Grand Jury, which almost always means an ARREST and INDICTMENT. Let me be perfectly clear: I DID NOTHING WRONG. I AM COMPLETELY INNOCENT. This is just another vicious act of Election Interference on behalf of the Deep State to try and stop the Silent Majority from having a voice in your own country. It’s quite the coincidence that this news comes JUST AFTER a series of polls show that all of our Republican opponents are LOSING BADLY to Crooked Joe Biden – and that I AM THE ONLY CANDIDATE projected to beat him in a free and fair election. This letter also comes just after our FEC report revealed a TREMENDOUS number of small-dollar donors, proving that the AMERICAN PEOPLE stand by our movement. The Special Counsel’s office has already wasted $9 MILLION of YOUR taxpayer money on never-ending witch hunts to try and destroy our movement – not to mention the $32 MILLION wasted in Mueller’s Russia, Russia, Russia witch hunt. When I keep touring the country and hear voters tell me, “President Trump, you’re our only hope!” “President Trump, we NEED you back in the White House!” – I know that I could never stop fighting to save our country, no matter how vicious these witch hunts ever become. The fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. It’s not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well – and I will NEVER let them take it from you. If you’re doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day. But if not, I don’t have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now. | | Thank you, | Donald J. Donald J. Trump July 18th, 2023
Some reboots were never going to be successful, like Dynasty, Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles, or even MacGyver. And now we can add Ron DeSantis’ 2024 campaign to the list of failures.
The real story here is that the DeSantis campaign doesn’t know how to turn things around with their current candidate. Case in point: they don’t actually want any Republican primary voters to see his CNN interview. DeSantis could have easily joined one of CNN’s high-profile primetime hosts and reached millions of new voters if he had something compelling to say, but with an unlikable candidate, no campaign message, and rapidly sinking poll numbers, the campaign is doing an afternoon hit that nobody will watch. That’s a tactic, not a new strategy, and it’s not going to change DeSantis’ campaign nosedive.

Trump July 18th, 2023 Some reboots were never going to be successful, like Dynasty, Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles, or even MacGyver. And now we can add Ron DeSantis’ 2024 campaign to the list of failures. The real story here is that the DeSantis campaign doesn’t know how to turn things around with their current candidate. Case in point: they don’t actually want any Republican primary voters to see his CNN interview. DeSantis could have easily joined one of CNN’s high-profile primetime hosts and reached millions of new voters if he had something compelling to say, but with an unlikable candidate, no campaign message, and rapidly sinking poll numbers, the campaign is doing an afternoon hit that nobody will watch. That’s a tactic, not a new strategy, and it’s not going to change DeSantis’ campaign nosedive. | ---|--- Donald J. 0711-a-Attack-Other-Neg&utm_agency=PG Just about a month ago, the
Indiana Democrat Party invited Stacey Abrams to deliver a message at
their annual fundraiser.

Their reaction? Well, it left them
“inspired.”

... inspired by the same far-left Democrat that fights
against photo ID laws like Indiana's and that refused to concede the
2018 Georgia gubernatorial election after the race had been called for
Republican Brian Kemp.

By embracing election denier Stacey Abrams,
the Indiana Democrat Party has once again shown just how extreme it has
become.

It’s why they fought against common sense photo ID and
election integrity laws this past session to ensure the vote-by-mail
process is as secure as voting in person.

Friend,
On Sunday night, while I was with my family, my attorneys gave me HORRIFYING news.
The deranged prosecutor with Biden's Department of Justice sent a letter, stating that **I AM A TARGET OF THE JANUARY 6TH GRAND JURY INVESTIGATION.**
**They gave me a very short time period of 4 DAYS to report to the Grand Jury, which almost always means an ARREST and INDICTMENT.**
Let me be perfectly clear: I DID NOTHING WRONG. I AM COMPLETELY INNOCENT.
This is just another vicious act of Election Interference on behalf of the Deep State to try and stop the Silent Majority from having a voice in your own country.
It's quite the coincidence that this news comes JUST AFTER a series of polls show that all of our Republican opponents are LOSING BADLY to Crooked Joe Biden - and that I AM THE ONLY CANDIDATE projected to beat him in a free and fair election.
This letter also comes just after our FEC report revealed a TREMENDOUS number of small-dollar donors, proving that the _AMERICAN PEOPLE_ stand by our movement.
The Special Counsel's office has already wasted $9 MILLION of YOUR taxpayer money on never-ending witch hunts to try and destroy our movement - not to mention the $32 MILLION wasted in Mueller's Russia, Russia, Russia witch hunt.
When I keep touring the country and hear voters tell me, "President Trump, you're our only hope!" "President Trump, we NEED you back in the White House!" - I know that I could never stop fighting to save our country, no matter how vicious these witch hunts ever become.
**The fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. It 's not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well - and I will _NEVER_ let them take it from you.**
_If you 're doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day._
But if not, I don't have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now.

clean_body: Stating I am the target of a GRAND JURY investigation | | | Friend, On Sunday night, while I was with my family, my attorneys gave me HORRIFYING news. The deranged prosecutor with Biden's Department of Justice sent a letter, stating that I AM A TARGET OF THE JANUARY 6TH GRAND JURY INVESTIGATION. They gave me a very short time period of 4 DAYS to report to the Grand Jury, which almost always means an ARREST and INDICTMENT. Let me be perfectly clear: I DID NOTHING WRONG. I AM COMPLETELY INNOCENT. This is just another vicious act of Election Interference on behalf of the Deep State to try and stop the Silent Majority from having a voice in your own country. It's quite the coincidence that this news comes JUST AFTER a series of polls show that all of our Republican opponents are LOSING BADLY to Crooked Joe Biden - and that I AM THE ONLY CANDIDATE projected to beat him in a free and fair election. This letter also comes just after our FEC report revealed a TREMENDOUS number of small-dollar donors, proving that the AMERICAN PEOPLE stand by our movement. The Special Counsel's office has already wasted $9 MILLION of YOUR taxpayer money on never-ending witch hunts to try and destroy our movement - not to mention the $32 MILLION wasted in Mueller's Russia, Russia, Russia witch hunt. When I keep touring the country and hear voters tell me, "President Trump, you're our only hope!" "President Trump, we NEED you back in the White House!" - I know that I could never stop fighting to save our country, no matter how vicious these witch hunts ever become. The fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. It 's not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well - and I will NEVER let them take it from you. If you 're doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day. But if not, I don't have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now. | | Thank you, | Donald J. Hey, Peter. Rand Paul here. For years, liberty-minded folks like myself have warned about government agencies abusing their power to trample on Americans’ First Amendment rights – and we were just proven right... _[**AGAIN!**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d95bf0e3598f4c1cb0a3f1a5e450eeb5&_e=qyC8Ka67dEPdAaV3z969Wen6O7QSj8URB1qzIzqjc4A_CQsW28OfZlU4RysyfiA9pJZ6nzfS9TvEOmekvtuXpyPRv3pu_iETCHHZFQaPyTlTFJYDR1iRBRN2Sl5GhPFjc0dejJHy3gUL6aMHgqNNEVBJGBez_Nq0PHryXZrwtcYNtjd4jtwHibLAvvGgKPFPFSeewf1ISHok-Q4N-BCk-CZ21aMgGPanm1t_lu8P3EbXGHRQg35szB6SyWNfMtSoOXqLT02mESRrvSO6xd5iYjzZCN8uHoCpb9-nxkHVk4sODZE5a2mfaLQ3rU4NHd9GZ2uLyS9wweESLcMY1IVwnIVQ_ZVJTMV_1VHgIORNIis%3D)_ The Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) worked heavily with other taxpayer-funded agencies to stop so-called “misinformation” and “disinformation.” **They had an ENTIRE “rapid response team” that worked around the clock to stifle what you had to say online, Peter, even if what you said was true!__[THIS IS WRONG >>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d95bf0e3598f4c1cb0a3f1a5e450eeb5&_e=qyC8Ka67dEPdAaV3z969Wen6O7QSj8URB1qzIzqjc4A_CQsW28OfZlU4RysyfiA9pJZ6nzfS9TvEOmekvtuXpyPRv3pu_iETCHHZFQaPyTlTFJYDR1iRBRN2Sl5GhPFjc0dejJHy3gUL6aMHgqNNEVBJGBez_Nq0PHryXZrwtcYNtjd4jtwHibLAvvGgKPFPFSeewf1ISHok-Q4N-BCk-CktOnWFPHR6zusx1L1XotjDii8__0bJy9k9avxckOT0Qg6pLUyzpJRUyr4Le6Yehrfgj6j1MAPmw3ADZOihvff2-y7qVNKHfvjt-sWo4Qvo779r_ApdEDfAP_E4T38ZiyP45vo1J7PC0WYLLZ5B9EQ%3D)__** What makes this even worse? __They knew it was wrong.__
---
| | “Members of the CISA’s advisory committee agonize it was **‘only a matter of time before someone realizes we exist and starts asking about our work.’”** _ -House Judiciary Committee’s CISA Staff Report_
---
[**> > STOP THE ABUSE OF POWER <<**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d95bf0e3598f4c1cb0a3f1a5e450eeb5&_e=qyC8Ka67dEPdAaV3z969Wen6O7QSj8URB1qzIzqjc4A_CQsW28OfZlU4RysyfiA9pJZ6nzfS9TvEOmekvtuXpyPRv3pu_iETCHHZFQaPyTlTFJYDR1iRBRN2Sl5GhPFjc0dejJHy3gUL6aMHgqNNEVBJGBez_Nq0PHryXZrwtcYNtjd4jtwHibLAvvGgKPFPFSeewf1ISHok-Q4N-BCk-AK_pJNH46hA2BOEEyhmbUEWXu6tKaMr8XnGfmCuBRj87vf0HgEB09lYPliXdsVPL0WysSej7IklbFu8ziQiOcOcrbw4V2Y-fTGZ7oMBanikFjVvK5ppaRqb7A2e_He6JU-5N4zRqz0fu2QwiAiOmbA%3D)

clean_body: This is antithetical to everything America stands for, Peter, and we owe it to ourselves to fight back. | | | Please see a note from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this . Hey, Peter. Rand Paul here. For years, liberty-minded folks like myself have warned about government agencies abusing their power to trample on Americans’ First Amendment rights – and we were just proven right... The Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) worked heavily with other taxpayer-funded agencies to stop so-called “misinformation” and “disinformation.” They had an ENTIRE “rapid response team” that worked around the clock to stifle what you had to say online, Peter, even if what you said was true! What makes this even worse? They knew it was wrong. | | “Members of the CISA’s advisory committee agonize it was ‘only a matter of time before someone realizes we exist and starts asking about our work.’” -House Judiciary Committee’s CISA Staff Report | | Instead of stopping this unconstitutional and highly illegal whole-of-government censorship effort, they doubled down. They created a taxpayer-funded “non-profit” that continued this work even after the Biden administration admitted in court that this type of censorship violated your First Amendment rights. | | Peter, we can’t allow this type of abuse of power to continue. We HAVE to rein in an out-of-control government that stifles liberty and tramples on our constitutional rights. | | | | | If we allow the government to ignore the Constitution, we will lose the country we’ve come to know and love. body:
Most elections are local – so why do we only hear about the federal elections?

| |
---
Peter, Sometimes, it can be difficult to explain how Democrats can begin to make a comeback in rural America. But Peter, take a look at this chart of how many elected officials serve at each level of government: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66718525/417354135/1646350971?refcode=urd-em-230719-local&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmExZTg0NjAtNTAyNi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=w4WXoVTrcQQ1o68xbNeX_1ZzqhirJmYLxPmcNhJpKPg=) **That’s right – more than 99% of all elected officials are at the local and state level.** At United Rural Democrats, we are dedicated to strengthening Democratic performance by championing elections across the country. That’s why we work with candidates at ALL levels of government – from the U.S. Senate, to your state Senate, to your town council. [**Will you chip in and join United Rural Democrats in our whole-of-government approach to bringing Democratic leadership back in rural Local elections play a pivotal role in shaping the future of our communities. They provide us with the opportunity to elect representatives who understand the unique challenges and aspirations of our rural areas. From mayors and city council members to school board officials and county commissioners, these local leaders have a direct impact on our everyday lives. They make decisions that affect our schools, infrastructure, public safety, and local economy. If Democrats are going to make a comeback in Rural America, they can’t just be focused on federal offices – we owe every community our attention. That’s why we work with candidates at ALL levels of government – from the U.S. Senate, to your state Senate, to your town council. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = Local elections play a pivotal role in shaping the future of our communities. They provide us with the opportunity to elect representatives who understand the unique challenges and aspirations of our rural areas. From mayors and city council members to school board officials and county commissioners, these local leaders have a direct impact on our everyday lives. They make decisions that affect our schools, infrastructure, public safety, and local economy. If Democrats are going to make a comeback in Rural America, they can’t just be focused on federal offices – we owe every community our attention. = – United Rural Dems | United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue? = = PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . United Rural Democrats PO Box 44 Tampico, IL 61283 United States

name: Team Gillibrand
subject: NEWS: Senator Gillibrand introducing bipartisan bill to ban members of Congress from holding or trading individual stocks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Friends, [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Today, Senator Kirsten Gillibrand unveiled her landmark Ban Stock Trading for Government Officials Act – the most substantial bipartisan effort yet to ban stock trading and restore faith and accountability in our elected officials.
https://www.wsj.com/articles/senators-to-propose-ban-on-u-s-lawmakers-executive-branch-members-owning-stock-6db6411 [https://www.wsj.com/articles/senators-to-propose-ban-on-u-s-lawmakers-executive-branch-members-owning-stock-6db6411]
A majority of Americans – regardless of political party – believe that members of Congress shouldn’t be able to own or trade stocks. And it’s no wonder:
*
1
in
3
members
of
Congress
traded
stocks
or
other
financial
assets
from
2019
to
2021.
*
1
in
7
members
of
the
117th
Congress
violated
Kirsten’s
STOCK
Act
by
failing
to
properly
report
their
stock
trades.
*
Members
of
Congress
conducted
a
staggering
3,700+
stock
trades
from
2019
to
2021
that
potentially
posed
conflicts
of
interest
.
*
And
members
of
Congress’
stock
portfolios
outperformed
the
S&P
500
by
an
average
of
17.5%
in
2022.
It is critical that the American people know that their elected leaders are putting the public good first – not abusing the power of their office to line their own pockets.
That’s why Kirsten was the first member of Congress to post a daily report listing her official meetings, personal financial disclosures, taxes and earmark requests online. And it’s why, in 2012, she introduced and passed the STOCK Act, which banned members of Congress from engaging in insider trading.
Sunlight is always the best disinfectant. Thank you for standing with Kirsten in this fight.
- Team Gillibrand
P.S. Kirsten’s campaign doesn’t accept donations from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists – it is entirely powered by grassroots supporters like you. So please, make a contribution in support of her campaign today to help her continue her work to clean up Washington.
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_footer] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
A note from Kirsten:
Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever.
While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority.
As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_footer] And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, text JOIN to 60708. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_footer]
Thank you,
Kirsten Gillibrand

| | I think the Kaine team said it all, Derek. Tim Kaine has a new GOP challenger, and he needs our help now. **__[Rush $5 to support Tim and stop his new opponent’s election launch momentum in its tracks>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66719005/417356193/-1932400013?refcode=mw_em_230719_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjQ2YTJjZC01MTI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0lHlsZTA4RMui8tjV2ExHiRwrqlLr00rk8t6r-jzDls=)__** ******Remember: This seat could be the seat that decides Senate control next year. ******If we don’t help Tim fight back, we’re at risk of the GOP taking back the majority and enacting their right-wing agenda. I’m proud to always have Tim’s back, and I know he always has mine. But today, I need you to have his back too. _**_**_**[Please, if you can, step up and support my friend during this crucial moment by donating anything you can to his re-election campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66719006/417356194/-1932400013?refcode=mw_em_230719_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjQ2YTJjZC01MTI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0lHlsZTA4RMui8tjV2ExHiRwrqlLr00rk8t6r-jzDls=)**_**_**_ Thank you, Mark —------- Forwarded message ------— **BREAKING NEWS: ** _**NRSC-picked Republican, Hung Cao, enters race to challenge Tim Kaine for U.S. Senate seat**_ Former GOP Congressional candidate Hung Cao has launched his campaign to officially challenge Tim Kaine for Virginia’s U.S. Senate seat. Cao, who was openly recruited by the GOP’s national Senate fundraising committee, is an anti-choice extremist who said he was “thrilled” that _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned and compared abortion to the Holocaust. He has also supported Florida Sen. Rick Scott’s plan to put Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security on the chopping block, called for gutting health care protections for 1.3 million Virginians with pre-existing conditions, and expressed sympathy for the January 6th insurrectionists while calling into question the 2020 election results. _**Put simply, Hung Cao does not represent the interests of the people of Virginia -- and he cannot be allowed anywhere near the U.S. Senate.**_ **Here’s the problem:** Steve Daines, chair of the well-funded National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC), has recruited Cao to run against Tim next November. I’m proud to always have Tim’s back, and I know he always has mine. But today, I need you to have his back too. =_ Thank you, Mark —------- Forwarded message ------— BREAKING NEWS: NRSC-picked Republican, Hung Cao, enters race to challenge Tim Kaine for U.S. Senate seat Former GOP Congressional candidate Hung Cao has launched his campaign to officially challenge Tim Kaine for Virginia’s U.S. Senate seat. Cao, who was openly recruited by the GOP’s national Senate fundraising committee, is an anti-choice extremist who said he was “thrilled” that Roe v. Wade was overturned and compared abortion to the Holocaust. He has also supported Florida Sen. Rick Scott’s plan to put Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security on the chopping block, called for gutting health care protections for 1.3 million Virginians with pre-existing conditions, and expressed sympathy for the January 6th insurrectionists while calling into question the 2020 election results. Put simply, Hung Cao does not represent the interests of the people of Virginia -- and he cannot be allowed anywhere near the U.S. Senate. Here’s the problem: Steve Daines, chair of the well-funded National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC), has recruited Cao to run against Tim next November. name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znm9png8a9osgl06232pkh6a68gppkrplr341avg_rp22sh2s8i66o74stie1or1c5h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc8fst2edijlbeacrrcocega4u9fi5ovr54j6n3o_rp22sh2s8i66o74stie1or1c5h2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjlafrhqp1j6g0cqoevgats4ulmkpb38jqlu9090_rp22sh2s8i66o74stie1or1c5h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj28arac7fe1n9oq36mlvdacqi50bmkca1h42ljo_rp22sh2s8i66o74stie1or1c5h2bs)

[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlp096bd49voumi850b8u1c85cg431uji952q6cg_rp22sh2s8i66o74stie1or1c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5nbaqjg94m3ts5bagib762oelsaii33723u9mc0_rp22sh2s8i66o74stie1or1c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6c324rp8hh3j8sbb1ucvb9mnlgb66374bpgkb88_rp22sh2s8i66o74stie1or1c5h2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z45ok5k883fjsfvdl4uhefhavbhuf5hponmtolbg_rp22sh2s8i66o74stie1or1c5h2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zts0mrhf1nie18cv4rcinee681jv6clrgb8ejjrg_rp22sh2s8i66o74stie1or1c5h2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi4le5sv5fr6fecn2e5a85kgouvp3h940brah6o0_rp22sh2s8i66o74stie1or1c5h2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrtpl7fsnkvkqfaq419lo9h4dq3js58sne25i0ng_rp22sh2s8i66o74stie1or1c5h2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: URGENT: I RECEIVED A LETTER INFORMING ME. . .
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
Stating I am the target of a GRAND JURY investigation

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcl4euhaqudc6a7jntr68v7tedek7hs85qpqmm68_rp22sh2s8i66o74stie1or1c5h2bs)
---
Friend,
On Sunday night, while I was with my family, my attorneys gave me HORRIFYING news.
The deranged prosecutor with Biden’s Department of Justice sent a letter, stating that **I AM A TARGET OF THE JANUARY 6TH GRAND JURY INVESTIGATION.**
**They gave me a very short time period of 4 DAYS to report to the Grand Jury, which almost always means an ARREST and INDICTMENT.**
Let me be perfectly clear: I DID NOTHING WRONG. I AM COMPLETELY INNOCENT.
This is just another vicious act of Election Interference on behalf of the Deep State to try and stop the Silent Majority from having a voice in your own country.
It’s quite the coincidence that this news comes JUST AFTER a series of polls show that all of our Republican opponents are LOSING BADLY to Crooked Joe Biden – and that I AM THE ONLY CANDIDATE projected to beat him in a free and fair election.
This letter also comes just after our FEC report revealed a TREMENDOUS number of small-dollar donors, proving that the _AMERICAN PEOPLE_ stand by our movement.
The Special Counsel’s office has already wasted $9 MILLION of YOUR taxpayer money on never-ending witch hunts to try and destroy our movement – not to mention the $32 MILLION wasted in Mueller’s Russia, Russia, Russia witch hunt.
When I keep touring the country and hear voters tell me, “President Trump, you’re our only hope!” “President Trump, we NEED you back in the White House!” – I know that I could never stop fighting to save our country, no matter how vicious these witch hunts ever become.
**The fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. It’s not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well – and I will _NEVER_ let them take it from you.**
_If you’re doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day._
But if not, I don’t have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now.
**[Please make a contribution to show that you will NEVER SURRENDER our country to tyranny as the Deep State thugs try to JAIL me for life – for 1,500% impact.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr60678n782qtv1h5c0l74afsr76ph8p972ta5r8_rp22sh2s8i66o74stie1or1c5h2bs)**

The deranged prosecutor with Biden’s Department of Justice sent a letter, stating that I AM A TARGET OF THE JANUARY 6TH GRAND JURY INVESTIGATION. They gave me a very short time period of 4 DAYS to report to the Grand Jury, which almost always means an ARREST and INDICTMENT. Let me be perfectly clear: I DID NOTHING WRONG. I AM COMPLETELY INNOCENT. This is just another vicious act of Election Interference on behalf of the Deep State to try and stop the Silent Majority from having a voice in your own country. It’s quite the coincidence that this news comes JUST AFTER a series of polls show that all of our Republican opponents are LOSING BADLY to Crooked Joe Biden – and that I AM THE ONLY CANDIDATE projected to beat him in a free and fair election. This letter also comes just after our FEC report revealed a TREMENDOUS number of small-dollar donors, proving that the AMERICAN PEOPLE stand by our movement. The Special Counsel’s office has already wasted $9 MILLION of YOUR taxpayer money on never-ending witch hunts to try and destroy our movement – not to mention the $32 MILLION wasted in Mueller’s Russia, Russia, Russia witch hunt. When I keep touring the country and hear voters tell me, “President Trump, you’re our only hope!” “President Trump, we NEED you back in the White House!” – I know that I could never stop fighting to save our country, no matter how vicious these witch hunts ever become. The fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. It’s not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well – and I will NEVER let them take it from you. If you’re doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day. name: Captain Sam Brown
subject: I thought I was dead. But God had other plans.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
I survived this for a reason, Friend

| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zobbjd9c5taj7t9grhsb0i5mquupofe11iblgmqo_rp22sh2s8i66o74stie1or1c5h2bs)
---
Even 15 years after the bomb went off - it's hard to believe that I survived. While serving in Afghanistan, a roadside bomb exploded under the gas tank of my vehicle. The explosion drenched me in diesel and covered my body in flames. **_I thought I was done for. But God had other plans._** A fellow soldier, who had also been injured by our attackers, rushed to extinguish the fire on my body. But, I don't remember that day as the day I nearly died. **I remember it as the day I was given a new life.** A life that would be totally dedicated to the service of my country, and my family for the glory of God. **_The life I live is not my own, and I intend to give my whole life up in service. _** **[That 's why I'm running for the U.S. Senate.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7igla1njuciqbqpfigm15bqfgnl8ss7n9e9jq4g_rp22sh2s8i66o74stie1or1c5h2bs)** I always knew that God's calling for my life would lead me to service for my country. What I didn't know is that this path would lead me to run for public office. But the mission I'm setting off on today is not one I can complete on my own. [**That 's why I am asking for your support today.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqeacqfbcv472fg6d4n56249duupjrr25f2ut98o_rp22sh2s8i66o74stie1or1c5h2bs) Friend, the fight to defend America is fundamentally not about me. It's about protecting the greatest country in the history of mankind and ensuring the longevity of the American experiment for you, your children, and your children's children. **But the American experiment has never been in greater peril than it is right now.** Just look at where our country is right now. Since Joe Biden took office, we've faced unprecedented threats from adversaries like China, our economy has fallen to shambles, our southern border has deteriorated. We've allowed a full scale invasion to occur, and the radical left's agenda has torn our nation apart bit by bit. The mission to take back the Senate and restore our nation is going to require all of us, working together as a team, to complete. **[I 'm relying on patriots like you to join me. Help me make this mission possible NOW! >>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zacde5068nqo38439123gthmg5e9cparinlevcgo_rp22sh2s8i66o74stie1or1c5h2bs)** Duty First,
---
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfuqam10h53kurhptu3bmbhut8nuojkop5rgenqo_rp22sh2s8i66o74stie1or1c5h2bs)
---
CPT Sam Brown, US Army (Ret.)

name: Vivek
subject: America was founded on these TRUTHS.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
"There's only one TRUTH. Not yours, not mine. PURE TRUTH. If you agree with these 10 TRUTHS, I need you on my team. "
[Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=2468650497fd40a5a60262dfd5accc59&_t=K_aHmY5lpII5v2FcYoq3reddMJXgcxGJVyBYK3WROmvlzWbG_BaODS5FbzLN_okGSIZHWL_4uUdIj5BvhH5YC9f_ltDvX6lHYbmthtYhw4A%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=2468650497fd40a5a60262dfd5accc59&_t=K_aHmY5lpII5v2FcYoq3reddMJXgcxGJVyBYK3WROmvlzWbG_BaODS5FbzLN_okGSIZHWL_4uUdIj5BvhH5YC9f_ltDvX6lHYbmthtYhw4A%3D)

|
Fellow American,

**TRUTH.** There's only one. Not yours, not mine. Just pure TRUTH. In today's bureaucratic political climate where spin is all the Administrative state knows how to do, we stand by cold-hard facts. I'm not afraid to say them:

|
**God** is real.
There are **two** genders.
Human flourishing requires **fossil fuels**.
**Reverse racism** is racism.
An open border is **no border**.
**Parents** determine the education of their children.
The **nuclear family** is the greatest form of governance known to mankind.
**Capitalism** lifts people up from poverty.
There are three branches of the U.S. government, **not four**.
The **U.S. Constitution** is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history.
| [** CHIP IN IF YOU BELIEVE IN THE TRUTH **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2468650497fd40a5a60262dfd5accc59&_e=qJN4oay-F5qnMzIeQS1L3mSeTqFlAMWRJEL-A5ZKaCDhNY-Nrb_NcK7XTodkqWLGpZA9QuGGiRIkegTtCZ58LrCdkUCrsyxE3Hsn_97QMm-Osx3cqqteaVE8lcI8xCdV0oHg3MzdMt-BmRh5ojrXZTSnWUSvMnvhg3cPtsoUFuTmTr_HVeNF-M3Jw1Ar-Hq60hcOvey2BJ0BqjLox1Lm5iQ-_q47KsCjNqC1F2u8E30Fa5OmW8q9hh9pQt_2oYVvs7voU9tbc8oAxSnipVPd3WzNUrRdIKGKdTSvb9moxXRHZOXI3CZnJumVsxM5x8CINFZoUn5bXeyZXeNHVZx7onGfcS-yr14biRJ1E74nrvqHtKlw83IJ0LMdC-ZxiYL2SJL62_W6GoWyUxyQGZoZyQ%3D%3D)
---

America was founded on these truths that we find sacred and undeniable. **Without these truths, our standing as a nation would mean nothing.**

If you agree with these 10 TRUTHS, _**[I need you on my team.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2468650497fd40a5a60262dfd5accc59&_e=qJN4oay-F5qnMzIeQS1L3mSeTqFlAMWRJEL-A5ZKaCDhNY-Nrb_NcK7XTodkqWLGpZA9QuGGiRIkegTtCZ58LrCdkUCrsyxE3Hsn_97QMm-Osx3cqqteaVE8lcI8xCdV0oHg3MzdMt-BmRh5ojrXZTSnWUSvMnvhg3cPtsoUFuTmTr_HVeNF-M3Jw1Ar-Hq60hcOvey2BJ0BqjLox1Lm5iQ-_q47KsCjNqC1F2u8E30Fa5OmW8q9hh9pQt_2oYVv431N32UN4vysk53A-IDlTjwlEsP_Zm7HNrOimOwq4TdH05ojfg_IFJDRz2Ub0uh8arxq9xZLwVbbbMNmcM6Nr3zWTUuJxYJKpEx3xYw9Qbq6GAXdjrpxWqzmAFh3rHNy-TlD10u2VRtOQneIJsWMtA%3D%3D)**_

This is about more than a campaign. It is a movement to revive this great nation. **[Will you join me today by chipping in $1 or more?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2468650497fd40a5a60262dfd5accc59&_e=qJN4oay-F5qnMzIeQS1L3mSeTqFlAMWRJEL-A5ZKaCDhNY-Nrb_NcK7XTodkqWLGpZA9QuGGiRIkegTtCZ58LrCdkUCrsyxE3Hsn_97QMm-Osx3cqqteaVE8lcI8xCdV0oHg3MzdMt-BmRh5ojrXZTSnWUSvMnvhg3cPtsoUFuTmTr_HVeNF-M3Jw1Ar-Hq60hcOvey2BJ0BqjLox1Lm5iQ-_q47KsCjNqC1F2u8E30Fa5OmW8q9hh9pQt_2oYVvj96XjcPm7qlTzMnHa-ArzDwW4Iz8l_SsLeXMpoeM0CWzlkIpQAxHqaUtTeP9namb-BGHGN6ggRPQwLrrjBV-ambo8DEyt_9qU0zkARr5w3yk61UdVhaS5nBPBAHpvJyg72byLo2PMEWaqNvKHHNqIg%3D%3D)**

Thanks,

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2468650497fd40a5a60262dfd5accc59&_e=qJN4oay-F5qnMzIeQS1L3mSeTqFlAMWRJEL-A5ZKaCDhNY-Nrb_NcK7XTodkqWLGpZA9QuGGiRIkegTtCZ58LrCdkUCrsyxE3Hsn_97QMm-Osx3cqqteaVE8lcI8xCdV0oHg3MzdMt-BmRh5ojrXZTSnWUSvMnvhg3cPtsoUFuTmTr_HVeNF-M3Jw1Ar-Hq60hcOvey2BJ0BqjLox1Lm5iQ-_q47KsCjNqC1F2u8E30Fa5OmW8q9hh9pQt_2oYVvN75GKj1bRyUCAyqTmf5CZ4JKKp9_uIdQAAZF5sXHFYk--SP-x-x3foa25fbSXygMxMrkGCO-q18ZbjN5KSlCE-nIvvuo2jLybGIGDE7EMpEro74ozMlxHg5uOforG82Tdo7AVQZ5Hp5ZJaQBwjJ_FA%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** STAND WITH THE TRUTH **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2468650497fd40a5a60262dfd5accc59&_e=qJN4oay-F5qnMzIeQS1L3mSeTqFlAMWRJEL-A5ZKaCDhNY-Nrb_NcK7XTodkqWLGpZA9QuGGiRIkegTtCZ58LrCdkUCrsyxE3Hsn_97QMm-Osx3cqqteaVE8lcI8xCdV0oHg3MzdMt-BmRh5ojrXZTSnWUSvMnvhg3cPtsoUFuTmTr_HVeNF-M3Jw1Ar-Hq60hcOvey2BJ0BqjLox1Lm5iQ-_q47KsCjNqC1F2u8E30Fa5OmW8q9hh9pQt_2oYVvTCEMpppOAYrTyWrOioFLXzfsCgDcpPHndIx1fMf7-sd9rlrvo0tBBNmLP_F68iJ_GGWx_WzeFSjPZ1paNtozX9Rzt4ixvfWGcGOzgOslTg7nZsvs-KXY46eTUhpaSyot1fGrQSCRYHS1sCekP_3mPQ%3D%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: "There's only one TRUTH. Not yours, not mine. PURE TRUTH. If you agree with these 10 TRUTHS, I need you on my team. " | | Fellow American, TRUTH. There's only one. Not yours, not mine. Just pure TRUTH. In today's bureaucratic political climate where spin is all the Administrative state knows how to do, we stand by cold-hard facts. I'm not afraid to say them: | God is real. There are two genders. Human flourishing requires fossil fuels. Reverse racism is racism. An open border is no border. Parents determine the education of their children. The nuclear family is the greatest form of governance known to mankind. Capitalism lifts people up from poverty. There are three branches of the U.S. government, not four. The U.S. Constitution is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history. | America was founded on these truths that we find sacred and undeniable. Without these truths, our standing as a nation would mean nothing. If you agree with these 10 TRUTHS, This is about more than a campaign. It is a movement to revive this great nation. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits.
