| | Friend,

**What happened to decency in our country?** What happened to respect for different points of view? You may have seen that last weekend at the Turning Point Conference, while the students tried to listen, I was booed by the adult crowd of Pro-Trump supporters.

They acted like an out-of-control mob and wanted to shut down my speech before I could even offer my vision to bring out the best in America. **When Republicans act like this we are no better than radical liberal Democrats who protest conservative speaking at Universities.**

A real leader would push back on his supporters to at least act with dignity and respect but **Trump vocally encourages this type of outrageous behavior. **

If you think we need to bring decency back to our country, [**support our campaign for President with a contribution**.](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/YlCh3B5lBOgELLfL_Lzcxw~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRmmpwaP0UgOTNiMDc3NWE4NWVhMDVkZjNjNWU2Mjk3NWE5M2ZjY2JEzGh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vYXNhLWZvci1hbWVyaWNhLWluYy9oZWxwLWFzYS1icmluZy1iYWNrLWRlY2VuY3k_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1lbWFpbG9jdG9wdXMmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249SGVscCUyMEJyaW5nJTIwRGVjZW5jeSUyMEJhY2slMjB0byUyMEFtZXJpY2ElMjAtJTIwQXNhJTIwMjAyNCUyMEhvdXNlJTIwRmlsZVcFc3BjZXVCCmS3Ghe4ZPaG4TtSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAFPv) America deserves a real leader who will stand up to Trump's juvenvile behavior.

| | | | | Peter, **_Donald Trump Is Openly Saying That If He Wins in 2024, He Will Become A Dictator._** _As you know if you've been part of the Blue Amp Community, I don't exaggerate about this stuff. | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T66a3be2b-e88a-4d97-be03-5a745c08b667/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

In a recent speech, MTG highlighted the president’s work on infrastructure, his investments in education, our environment, and more -- whether she meant to or not. | | |

In a speech this week, Marjorie Taylor Greene highlighted the president’s work on infrastructure, his investments in education, our environment, and more. **Whether she meant to be or not,**_**she was spot on about President Biden’s record.**_ [So much so that we turned her speech into a campaign-approved message. In a speech this week, Marjorie Taylor Greene highlighted the president’s work on infrastructure, his investments in education, our environment, and more. Whether she meant to be or not,she was spot on about President Biden’s record. | | | No matter the messenger, Peter, it’s clearer than ever that President Biden’s record is one we can believe in. name: Josh (personal)
subject: My new opponent
body:
I really need your help.
Hey team,
I’m reaching out again because this moment demands urgency... the Republican mayor of Stockton just announced that he’s running for my seat!
**Kevin McCarthy personally recruited him to run against me and is already helping him raise money to flip this seat red. Now our race is shaping up to be one of the toughest and most expensive races in the country.**
If you can please rush in a donation to help us keep this seat blue, I’ll leave a link for you [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66721876/417366383/590255291?&refcode=E3410-20230719-Opponnent2-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDYxNjI2MjYtNTgyNi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EZ8I6cjSdE4p_fIngGoKF27fKlCGjcR3wmAz4kQlUP0=).
If you’ve been a part of my campaign for a while, you know I’ve taken on tough challengers before - and won. First I defeated an extreme Trump-backed opponent, and then two years later you helped me defeat a corrupt County Supervisor who wanted to ban abortion.
But now I’m facing my most serious challenge yet. My new opponent won a surprising victory to become the mayor of the biggest city in our district, and now he has his sights set on Congress. We can’t let him win this seat and give Kevin McCarthy another two years as Speaker of the House.
**So what do we need to do? I need your help to raise as much as we possibly can to defend this seat and prepare for one of the most competitive races in the country.**
Can I count on you to rush in a donation to my campaign today? I’ll leave another link [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66721877/417366384/590255291?&refcode=E3410-20230719-Opponnent2-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDYxNjI2MjYtNTgyNi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EZ8I6cjSdE4p_fIngGoKF27fKlCGjcR3wmAz4kQlUP0=).
We can do this!
\- Josh

Josh Harder for Congress
10 N California St
Stockton, CA 95202
United States

| | Peter, Last week, my team reached out to ask you what your #1 priority is for Congress. Thank you to everyone who took the time to answer that question; I am excited to share the results and my plans to take on these issues. **#1 Affordability + The Economy** People are choosing between groceries and electricity. Parents are sacrificing their careers due to the high cost of child care. And everyone is feeling the squeeze of inflation. That's why I worked hard on the school board to help alleviate our community's financial strain including providing free breakfasts and lunches, creating a college savings program and assisting in access to financial aid, and supporting the country's highest minimum wage for district workers. In Congress, I will:
* Push for a minimum wage that matches the basic cost of living.
* Work to expand affordable child care options and push for universal preschool and after school programs.
* Make community college free for all students.
* Advocate for retraining and technical education to adapt our existing workforce to new industries like the green economy.
* Vote for fewer regulations for small businesses and meaningful investments in their resilience.
* Work to create good paying jobs through investments in infrastructure, technology, and education.

[**By making a contribution to my campaign you can help make this happen. Chip in now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66722024/417366967/1183499175?refcode=2023-07-19-results&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=5763c200-5926-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTc2M2MyMDAtNTkyNi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TTGqyaD6ujRtcV3V4VjgDfdlaVeMBKO6nY1hjOjt20c=) [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66722025/417366968/1183499175?refcode=2023-07-19-results&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=5763c200-5926-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTc2M2MyMDAtNTkyNi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TTGqyaD6ujRtcV3V4VjgDfdlaVeMBKO6nY1hjOjt20c=) **#2 Addressing Gun Violence** We can't keep standing idly by while our children and families are dying. I advocated for legislation at the state and national level, divested the district from the gun industry, increased campus security measures, and educated families on proper gun storage and safety. But to end this epidemic and protect our communities from the unrelenting horror of gun violence, we must act at the federal level now. In Congress, I will fight for:
* Stricter background checks.
* A ban on assault weapons.
* A ban on large gun magazines.
* Red flag laws to prevent domestic abusers and those struggling with mental illness from acquiring firearms.

**#3 Invest in Infrastructure** It's no secret that our basic infrastructure is failing and we have to take bold action before we fall behind. In my current role as a local leader, we made historic progress on infrastructure by passing the largest school infrastructure bond in the country to modernize our schools. Congress must capitalize on the momentum of the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act bill to fix our roads, expand digital access, and develop new, environmentally friendly public transportation options while creating jobs and addressing inequity. In Congress, I will fight for:
* Improved public transportation systems and hubs to decrease our dependence on cars and alleviate traffic.
* More green energy and transportation infrastructure development.
* Equitable investment of transportation dollars to create jobs and support historically disadvantaged communities.

I'm running for Congress because I want to make a positive impact on these issues and more. **R****epublicans, including Derek’s opponent, continue to oppose, obstruct, or delay any meaningful climate action to protect corporate interests. We need to vote them out immediately!

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: "There's only one TRUTH. Not yours, not mine. PURE TRUTH. If you agree with these 10 TRUTHS, I need you on my team. " | | Fellow American, TRUTH. There's only one. Not yours, not mine. Just pure TRUTH. In today's bureaucratic political climate where spin is all the Administrative state knows how to do, we stand by cold-hard facts. I'm not afraid to say them: | God is real. There are two genders. Human flourishing requires fossil fuels. Reverse racism is racism. An open border is no border. Parents determine the education of their children. The nuclear family is the greatest form of governance known to mankind. Capitalism lifts people up from poverty. There are three branches of the U.S. government, not four. The U.S. Constitution is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history. | America was founded on these truths that we find sacred and undeniable. Without these truths, our standing as a nation would mean nothing. If you agree with these 10 TRUTHS, This is about more than a campaign. It is a movement to revive this great nation. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. body:
Will you help us fight back?

| | | | Will you help us fight back?

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d4c44fa67a074753bf11360c7d69b929&_e=lws3-UBhBl9N8HDHh0z0iryf9bFnFFgcAW8qR2hUpBKxk3PR23RcqVrHU6GwmnFQSfmNVrITC_uh-GFCQPqyDC7ppd8bNvtrjUlGTprIGc2PrFTkTq-tKdiUNytQZ26agwHBZxUOO0NCK88tTrV9vnMU2kzb6ukcpkboplMSu70mV72PZYc2TfqWCjvZ4cPl7vsMng20whIYdv-XCnAtebcXMvK1Pjs3Vza0gmlF2doMdiIBAMKfaOg08Ho-wYSl_ZvSncOCl25u3cFePT5_Dg%3D%3D)

Friend, Hollywood actors are always lecturing the rest of us - Mark Ruffalo is no exception:
---
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d4c44fa67a074753bf11360c7d69b929&_e=lws3-UBhBl9N8HDHh0z0iryf9bFnFFgcAW8qR2hUpBKxk3PR23RcqVrHU6GwmnFQSfmNVrITC_uh-GFCQPqyDC7ppd8bNvtrjUlGTprIGc2PrFTkTq-tKdiUNytQZ26aeni9cZFrEfNGrZA_731uf0aMDFi_O6JqB6bIQQkdHqKgoE1R-sc4YpRXZ5vxeUasninSqMk0RSp5DzDKZIqHOPDohUIuKm8hMiwkH-OtoqAejyTyJ3EIBgLHhjhkS0q4OsrDVz13JlAYRPGtPVan_w%3D%3D)
---
---
While Mark is a failed, C-list actor, his net worth is roughly******$35 MILLION****....** Being a terrible actor pays pretty well these days! But Hollywood elites like Mark Ruffalo have no idea what the average New Yorker faces every day - and have no clue on what's best for the average American. Maybe, instead of making nasty and petty smears against Mike's hard work, Mark should donate some of his millions to actually making a difference for New Yorkers and Americans... But we know, he won't - he's just hiding behind his keyboard and furthering the political divide in America. In fact, maybe he could learn something from his most notable role, the Hulk, and put some effort into not getting so nasty and angry - it's not a good look! Regardless, this is an attack from someone with a lot of money and a significant following, so we need to be prepared to fight back. Will you join us? [**Please make a contribution of any amount to help Mike combat the baseless attacks coming from Hollywood 's Elite****. >>**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d4c44fa67a074753bf11360c7d69b929&_e=lws3-UBhBl9N8HDHh0z0iryf9bFnFFgcAW8qR2hUpBKxk3PR23RcqVrHU6GwmnFQSfmNVrITC_uh-GFCQPqyDC7ppd8bNvtrjUlGTprIGc2PrFTkTq-tKdiUNytQZ26araLlGDeb9d3jsNw5lvQpbM9_iCJJkiVNdKviBW6ArxbehhOFfwMb4xM4_uFlVHwN1PSCO640h8a0o-c68hSJROrHT-1_l-7Wov5omU2KZdPu0ANd70PxbY9_YkJzhUppKwGuQeUw0Kv6anAs2Bzm0w%3D%3D) Thank you, Mike Lawler War Room

clean_body: Will you help us fight back? | | | | Will you help us fight back? Friend, Hollywood actors are always lecturing the rest of us - Mark Ruffalo is no exception: While Mark is a failed, C-list actor, his net worth is roughly****$35 MILLION.... Being a terrible actor pays pretty well these days! But Hollywood elites like Mark Ruffalo have no idea what the average New Yorker faces every day - and have no clue on what's best for the average American. Maybe, instead of making nasty and petty smears against Mike's hard work, Mark should donate some of his millions to actually making a difference for New Yorkers and Americans... But we know, he won't - he's just hiding behind his keyboard and furthering the political divide in America. In fact, maybe he could learn something from his most notable role, the Hulk, and put some effort into not getting so nasty and angry - it's not a good look! Regardless, this is an attack from someone with a lot of money and a significant following, so we need to be prepared to fight back. Will you join us? Kentuckians know that Senator Mills and I are the WINNING ticket for this November. The Left is already salivating over my conservative choice for Lieutenant Governor. name: Team Casey
subject: Our veterans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=327%2E552475%2EfbxQLg)
Peter,
President Abraham Lincoln outlined a careful directive for caring for our veterans:
_“To care for him who shall have borne the battle and for his widow, and his orphan.”_
We’ll never be able to fully repay our veterans for their service, but we can, and must, care for them when they return home.
Bob Casey is fighting each and every day for the needs of our veterans and their loved ones: quality health care, education, disability benefits, and more.
**But the fight is ongoing.** Earlier this year, House Republicans proposed a budget that could slash funding for the Department of Veterans Affairs by as much as _30 billion dollars_. **That’s why we’re asking our team to send a strong message in support of our veterans and their families today.**
**[If you’re with Bob Casey in the fight to serve the brave men and women who have served our Nation, will you add your name in support today?](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/bc4s-em-veterans/?source=em20230719-1&t=2&akid=327%2E552475%2EfbxQLg)**
**[Sign Now](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/bc4s-em-veterans/?source=em20230719-1&t=3&akid=327%2E552475%2EfbxQLg)**
Pennsylvania has more veterans than almost any other state -- nearly 1 million in all. That’s why Senator Casey is fighting day in and day out to ensure our service members across the Commonwealth and the country have the support and care they deserve.
Thank you for making your voice heard,
Team Casey

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=327%2E552475%2EfbxQLg)

* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=327%2E552475%2EfbxQLg)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)

name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeq9qlpqu84srhlemu23pfpshomau1rugjbc6h58_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3g64oj6c3h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zliu2dr2h8q11m8rmqv41f2epbctvqunb7vhbam8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3g64oj6c3h2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn2be12eg1elmambsihhk3b4ctsb58jemn2o9aag_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3g64oj6c3h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Before I go LIVE with Hannity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
I’ll be taking questions from voters and outlining our plans to SAVE AMERICA.

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z18umeonin8nl3vuc8jskhftn67nf3a65oq3mck0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3g64oj5c1h2bs)
---
Friend,
Tonight, I will be going live with Sean Hannity in Iowa for a voter town hall – home of the FIRST CAUCUS of the Republican primary.
Most politicians usually hide from voters...
_...Lucky for you, I’m not a politician – so this might be my favorite part of the job._
Millions of Republican primary voters will be tuning in tonight as I take questions from voters and outline our plans to SAVE AMERICA from the incompetent crook currently occupying the White House.
**But there’s one other group that will be tuning in... _the special interest “Republican” mega-donors (RINOs, as we like to call them) who’ve pledged to spend over $370 MILLION against us will surely be watching to see just how strong our movement is._**
Tonight is our chance to show that we are TRULY UNBREAKABLE – and that a handful of treacherous RINOs are no match for the greatest political movement in history!
With MILLIONS of eyes on us, _this_ is the moment we PROVE that the RINOs’ multimillion-dollar attacks completely BACKFIRED!
**Please make a contribution before we go LIVE so that I can report that our grassroots movement is STRONGER than EVER before.**
_(But, of course, if you can’t donate right now, don’t feel pressured to. My goal is to make your life great again. I would never want you to incur a cost that you can’t afford. Very soon, I’ll be back in the White House, and America will come ROARING BACK!)_

name: =?utf-8?Q?David=20Torres=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Together We Can Make a Difference
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/davidtorres4congress/together-we-can-make-a-difference?e=56e02d6e28)
---
[](https://davidtorres4congress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0874d556c8360c59de0b9a40e&id=bfb1e01f5e&e=56e02d6e28)
[](https://davidtorres4congress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0874d556c8360c59de0b9a40e&id=e2d6cfcfa1&e=56e02d6e28)

I hope this message finds you well. We find ourselves at a critical point in history, where every decision matters and every voice counts. The most recent events have only underscored the importance of this truth.
Just this past month, we've seen alarming decisions being made - decisions that affect us all. We witnessed the failure of the Republican Congress to prevent the inclusion of divisive language in the NDAA, further polarizing our nation.
In the Supreme Court, a series of 6-3 rulings took place:
* On June 29, race-conscious admissions policies at Harvard and the University of North Carolina were deemed unlawful, striking a blow to efforts to promote diversity and equality in education.
* The next day, the Biden administration's plan to wipe out over $400 billion in student debt was blocked, putting millions of Americans under unnecessary financial pressure.
* Additionally, the court ruled that a web designer has the right to refuse service for same-sex weddings, prioritizing discrimination over inclusivity.
* Lastly, in May, a 5-4 ruling concluded that the Clean Water Act does not allow the EPA to regulate discharges into nearby wetlands, a significant setback for environmental protection efforts.

The need for change is clear, and the stakes are too high for us to stand by.
That's why we're reaching out to you today. We've set a fundraising target of **$5000** by the end of July and every single dollar helps us inch closer to this goal. It helps us ensure that our campaign gets off to a strong start, paving the way for change in November 2024.
Can we count on you to stand with us in this crucial time? A donation of $5, $25, $50, or any amount you're comfortable with, can make a significant difference. Please consider making a contribution today by clicking any of the buttons below or by visiting our [**donation page**](https://davidtorres4congress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0874d556c8360c59de0b9a40e&id=d7040006d0&e=56e02d6e28).
Together we can challenge these injustices, together we will shape a better future for us all. Your support is not just appreciated - it's essential.
Sincerely,
|

name: Mike Thompson
subject: A year since the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://support
body:
|
---
| | Peter,
Just over a year ago, the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act was signed. The legislation aims to reduce gun violence while expanding access to mental health services and trauma for those affected.

As the Chairman of the House Gun Violence Prevention Task Force and a lifelong hunter and gun owner, I strongly believe in both the second amendment and the importance of the safety of our community against the misuse of guns.

**[If you stand with me in reducing gun violence and protecting our communities, will you add your name today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66723160/417371372/1312020560?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_20230718_PT_BipartisanSaferCA_0_ID_MikeThompson_NA_NA_BSC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2Y1NmMwZi01ZTI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DziOet-UVnZ8-vWAn-1t7tvFHZiYcP-dndRfkjSRtkY=&emci=212ca3a3-2815-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=c7f56c0f-5e26-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=2678920)** | | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66723161/417371373/1312020560?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_20230718_PT_BipartisanSaferCA_0_ID_MikeThompson_NA_NA_BSC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2Y1NmMwZi01ZTI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DziOet-UVnZ8-vWAn-1t7tvFHZiYcP-dndRfkjSRtkY=&emci=212ca3a3-2815-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=c7f56c0f-5e26-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=2678920)

As communities face gun violence every day, it is crucial to pass life-saving legislation. I believe in meaningful action to save lives and put a stop to the trauma of gun violence. **[Peter, sign your name to show your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66723162/417371374/1312020560?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_20230718_PT_BipartisanSaferCA_0_ID_MikeThompson_NA_NA_BSC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2Y1NmMwZi01ZTI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DziOet-UVnZ8-vWAn-1t7tvFHZiYcP-dndRfkjSRtkY=&emci=212ca3a3-2815-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=c7f56c0f-5e26-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=2678920)**

Mike Thompson

subject: Sex changes for kids will NOT take place under my watch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc
body:
if you're providing these surgeries, you WILL face the consequences

|

****THIS IS ALL I HAVE TO SAY:

Under no circumstances should doctors be allowed to perform these gruesome, irreversible operations on underage children.**

**[CLICK HERE IF YOU AGREE.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=15bc7d5585494099b1662b172c4a428d&_e=uLET9THpC2ItSRnlFoMRPi7qWLE9-7v9_2fvzpCzwEEiIAb22xQVH3PhekdcyIcntIUMOYarXLXWk0GoKh2ASLjQjaf2_JR_PgLShmAc9CfHBqWKAcmk2jA6Zrmtc_WxOXibYjpR7CF7-k9Lkp-FcKSjfQTieWfqrtOQvKToWkEhx2spSbk9iZ2L3BpeqcGI7GbR8ai1iGmpSKvS0A_unx9jL72ahPwWSpt4Cf5nGdVLmYYg0CR4OjDAmCtbZ9-8L22vcYa9uVCRaaJ569SSmzpaFcfv_Cg5MnLJuwrFPF8eJlauzXqACF9jvpHQHSlt)**

_I 'm introducing legislation to charge any person who knowingly provides sex change surgeries, cross-sex hormones or puberty blockers to a minor with a Class C Felony, which could lead to a prison sentence of 10 to 25 years or a maximum fine of $250,000._**
**This is an urgent matter. I 'm so tired of hearing from "adults" who are steering our children and grandchildren in the WRONG direction. **

**[IT'S TIME TO TAKE ACTION AND PROTECT OUR KIDS.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=15bc7d5585494099b1662b172c4a428d&_e=uLET9THpC2ItSRnlFoMRPi7qWLE9-7v9_2fvzpCzwEEiIAb22xQVH3PhekdcyIcntIUMOYarXLXWk0GoKh2ASLjQjaf2_JR_PgLShmAc9CfHBqWKAcmk2jA6Zrmtc_WxOXibYjpR7CF7-k9Lkp-FcKSjfQTieWfqrtOQvKToWkGvYvY_hirxn5_SdmhNOsgWJGK1EZycQNiuaxWrZHJMbuk8K7v53z_-nioW2Ou3MlKQEY2XLuSCCTW8Pahj_nZHRpHe9fxXuT3aBsLmB-pg-2VQIC-dZJTEUNS84M-5SyIjdKPGUyFN0BPW9AOHXhlj)**

**THAT 'S IT. End of conversation. **

\-- JD Vance

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our
economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans.
Ohio needs JD Vance. I 'm introducing legislation to charge any person who knowingly provides sex change surgeries, cross-sex hormones or puberty blockers to a minor with a Class C Felony, which could lead to a prison sentence of 10 to 25 years or a maximum fine of $250,000. This is an urgent matter. I 'm so tired of hearing from "adults" who are steering our children and grandchildren in the WRONG direction. THAT 'S IT. End of conversation. \-- JD Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=27b81487a9164197aa49a85693b79f0f&_e=3JKYC4UeL-2ylVqc8E38gj-yS7TXYlCgwS4mlSZVOAJ_wpxg-qa8jfmOsdqdjJ_UwoB4UY6PEFupQ2LVU7p0rn3ThOp2lODdpuKOmUmo-QCZuEc64Af2nbRtxp1QnzYNj8QZY4i45MD4F13yypKrISPctpc8tVwL4gYqFwR3TmTk3VMYPL6fuFzvTewZDfrCJdlULo9xPyfW0_5CTaA_SDVi9atd5Y2P9WCYUnaGSJ3hjVck5bKddHNyM080xu74WHwcUcjsd806I452D4eqbpN5JT8PZzZCLyTfWzFqbFhJD4t8JRJ30f4Y_1Xcp5y2L30mjfK_vFTMVhox165fzHHtOqtg9nMvwojvrlpPNBsvpU-ptkqOzzQWB33Eu65e)
Fellow American,

To say that I am living the American Dream is an understatement.

I'm Kevin Lincoln – a conservative Republican, the current Mayor of Stockton, California, a Marine Corps veteran, the grandson of immigrants, **and I'm proud to announce to you today that I am running to represent California’s 9th District in the United States Congress.**

This seat is currently held by out-of-touch liberal Josh Harder, and **it’s one of our BEST opportunities in the whole country to defeat a Democrat incumbent, flip a seat, and expand our House majority.**

Republicans’ thin majority simply is not large enough to ensure we can stand strong against Biden’s destructive agenda and deliver results for the American people. I need your help to flip this top-target seat so we can.

[**Will you help me defeat Josh Harder, flip CA-9, and get our country back on track by joining my team as a week one donor?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=27b81487a9164197aa49a85693b79f0f&_e=3JKYC4UeL-2ylVqc8E38gj-yS7TXYlCgwS4mlSZVOAJ_wpxg-qa8jfmOsdqdjJ_UwoB4UY6PEFupQ2LVU7p0rn3ThOp2lODdpuKOmUmo-QCZuEc64Af2nbRtxp1QnzYNj8QZY4i45MD4F13yypKrISPctpc8tVwL4gYqFwR3TmTk3VMYPL6fuFzvTewZDfrCJdlULo9xPyfW0_5CTaA_SDVi9atd5Y2P9WCYUnaGSJ2jZp7oeUCQsusIjC31uHfwsQJ7cz_WG8kmqIengmo_cEg0p6s3dKz0pC-_G_nAWAFvaWDGBDDBt0mFIeXzI40Rvd1FrzS7yHsa5tGnUC62vz8Y4yBla17m7VDEWCREMMBt-t-itVCg6M5esTCSfLb2)

[ ** SEND KEVIN TO CONGRESS ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=27b81487a9164197aa49a85693b79f0f&_e=3JKYC4UeL-2ylVqc8E38gj-yS7TXYlCgwS4mlSZVOAJ_wpxg-qa8jfmOsdqdjJ_UwoB4UY6PEFupQ2LVU7p0rn3ThOp2lODdpuKOmUmo-QCZuEc64Af2nbRtxp1QnzYNj8QZY4i45MD4F13yypKrISPctpc8tVwL4gYqFwR3TmTk3VMYPL6fuFzvTewZDfrCJdlULo9xPyfW0_5CTaA_SDVi9atd5Y2P9WCYUnaGSJ2SDVp_8SfleWzlybx7FVQq1VYFaO4Biq-KFRv6MW7rNhXD4ADhDPj7QPlwmHyBD4hUPZ6RoDYgV1ocR5UVRH51J4Q8i305wEGfPNeQ7iGYC0y-a1d2-St1MU_Ry5CCS_j97YKV4khqLMWhKuUpSc5e)
Service and faith have always played a major role in my life.

My Mexican grandfather came to California in search of opportunity. He settled here in Stockton, raised a family, and became a United States citizen. **He instilled in me a sense of pride in my community, my heritage, and my country.**

That pride still lives in me today, and that's what's called me to serve.

I joined the United States Marine Corps in 2001. I became a military police officer and was recruited by the White House Military Office to serve the President of the United States on Marine One. **I was proud to serve my nation in such an important role.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=27b81487a9164197aa49a85693b79f0f&_e=3JKYC4UeL-2ylVqc8E38gj-yS7TXYlCgwS4mlSZVOAJ_wpxg-qa8jfmOsdqdjJ_UwoB4UY6PEFupQ2LVU7p0rn3ThOp2lODdpuKOmUmo-QCZuEc64Af2nbRtxp1QnzYNj8QZY4i45MD4F13yypKrISPctpc8tVwL4gYqFwR3TmTk3VMYPL6fuFzvTewZDfrCJdlULo9xPyfW0_5CTaA_SDVi9atd5Y2P9WCYUnaGSJ2PDS2_tKD3lAVClH6KSpGfZejAtqYppHbiToE5_LOzuX8jm3J8LvXy7M6mbZjtbYq4_jM22pwz8HM_An4wHz-KzgGOC18nKFy7CplKYUid6y0ZOkF1H7b6AgFHKI0K4qwI-ozjG7GQDV1lhBZ6vDVq)
**Now, I'm proud to serve as the Mayor of my hometown of Stockton.** I got to work on day one in office, and we've put our city back on track. Let me tell you, fellow American, Stockton's making a comeback. The heart of our community is beating again.

**I'm proud of my record of service, and I’m running for Congress to continue that service.** My district and our nation need a servant leader, not a left-wing politician whose votes for out of control spending and job killing policies are making it harder for families just to get by.

[**Will you send a local Mayor and Marine to fight for your country in Congress by becoming a week one donor to my campaign?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=27b81487a9164197aa49a85693b79f0f&_e=3JKYC4UeL-2ylVqc8E38gj-yS7TXYlCgwS4mlSZVOAJ_wpxg-qa8jfmOsdqdjJ_UwoB4UY6PEFupQ2LVU7p0rn3ThOp2lODdpuKOmUmo-QCZuEc64Af2nbRtxp1QnzYNj8QZY4i45MD4F13yypKrISPctpc8tVwL4gYqFwR3TmTk3VMYPL6fuFzvTewZDfrCJdlULo9xPyfW0_5CTaA_SDVi9atd5Y2P9WCYUnaGSJ2w7n9nKLUC6g7ZRq6WbzqM991C0tkU6zDknGCGqT02Vn5aH5eLmRC27fxcNFczIfc97FRSaGmwficZgSuxfdjKi3WaT9T4qJe6-qlzlIgdmM2q-JVJO0mOofrJfWVL7y4pgBN2fJDtzt7yCF40gcgk)

[ ** SEND KEVIN TO CONGRESS ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=27b81487a9164197aa49a85693b79f0f&_e=3JKYC4UeL-2ylVqc8E38gj-yS7TXYlCgwS4mlSZVOAJ_wpxg-qa8jfmOsdqdjJ_UwoB4UY6PEFupQ2LVU7p0rn3ThOp2lODdpuKOmUmo-QCZuEc64Af2nbRtxp1QnzYNj8QZY4i45MD4F13yypKrISPctpc8tVwL4gYqFwR3TmTk3VMYPL6fuFzvTewZDfrCJdlULo9xPyfW0_5CTaA_SDVi9atd5Y2P9WCYUnaGSJ14A69ARBLJP-wyGJ4IihF8GfeYBOmZ6mYSz3QemJlkrNytMZ2NswrWJ5JEOwmz8SL-va1WY1HVk9kb6vwg05LHG9lQY9MIVP2GTYiHCpEbBMv-nEzZVFo5pOg_jrsBEY--zUVlWQiyeIdA2vDdflWC)
**Washington is broken.** Petty partisan politics are making it harder for Americans to get ahead. Our communities are working hard to make things better, but they are still struggling because of Washington's neglect.

My opponent, Josh Harder, votes lockstep with the Democrats and against the values of our district. A whopping 95% of the time he’s put Joe Biden ahead of our community.

We need representatives that will address our country's challenges as we’ve done in Stockton. We’re going to fight inflation and lower costs, support economic policies that create jobs not joblessness, strengthen our schools by empowering parents, defend our farms and our farmers, protect seniors, honor our veterans, and support our law enforcement.

I say “we” not “me” because this is bigger than just one man, fellow American. Now that I've shared my story and my plan with you, [**I'm asking you to help me launch my campaign for Congress with a week one contribution of $5 or $10 today.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=27b81487a9164197aa49a85693b79f0f&_e=3JKYC4UeL-2ylVqc8E38gj-yS7TXYlCgwS4mlSZVOAJ_wpxg-qa8jfmOsdqdjJ_UwoB4UY6PEFupQ2LVU7p0rn3ThOp2lODdpuKOmUmo-QCZuEc64Af2nbRtxp1QnzYNj8QZY4i45MD4F13yypKrISPctpc8tVwL4gYqFwR3TmTk3VMYPL6fuFzvTewZDfrCJdlULo9xPyfW0_5CTaA_SDVi9atd5Y2P9WCYUnaGSJ22x2ymjr5C65sLVvMUv2kOvQQXL-Cl2h1hQFMMiFb9PQ4UlNq88Jt9wU3sZN1Dc9bSb0vPb8SyuXweHD7eck7wsyitblHA1oZvSUWcUGHBfnys6UxvFiK_A5b9Ma6xxSkagizvPzmDAPeHbiRZm10m)

This campaign is about my district and about all Americans, and I need your help to see it through to election day. [**A launch week contribution of even just a couple bucks can make that happen.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=27b81487a9164197aa49a85693b79f0f&_e=3JKYC4UeL-2ylVqc8E38gj-yS7TXYlCgwS4mlSZVOAJ_wpxg-qa8jfmOsdqdjJ_UwoB4UY6PEFupQ2LVU7p0rn3ThOp2lODdpuKOmUmo-QCZuEc64Af2nbRtxp1QnzYNj8QZY4i45MD4F13yypKrISPctpc8tVwL4gYqFwR3TmTk3VMYPL6fuFzvTewZDfrCJdlULo9xPyfW0_5CTaA_SDVi9atd5Y2P9WCYUnaGSJ2pspJLRL2iZyn3xlW1M7HnnC_mxX6ywZ1WhRJHj2rpgGRP_feWMosGV7COLO7OMbazcQvfiydqj8J_a9l1S0Q30H3m8_jOilOxlNeeCuVOaYueE6HgYU7XiIbuwZz0ZVLq597-HZAXe45KYPQZPUVi)

[ ** SEND KEVIN TO CONGRESS ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=27b81487a9164197aa49a85693b79f0f&_e=3JKYC4UeL-2ylVqc8E38gj-yS7TXYlCgwS4mlSZVOAJ_wpxg-qa8jfmOsdqdjJ_UwoB4UY6PEFupQ2LVU7p0rn3ThOp2lODdpuKOmUmo-QCZuEc64Af2nbRtxp1QnzYNj8QZY4i45MD4F13yypKrISPctpc8tVwL4gYqFwR3TmTk3VMYPL6fuFzvTewZDfrCJdlULo9xPyfW0_5CTaA_SDVi9atd5Y2P9WCYUnaGSJ2wTuOUXGIdw1MwcLLDfGVlboZz8IrwCTzBoVp2srqHr2ykDvEMBI1LMFn7hcXgSJmSU1fdnhww8L5k8moXPULdkiMRxtt0siWmJ4BXYM2LuOhmTP8Rm_jyZrAqDYL8IUvCEw4b0uvXawLLN4FXhhpi)
I'm ready to take my service to my country and my community to the next level, and I'm hoping you will be part of our fight.

Thank you,

Kevin Lincoln
Veteran, USMC
Republican for Congress

| **Meet Kevin Lincoln
**
My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran.

Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader.

I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton.

clean_body: Service and faith have always played a major role in my life. | | Fellow American, To say that I am living the American Dream is an understatement. I'm Kevin Lincoln – a conservative Republican, the current Mayor of Stockton, California, a Marine Corps veteran, the grandson of immigrants, and I'm proud to announce to you today that I am running to represent California’s 9th District in the United States Congress. This seat is currently held by out-of-touch liberal Josh Harder, and it’s one of our BEST opportunities in the whole country to defeat a Democrat incumbent, flip a seat, and expand our House majority. Republicans’ thin majority simply is not large enough to ensure we can stand strong against Biden’s destructive agenda and deliver results for the American people. I need your help to flip this top-target seat so we can. Service and faith have always played a major role in my life. My Mexican grandfather came to California in search of opportunity. He settled here in Stockton, raised a family, and became a United States citizen. He instilled in me a sense of pride in my community, my heritage, and my country. That pride still lives in me today, and that's what's called me to serve. I joined the United States Marine Corps in 2001. I became a military police officer and was recruited by the White House Military Office to serve the President of the United States on Marine One. I was proud to serve my nation in such an important role. Now, I'm proud to serve as the Mayor of my hometown of Stockton. I got to work on day one in office, and we've put our city back on track. Let me tell you, fellow American, Stockton's making a comeback. The heart of our community is beating again. I'm proud of my record of service, and I’m running for Congress to continue that service. My district and our nation need a servant leader, not a left-wing politician whose votes for out of control spending and job killing policies are making it harder for families just to get by. Washington is broken. Petty partisan politics are making it harder for Americans to get ahead. Our communities are working hard to make things better, but they are still struggling because of Washington's neglect. My opponent, Josh Harder, votes lockstep with the Democrats and against the values of our district. A whopping 95% of the time he’s put Joe Biden ahead of our community. We need representatives that will address our country's challenges as we’ve done in Stockton. We’re going to fight inflation and lower costs, support economic policies that create jobs not joblessness, strengthen our schools by empowering parents, defend our farms and our farmers, protect seniors, honor our veterans, and support our law enforcement. I say “we” not “me” because this is bigger than just one man, fellow American. Now that I've shared my story and my plan with you, This campaign is about my district and about all Americans, and I need your help to see it through to election day. I'm ready to take my service to my country and my community to the next level, and I'm hoping you will be part of our fight. Thank you, Kevin Lincoln Veteran, USMC Republican for Congress | Meet Kevin Lincoln My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran. Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader. I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton. Like , Follow , and Subscribe! Kevin Lincoln is a former member of the U.S. Marine Corps. | | Derek,

Governor Chris Sununu **JUST ANNOUNCED** he would not be running for re-election in 2024.

I'm so grateful for the leadership and steady hand Governor Sununu has delivered for the Granite State over the last 8 years, and look forward to seeing what's next for him.

name: Katie Porter
subject: re: fake fundraising tactics in here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=26757%2E3422442%2ED7of7I)
Derek,
As a consumer protection attorney, there’s a lot I’ve always disliked about political emails. Emails that try to shame or terrify you into donating aren’t my style.
Let me break down a few of the tactics you’ve probably seen:
* “We need 5,238 donors from YOUR zip code.” This is fake. We have goals and deadlines, and donations from different parts of the state or country can signal support, but there’s no crazy math like this happening.
* “Donate $5 today and it will be triple matched.” I promise nobody is really doing this.
* “Warning: Payment incomplete.” I despise these misleading emails that make you think you’ve missed a bill. Invoking this type of fear in people is unacceptable.

I’ve introduced legislation to crackdown on scam PACs, who can often be the worst offenders. Scam PACs are political organizations that exist to steal money rather than to support a cause or candidate. Their expenditures go solely to “consultants” rather than real causes, and it’s a shameful way to make a quick buck.
**Here’s what is real: our fundraising deadlines and the facts we give you about this race.** There is urgency, yes, because we’re less than eight months from Election Day, which means we have to start building our campaign right now. We’ve been outraised two quarters in a row by another candidate in this race, so we need to catch up and stretch our dollars further.
Our end of quarter deadlines are some of the most important, as we have to publicly report how much we raise every three months. But our monthly and even weekly internal goals help us hit those quarterly goals, and we base our internal budget on our monthly revenue.
[**Our recent fundraising has slowed, and we’re at risk of falling short of our July goal. So truly, whatever zip code you’re in, I’d be so appreciative of your support!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230719-1?refcode=EMAJ19_1_TAC_20230719_V1_F&refcode2=26757_3422442_D7of7I&akid=26757%2E3422442%2ED7of7I)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230719-1?refcode=EMAJ19_1_TAC_20230719_V1_F&refcode2=26757_3422442_D7of7I&akid=26757%2E3422442%2ED7of7I)**
Thanks for reading, and thanks for supporting our campaign.
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAJ19_1_TAC_20230719_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=26757_3422442_D7of7I&akid=26757%2E3422442%2ED7of7I)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=26757%2E3422442%2ED7of7I)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=26757%2E3422442%2ED7of7I)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

---
| | Friend,

---
On Sunday night, while I was with my family, my attorneys gave me HORRIFYING news.

---
_The deranged prosecutor with Biden’s Department of Justice sent a letter, stating that**I AM A TARGET OF THE JANUARY 6TH GRAND JURY INVESTIGATION**.
_
---
**They gave me a very short time period of 4 DAYS to report to the Grand Jury, which almost always means an** _**ARREST**_**and** _**INDICTMENT**_**.**
---
Let me be perfectly clear: _I DID NOTHING WRONG. I AM COMPLETELY INNOCENT._

---
This is just another vicious act of Election Interference on behalf of the Deep State to try and stop the Silent Majority from having a voice in your own country.

---
It’s quite the coincidence that this news comes JUST AFTER a series of polls show that all of our Republican opponents are LOSING BADLY to Crooked Joe Biden – and that I AM THE _ONLY_ CANDIDATE projected to beat him in a free and fair election.

---
This letter also comes just after our FEC report revealed a TREMENDOUS number of small-dollar donors, proving that the _AMERICAN PEOPLE_ stand by our movement.

---
The Special Counsel’s office has already wasted $9 MILLION of YOUR taxpayer money on never-ending witch hunts to try and destroy our movement – not to mention the $32 MILLION wasted in Mueller’s Russia, Russia, Russia witch hunt.

---
When I keep touring the country and hear voters tell me, “President Trump, you’re our only hope!” “President Trump, we NEED you back in the White House!” – I know that I could never stop fighting to save our country, no matter how vicious these witch hunts ever become.

---
**The fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. It’s not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well – and I will**** _NEVER_****let them take it from you.**

---
_If you’re doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day._

---
But if not, I don’t have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now.

---

clean_body: Stating I am the target of a GRAND JURY investigation| | | | | Friend, On Sunday night, while I was with my family, my attorneys gave me HORRIFYING news. The deranged prosecutor with Biden’s Department of Justice sent a letter, stating thatI AM A TARGET OF THE JANUARY 6TH GRAND JURY INVESTIGATION. They gave me a very short time period of 4 DAYS to report to the Grand Jury, which almost always means an ARRESTand INDICTMENT. Let me be perfectly clear: I DID NOTHING WRONG. I AM COMPLETELY INNOCENT. This is just another vicious act of Election Interference on behalf of the Deep State to try and stop the Silent Majority from having a voice in your own country. It’s quite the coincidence that this news comes JUST AFTER a series of polls show that all of our Republican opponents are LOSING BADLY to Crooked Joe Biden – and that I AM THE ONLY CANDIDATE projected to beat him in a free and fair election. This letter also comes just after our FEC report revealed a TREMENDOUS number of small-dollar donors, proving that the AMERICAN PEOPLE stand by our movement. The Special Counsel’s office has already wasted $9 MILLION of YOUR taxpayer money on never-ending witch hunts to try and destroy our movement – not to mention the $32 MILLION wasted in Mueller’s Russia, Russia, Russia witch hunt. When I keep touring the country and hear voters tell me, “President Trump, you’re our only hope!” “President Trump, we NEED you back in the White House!” – I know that I could never stop fighting to save our country, no matter how vicious these witch hunts ever become. The fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. It’s not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well – and I will NEVERlet them take it from you. If you’re doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day. But if not, I don’t have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now. | | Thank you, Donald J. name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28473%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m2JA76YbTR46ESMNw%2fV2eQ&sysid=1)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28473%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m2JA76YbTR46ESMNw%2fV2eQ&sysid=1)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28474%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tT6fnrCTcLnZU5P85O2NeQ&sysid=1)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[**_Donate Now >>_**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28485%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mG%2bZoMpbQyUmnMJRAp6YjQ&sysid=1)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28486%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gky2Chz%2fS1ColGbEyx%2bpvQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28487%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=S%2fRvAAxl4F2dhVrABQvCkw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28488%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lI8V3667u05rtYzqUm5pLA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28489%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hnnPN92HMkiZdSN%2fOgdABw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28480%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2b9%2bNbVjh51IdneeFH8Leaw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28481%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fuHgRLJCKT5yw4ct8zNyUw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28482%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3o2VwQ24pYGxQqrUAz1aLg&sysid=1)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28483%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3sNq%2bxe3HFpBwqtuoTlJ%2bw&sysid=1)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28484%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=w3WcOzz91YLkFJHBr%2fHjVw&sysid=1)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28495%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=McMy1IJ2gH26Gi1042rRsg&sysid=1)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28496%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F26XK8cb%2bifUDVMseThADA&sysid=1)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

Now that the Ron DeSantis for President campaign has reported its first quarter of fundraising since the absentee Governor of Florida officially filed to run for President in May 2023, it important to look at how the campaign performed. Despite consistent chatter about how well DeSantis was fundraising, over the weekend, it was reported that his campaign [recently released](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/dffb6e86-2586-4681-8b3b-bc4b28f88a33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and fired an unspecified number of staffers in an attempt to run leaner financially.
On the surface, the DeSantis campaign raised just over $20,487,000. This was achieved through 16,841 transactions for an average donation of just over $1200.00 per transaction. In comparison, FEC reports show Donald Trump raised $35 Million, with an average donation of $34.
With average donation numbers like that, it's safe to say Ron DeSantis isn't exactly a man of the people, and he's definitely not grassroots.
While the list of Ron DeSantis's high dollar donors is extensive, one donor caught my attention as I was researching the campaign finance reports.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/c2375bfc-5d0a-4518-a85a-a65ebbff1165?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Jeff Hartley is a registered lobbyist in the state of Florida, and works for a large Tallahassee firm by the name of Smith, Bryan and Myers. This firm proudly [lobbies](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/44c60a3e-4ea8-4efb-8068-b532644baa73?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for Democrat Billionaire [Michael Bloomberg's ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/03f5bbc9-a388-4ac9-8f89-f61aea4d112e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)gun control organization, Everytown for Gun Safety. He also lobbies for Anheuser Busch and Walt Disney World.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/64f3160c-f253-4008-8862-223332f2e05d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Why would the lobbyist for the companies and policies Ron DeSantis publicly claims to oppose be a double max donor to his campaign?
Vivek Ramaswamy barely trailed the DeSantis campaign in fundraising coming in with $19,164,680 raised, totaling 1089 transactions. It should be noted that Vivek himself has contributed over $10 million in personal funds to his campaign. Nikki Haley, who has also filed to run for President, didn't raise as much money as DeSantis, but she outpaced him in terms of individual transactions. Haley had 24,734 transactions during the same time period. Joe Biden had 27,846 transactions, while Tim Scott finished the fundraising quarter with 13,853 transactions.
While Chris Christie has publicly claimed he's reached the RNC's mandated 40,000 donor minimum as a requirement to participate in their first scheduled debate on August 23, 2023, campaign finance reports indicate a different story.
The largest donation to the DeSantis campaign was made by the Draft DeSantis 2024 Fund. This donation totaled $351,933.43. It is also important to look at where DeSantis is raising money from. A quick review of the Federal Election Commission website shows that out of the 16,841 individual contributions made to the DeSantis campaign, 5,117 of those came from the state of Florida. In contrast, Iowa supporters only accounted for 66 contributions. New Hampshire fares even worse than Iowa with only 51 contributors coming from the state. In comparison, Nikki Haley had 822 individual donations from Iowa during the same time period.
Additionally, more than $3 million of what DeSantis raised are funds earmarked for the general election -- meaning donors gave more than the $3,300 limit for the primary, and those extra funds will not be available to the candidate for use until after the primary is over. Many of DeSantis's donors are also currently maxed out and will not be able to contribute any additional funds to the DeSantis campaign due to campaign finance laws, which means DeSantis will only be able to rely on his Wall Street sugar daddy donors for a limited amount of time.
DeSantis's campaign also spent heavily. 39% of the contributions raised were spent during the first reporting period. Some highlights include more than $900,000 on merchandise, and $883,000 on digital fundraising consulting. Other significant expenditure categories included $867,000 toward media placements and $730,000 on direct mail. It has been reported that DeSantis had more than 90 paid staffers on his campaign payroll. Based on the totals of the biweekly disbursements on his FEC report, it is easy to calculate an annual salary in excess of $120,000 for DeSantis for President rapid response Director Christina Pushaw. For comparison, Ron DeSantis is currently paid an annual salary of $134,000 as the Governor of Florida.
The future of DeSantis fundraising remains to be seen. However, recent reports indicate that large GOP donors are souring on the DeSantis campaign as he continues to trail Donald Trump substantially in early polls in key primary states, as well as nationally among GOP voters. Without the large special interest donors, the DeSantis campaign will not have the grassroots donor support it desperately needs in order to continue having enough engagement to fundraise on a long term basis for a Presidential campaign.

While Chris Christie has publicly claimed he's reached the RNC's mandated 40,000 donor minimum as a requirement to participate in their first scheduled debate on August 23, 2023, campaign finance reports indicate a different story. The largest donation to the DeSantis campaign was made by the Draft DeSantis 2024 Fund. This donation totaled $351,933.43. It is also important to look at where DeSantis is raising money from. A quick review of the Federal Election Commission website shows that out of the 16,841 individual contributions made to the DeSantis campaign, 5,117 of those came from the state of Florida. In contrast, Iowa supporters only accounted for 66 contributions. New Hampshire fares even worse than Iowa with only 51 contributors coming from the state. In comparison, Nikki Haley had 822 individual donations from Iowa during the same time period. Additionally, more than $3 million of what DeSantis raised are funds earmarked for the general election -- meaning donors gave more than the $3,300 limit for the primary, and those extra funds will not be available to the candidate for use until after the primary is over. Many of DeSantis's donors are also currently maxed out and will not be able to contribute any additional funds to the DeSantis campaign due to campaign finance laws, which means DeSantis will only be able to rely on his Wall Street sugar daddy donors for a limited amount of time. DeSantis's campaign also spent heavily. 39% of the contributions raised were spent during the first reporting period. Some highlights include more than $900,000 on merchandise, and $883,000 on digital fundraising consulting. Other significant expenditure categories included $867,000 toward media placements and $730,000 on direct mail. It has been reported that DeSantis had more than 90 paid staffers on his campaign payroll. Based on the totals of the biweekly disbursements on his FEC report, it is easy to calculate an annual salary in excess of $120,000 for DeSantis for President rapid response Director Christina Pushaw. For comparison, Ron DeSantis is currently paid an annual salary of $134,000 as the Governor of Florida. The future of DeSantis fundraising remains to be seen. However, recent reports indicate that large GOP donors are souring on the DeSantis campaign as he continues to trail Donald Trump substantially in early polls in key primary states, as well as nationally among GOP voters. Without the large special interest donors, the DeSantis campaign will not have the grassroots donor support it desperately needs in order to continue having enough engagement to fundraise on a long term basis for a Presidential campaign. If you enjoyed this article, please SUBSCRIBE to LOOMER UNLEASHED, where I will continue to piss off the elitist political establishment by speaking the TRUTH. It is free to sign up, but paid subscriptions of $7 per month or $70 per year help keep this publication and my investigative journalism alive. So please, consider joining for a nominal fee! Thank you for your support! I truly appreciate it. Already subscribed and want to support Loomer Unleahsed further, while getting more eyes on this important information? Peter, this will be a hard-fought campaign, but Debby Burnett is up to the challenge. She’s a veterinarian, a mom, and a small-business owner. Over 59% of primary voters are women, and the majority live, like Debby, in rural or working-class communities like Debby.
**Data from previous rematches clearly shows that a fresh nominee has the best chance of winning what will be a competitive and targeted race in the general election.** While Debby’s ultra-rich primary opponent got close to defeating Boebert last cycle, he failed to get the job done.
And here’s the thing — of the 56 rematch races in 2020, only five had an outcome different from that in 2018. That means Debby’s primary opponent only has**less than a 9% chance** of changing the results from his first match with Boebert, _no matter how much of his personal fortune he pours into the race._
**With so much at stake, we can’t afford to let Lauren Boebert win again.**
A Democrat like Debby, who can speak to our district’s rural and working-class values, can gain the traction needed to turn the seat blue, but we need everyone to do their part to make it happen. [**_Can Debby count on you to pitch in whatever you can right now?_**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w8zT8YoakpOTqvvRJdDcrUetef6gBmypQp1DK2J8tyRjNEH-ROPQvj2yeZJ7dvJEV9zhAKc3W81hbOfAa8uChUid3aXcuKNcVf0PKgmuegvNhmKqK6dPQfu6GjgrpX-xnuOf-5VFDugP3jZPjIxp7jqPHVHLRPqO1d9SL3LXItzfgJiCAL7Yei1oIrOC2cU-lV81H3hj3wy2dTe-VtrijH7Z04w_Ia5a941Rvo305_R-qC-AlRBO2k-XlI50QXO551Z8ihsPe8TGcIrdPjX6RK01saG7hNAd9Mxo5FcPRz8xK7G7ZOvYcEpuDJLdmq_Z_51j8T3WBcWY3to9wvgAXGlrllew8EZj2XLWuvmaWl__o984ALirPNa5iyitVgWL2gYaYTdXZRJPBYcH-U71GZgPquh6EIHHl7sNbDkw4BtQ/3y0/eetPs_1dSH2Mh-jxDEAjpA/h5/BikXI0n0TrWFEKk9BADGONrmhnDOvNI5IeUX3DSsSnU)
If enough of us work together, we can defeat Lauren Boebert once and for all and elect a leader who’ll put the people of Western and Southern Colorado first.
Thanks so much,
Team Debby

Dr. Debby Burnett is running to represent Colorado’s 3rd District in Congress. As a veterinarian for 20+ years, she’s worked with farmers and ranchers across our district to improve their lives and their livelihoods. As the mother of a 16-year-old, she knows how to get 20 things done at once. And as a rural Coloradan who owns a small agricultural business, she understands what the people of Western and Southern Colorado need — _and that’s why she’s stepping up to give them a real voice in Congress._ | [DONATE »](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w8zT8YoakpOTqvvRJdDcrUetef6gBmypQp1DK2J8tyRiL14AuIVNTU9j1AEv2OXYwyixMdJqWtCbPi-ViSURz0g7R7xaRIKCWZ8PnP4nJYq6_KOhnugRT2W4L8sqS6NRfi6iE-LqO1K-YiG_GjC545ylF2vs7MHpRltmA4TGZylfDTq5javfI_GFnGjxit0vwy_Us-744dwJborPq8XxQlmM2r6KEOlEr-sCHKjuryvIbT1-Zw8LZPcTKP9gJwfdB6ECqWfqozAMfDvQqY7t44OJvonaI7Oze0Ol81CAi-KYY3xZ4jW6ki1zi_kNzPZl7hA3y4l0_7DtOO4p9kQf3TmZwfqXfytKAHlA2Z0gakwO1nelIthw60ReRYKXIqjEEHl77X0w9f5JRxsSXhKkgJFiZpgAu6SUs0fs_284dPlprCvSBHbNmNf0DiH-NG_4A/3y0/eetPs_1dSH2Mh-jxDEAjpA/h6/8dwzl528ux-hhrFyWZ1DVVGoVlC6YKhiks7ygE0vxFE)

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: I’m running for reelection so we can continue fighting for progress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hi folks — this is Amy Klobuchar. When my daughter Abigail was born, she couldn't swallow. Not knowing what was wrong was scary. But after 24 hours with no sleep and a sick baby in intensive care, my insurance forced me out of the hospital. I didn’t want another mom to go through what I experienced and was determined to change the policy. So even though I had never held elected office, **I went to the legislature and advocated for one of the first laws in the country guaranteeing new moms and their babies a 48-hour hospital stay.** When we stand up for people and fight for them we have the power to deliver real change. Grassroots supporters like you have helped me do just that in the U.S. Senate — now I’m hoping you’ll stand with me once again as I run for reelection in 2024. **[Will you split a donation between myself and Tina now to power my campaign so we can keep on fighting for progress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66725858/417380901/-1773662333?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20230719_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjk3OTFiOC02NTI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oD_KtPCZSCEOpLkWlKN9cNuYmPMtKrplWWpY-AXL_zA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Amy Klobuchar and Tina Smith:_ | | [SPLIT $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66725859/417380902/-1773662333?express_lane=true&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20230719_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjk3OTFiOC02NTI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oD_KtPCZSCEOpLkWlKN9cNuYmPMtKrplWWpY-AXL_zA=)

name: Senator John N. Kennedy
subject: Can you handle the truth? I think you can.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This might be a tough pill to swallow, but I'd rather drink weed killer than sugarcoat the truth.

| |

---
| | | Today, I want to talk to you about the truth.

The unadorned, unvarnished truth.

The truth is important.

_Without the truth, we cannot order society.
Without the truth, we cannot survive as human beings.
Without the truth, we cannot thrive as human beings. _

_**[Can you handle the truth? I think you can.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=35ad8cdca31346a1a5035e71c1224f15&_e=dktCQ4-dEh1d0vqK0MKXviF10GrtNbZeS1mTDHeN634Jv1in4oJn8THYN7G8YqZaj2EkB2DsNnpZpaWryMNrrCHijW9pITXOqPEB_Nlz_qQq77yHlsxKOlxNfIlB7YbgWYkmionmYJo_FoUGfUx846oinVkvgC861JK0za-bow7YJloNvp6AZynlC4na0Cn__oiyjJBswM6_c4SJrrDSo0sqf2ykxiKbFdAXFCMJqB933HQFNPA3eUehF3Fijp7nq4S1OsomxuWLC5xJbwReAm0WdhEEwkSKFqs0A4kLqEsEjJeSstrTtfqKSiSyrS6GNtYnPdsbC94FzH-xgFnbxtQOLHQNbZNtWN-wxWOvA4egyEfB6J4q91WCujEY1ftPTSVSnv1L-udz1EsZwsOUdA%3D%3D "Can you handle the truth? I think you can.")**_

The truth is, I think it's important to speak your mind. So I do. Now, that makes some people mad, but I try not to worry too much about what anyone thinks of me.

This might be a tough pill to swallow, but I'd rather drink weed killer than sugarcoat the truth.

**So here 's the truth:** The Democrats are doing EVERYTHING in their power to destroy our country. Whether it's leaving our borders wide open for terrorists and illicit drugs to flow through, attacking parental rights, or outrageous government spending, they will do whatever it takes to undermine the foundations of America. It all goes back to the SPECTACULARLY awful job Joe Biden has done with America.

**Here 's the solution:** We must DEFEAT the Democrats at _**every level**_ of government. This will be the only way we can stop the Democrats' woke agenda and put America back on the path to prosperity.

**Here 's how we'll WIN: **This all starts with YOU, Friend. I am working alongside Majority Leader Scalise to personally ask you to put your money where your mouth is and help House Republicans beat the Democrats. They were outraised last quarter by $12M, so we cannot afford for a single patriot to sideline themselves.

clean_body: This might be a tough pill to swallow, but I'd rather drink weed killer than sugarcoat the truth. | | | | | Today, I want to talk to you about the truth. The unadorned, unvarnished truth. The truth is important. Without the truth, we cannot order society. Without the truth, we cannot survive as human beings. Without the truth, we cannot thrive as human beings. "Can you handle the truth? I think you can." The truth is, I think it's important to speak your mind. So I do. Now, that makes some people mad, but I try not to worry too much about what anyone thinks of me. This might be a tough pill to swallow, but I'd rather drink weed killer than sugarcoat the truth. So here 's the truth: The Democrats are doing EVERYTHING in their power to destroy our country. Whether it's leaving our borders wide open for terrorists and illicit drugs to flow through, attacking parental rights, or outrageous government spending, they will do whatever it takes to undermine the foundations of America. It all goes back to the SPECTACULARLY awful job Joe Biden has done with America. Here 's the solution: We must DEFEAT the Democrats at every level of government. This will be the only way we can stop the Democrats' woke agenda and put America back on the path to prosperity. Here 's how we'll WIN: This all starts with YOU, Friend. I am working alongside Majority Leader Scalise to personally ask you to put your money where your mouth is and help House Republicans beat the Democrats. By sending a text message from your mobile phone, you are providing your written consent to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from the Republican National Committee. Text message and data rates may apply. Text STOP 80810 to opt-out. Entries must be received between June 21st, 2023, at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Time and August 16th, 2023 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winner will receive round-trip transportation and accommodations for two (2) (approximate retail value $3000). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit ** for full details and Official Rules.
