| Hi Peter, it’s Kurt.

I’m running for Congress in AZ-01 because Arizonans deserve a leader that will fight for them instead of corporations and special interests.

Flipping this district won’t be easy, but I’m so glad to have such a strong team of grassroots supporters on my side. In a people-powered campaign like ours, contributions from folks like you are vitally important to our success, and we wouldn’t be where we are without your support.

[_**So, if you commit to making a monthly contribution of $5 or more through this email, you’ll have a chance to get a personal phone call from me as a thank you!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66726477/417383454/215820969?refcode=BLU-KKFC-20230719-1-EM&amount=5&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0MDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGU4NGE3ZjYtNjYyNi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PNrjTitI4s3jyu4fTDUJ5uPLsRnOyu_DxsyCzffscyw=)

### 46th Annual Dinner

| [Join us at our 46th Annual Dinner on October 27th, 2023 held at the Bellevue Regency Hyatt. ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=dd4dbb6e1e&e=6a281f566d)We have a great evening planned and hope you'll join us to honor Rep. Cathy McMorris Rodgers as we present her with this years' Courage Award for all the work she has done for both our state and nation while working in Washington DC and as Chair of the House Energy and Commerce Committee.

We will be bringing back a crowd favorite - Spokane county Treasurer Michael Baumgartner as our night's emcee and will also be joined by Representative Burgess Owens (UT-04) for a memorable keynote speech. [We hope you will join us at this yearly gathering!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=a370efc30f&e=6a281f566d)

This is your chance to learn more about their vision for our great state and show your support.

🌟[September 14th: Heart of the Party Reception - Yakima](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=46e69c2ab3&e=6a281f566d): Join us in Yakima for an evening with Republican elected officials like State Representative Alex Ybarra, Representative Bryan Sandlin, and Yakima County Commissioner Amanda McKinney along with other local candidates. This is your chance to support the Washington State Republican Party, our elected officials, and great candidates in the Yakima area!

🌟[September 15th: Heart of the Party Reception - Kenmore](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=46ece94735&e=6a281f566d): Join us in Kenmore for an evening with Republican elected officials like Snohomish County Councilman Nate Nehring and Sheriff Adam Fortney along with other local Republican candidates. Join us for good food, good drinks, and good company!

### 2024 State Convention
---
| [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=d420523a14&e=6a281f566d)
---
| Mark your calendars! The road to the 2024 elections is an opportunity for every member of the Washington State Republican Party to engage, participate, and make a difference. Here are the key dates you need to know: **Precinct Caucuses – January 13, 2024** : Precinct caucuses are the grassroots level of our political process. This is your first opportunity to get involved in the 2024 election cycle. Meet your Republican neighbors, discuss Party platform, and elect delegates to the County Conventions. Please contact your county party to get involved! More alerts and notifications will inform you as we get closer to the date of our precinct caucuses. **County Conventions – January 20 – March 16, 2024** (exact dates to be determined by individual counties): Elected delegates from the precinct caucuses will gather at their respective County Conventions. Here, they will elect delegates to the State Convention and address county-specific issues. **State Convention – April 18-20, 2024** : At the State Convention, delegates from across Washington will come together to endorse candidates for state and federal offices, pass a party platform, and select delegates to represent Washington at the National Convention. This event will play a crucial role in shaping the direction of the Party for the upcoming elections. **National Convention – July 15-18, 2024** : Chosen delegates will then attend the National Convention, where they will participate in the selection of the Party’s Presidential nominee, helping shape the national platform, and strategizing for the General Election.
---
| [Learn More: 2024 State Convention](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=f07616e3f0&e=6a281f566d "Learn More: 2024 State Convention")

|

|
## Get Involved
---
|
### Ballot Initiatives
---
| Help qualify these six Initiatives for the 2024 ballot! Washington State has an initiative process so that the citizens can directly influence the laws of our state. Democrats have brought us so many bad policies that have reduced public safety, increased the cost of living, and destroyed parental rights - and we need your help to ensure our state can get back on the right track!

[Find a signature location near you and add your name to help us qualify these six Initiatives](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=a3ecaa8748&e=6a281f566d):

### Public Safety:

_**I-2113: Reasonable Police Pursuit**_

This measure would remove certain restrictions on when peace officers may engage in vehicular pursuits. Such pursuits would be allowed when the officer has a reasonable suspicion a person has violated the law, pursuit is necessary to identify or apprehend the person, the person poses a threat to the safety of others, those safety risks are greater than those of the pursuit, and a supervisor authorizes the pursuit. [View the complete text here](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=fd8e683634&e=6a281f566d).
###
Cost of Living:

_**I-2117: Stop the Hidden Gas Tax**_

This measure would prohibit state agencies from imposing any type of carbon tax credit trading, uncluding 'cap and trade' or 'cap and tax' programs, regardless of whether the resulting increased costs are imposed on fuel recipients or fuel suppliers. It would repeal sections of the 2021 Washington Climate Commitment Act as amended, including repealing the creation and modification of a 'cap and invest' program to reduce gas emissions by specific entities. [View the complete text here. ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=48fdbd0a73&e=6a281f566d)

_**I-2124: Opt out of the State Run Long Term Care Coverage Act**_

This measure would amend state law establishing a state long term care insurance program to provide that employees and self-employed people must elect to keep coverage under RCW 50B.04, allow employees to opt-out of coverage under RCW 50B.04 at any time, and repeal a current law governing exemptions for employees who had purchased long term care insurance before November 1st, 2021. [View the complete text here](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=eb6de66ca0&e=6a281f566d).

_**I-2109: Repeal the Capital Gains Tax**_

This measure would repeal an excise tax imposed on the sale or exchange of certain long-term capital assets by individuals who have annual capital gainst of over $250,000. [View the complete text here](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=583a41c794&e=6a281f566d).

_**I-2111: No State Income Tax**_

This measure would prohibit the state, counties, cities, and other local jurisdictions from imposing or collecting income taxes, defined as having the same meaning as 'gross income' in the Internal Revenue Code. [View the complete text here.](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=6ddf181a94&e=6a281f566d)

### Parental Rights:

_**I-2081: Parental Notification**_

This measure would allow parents and guardians of public-school children to review instructional materials and inspect student records, including health and disciplinary records, upon request. It would require public schools to provide parents and guardians with certain notifications, including about medical services given and when students are taken off campus; access to calendars and certain policies; and written notice and opportunities to opt students out of comprehensive sexual-health education and answering certain surveys or assignments. [View the complete text here](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=623678b901&e=6a281f566d).

Here are the key dates you need to know: Precinct Caucuses – January 13, 2024 : Precinct caucuses are the grassroots level of our political process. This is your first opportunity to get involved in the 2024 election cycle. Meet your Republican neighbors, discuss Party platform, and elect delegates to the County Conventions. Please contact your county party to get involved! More alerts and notifications will inform you as we get closer to the date of our precinct caucuses. County Conventions – January 20 – March 16, 2024 (exact dates to be determined by individual counties): Elected delegates from the precinct caucuses will gather at their respective County Conventions. Here, they will elect delegates to the State Convention and address county-specific issues. State Convention – April 18-20, 2024 : At the State Convention, delegates from across Washington will come together to endorse candidates for state and federal offices, pass a party platform, and select delegates to represent Washington at the National Convention. This event will play a crucial role in shaping the direction of the Party for the upcoming elections. Peter, I would like for you to be the first to know about a major decision I have made.

**After much prayer with my family, I am announcing today, my campaign for the U.S. Senate for the Commonwealth of Virginia.**

As a Navy Special Operations Officer, I put my life on the line defending this country and led our troops into some of the most dangerous corners of the world, from Iraq to Afghanistan to Somalia.

But after a 25-year naval career, I’m taking our fight to our homeland to defend our freedom and the American Dream against radical Left politicians who want to destroy them.

You were an incredible part of our last mission, and now, we’re on a new one that I can’t wait to embark on with you.

It’s time we restore OUR Virginia and save OUR country. name: Team Sewell
subject: fwd: BREAKING: new maps are horrific for Alabama and Black representation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERRI SEWELL FOR CONGRESS
body:
Terri Sewell is the proud product of Alabama's rural Black Belt and has spent her life fighting for Alabama communities. From her time as one of the only black public finance lawyers in Alabama, when she delivered financing for new campus facilities at Alabama State University, Tuskegee University, and Stillman College, to her work as Congresswoman for Alabama's 7th District, Terri Sewell has delivered results every step of the way. If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.myngp.com/el/xklI8eC-NDfbeqdWZDMd2QfYlv0Q2jnR8GMbsLvpUNw=/z3xPcfdUU_PjmtNT3ZWCxIke62xXkv29ty7kbzAfxfA=)
---

| | Friend, the Republican-controlled Alabama Legislature is stripping away our right to fair representation right NOW. But you can do something about it.

**[Donate right now to help protect the ONLY Black-majority district in the state of Alabama>>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/xklI8eC-NDfbeqdWZDMd2QfYlv0Q2jnR8GMbsLvpUNw=/CFUC1xA-VClAtkAruJr722tPxC53GIaOSOcqcIm-Hn4=?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_TS_20230719_FR_ALMaps_WL_TeamSewell_na_na_RR)**

* * *
Read Terri's full message below:
---
**BREAKING NEWS:**
**New Alabama voting map sends Selma and Montgomery to MAGA District**

Chip in $10 or any amount right now to protect Alabama's 7th Congressional District from an extreme MAGA Republican takeover.

| [Chip in $10->](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ts-july?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_TS_20230719_FR_ALMaps_WL_TeamSewell_na_na_RR)
---

I'm outraged. Our hard-won Supreme Court case siding with the Voting Rights Act, siding with fairness and equity, and real representation in government is being ignored by the Republican super majority in the Alabama legislature.

Not only is the state legislature advancing maps that do NOT create a second minority majority voting district in Alabama as it was directed, it is trying to REDUCE the number of Black voters in our home district, leaving my seat vulnerable to an extreme MAGA challenger.

[**We can 't let that happen, **](https://act.myngp.com/el/xklI8eC-NDfbeqdWZDMd2QfYlv0Q2jnR8GMbsLvpUNw=/CFUC1xA-VClAtkAruJr722tPxC53GIaOSOcqcIm-Hn4=?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_TS_20230719_FR_ALMaps_WL_TeamSewell_na_na_RR)[**friend**](https://act.myngp.com/el/xklI8eC-NDfbeqdWZDMd2QfYlv0Q2jnR8GMbsLvpUNw=/CFUC1xA-VClAtkAruJr722tPxC53GIaOSOcqcIm-Hn4=?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_TS_20230719_FR_ALMaps_WL_TeamSewell_na_na_RR)[**. This new map flies in the face of everything the original lawsuit intended. I cannot waste a second if I 'm going to fight back at the polls in 2024. Chip in $10 here if you're on my side>>>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/xklI8eC-NDfbeqdWZDMd2QfYlv0Q2jnR8GMbsLvpUNw=/CFUC1xA-VClAtkAruJr722tPxC53GIaOSOcqcIm-Hn4=?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_TS_20230719_FR_ALMaps_WL_TeamSewell_na_na_RR)

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:
| [DONATE $5 NOW »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ts-july?amount=5&express_lane=true&source=EM_NBI_TS_20230719_FR_ALMaps_WL_TeamSewell_na_na_RR)
---
| [DONATE $10 NOW »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ts-july?amount=10&express_lane=true&source=EM_NBI_TS_20230719_FR_ALMaps_WL_TeamSewell_na_na_RR)
---
| [DONATE $25 NOW »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ts-july?amount=25&express_lane=true&source=EM_NBI_TS_20230719_FR_ALMaps_WL_TeamSewell_na_na_RR)
---

---
| [DONATE $100 NOW »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ts-july?amount=100&express_lane=true&source=EM_NBI_TS_20230719_FR_ALMaps_WL_TeamSewell_na_na_RR)
---
| [DONATE OTHER »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ts-july?amount=15&source=EM_NBI_TS_20230719_FR_ALMaps_WL_TeamSewell_na_na_RR)

But it's not just that they are reducing the number of Black voters in our district, it's HOW they are doing it....

In one map, they've moved my hometown of Selma and Montgomery -- two beacons of the civil rights movement and the fight to pass the _Voting Right Acts of 1965_ -- to Alabama's MAGA-controlled, Trumper Second District. It's horrifying; it's intentional; and it opens up the only Black-majority district -- our district -- to a Republican takeover.

Apparently this map didn't go far enough for some GOP state senators. In another map they passed today, the Black population in the 2nd district is only 38.31%, which is far below what is needed to ensure that Black voters have a real opportunity to elect a candidate of their choice.

_We cannot let this stand. That 's why I need your help right now. _

[**Please, donate just $10 or whatever you can to help defend my seat and make sure I have the resources it will take to keep Alabama-07 blue in 2024.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/xklI8eC-NDfbeqdWZDMd2QfYlv0Q2jnR8GMbsLvpUNw=/CFUC1xA-VClAtkAruJr722tPxC53GIaOSOcqcIm-Hn4=?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_TS_20230719_FR_ALMaps_WL_TeamSewell_na_na_RR) | [Donate->](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ts-july?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_TS_20230719_FR_ALMaps_WL_TeamSewell_na_na_RR)

Terri Sewell

Read Terri's full message below: BREAKING NEWS: New Alabama voting map sends Selma and Montgomery to MAGA District Chip in $10 or any amount right now to protect Alabama's 7th Congressional District from an extreme MAGA Republican takeover. | I'm outraged. Our hard-won Supreme Court case siding with the Voting Rights Act, siding with fairness and equity, and real representation in government is being ignored by the Republican super majority in the Alabama legislature. Not only is the state legislature advancing maps that do NOT create a second minority majority voting district in Alabama as it was directed, it is trying to REDUCE the number of Black voters in our home district, leaving my seat vulnerable to an extreme MAGA challenger. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: | | | | | | But it's not just that they are reducing the number of Black voters in our district, it's HOW they are doing it.... In one map, they've moved my hometown of Selma and Montgomery -- two beacons of the civil rights movement and the fight to pass the Voting Right Acts of 1965 -- to Alabama's MAGA-controlled, Trumper Second District. It's horrifying; it's intentional; and it opens up the only Black-majority district -- our district -- to a Republican takeover. Apparently this map didn't go far enough for some GOP state senators. In another map they passed today, the Black population in the 2nd district is only 38.31%, which is far below what is needed to ensure that Black voters have a real opportunity to elect a candidate of their choice. We cannot let this stand. That 's why I need your help right now. | For our right to vote, Terri Sewell PAID FOR BY TERRI SEWELL FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 1964 | Birmingham, AL 35201 If you need to you can unsubscribe here: = You can also .

Hi teammates, You know those anti-gun violence shirts that say, "policy & change"? Well that's what we are delivering right here in Maryland. I refuse to be a governor who simply attends funerals and memorials. Who every time we lose someone to gun violence only puts out a pleasantly-worded tweet. That's why in my first legislative session, I worked with our state representatives and senators to pass historic anti-gun violence legislation. We said no, you cannot bring a gun into a nursery or a school or a government building. **The NRA immediately sued us.** I'm not afraid of the NRA or gun manufacturers saying we're wrong. I'm afraid of doing nothing. Of continuing to lose people to senseless violence. [**I know the NRA isn't going to let this go. And so we can't either – that's why I'm asking you to pitch in** $25**. name: Tom Malinowski
subject: our voices matter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Districts for Democracy
body:
| | Since starting Districts for Democracy, we have seen so many people rise to the challenge and fight to keep culture wars out of our public schools.

Our organization was founded to protect the freedom to teach and to learn in our public schools, fighting back against censorship and supporting candidates ready to do the same. We’re doing this because we care about the quality of our kids’ educations. But we also know that public schools teaching history, civics, science, and critical thinking are vital to preserving democracy in America. That’s why the MAGA right is targeting them, and why we must defend them.

**The MAGA strategy is to mobilize its voters around school board elections and then to ride the culture wars to victory in the presidential and Congressional races in 2024. This is the time to stop them in their tracks.** And the good news is that the vast majority of voters want nothing to do with their extremist, book-banning agenda. We just have to get organized around the same local races they’re contesting.

[Our voices matter. I need you to stand with me so we can keep up our momentum and protect our children’s education, and our nation’s democracy, from these hate-filled extremists. Will you pitch in $10 or any amount to help us make this happen?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66727253/417386876/1647078566?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230719_FR_MMFR_0_TomMalinowski_NA_NA_MMFR.3&refcode2=e941d90c-6a26-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTQxZDkwYy02YTI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iYz3pN5o8VJbC2Olb46_xKPU6o1zD8GYi5LCqYY9RIA=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

clean_body: | | Since starting Districts for Democracy, we have seen so many people rise to the challenge and fight to keep culture wars out of our public schools. Our organization was founded to protect the freedom to teach and to learn in our public schools, fighting back against censorship and supporting candidates ready to do the same. We’re doing this because we care about the quality of our kids’ educations. But we also know that public schools teaching history, civics, science, and critical thinking are vital to preserving democracy in America. That’s why the MAGA right is targeting them, and why we must defend them. The MAGA strategy is to mobilize its voters around school board elections and then to ride the culture wars to victory in the presidential and Congressional races in 2024. This is the time to stop them in their tracks. And the good news is that the vast majority of voters want nothing to do with their extremist, book-banning agenda. We just have to get organized around the same local races they’re contesting. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Tom Malinowski * | Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States. = = Paid for by Districts for Democracy Districts for Democracy P.O. name: ElizabethWarren.com
subject: If you’re in a place where you can make a donation right now, please chip in $20 or any amount that makes sense for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
This is how we helped defy history and how we’ll build a country that works for everyone. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66745536/417419213/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ15M_EGR_Q_20230719_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTFmYWIwYi04YzI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q-PCQTDP4gSyI2EJZI3Q2fFCKL8bMHgcdJ2O2rUeR8g=&emci=27c12aaa-8826-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=451fab0b-8c26-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
Elizabeth is keeping up the fight in Washington — to root out corruption, defend our democracy, and rebuild the middle class. But she can’t do it alone. We fight by her side. And grassroots donors are at the heart of our movement, so we have to ask: [**If you’re in a place where you can make a donation right now — and if you’re proud to help keep Elizabeth in the ring, fighting for working families — please chip in $20 or any amount that makes sense for you.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66745537/417419214/-1332346508?amount=20&refcode=EMZ15M_EGR_Q_20230719_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTFmYWIwYi04YzI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q-PCQTDP4gSyI2EJZI3Q2fFCKL8bMHgcdJ2O2rUeR8g=) Every action you’ve taken adds up, from signing a petition or sharing an illuminating article on social media to knocking on some doors or pitching in a few bucks. It’s how we helped build the Congressional majorities — and the grassroots momentum — behind the historic progress we made in the first two years of the Biden-Harris administration:
* The biggest-ever federal investment in fighting the climate crisis
* The first time allowing Medicare to negotiate for lower prescription drugs
* A first-of-its-kind crackdown on freeloading corporations to make sure they pay taxes on massive profits, and much more.

It’s how we helped defy history, stopped the so-called “red wave,” and even expanded our Democratic Senate majority in 2022. And it’s how we’re going to build a country that works for everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected. But it starts with growing our grassroots movement, so we’re asking: [**Can you make a donation today? clean_body: This is how we helped defy history and how we’ll build a country that works for everyone. | | | Elizabeth is keeping up the fight in Washington — to root out corruption, defend our democracy, and rebuild the middle class. But she can’t do it alone. We fight by her side. And grassroots donors are at the heart of our movement, so we have to ask: = Every action you’ve taken adds up, from signing a petition or sharing an illuminating article on social media to knocking on some doors or pitching in a few bucks. It’s how we helped build the Congressional majorities — and the grassroots momentum — behind the historic progress we made in the first two years of the Biden-Harris administration: The biggest-ever federal investment in fighting the climate crisis The first time allowing Medicare to negotiate for lower prescription drugs * A first-of-its-kind crackdown on freeloading corporations to make sure they pay taxes on massive profits, and much more. It’s how we helped defy history, stopped the so-called “red wave,” and even expanded our Democratic Senate majority in 2022. And it’s how we’re going to build a country that works for everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected. But it starts with growing our grassroots movement, so we’re asking: = Thanks for everything, Team Warren | = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2023 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Team AOC
subject: A real person wrote this email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Can we be real with you for a moment?
We understand that a constant stream of emails asking for a contribution can sometimes get on your nerves. That’s okay. Real people wrote this email, we get them as well. We understand how people can get frustrated. _But let us explain why this is vital._
When we’re asking for your support, we don’t expect every person to give. But we ask because we know that when you can support the cause, you will. That’s how this transformative movement works.**It’s a whole lot of people doing their part to make something great.**
[Right now, we’re approaching our July deadline, and we’re hoping to hit our goal in just 12 days. The only way we can get there is through the support of small-dollar donors chipping in whatever they can. If you have the means, can you donate $5 right now? It’ll go a long way.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230719-2.mwr7eJ&refcode=em20230719-4662-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4662%2E2526796%2EaWR7HN)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230719-2.mwr7eJ&refcode=em20230719-4662-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4662%2E2526796%2EaWR7HN)**
We’re not exaggerating. Most members of Congress fuel their reelection campaigns by dedicating hours of their time asking rich donors for $500, $1000, or even $2900 donations.
**Alexandria is different.** This whole movement is fueled by online contributions like the ones we’re asking for in this email. With these contributions, we’ve built a campaign that is...
1. Raising resources, recruiting volunteers, and making calls to help elect progressive allies across Congress, and build a progressive majority.
2. Reaching out to communities across NY-14 to spread awareness about the Green New Deal, how to influence local, state, and federal leaders, how to access medical abortion by mail, and more.
3. Raising money for community relief organizations, closing critical resources gaps that the federal government has left unfilled.
4. Working day and night to keep Alexandria in Congress and show the world what we can do.

[There are more than enough people reading this email that, if they just donated whatever they can spare, we’d be on track to hit our July contribution targets. If this movement is the model of what you want in our politics, please donate today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230719-2.mwr7eJ&refcode=em20230719-4662-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4662%2E2526796%2EaWR7HN)
Thanks for reading,
Team AOC
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230719-2.mwr7eJ&refcode=em20230719-4662-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=4662%2E2526796%2EaWR7HN)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230719-2?refcode=em20230719-4662-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=23&refcode2=4662_2526796_aWR7HN&akid=4662%2E2526796%2EaWR7HN)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230719-4662-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=24&akid=4662%2E2526796%2EaWR7HN)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=4662%2E2526796%2EaWR7HN) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=4662%2E2526796%2EaWR7HN) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=4662%2E2526796%2EaWR7HN)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

subject: PRESS RELEASE: AG Dana Nessel Reveals New Authoritarian Streak & Attempts at Political Theatre Will FAIL
body:
| | | Can't see images? [Browser View](https://mailchi.mp/bd3c63df8857/press-release-ag-dana-nessel-reveals-new-authoritarian-streak-attempts-at-political-theatre-will-fail?e=a2af77507c)
---
| |
---
| | |
# PARTY OF THE CONSTITUTION
---
| | **_PRESS RELEASE: AG Dana Nessel Reveals New Authoritarian Streak & Attempts at Political Theatre Will FAIL_**
---
| | For Immediate Release:
Lansing Michigan

AG Dana Nessel's recent charge of forgery and conspiracy against sixteen alternative electors in Michigan has sparked valid concerns regarding the possible misuse of power by her office. It is crucial to recognize that despite being identified as a liberal, this AG constantly displays authoritarian tendencies and ambitions.

It is not only the sixteen targets of the weaponized AG who are being victimized but also the patriot employees in the AG office who uphold the rule of law. These illicit prosecutions are forcing them to make a difficult choice between fulfilling their Oath of Office or being complicit in wrongful actions.

First, let us deal with the charges against the sixteen alternative electors (links below):
* Did you know that challenges to elections are common occurrences? In the 2016 election, seven Democratic members of the House filed objections.
* Did you know that an alternative slate of electors is legally and historically provided for? This process was put into action during the 1876 election.
* Did you know that the 2020 election had problems in Michigan and there was potential for the use of an alternative set of electors? The Secretary of State was found by the Michigan Court of Appeals to have breached the law by employing signature verification on more absentee ballots than the margin between the candidates. This is an absolute prohibition and merely confirms a challenge without considering other anomalies that have been discovered.
* Did you know that the sixteen alternative electors were put under a Grand Jury investigation in DC, yet no charges were brought against them?

Why is AG Nessel weaponizing her AG office using illicit prosecutions?

The answer is twofold:
1\. Deconstruct the influence of the Michigan Republican Party's activists and leaders by striking fear in us of being illicitly prosecuted.
2\. Aspiring-tyrant AG Nessel and her co-conspirators posing as 'liberals' have their sights set on preserving, protecting, and defending systemic election corruption. This system enables them to flood our governing bodies with individuals who are either actively working towards the destruction of Michigan and America or are being used as mere pawns in their schemes.

Our kids and grandchildren’s future hangs in the balance. Will they inherit a tyrannical government that oppresses and silences its people? Will they inherit God-given unalienable rights our forefathers fought and died for and we are obliged to protect? It is imperative for Americans to join the Grassroots Populist MIGOP team and establish constitutional governance to tackle the issue of government weaponization effectively.

The MIGOP team will closely monitor the situation and recruit and deploy activists as needed to ensure we are doing right by God and delivering freedom to future generations.

MIGOP IS THE PARTY OF THE CONSTITUTION!

Links:

[https://www.newsweek.com/fact-check-did-democrats-object-more-states-2016-republicans-2020-1561407](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=dd65aea9f1&e=a2af77507c) [https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/justice-department/dozens-witnesses-testified-jan-6-focused-grand-jury-probes-trump-rcna91171](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=47ed0a8503&e=a2af77507c) [https://www.politico.com/story/2017/01/no-trump-electoral-college-challenge-233294](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=063f4ddd6b&e=a2af77507c) [https://www.justsecurity.org/82233/a-historical-perspective-on-alternate-electors-lessons-from-hayes-tiden/](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=ceb9b7ea5a&e=a2af77507c)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: RE: the Israeli president’s address to Congress today.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Justice Democrats Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Ilhan Omar, Cori Bush, Rashida
Tlaib, and Jamaal Bowman did not attend the Israeli president’s address to
Congress today in protest of the Israeli government’s treatment of
Palestinians.

What they did is right and a model for what more progressives should be
doing. Israeli president, Isaac Herzog is coming to the U.S. during
Israeli’s most right-wing government in recent history.

How right-wing? High-ranking members of that government have publicly
voiced support for ethnic cleansing of Palestinians. Attendance is
complicity.

More than just rhetoric; this government’s actions have immensely harmed
Palestinians. Not only are they planning a massive illegal settlement
expansion, stealing the land Palestinians live on, but have also conducted
the largest military assault in the West Bank in 20 years.

Despite the Israeli government’s blatant anti-Palestinian racism, the
United States continues to send Israel $3.8 billion per year in
unconditional military funding. And when Justice Democrats like Pramila
Jayapal stand up for Palestinians, they’re condemned by our party’s
leaders.

Instead of surrendering to Super PACs like AIPAC, these Justice Democrats
are sending a strong message by skipping the Israeli president’s speech to
Congress: we need to be consistent in standing up for human rights here
and abroad, and not give any country or ally a pass.

While AIPAC and other right-wing groups are ready to spend millions to
silence anyone who stands up on behalf of Palestinian civil rights, the
more progressives who speak up, the better chance we have at overcoming
their millions of dollars and bringing true democracy and equality for all
Palestinians and Israelis.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136070?refcode=em20230719-29969&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=29969%2E1203867%2EUNoL3Z ]So today, we’re asking for your financial support, so we can elect more
leaders who will stand up for Palestinian rights. Will you donate
$3 right now?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136070?refcode=em20230719-29969&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=29969%2E1203867%2EUNoL3Z ]Donate $3

Thank you for your solidarity,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=29969%2E1203867%2EUNoL3Z ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=29969%2E1203867%2EUNoL3Z ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230719-29969-footer&t=1023&refcode2=29969_1203867_UNoL3Z&akid=29969%2E1203867%2EUNoL3Z

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=29969%2E1203867%2EUNoL3Z

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Peter, God Calls Us to Do Hard Things. That’s not just the title of my new book, it’s a phrase that has summed up my life experience. **As a wife, mother, attorney, businesswoman, and –**** _now –_****public official, God has called on me to do hard things.** Now, I want to tell you my story– a story of setbacks and successes, of laughing and crying, of tough times, good times and real challenges– and most importantly, of faith and service. From the Wiregrass to the United States Senate, I want you to hear my story, Peter. And I hope that the values and lessons I learned growing up in Alabama can inspire a new generation to do hard things.

clean_body: Not just a book title–a life experience | | | Peter, God Calls Us to Do Hard Things. That’s not just the title of my new book, it’s a phrase that has summed up my life experience. As a wife, mother, attorney, businesswoman, and – now –public official, God has called on me to do hard things. Now, I want to tell you my story– a story of setbacks and successes, of laughing and crying, of tough times, good times and real challenges– and most importantly, of faith and service. From the Wiregrass to the United States Senate, I want you to hear my story, Peter. And I hope that the values and lessons I learned growing up in Alabama can inspire a new generation to do hard things. Sincerely, Senator Katie Britt | | Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

| | Options ARE always better, y'all. Just like with cars, homes, and even what you're planning for dinner...I like to have options and so should America when comes to choosing their next commander-in-chief. Don't let early polls and rhetoric get you down about the upcoming presidential election. A majority of Americans are clamoring for a new direction led by common sense leaders...the problem is only 23% of voters actually vote in primaries. This is our chance to change the trajectory of our country, to stop thinking about the short-term, to invest in the future of this nation, and to point us in a more hopeful direction. **I'm sick of the in-party fighting and divisive rhetoric that's tearing our country apart. ** Join me in the fight for a future grounded in common sense that will prioritize the needs of the American people and build on our strengths as a nation. _**I'm asking you to make your FIRST donation today of as little as $1.**_

clean_body: | | | | | Options ARE always better, y'all. Just like with cars, homes, and even what you're planning for dinner...I like to have options and so should America when comes to choosing their next commander-in-chief. Don't let early polls and rhetoric get you down about the upcoming presidential election. A majority of Americans are clamoring for a new direction led by common sense leaders...the problem is only 23% of voters actually vote in primaries. This is our chance to change the trajectory of our country, to stop thinking about the short-term, to invest in the future of this nation, and to point us in a more hopeful direction. I'm sick of the in-party fighting and divisive rhetoric that's tearing our country apart. Join me in the fight for a future grounded in common sense that will prioritize the needs of the American people and build on our strengths as a nation. I'm asking you to make your FIRST donation today of as little as $1. Together we can make this vision a reality and create an America that thrives on innovation, opportunity, and leads the world in power and principle. Thank you,Will Hurd Candidate for President & Former Texas Congressman | | | | www.hurdforamerica.com | | |

name: Captain Sam Brown
subject: I thought I was dead. But God had other plans.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
I survived this for a reason, Friend

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4a10a85e321247409bdbad9fcb1c7a6b&_e=z0vj8pRV4ULEA0nUnmolUgI9WVd2XFqXC9bYzXBuhnCwLumxs_jpE9XODz2A9ImLwbaIi-92Sq8UtFkfQQO8H5OzF-VKrdTJHfbSFWWPqGrrERyT409Y8HLdy5me8uSBnwhBXqj499ThL5AOJ91mI1joqpteQ9d5S2f1uIfgpAPtXyXvoM5xk9KuoJr0wgvklUYpHYhcSdfSsRJkMHtE0fAUJKkAl57iDC5qmlQ3SF-qtJdEztRSE3HqSo9aK7w23Unn8oXKcUr-9Hc9xgAD9BpA2-Zjem5lIigTiZMI2NlOx4dwwTVBjFCA38xO35uBEYOSUS1aTs05YQnKlYzuW95AG9Bds1qJ1B77Nmxec5Ti9CEk7BXGVqRJAtIAE08Ky70o-icGgGnIUwmX8mcovT24QaN5P3sDLcEJ3BEm_6GcuR-nrPmPolY0_WsKhRbQ)
---
Even 15 years after the bomb went off - it's hard to believe that I survived. While serving in Afghanistan, a roadside bomb exploded under the gas tank of my vehicle. The explosion drenched me in diesel and covered my body in flames. **_I thought I was done for. But God had other plans._** A fellow soldier, who had also been injured by our attackers, rushed to extinguish the fire on my body. But, I don't remember that day as the day I nearly died. **I remember it as the day I was given a new life.** A life that would be totally dedicated to the service of my country, and my family for the glory of God. **_The life I live is not my own, and I intend to give my whole life up in service. _** **[That 's why I'm running for the U.S. Senate.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4a10a85e321247409bdbad9fcb1c7a6b&_e=z0vj8pRV4ULEA0nUnmolUgI9WVd2XFqXC9bYzXBuhnCwLumxs_jpE9XODz2A9ImLwbaIi-92Sq8UtFkfQQO8H5OzF-VKrdTJHfbSFWWPqGrrERyT409Y8HLdy5me8uSBnwhBXqj499ThL5AOJ91mI1joqpteQ9d5S2f1uIfgpAPtXyXvoM5xk9KuoJr0wgvklUYpHYhcSdfSsRJkMHtE0fAUJKkAl57iDC5qmlQ3SF-qtJdEztRSE3HqSo9aK7w23Unn8oXKcUr-9Hc9xgAD9BpA2-Zjem5lIigTiZMI2Nl4_6fK0suAGSBI9HvcQbBtOi6B_Sb_ggIJxfcbkBY_Ha68LwXub4dgMvHpoAhg4JrMuZZdRSyvRdjxpRK0sFGmuRNPynHQYwuBz-S5XnscnUXOU-cQdVz6GvPDa_N4fSUET9ePip85jmmjWOij4T_S)** I always knew that God's calling for my life would lead me to service for my country. What I didn't know is that this path would lead me to run for public office. But the mission I'm setting off on today is not one I can complete on my own. [**That 's why I am asking for your support today.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4a10a85e321247409bdbad9fcb1c7a6b&_e=z0vj8pRV4ULEA0nUnmolUgI9WVd2XFqXC9bYzXBuhnCwLumxs_jpE9XODz2A9ImLwbaIi-92Sq8UtFkfQQO8H5OzF-VKrdTJHfbSFWWPqGrrERyT409Y8HLdy5me8uSBnwhBXqj499ThL5AOJ91mI1joqpteQ9d5S2f1uIfgpAPtXyXvoM5xk9KuoJr0wgvklUYpHYhcSdfSsRJkMHtE0fAUJKkAl57iDC5qmlQ3SF-qtJdEztRSE3HqSo9aK7w23Unn8oXKcUr-9Hc9xgAD9BpA2-Zjem5lIigTiZMI2NnlPzafJ2m2i6A-fMcJ9DUSSebN3B77B5V1l2FpZaAKd-0HxUekLjxmjc7Q_uJBI8MH2VyaS2IugL_oqE6CC27rpeTYzqP98KCHsEUny2hU4zVMWsDuI2Dj7cQBFhDH84wJsv0yznR3dpP81xScUHg7) Friend, the fight to defend America is fundamentally not about me. It's about protecting the greatest country in the history of mankind and ensuring the longevity of the American experiment for you, your children, and your children's children. **But the American experiment has never been in greater peril than it is right now.** Just look at where our country is right now. Since Joe Biden took office, we've faced unprecedented threats from adversaries like China, our economy has fallen to shambles, our southern border has deteriorated. We've allowed a full scale invasion to occur, and the radical left's agenda has torn our nation apart bit by bit. The mission to take back the Senate and restore our nation is going to require all of us, working together as a team, to complete. **[I 'm relying on patriots like you to join me. Help me make this mission possible NOW! >>](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4a10a85e321247409bdbad9fcb1c7a6b&_e=z0vj8pRV4ULEA0nUnmolUgI9WVd2XFqXC9bYzXBuhnCwLumxs_jpE9XODz2A9ImLwbaIi-92Sq8UtFkfQQO8H5OzF-VKrdTJHfbSFWWPqGrrERyT409Y8HLdy5me8uSBnwhBXqj499ThL5AOJ91mI1joqpteQ9d5S2f1uIfgpAPtXyXvoM5xk9KuoJr0wgvklUYpHYhcSdfSsRJkMHtE0fAUJKkAl57iDC5qmlQ3SF-qtJdEztRSE3HqSo9aK7w23Unn8oXKcUr-9Hc9xgAD9BpA2-Zjem5lIigTiZMI2NlROfxGOCmKKNOsJq-Lq1-FbO9AWf8ShArdoBGPlBVf3xyfeYIEzE4dFWlRd2wThVMpzWxbz6YppRixdhfPZ2QncrBoxuKfdYDOQw0Mi1cstG_1GtRnOiscgTzqEM8TSbMWiDDeL8zSDnmYQtFHdhXp)** Duty First,
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4a10a85e321247409bdbad9fcb1c7a6b&_e=z0vj8pRV4ULEA0nUnmolUgI9WVd2XFqXC9bYzXBuhnCwLumxs_jpE9XODz2A9ImLwbaIi-92Sq8UtFkfQQO8H5OzF-VKrdTJHfbSFWWPqGrrERyT409Y8HLdy5me8uSBnwhBXqj499ThL5AOJ91mI1joqpteQ9d5S2f1uIfgpAPtXyXvoM5xk9KuoJr0wgvklUYpHYhcSdfSsRJkMHtE0fAUJKkAl57iDC5qmlQ3SF-qtJdEztRSE3HqSo9aK7w23Unn8oXKcUr-9Hc9xgAD9BpA2-Zjem5lIigTiZMI2NlwchI9QGP2uf7pV_0WRXvqau09ZATwEqgmL2x0QGHzZnL6pKvPAoh0lHUA_EnWpD21neEZDCW1HdrcE2uJCW4rXLv9YP5sa-QFqB0jZi6DO5GIXB2NNuCv4QweyaBkY_BPmPXtMr1nDmnY0mYsgqmi)

name: Chuck Morse
subject: I'm Running for Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse, PO Box 106, North Salem, NH 03073
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMjYyNTc0MDI2MDM3NjYzOTgyJmM9ZTBvNyZlPTAmYj0xMTc2MDgyMTAxJmQ9bjhyOXAxaA==.vK1kLCcdSlSp2lVYzK7T-pjckrLRfnD6tR9vSvLyFYM)
| | | |
---
| |
---
| Friend, **__** Like most everyone else in New Hampshire I’m thankful for everything that Governor Sununu has done to make New Hampshire the state it is today.
I’m proud to have worked with him to put together a conservative, pro-jobs, pro-growth, family first economic agenda that has made New Hampshire the envy of New England and the nation. We lead the nation in economic freedom. We have the lowest poverty rate in the nation and are the number one state for taxpayer return on investment. Now that he’s decided not to run for re-election, I’m announcing that I am running for Governor to build on those successes. Year in and year out New Hampshire ranks among the best states to live in. It’s not an accident and it’s not luck either. It’s because we elect conservatives who get results. It’s what I did as Senate President and it’s what I’ll do as Governor. I want to put my experience and leadership to work for the people of New Hampshire to keep moving forward on a path of growth and prosperity for all. Best, Chuck Morse

---

name: Joanna Weiss
subject: Republicans pulled our national defense into their culture war.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOANNA WEISS FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66731831/417398196/-1695430967?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzJmMmM0ZWMtNzAyNi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0zIvZy8RCk-X67roF9uDbq8MIhhJ7647n2hTVttE7p0=)
Peter, you may not know this but I come from a military family.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66731832/417398197/-129347026?refcode=em-7.19.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzJmMmM0ZWMtNzAyNi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0zIvZy8RCk-X67roF9uDbq8MIhhJ7647n2hTVttE7p0=) _Here’s a photo of my grandfather, at the time of his service._ **My grandfather, father, brother, and nephew have all served in the Navy.** I know the importance of service to our country, and the profound challenges that service members and their families face.

That's also why I was so disappointed to see the passage of this year's national defense bill – the NDAA – devolve into a heated political fight.

Typically when the defense bill comes up, Congress passes it with strong bipartisan support. That’s how it should be; both parties coming together to keep the country safe.

**But this year, Kevin McCarthy and his allies in the ‘Conspiracy Caucus’ pulled the NDAA into their culture war -- putting their social agenda ahead of our national security. Frankly, it's appalling.**

This is exactly what happens when a major political party is hijacked by the furthest extremes in their ranks. We have politicians leading the way who care more about scoring culture war points than investing in keeping our country safe.

This needs to end, and step one is taking back the House in 2024.

**[CA-47 will be one of the most important districts for Democrats to hold in order to retake the House majority. Friend,
On Sunday night, while I was with my family, my attorneys gave me HORRIFYING news.
The deranged prosecutor with Biden's Department of Justice sent a letter, stating that **I AM A TARGET OF THE JANUARY 6TH GRAND JURY INVESTIGATION.**
**They gave me a very short time period of 4 DAYS to report to the Grand Jury, which almost always means an ARREST and INDICTMENT.**
Let me be perfectly clear: I DID NOTHING WRONG. I AM COMPLETELY INNOCENT.
This is just another vicious act of Election Interference on behalf of the Deep State to try and stop the Silent Majority from having a voice in your own country.
It's quite the coincidence that this news comes JUST AFTER a series of polls show that all of our Republican opponents are LOSING BADLY to Crooked Joe Biden - and that I AM THE ONLY CANDIDATE projected to beat him in a free and fair election.
This letter also comes just after our FEC report revealed a TREMENDOUS number of small-dollar donors, proving that the _AMERICAN PEOPLE_ stand by our movement.
The Special Counsel's office has already wasted $9 MILLION of YOUR taxpayer money on never-ending witch hunts to try and destroy our movement - not to mention the $32 MILLION wasted in Mueller's Russia, Russia, Russia witch hunt.
When I keep touring the country and hear voters tell me, "President Trump, you're our only hope!" "President Trump, we NEED you back in the White House!" - I know that I could never stop fighting to save our country, no matter how vicious these witch hunts ever become.
**The fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. It 's not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well - and I will _NEVER_ let them take it from you.**
_If you 're doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day._
But if not, I don't have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now.

clean_body: Stating I am the target of a GRAND JURY investigation Stating I am the target of a GRAND JURY investigation | | | Friend, On Sunday night, while I was with my family, my attorneys gave me HORRIFYING news. The deranged prosecutor with Biden's Department of Justice sent a letter, stating that I AM A TARGET OF THE JANUARY 6TH GRAND JURY INVESTIGATION. They gave me a very short time period of 4 DAYS to report to the Grand Jury, which almost always means an ARREST and INDICTMENT. Let me be perfectly clear: I DID NOTHING WRONG. I AM COMPLETELY INNOCENT. This is just another vicious act of Election Interference on behalf of the Deep State to try and stop the Silent Majority from having a voice in your own country. It's quite the coincidence that this news comes JUST AFTER a series of polls show that all of our Republican opponents are LOSING BADLY to Crooked Joe Biden - and that I AM THE ONLY CANDIDATE projected to beat him in a free and fair election. This letter also comes just after our FEC report revealed a TREMENDOUS number of small-dollar donors, proving that the AMERICAN PEOPLE stand by our movement. The Special Counsel's office has already wasted $9 MILLION of YOUR taxpayer money on never-ending witch hunts to try and destroy our movement - not to mention the $32 MILLION wasted in Mueller's Russia, Russia, Russia witch hunt. When I keep touring the country and hear voters tell me, "President Trump, you're our only hope!" "President Trump, we NEED you back in the White House!" - I know that I could never stop fighting to save our country, no matter how vicious these witch hunts ever become. The fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. It 's not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well - and I will NEVER let them take it from you. If you 're doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day. But if not, I don't have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now. | | Thank you, | Donald J. _"A sad day in American constitutional law and in the lives of LGBTQ+ people.”_

Peter, that's what Justice Sotomayor said in response to the latest Supreme Court decision to further strip away the rights and protections of the LGBTQ+ community – and today, I echo that sentiment.
But more than that – this was not just a sad day, but an _infuriating_ one.
Because, for decades now, we have fought for the LGBTQ+ community to receive the protections they deserve. From the right to marry, to the right to adopt children, to simply the right to exist in their own skin, we have spent decades fighting for these protections bit by bit.
Peter, this case, which rested entirely on a hypothetical situation and not a real one, should've never even made it in front of the nation's highest court – and the fact that it did sends alarm bells. It implies that the conservative Supreme Court is looking beyond legal reason and instead looking for ways to intentionally harm the LGBTQ+ community. And if that's the case, we need to be prepared to fight back.
**That's why I put together this flash poll so I can gauge where public support falls on this issue. **
**Peter, I will _never_ relent in my fight for the LGBTQ+ community in New York and beyond, but I need to know if you're in this fight with me. Before midnight tonight, will you take this quick survey to tell me where you stand?**

clean_body: | | | | | Do you think LGBTQ+ rights should be protected? | | | | "A sad day in American constitutional law and in the lives of LGBTQ+ people.” Peter, that's what Justice Sotomayor said in response to the latest Supreme Court decision to further strip away the rights and protections of the LGBTQ+ community – and today, I echo that sentiment. But more than that – this was not just a sad day, but an infuriating one. Because, for decades now, we have fought for the LGBTQ+ community to receive the protections they deserve. From the right to marry, to the right to adopt children, to simply the right to exist in their own skin, we have spent decades fighting for these protections bit by bit. Peter, this case, which rested entirely on a hypothetical situation and not a real one, should've never even made it in front of the nation's highest court – and the fact that it did sends alarm bells. It implies that the conservative Supreme Court is looking beyond legal reason and instead looking for ways to intentionally harm the LGBTQ+ community. And if that's the case, we need to be prepared to fight back. That's why I put together this flash poll so I can gauge where public support falls on this issue. Peter, I will never relent in my fight for the LGBTQ+ community in New York and beyond, but I need to know if you're in this fight with me. Before midnight tonight, will you take this quick survey to tell me where you stand? | | Do you think LGBTQ+ rights should be protected? | | | | Thank you for standing with me. Letitia | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: What we learned from fixing I-95 in 12 days:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Derek, after a critical stretch of I-95 collapsed, some experts said it would take months to get traffic flowing again. But here in Pennsylvania, we got it done in 12 days. Look, I know we've all become accustomed to infrastructure projects getting mired down in a slog of reviews, permits, and delays — and dragging on for years as a result. But it doesn't have to be that way. **Americans can do big things again.** **[That's why I wrote an op-ed in The Washington Post about the playbook we developed here in Pennsylvania. I hope you'll take a moment to read it, Derek](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66732268/417398715/-1595192527?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzAyMmE0Zi03MTI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mpEJuQuL0ixb7gmDcUCFu8bEzvkl8l9N4AQdO9hKtjw=&emci=006f2349-7126-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=67022a4f-7126-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21962291)[.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66732269/417398717/-1423115610?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzAyMmE0Zi03MTI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mpEJuQuL0ixb7gmDcUCFu8bEzvkl8l9N4AQdO9hKtjw=&emci=006f2349-7126-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=67022a4f-7126-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21962291)** | | [Read Josh's Op-Ed →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66732270/417398718/-1595192527?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzAyMmE0Zi03MTI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mpEJuQuL0ixb7gmDcUCFu8bEzvkl8l9N4AQdO9hKtjw=&emci=006f2349-7126-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=67022a4f-7126-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21962291)
---
Our experience reopening I-95 provides real lessons for how state and local leaders across our nation can take on big infrastructure projects, from highway and bridge repair to broadband expansion and clean energy, and get them done — safely, quickly, and smartly.
I expand on these points **[in the piece](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66732271/417398719/-1423115610?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzAyMmE0Zi03MTI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mpEJuQuL0ixb7gmDcUCFu8bEzvkl8l9N4AQdO9hKtjw=&emci=006f2349-7126-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=67022a4f-7126-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21962291)** , but here are some of our key takeaways:
**1️⃣ Empower strong leadership**
**2️⃣ Speed up bureaucracy**
**3️⃣ Encourage creativity**
**4️⃣ Work together**
Derek, infrastructure is the backbone of America. And with the necessary resources, the right team, and a smart strategy, there is tremendous opportunity to get some big things done in the years ahead.
Sincerely,
Gov. Josh Shapiro

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Tomorrow’s vote on Supreme Court ethics reform
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Make your voice heard >>>
#
Peter,
We have an important vote tomorrow in the Senate Judiciary Committee.
Chief Justice John Roberts failed to act on a code of conduct for Supreme Court Justices—even in the midst of a wave of headlines about alleged misconduct. So our Committee will mark up and vote on the Supreme Court Ethics, Recusal, and Transparency Act tomorrow.
**[I know you can’t be in the Senate with us tomorrow, but you can make your voice heard right now. Add your name now to support long-overdue Supreme Court ethics reform.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66732626/417399066/1611293731?refcode=dd_em_230719_1&ms=dd_em_230719_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzliOGVkNy03MTI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BvgFFJCKyfk0PiswBcJIomsH5U9AticRUdUvGhicMFY=&emci=eb42c3ff-6626-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=e39b8ed7-7126-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)**
Our legislation aims to do three things to restore Americans’ confidence in the Supreme Court:
1. Adopt a strong code of ethical conduct for Supreme Court Justices to follow
2. Institute procedures to properly investigate violations and enforce the rules
3. Require disclosure on conflicts of interest and full transparency on recusals

Every other federal judge is sworn to abide by a high bar of ethical standards, but lifetime appointees to the Supreme Court don’t follow the same rules.
Tomorrow, when we mark up this bill and send it to the full Senate, I want to be able to show my colleagues the vast amount of support across the country for Supreme Court ethics reform.
****[Will you sign on now to join us in this historic push?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66732628/417399067/1611293731?refcode=dd_em_230719_1&ms=dd_em_230719_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzliOGVkNy03MTI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BvgFFJCKyfk0PiswBcJIomsH5U9AticRUdUvGhicMFY=&emci=eb42c3ff-6626-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=e39b8ed7-7126-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)****
My best,
Dick Durbin

**[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66732629/417399068/1611293731?refcode=dd_em_230719_1&ms=dd_em_230719_1amp;email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzliOGVkNy03MTI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BvgFFJCKyfk0PiswBcJIomsH5U9AticRUdUvGhicMFY=&emci=eb42c3ff-6626-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=e39b8ed7-7126-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)**

name: Mary Pat
subject: Calling it like it is

body:

| | My friend, My husband, Chris Christie, has always called it like it is. As long as I have known him (and I've known him a long time...) he's always been focused on the truth and doing what is right.

Whether as a U.S. Attorney, a Governor, or even as a husband and father, treating people fairly and making common sense decisions have been very important to him. Does he make mistakes? Of course he does! We all do. But what makes Chris different from almost all other leaders is that he isn't afraid to admit them and then work to make the situation better.
---
[**Can Chris Count On You?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe31785746a74a91a29688c558f8e5b5&_m=7f29ea0d642449dfb419c844a2533ab6&_e=oj0vcW6IEO45MLhHqETrPEudMJBODtecyA1Hf68KukoHN7ZmoZyV0N0JtT6wOSi-xcSScbDZT-ZdehFTgwfacbe6Pxw5nvKV9V1Ob_kbE6xATs8YoQyaE5I7r1ub1GLSsJv79xrhpfPIftVe6ISFi7YAsIR1fKE5ayGr4bBDW-dt8iZLQRhV8UtGWyWBsuumhi12l-n1Cyx91_qrRI9izG_KA8ObzczzMR6L33z-6tt6PBbcziavqrQUMB5onQFBcO0g1YSGlfT9bp_D_nXylQ%3D%3D)
---
**Like Chris says, be wary of the leader who has never made a mistake... **
Modern American politics is a divisive mess. From Donald Trump's never ending stream of lies to politicians changing their message based on who they are talking to, we need more people like my husband who will speak the TRUTH - no matter who he is talking to.
---
[**SUPPORT CHRIS CHRISTIE**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe31785746a74a91a29688c558f8e5b5&_m=7f29ea0d642449dfb419c844a2533ab6&_e=oj0vcW6IEO45MLhHqETrPEudMJBODtecyA1Hf68KukoHN7ZmoZyV0N0JtT6wOSi-xcSScbDZT-ZdehFTgwfacbe6Pxw5nvKV9V1Ob_kbE6xATs8YoQyaE5I7r1ub1GLSR9CEk8PZjKDIybbKsjwZQYJutqDIyhrbsOShKUnWf5azPnf_lvDK7CAIziIMLqWGf4CKI1uqllGUNw3lMrcfy4RNJKh5s6aRxpOuvPgHzbsyZx2YiAIa5W2nWrD8D2wu-tHwUWhU_K0n1IANt_4tLQ%3D%3D)
---
**Let's change directions. Do something different.** Let's stop giving the time of day to politicians who only want to divide us so they can maintain power and control.
We have an opportunity to change the debate, end the divisiveness, and start moving in the RIGHT direction again, and I know Chris is the leader to make it happen. [**__Can he count on you to join him?__**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe31785746a74a91a29688c558f8e5b5&_m=7f29ea0d642449dfb419c844a2533ab6&_e=oj0vcW6IEO45MLhHqETrPEudMJBODtecyA1Hf68KukoHN7ZmoZyV0N0JtT6wOSi-xcSScbDZT-ZdehFTgwfacbe6Pxw5nvKV9V1Ob_kbE6xATs8YoQyaE5I7r1ub1GLSeU47BsTYNL1sO6_sbfJuTUztr-BWE2nmCwNZxWMZpzaZro5gJ0gUT__-Rzev2tqhiyR0DNho5EKzU1mNQL2wtzAV2_3LSeKXAElNMprfiA-aLa6lNKvrI-4bG58I7JOHvkOtUh18aVVABEXocYdioQ%3D%3D) Thank you, **Mary Pat Christie**

name: Congressman Mike Waltz
subject: ICYMI: Rules for thee, NOT for me
body:
| | | This is Congressman Mike Waltz, I just exposed the Biden Administration for its hypocrisy in a BIG way. Green-agenda Fanatic John Kerry just admitted UNDER OATH to flying on a **_private jet_** while working for the Biden Administration. This is the same administration that’s shutting down America’s natural resources, killing our jobs, and forcing companies to move their business to Communist China. Folks, this is hypocrisy in its purest form. These people want to make rules only for you to live by while they live a life of unrestricted luxury at the top. It’s unsustainable, and frankly, _UnAmerican_ that they can get away with this. Help us stop this kind of behavior once and for all. [**Sign your name at the link below to hold them accountable. **](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=398f4cbf65534e10996fad361ac1d571&_e=j31ZsiLiuJrJqQByrH_Bj5ykp6G9Hkap60kh9gEvPum3eS-QWj_PW4RhTb689g6S7gaJQCzKAZGIAV4cKQ3CD6LWU1sTmUusr4sGKhw0uK8PzKbpoBoMahZZ23paBxtUirk1p_RUKX19qLHafrIQkL9u3Q6qDU4yeZLLQ7UYbrFhrxcLhPExRW2t8onm3dPVMCUVdonTPOjY9lVHHAjAjxBtI46NW4CO8UUOIPUS4U1IB9vxgHM215uIAc3rIGOSQRof6nchdeUVLCH-3bMvMVMRS_Hfl-YlKGq7Mi3fkdmRI78wubKOqTK9LlDswSeyxeLX4zt1AUAhHlHnxEjaPxJaJ02fr89AZBoAbxTRIp7NQxYhuYGikdLi2m10ntcE) **[https://mikewaltz.com/rules-for-thee-petition](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=398f4cbf65534e10996fad361ac1d571&_e=j31ZsiLiuJrJqQByrH_Bj5ykp6G9Hkap60kh9gEvPum3eS-QWj_PW4RhTb689g6S7gaJQCzKAZGIAV4cKQ3CD6LWU1sTmUusr4sGKhw0uK8PzKbpoBoMahZZ23paBxtUirk1p_RUKX19qLHafrIQkL9u3Q6qDU4yeZLLQ7UYbrFhrxcLhPExRW2t8onm3dPVMCUVdonTPOjY9lVHHAjAj_yqJX5zosV5i5T_suEBjR3HyAc_bTXKX73vO6piMUwDA_otA0QNsZrtBXNia8vdifEkjvMcucZbNga3PafPxgVhk93OAtXtAEC8T8The3ExUOt45aT6v84KrAp7Ba-5VzbcM7QKL7ql_hzRlbJTX8AYH7ZrgxwgT2-D_PU-8ZGN)**

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Choosing a lieutenant governor is the first major decision a candidate for governor makes. **BREAKING:** Daniel Cameron picks Bevin ally Robby Mills as running mate.

**[A Cameron-Mills administration would be devastating for Kentucky. Rush a donation to help Andy defeat them and continue making progress for Kentucky →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66734231/417400506/950424521?refcode=em23_230719_lganno_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230719_lganno_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=8028640d-7326-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDI4NjQwZC03MzI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mdyhOh4j92YTXy5I6iXoBgO1fXIYd-aC7YdyAsA666s=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66734232/417400507/950424521?refcode=em23_230719_lganno_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230719_lganno_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=8028640d-7326-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDI4NjQwZC03MzI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mdyhOh4j92YTXy5I6iXoBgO1fXIYd-aC7YdyAsA666s=)
* * *
Peter,

Choosing a lieutenant governor is the first major decision a candidate for governor makes. Who they choose demonstrates their judgment and values — which is why we can't say we're surprised by Daniel Cameron's pick.

Cameron announced today that state legislator Robby Mills will run alongside him. Mills was one of the architects of Matt Bevin’s “sewer bill” — a plan to slash pensions for our teachers, police, and firefighters. That couldn’t be further from Andy's values — and the values of Kentuckians.

[**If you're ready to continue moving Kentucky forward, chip in now to help us defeat Cameron and Mills in November # Eigel’s Donor Base Dominates Opponents, Over 41,000 Donations in Quarter Two
---
| The Eigel for Governor Exploratory Committee has demonstrated an unprecedented level of grassroots support, with Eigel For Missouri and BillPAC—Bill Eigel’s associated leadership political action committee— receiving 41,308 individual donations from more than 21,000 individual donors. The average donation to these committees was under $50.

“There is not another gubernatorial campaign that has built the network of committed donors that we have,” Eigel said. “For every special interest check or endorsement received by my opponents, a thousand people donated to my message and cause. Missourians are tired of sending uniparty, establishment Republicans to Jefferson City that hold Missouri back from the big conservative wins that all of us are desperate for.”

The total donations for the Eigel for Governor campaign amount to more than $800,000 for the second quarter, a record for the campaign so far. The combined total of these committees will report more than $1,000,000 cash on hand as the campaign heads into the late summer.

“The purpose of the exploratory phase of this campaign was to see if sufficient support existed for our message of a stronger Missouri,” stated Eigel. “The answer is a resounding yes – there is overwhelming support around Missouri for a proven conservative outsider. We are now preparing for a formal announcement and the end of the exploratory phase of the campaign. In 2024, there will be a reckoning for the Jefferson City swamp – their days of exchanging our rights for their gain are coming to an end.”
---

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: Help Ruben protect the right to choose
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
The only thing standing in the way of a national abortion ban is President Biden and the Senate.
#

There’s a common thread in the GOP right now, Peter.
Through all the lies, the conspiracies, the extremism... they’re consistent on this:
They want to take away the right to choose.
Trump stole them the Supreme Court. Red states are passing abortion bans. The GOP led House is chomping at the bit to do the same.
The only thing standing in the way of a national ban on abortion is President Biden and the Senate.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/2198?t=1&akid=824%2E734936%2E1J_Sah)
That’s why we need Ruben to win in Arizona.
Whether it’s Kari Lake, Mark Lamb, or any other Republican — they’ll rubber stamp that ban.
Ruben will stand in the way.
[**So right now, we’re not asking for a donation. We’re not asking for your help hitting a goal. We’re just asking you to add your name and support Ruben’s campaign.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em230701_Personal_Endorse/?source=em230719-2-5x&refcode2=824.734936.1J_Sah&akid=824%2E734936%2E1J_Sah)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em230701_Personal_Endorse/?source=em230719-2-5x&refcode2=824.734936.1J_Sah&akid=824%2E734936%2E1J_Sah)
Thank you for having Ruben’s back.
Ruben Gallego for Arizona

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=824%2E734936%2E1J_Sah). name: Jon Tester
subject: We’re running this campaign differently
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Hi there.

Here’s a photo of my grandparents, Arnfred and Christine, on their wedding
day in 1905. That was seven years before they picked out a flat piece of
grassland just outside Big Sandy to build their homestead.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18999?t=1001&akid=3413%2E346206%2ErNpIFD ][IMG]

That patch of loamy, alkaline clay-soil is the same one where I grew up;
and where Sharla and I raised our kids and still farm the land.

Things weren’t easy for Fred and Christine. They suffered devastating
windstorms, bitter cold, shooting fire, poisonous snakes—pretty much
everything but locusts. And in the late teens, the drought hit, wiping out
the farm entirely. My grandparents were forced to leave.

But they were determined to return to their homestead. They saved up
enough to start all over again on the same little piece of land. They had
a couple hundred acres to their name, a newly-built barn, a windmill,
their healthy son and daughters (including newborn Helen, my mom), strong
muscles, and the powerful work ethic that built rural America.

I first ran for office to make sure our government was serving hardworking
Americans like my grandparents a hundred years ago. Folks like our
teachers, farmers, and construction workers deserve a government that
works for them.

But too many Washington politicians are deep in the pockets of right-wing
special interests. They promise one thing when the camera is rolling, then
make secret backroom deals with their wealthy megadonors.

That’s not how I operate, and it’s why we’re running this campaign
differently. I’m counting on grassroots folks like you chipping in what
you can, when you can, to build a team strong enough to take on the
outside groups and Republican attacks.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18999?t=1002&akid=3413%2E346206%2ErNpIFD ]Can I count on you to split a contribution today between my campaign
and Charles Booker? Your donation (no matter the size) *sows the seeds* of
our movement, ensuring we grow and build the resources we need to win.

CHIP IN →

Thanks for your support. Together, we can keep me in Washington fighting
for the little guy.

Jon

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18999?t=1003&akid=3413%2E346206%2ErNpIFD ][IMG]

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230719-3413-footer&t=1004&refcode2=3413_346206_rNpIFD&akid=3413%2E346206%2ErNpIFD

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3413%2E346206%2ErNpIFD

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

| | **URGENT: Help protect the two newborn baby orcas from cruise ship pollution!** **[Take action now!>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1885031?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** After the recent tragic deaths of Marina, Cappuccino, and Ripple, restoring the Southern Resident killer whale population has not been easy for this endangered species, which is at its lowest point since the 1970’s. _**In fact, 69% of orca pregnancies end in miscarriage.**_ That’s why it’s such miraculous news that not **_ONE but _TWO_ baby orcas_** have just been confirmed, born into the very same pod as the beloved deceased matriarch, Marina! While the new calves are a sign of hope for this fragile species, these babies won’t be named until after a year — due to the _**devastating mortality rate of newborns**_ being as high as _**50%.**_ If we’re going to help these newborn orcas survive, we MUST take immediate action to minimize threats — like _**STOPPING**_ cruise ship pollution, which has already been driving orcas closer to _**EXTINCTION**_ for years. [**These vulnerable newborn orcas are counting on us to fight back against the cruise industry’s corporate destruction, Friend. Will you step up and add your name in defense of these precious calves right now?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1885032?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1885033?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Orca pods are tight-knit groups, just like families, who depend on each other for survival. When even just ONE family member dies, the whole pod is _**at greater risk.**_ These sensitive creatures experience **stress and grief** that often leads to **miscarriage** or drives them further to **starvation.**
Meanwhile, the greedy cruise industry continues to increase the size of their massive industrial vessels that not only increase the risk of _**fatal whale strikes**_ but also dump massive amounts of _**toxic chemicals**_ and _**noise disturbances**_ into fragile orca habitats.
Friend, Big Cruise’s corporate greed is threatening to _**WIPE OUT**_ the _**last 75 Southern Resident orcas**_ that remain in the wild. But we can’t take on this powerful industry without environmentalists like you. We urgently need **3,917 more signatures by 11:59 P.M. tonight** to urge the Environmental Protection Agency to rein in cruise ship pollution and save _**endangered orcas from EXTINCTION.**_ [**Time is running out for these beloved whales, Friend, so please sign the petition now! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1885034?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1885033?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for your urgent action,
Friends of the Earth**
