Dear Friend,
Without a doubt, the best part of this campaign is hearing the stories of Utahns and why they support Becky Edwards for Congress.
[](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=53f3066232&e=6484bb6dd5)
Take Christina Dee, a medical laboratory scientist, a mom, and a proud Becky supporter:
_“I support Becky because she is able to work across the aisle and cares about the concerns of every constituent. As a healthcare professional, I support her commitment to reducing health care costs and providing greater access to mental and behavioral health services.”_
We are so grateful for supporters, like Christina, who share their stories. [Will you help us reach new supporters throughout CD2 by volunteering or donating today?](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=9b28791205&e=6484bb6dd5)

name: Mary Pat
subject: Calling it like it is
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS CHRISTIE FOR PRESIDENT, INC
body:
Chris always has. | | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe31785746a74a91a29688c558f8e5b5&_m=b4f60dc0cf3e443eb8bf4ab11b66f856&_e=sillp3CnQzFoKLsdaQ6ABMkRyIytKLo1DIgdYuLR66lrTo-u-mEXo8k0f-Ex2PAk0VquDGWCWSaBYrnWDtwtuKXEZpKCrE_TODUxdGQMC58Ads20cfxNpqgF3GGPp5JG_24C3eissghDqmgrRy2ZOjTRk8HO1cEYoaCej_ehc8EJEboYJnE76b3YRJkVhWNglSDBMVAnkkSJIyynADMXcerdAKmbo_6clpXHRz8Qc1GQu8IMoIAOSKeeV9k8ijORSA_VDtxq6p92TFvPZzUYsA%3D%3D)

| | My friend, My husband, Chris Christie, has always called it like it is. As long as I have known him (and I've known him a long time...) he's always been focused on the truth and doing what is right.

Whether as a U.S. Attorney, a Governor, or even as a husband and father, treating people fairly and making common sense decisions have been very important to him. Does he make mistakes? Of course he does! We all do. But what makes Chris different from almost all other leaders is that he isn't afraid to admit them and then work to make the situation better.
---
[**Can Chris Count On You?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe31785746a74a91a29688c558f8e5b5&_m=b4f60dc0cf3e443eb8bf4ab11b66f856&_e=sillp3CnQzFoKLsdaQ6ABMkRyIytKLo1DIgdYuLR66lrTo-u-mEXo8k0f-Ex2PAk0VquDGWCWSaBYrnWDtwtuKXEZpKCrE_TODUxdGQMC58Ads20cfxNpqgF3GGPp5JGrKHu_nqrx8-IGaHWQOYG2USPB4-mHYlYgFi4XYIYKIJBRCVl34-YDSYdDlklZappQrgu-ItI3RNFK7_JF6-Qzn1ZoOnirQ1Am5DltcCoqZLnBGsAjnyikPLIpzVVPMov1hDf5PGB5OR3qdQX7hIblg%3D%3D)
---
**Like Chris says, be wary of the leader who has never made a mistake... **
Modern American politics is a divisive mess. From Donald Trump's never ending stream of lies to politicians changing their message based on who they are talking to, we need more people like my husband who will speak the TRUTH - no matter who he is talking to.
---
[**SUPPORT CHRIS CHRISTIE**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe31785746a74a91a29688c558f8e5b5&_m=b4f60dc0cf3e443eb8bf4ab11b66f856&_e=sillp3CnQzFoKLsdaQ6ABMkRyIytKLo1DIgdYuLR66lrTo-u-mEXo8k0f-Ex2PAk0VquDGWCWSaBYrnWDtwtuKXEZpKCrE_TODUxdGQMC58Ads20cfxNpqgF3GGPp5JGm7VK0RHE1ppUxwimQNQJamQK-Y8aUThOFj5L9Kgi2a4ZllHtf5bgsDWKDA9InitouAnmHusIb4dq1eEa4lFOU_FddDXMrSFsN8u9twkr3BMOUT8ZA4jxDqVFmKco_A3_mU3ZGPJtO6NYb3feDNqPjw%3D%3D)
---
**Let's change directions. Do something different.** Let's stop giving the time of day to politicians who only want to divide us so they can maintain power and control.
We have an opportunity to change the debate, end the divisiveness, and start moving in the RIGHT direction again, and I know Chris is the leader to make it happen. [**__Can he count on you to join him?__**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe31785746a74a91a29688c558f8e5b5&_m=b4f60dc0cf3e443eb8bf4ab11b66f856&_e=sillp3CnQzFoKLsdaQ6ABMkRyIytKLo1DIgdYuLR66lrTo-u-mEXo8k0f-Ex2PAk0VquDGWCWSaBYrnWDtwtuKXEZpKCrE_TODUxdGQMC58Ads20cfxNpqgF3GGPp5JGH7RLmXWy7IooekAeVTGbuSXqAOMp9M6tx2MJ5JbQW5BSuEDu1sJDGpE4q8Tvk1GzMiGQhxWUoutBkAHlRhQUER3oPFW-_vU2XptrRTxoZusEtnMc7VVlSYw0h93NgGwx7cqD0LHsZN8leArmLRo_fQ%3D%3D) Thank you, **Mary Pat Christie**

| | Is this a mistake, Peter? name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: I’d be really grateful if you took the time to read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I’m hoping you’ll read this all the way through.
| |
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=693a911dddcb4e1db8b0d8c54114b1ac&_t=IFXgGLKwOq5W6heV3ct4ZtY5TAl3w4MKiD_jTt4354dyxwLsFlWxW7gZ9BTKfYqCZHfTDT0T3mQNb4uLequSp14e7o7ROEfc8KQ2rQDwlJ4%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=693a911dddcb4e1db8b0d8c54114b1ac&_t=IFXgGLKwOq5W6heV3ct4ZtY5TAl3w4MKiD_jTt4354dyxwLsFlWxW7gZ9BTKfYqCZHfTDT0T3mQNb4uLequSp14e7o7ROEfc8KQ2rQDwlJ4%3D)

| This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. I wanted to take a few minutes today to share something personal with you, but it's going to take a bit of explaining. **If you get to the end and still don 't understand my commitment to America, then I'm just appreciative that you took the time to read this in its entirety.**

I wanted to take some time to discuss my background so you understand where I'm coming from when I'm fighting for the American people.
| | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=693a911dddcb4e1db8b0d8c54114b1ac&_e=qhV-1X6BVCbx1FdDl2gTWmxmQ5iwPtohLqOCiTOikynoJKzBORSwtY-jC7OgkiZZOSKONvfh18myv5YFbLoZxXK04IEbqRuqFqAC18tCO7NeUPry4cnbemdGSBD8QJaKLkwjjnWBib6iD2sSE_3lA_x6DEMlq-wuSXZkfjI9RHfdK2amtcksxK-vXAP3X5pWpKnkmSlQaH8olgxyFW1Ad99m5GH_TRM7CL3O5VzKJ4_86tPqAH8MME3DDhkkSIW17XlyIKO6Rd6VdLTGOVUbd0rE82hhoiNHtePweraptOn02kKGr8yGTJcl-oMcwoD5TQQ_Bx1yhhHtvrjC-JGkRzKMDh1BbLwTZo89fKuZWLiTcb9IrEkOV23fTMnZm17b "Kevin as a baby with his dad")
---
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=693a911dddcb4e1db8b0d8c54114b1ac&_e=qhV-1X6BVCbx1FdDl2gTWmxmQ5iwPtohLqOCiTOikynoJKzBORSwtY-jC7OgkiZZOSKONvfh18myv5YFbLoZxXK04IEbqRuqFqAC18tCO7NeUPry4cnbemdGSBD8QJaKLkwjjnWBib6iD2sSE_3lA_x6DEMlq-wuSXZkfjI9RHfdK2amtcksxK-vXAP3X5pWpKnkmSlQaH8olgxyFW1Ad5-Ne09Zw7FZEKQ4-yKlqxHFHIQJLg7N1nUnnkKfgUgEM5w3mfGRl49sNnf2J3Prt1EM_lOwjTwUGeZmvL-WlS2RnKF_Nrk-kd-O_m5Ev0EjRoPWvW24PwMQtmnvHLJg7jckx4pei-EELUBhcX9OOfM4KRmXUXa6g4eW_KEy3PLJ "Kevin with his siblings in 1968")
---
_My dad and I, circa 1966._| _My siblings, Shelly and Mark, and I, circa 1968._

I come from a working-class background. My grandparents were immigrants. My mom, Roberta, was a homemaker. My dad, Owen, was an assistant city fire chief. **They instilled a strong work ethic in me that I carry with me every day.**
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=693a911dddcb4e1db8b0d8c54114b1ac&_e=qhV-1X6BVCbx1FdDl2gTWmxmQ5iwPtohLqOCiTOikynoJKzBORSwtY-jC7OgkiZZOSKONvfh18myv5YFbLoZxXK04IEbqRuqFqAC18tCO7NeUPry4cnbemdGSBD8QJaKLkwjjnWBib6iD2sSE_3lA_x6DEMlq-wuSXZkfjI9RHfdK2amtcksxK-vXAP3X5pWpKnkmSlQaH8olgxyFW1Ad7X3I7qgux6cI4jxHuwAeC6166tijgjnZ24Po-MoDZVminNeCxs5_iIsE6-WnqKpDU-eXujr1VAEI_apwNcQBmsHg8QlZXhRtJyXoGJp5u9WTNB1dZb1_RBLHF3XbsdnU_PdXKno2Zzt8xQJGoi22EHo_ALhVIPrJckJFt31xyRS "Kevin working the counter at Kevin O's Deli & McCarthy's Yogurt.")
---
_Working the counter at Kevin O's Deli & McCarthy's Yogurt. (Sorry for the image quality, but at least you'll know it's authentic!)_

When I was 19, I ran my first business, Kevin O's Deli, selling sandwiches out of the back of my uncle's yogurt shop. Eventually, I sold the deli to pay my way through college. It taught me a lot about personal responsibility, and **I quickly learned how overregulation by the government affects small businesses. **
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=693a911dddcb4e1db8b0d8c54114b1ac&_e=qhV-1X6BVCbx1FdDl2gTWmxmQ5iwPtohLqOCiTOikynoJKzBORSwtY-jC7OgkiZZOSKONvfh18myv5YFbLoZxXK04IEbqRuqFqAC18tCO7NeUPry4cnbemdGSBD8QJaKLkwjjnWBib6iD2sSE_3lA_x6DEMlq-wuSXZkfjI9RHfdK2amtcksxK-vXAP3X5pWpKnkmSlQaH8olgxyFW1Ad42WdayxoDDJhzuPCIe2PEso9sD98K0bBiNl6Z41BCkfeny3oqIuNuk86sDWUV1Z18tee4b1A5L3xeRD1FaO0jIRdeURknOAz8RspfTN-wnh0kkhqa_nbv3vw0Zp6m1IHUimy5RkD_E3jRYlwzpqOiRIyZkC6-3KpHPvDIdHpKGp "Kevin speaking with a farmer on the campaign trail in 2010")
---
_Speaking with a farmer on the campaign trail in 2010._

After Kevin O's Deli and my experience with government overreach, I decided it was time to make a change. I knew public service would be a positive way for me to channel my frustration as a former small business owner, while also helping others in similar situations. Little did I know that working in the California State Assembly would pave the way to holding one of the most prestigious roles in our country: _**Speaker of the House of Representatives.**_
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=693a911dddcb4e1db8b0d8c54114b1ac&_e=qhV-1X6BVCbx1FdDl2gTWmxmQ5iwPtohLqOCiTOikynoJKzBORSwtY-jC7OgkiZZOSKONvfh18myv5YFbLoZxXK04IEbqRuqFqAC18tCO7NeUPry4cnbemdGSBD8QJaKLkwjjnWBib6iD2sSE_3lA_x6DEMlq-wuSXZkfjI9RHfdK2amtcksxK-vXAP3X5pWpKnkmSlQaH8olgxyFW1Ad7YcXhngw3p-jSxSBmQI7H6x4wKPPxMPJGNn2U7cwirVYclirT82Q9wAB0PkP0zHmc50osX_LbZJkMbT8ZDXJ_4pssd82-TSlDW4_fkSxk6Q-2DvO86_GFgjCkC2DjqON0mYOF7yTkcFULhU2Rr5EDph7Gk43N6CZ3CkdXKmgNH_ "Celebrating Republicans’ success in taking back the House in 2022.")
---
_Celebrating Republicans ' success in taking back the House in 2022_

This brings me to my main point: **my Commitment to America isn 't some political ploy - _it 's deeply personal._**

**As Speaker of the House, I promise to deliver on our commitment to America and the American people.

[If you support my efforts as Speaker, please chip in whatever you can afford - $5, $10, even $25 if you can - to help me continue this fight.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=693a911dddcb4e1db8b0d8c54114b1ac&_e=qhV-1X6BVCbx1FdDl2gTWmxmQ5iwPtohLqOCiTOikynoJKzBORSwtY-jC7OgkiZZOSKONvfh18myv5YFbLoZxXK04IEbqRuqFqAC18tCO7NeUPry4cnbemdGSBD8QJaKLkwjjnWBib6iD2sSE_3lA_x6DEMlq-wuSXZkfjI9RHfdK2amtcksxK-vXAP3X5pWpKnkmSlQaH8olgxyFW1AdylPWUnAS5dbdKs23F70r7krukTDM2ZZM-6FPayJ7FGKFe-oqUh12bOaGyeXCmJ29zy7xMOhvV83wtEdfQUq0jBDxQwIyYTDEZvN8zMSC470rEUt_Pcwmp2gXVNhQkYCCdchYjfKElOxdEJUMYucT8Q0NxRSaJzpPILz9KYSAb9n "If you support my efforts as Speaker, please chip in whatever you can afford – $5, $10, even $25 if you can – to help me continue this fight.")**

| | [STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=693a911dddcb4e1db8b0d8c54114b1ac&_e=qhV-1X6BVCbx1FdDl2gTWmxmQ5iwPtohLqOCiTOikynoJKzBORSwtY-jC7OgkiZZOSKONvfh18myv5YFbLoZxXK04IEbqRuqFqAC18tCO7NeUPry4cnbemdGSBD8QJaKLkwjjnWBib6iD2sSE_3lA_x6DEMlq-wuSXZkfjI9RHfdK2amtcksxK-vXAP3X5pWpKnkmSlQaH8olgxyFW1Ad-1t0UJR1GvmBScAO8X9fQI7S2DWunoPUI6qEQHED8VaesqFB5IVNiBGYGUTQfukmQim3omvwpIlUY3L_5VasJMHNMqSBifhIFHeDoyFrVqGXmdMeK91DT6NNRhYHhK9zdPYC1YDy0nj8UMAM4L06ZoTIX-Luq-TIbbcGfucvDQc "STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY")
---

If you've read this through to the end, thank you so much for your time. I hope you understand why our commitment to America is so important. I'm so grateful to have your support.

Thank you,

---
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=693a911dddcb4e1db8b0d8c54114b1ac&_e=qhV-1X6BVCbx1FdDl2gTWmxmQ5iwPtohLqOCiTOikynoJKzBORSwtY-jC7OgkiZZOSKONvfh18myv5YFbLoZxXK04IEbqRuqFqAC18tCO7NeUPry4cnbemdGSBD8QJaKLkwjjnWBib6iD2sSE_3lA_x6DEMlq-wuSXZkfjI9RHfdK2amtcksxK-vXAP3X5pWpKnkmSlQaH8olgxyFW1Ad6rENnBHAlKNfvkzU5BErNsmMHXqJ0J6qny6kkWUIBPqvTGylFy_lVe4s7VHmgmt9a0maW-Ixb7FCgBKvzy5vLxsoEpPI4bdlDe92Vh9RlGPF4SQd1iL9MDF5xfpobJ617t36xECI2kzMJIknlMRUaz1XHueOj4QtfkOhGy6FyvV "KOM Signature")

clean_body: I’m hoping you’ll read this all the way through. | | | | | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. I wanted to take a few minutes today to share something personal with you, but it's going to take a bit of explaining. If you get to the end and still don 't understand my commitment to America, then I'm just appreciative that you took the time to read this in its entirety. I wanted to take some time to discuss my background so you understand where I'm coming from when I'm fighting for the American people. | | "Kevin as a baby with his dad" | "Kevin with his siblings in 1968" My dad and I, circa 1966.| My siblings, Shelly and Mark, and I, circa 1968. I come from a working-class background. My grandparents were immigrants. My mom, Roberta, was a homemaker. My dad, Owen, was an assistant city fire chief. They instilled a strong work ethic in me that I carry with me every day. | "Kevin working the counter at Kevin O's Deli & McCarthy's Yogurt." Working the counter at Kevin O's Deli & McCarthy's Yogurt. (Sorry for the image quality, but at least you'll know it's authentic!) When I was 19, I ran my first business, Kevin O's Deli, selling sandwiches out of the back of my uncle's yogurt shop. Eventually, I sold the deli to pay my way through college. It taught me a lot about personal responsibility, and I quickly learned how overregulation by the government affects small businesses. | "Kevin speaking with a farmer on the campaign trail in 2010" Speaking with a farmer on the campaign trail in 2010. After Kevin O's Deli and my experience with government overreach, I decided it was time to make a change. I knew public service would be a positive way for me to channel my frustration as a former small business owner, while also helping others in similar situations. Little did I know that working in the California State Assembly would pave the way to holding one of the most prestigious roles in our country: Speaker of the House of Representatives. | "Celebrating Republicans’ success in taking back the House in 2022." Celebrating Republicans ' success in taking back the House in 2022 This brings me to my main point: my Commitment to America isn 't some political ploy - it 's deeply personal. As Speaker of the House, I promise to deliver on our commitment to America and the American people. "If you support my efforts as Speaker, please chip in whatever you can afford – $5, $10, even $25 if you can – to help me continue this fight." | | "STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY" If you've read this through to the end, thank you so much for your time. I hope you understand why our commitment to America is so important. I'm so grateful to have your support. Thank you, | "KOM Signature" Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy | | "DONATE NOW" | | Paid for by McCarthy for Congress PO Box 12667 Bakersfield, CA 93389 %%=v(@unsubText)=%%

name: CPT Sam Brown
subject: Time is of the essence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
Every single minute could be the difference between success and failure

| | |
---
Friend, If there's one thing I've learned on the battlefield, it's the **value of time.**
---
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cbf9ed5806c240f889d48868120f6e7e&_e=laLBD3rWXg1LDjkUqCRfKCYDIf14RTCM490f2Vol56IXNaYgV3cknNHNvkG1HhaEMnu7g8zEmVwD1MvaWU-8Sgtn5tLFAk9C16-zYdJfVaeQGJK7Bt2rJXmxWnj68vfNIYDX1LTL2uhGfsEoumOyiI9wcmTy9U2TJHMMENtuPTyGV7_0k3hwduOzNmiIptiKgrUuev9gU8CTVwLD4L-EM9oSguG2gvUdtgz6NguV6TAt_gfqp-MFjngpvBwXEKMAYyr6d1dzGk4-m0DsxNH-dDJEQeJZLtqZQ8y17lmJRMS__6N6dc658F93oOBGRAWyHAGF68jqUK_RyrEqiVKGkd_a0iIq-feyuuyEyQowtXIJaJtvdrzq4GHzfsOa0_2-BjY3_zqO-1aek_L9H8B5JD6DjQFx994DHJKoDqodONM0CL6qJJHCZ07Ay6BCycdJH1a1t7cwYdeIALU09rzjmg%3D%3D)
---
Timing is everything. In combat, it can be the difference between victory and defeat - between life and death. **Timing is everything in elections too.** Let me explain: Early fundraising is **CRUCIAL** to a strong campaign. Everything we do, from winning votes at the doors to putting out ads on TV costs money. Campaigns aren't cheap, Friend, especially this highly competitive campaign for Nevada's Senate seat. My opponent has already started out with a multimillion-dollar war chest and she's enlisted the help of her left-wing D.C. friends like Hillary Clinton VP pick Tim Kaine. If I want to compete against her, I have no time to waste. That's why I'm asking you, Friend. **[Can you please chip in anything you can to help me fight back against the D.C. establishment?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cbf9ed5806c240f889d48868120f6e7e&_e=laLBD3rWXg1LDjkUqCRfKCYDIf14RTCM490f2Vol56IXNaYgV3cknNHNvkG1HhaEMnu7g8zEmVwD1MvaWU-8Sgtn5tLFAk9C16-zYdJfVaeQGJK7Bt2rJXmxWnj68vfNIYDX1LTL2uhGfsEoumOyiI9wcmTy9U2TJHMMENtuPTyGV7_0k3hwduOzNmiIptiKgrUuev9gU8CTVwLD4L-EM9oSguG2gvUdtgz6NguV6TAt_gfqp-MFjngpvBwXEKMAYyr6d1dzGk4-m0DsxNH-dDJEQeJZLtqZQ8y17lmJRMS__6N6dc658F93oOBGRAWyRm2tE6lrAzTH8fvLU86sHDkBZVwJp-Hf83oAuqK9iKZv2wVdpbCL_u43Qm8pDf44Gammh5ZxsoyKoyYLAKDWCtHhCB1LTvYvKyv7skiF-L5Brx2RirQxPwaYS_qY-Ppj4i8ZYwuM8QYFElCbKXslsA%3D%3D)** I knew from the get-go that this would be tough, but nothing worthwhile ever comes easy. Can I count on you to have my back? Duty First, CPT Sam Brown U.S. Army (Ret.)
---

name: Captain Sam Brown
subject: I thought I was dead. But God had other plans.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
I survived this for a reason, Friend

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f5d117816cc242c58e89f56d1967e373&_e=o-Y6qXBQjJimWIasPg1YTIavzf3BKkJ2_E0pP6qWbtX7F_5T6d3bR9EPYLcw4Ndzl3yFvVq35NgKrF2q6RvHok-GzkuAYZbgwUZkwQUMAW_OIWbFER5OST5Kx6ihXjF3u43mYQxfL2V1EC_P-A8n6Dv9yOpJ2gpYoviqjCzq13Sm-mAZeGO7rPPFe3ayVUo8WDWk-b6edflPA1n6Wyh5hU6aj-Saok7VuCaQE86kjgc21dWVxvu0ALxYmKE5YzfMoX26PUxTS-EmvZE-UUUNp6mOrObvnwaTuIfhzm3IuoKBrKBrDMHG9JbXHPiim_BP4onUrRV388DjtShQPAmDUwc90gqUv0SMwtq_OI9WtLfcrSDEvb2sm7jrxG4lgFclxIBnHQCl4ub8dkkmsv2iJwZfSRGRewl_biogaK96nlW6CproyIfrhnMWg80OETsp)
---
Even 15 years after the bomb went off - it's hard to believe that I survived. While serving in Afghanistan, a roadside bomb exploded under the gas tank of my vehicle. The explosion drenched me in diesel and covered my body in flames. **_I thought I was done for. But God had other plans._** A fellow soldier, who had also been injured by our attackers, rushed to extinguish the fire on my body. But, I don't remember that day as the day I nearly died. **I remember it as the day I was given a new life.** A life that would be totally dedicated to the service of my country, and my family for the glory of God. **_The life I live is not my own, and I intend to give my whole life up in service. _** **[That 's why I'm running for the U.S. Senate.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f5d117816cc242c58e89f56d1967e373&_e=o-Y6qXBQjJimWIasPg1YTIavzf3BKkJ2_E0pP6qWbtX7F_5T6d3bR9EPYLcw4Ndzl3yFvVq35NgKrF2q6RvHok-GzkuAYZbgwUZkwQUMAW_OIWbFER5OST5Kx6ihXjF3u43mYQxfL2V1EC_P-A8n6Dv9yOpJ2gpYoviqjCzq13Sm-mAZeGO7rPPFe3ayVUo8WDWk-b6edflPA1n6Wyh5hU6aj-Saok7VuCaQE86kjgc21dWVxvu0ALxYmKE5YzfMoX26PUxTS-EmvZE-UUUNp6mOrObvnwaTuIfhzm3IuoLPJ7Dyk7SbLLelC5MOUeOtLq7oMwx-ZrQRw_iUmf3m5BSeRRPVz0-u3OgzsXWqYCk9Ac8YKzJZhSD7d-wq8d7sF5vjPaqR2QnJZS9S1Kj5nrjQys3ou71rf-DBjJWVdcgV2mzTaTpZLZiWKYvJbq_F)** I always knew that God's calling for my life would lead me to service for my country. What I didn't know is that this path would lead me to run for public office. But the mission I'm setting off on today is not one I can complete on my own. [**That 's why I am asking for your support today.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f5d117816cc242c58e89f56d1967e373&_e=o-Y6qXBQjJimWIasPg1YTIavzf3BKkJ2_E0pP6qWbtX7F_5T6d3bR9EPYLcw4Ndzl3yFvVq35NgKrF2q6RvHok-GzkuAYZbgwUZkwQUMAW_OIWbFER5OST5Kx6ihXjF3u43mYQxfL2V1EC_P-A8n6Dv9yOpJ2gpYoviqjCzq13Sm-mAZeGO7rPPFe3ayVUo8WDWk-b6edflPA1n6Wyh5hU6aj-Saok7VuCaQE86kjgc21dWVxvu0ALxYmKE5YzfMoX26PUxTS-EmvZE-UUUNp6mOrObvnwaTuIfhzm3IuoIjSdTWr7IIxLmeGzZBYLFtT4dD58iVMI6qP0YscStdhkJtJSin5bSHgKIJFofYGnDUehGPGhjhExF_gkPQpNfo7e_Yty2mZXQXBdCGW7aK6F4hpLUw1jKe9MwQ3rAVf1RCjj0qeIiqTDXEMNBcDasC) Friend, the fight to defend America is fundamentally not about me. It's about protecting the greatest country in the history of mankind and ensuring the longevity of the American experiment for you, your children, and your children's children. **But the American experiment has never been in greater peril than it is right now.** Just look at where our country is right now. Since Joe Biden took office, we've faced unprecedented threats from adversaries like China, our economy has fallen to shambles, our southern border has deteriorated. We've allowed a full scale invasion to occur, and the radical left's agenda has torn our nation apart bit by bit. The mission to take back the Senate and restore our nation is going to require all of us, working together as a team, to complete. **[I 'm relying on patriots like you to join me. Help me make this mission possible NOW! >>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f5d117816cc242c58e89f56d1967e373&_e=o-Y6qXBQjJimWIasPg1YTIavzf3BKkJ2_E0pP6qWbtX7F_5T6d3bR9EPYLcw4Ndzl3yFvVq35NgKrF2q6RvHok-GzkuAYZbgwUZkwQUMAW_OIWbFER5OST5Kx6ihXjF3u43mYQxfL2V1EC_P-A8n6Dv9yOpJ2gpYoviqjCzq13Sm-mAZeGO7rPPFe3ayVUo8WDWk-b6edflPA1n6Wyh5hU6aj-Saok7VuCaQE86kjgc21dWVxvu0ALxYmKE5YzfMoX26PUxTS-EmvZE-UUUNp6mOrObvnwaTuIfhzm3IuoKA97cyiXPG7SYcqk_0Q30O7Oa9qNguAsRVXcbbnRhRvBq0QIJlFMQ2w0Ds5MeDC6E4v1yThnXLnThJbQlbjjN4ogYln_hG6QRGiM5Q7HYDp83ZM5uWy06MRoJRdVHi8NRj-8y-wpsfNDI0rqBnTXD0)** Duty First,

The coral reefs in Florida are facing a severe threat from the rising temperature, with the water temperature pushing 90 degrees Fahrenheit. The current sea temperatures are putting stress on the coral reefs that support crucial underwater ecosystems in Florida.

The signs of the consequences of climate change continue to grow severe. _**It’s time to take action and stop Big Oil’s assault on our planet.**_ The impacts we are facing now are a result of decades-long burning of dangerous fossil fuels. [_**Will you contribute $10 right away to join our fight to protect our planet? Big Oil is going to spend millions attacking our climate champions. clean_body: The signs of the consequences of climate change continue to grow severe. | | = The coral reefs in Florida are facing a severe threat from the rising temperature, with the water temperature pushing 90 degrees Fahrenheit. The current sea temperatures are putting stress on the coral reefs that support crucial underwater ecosystems in Florida. The signs of the consequences of climate change continue to grow severe. It’s time to take action and stop Big Oil’s assault on our planet. The impacts we are facing now are a result of decades-long burning of dangerous fossil fuels. = | = Scientists warned oceans have absorbed nearly 90 percent of additional heat driven by burning fossil fuels. If this continues at the same rate, coral reefs are at risk of bleaching, killing ocean ecosystems. = | | | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = Let’s fight to protect our planet together, Jane Fonda Climate PAC | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Friend,
Tonight, I will be going live with Sean Hannity in Iowa for a voter town hall - home of the FIRST CAUCUS of the Republican primary.
Most politicians usually hide from voters...
_... Lucky for you, I'm not a politician - so this might be my favorite part of the job._
Millions of Republican primary voters will be tuning in tonight as I take questions from voters and outline our plans to SAVE AMERICA from the incompetent crook currently occupying the White House.
**But there 's one other group that will be tuning in... _the special interest "Republican" mega-donors (RINOs, as we like to call them) who've pledged to spend over $370 MILLION against us will surely be watching to see just how strong our movement is._**
Tonight is our chance to show that we are TRULY UNBREAKABLE - and that a handful of treacherous RINOs are no match for the greatest political movement in history!
With MILLIONS of eyes on us, _this_ is the moment we PROVE that the RINOs' multimillion-dollar attacks completely BACKFIRED!
**Please make a contribution before we go LIVE so that I can report that our grassroots movement is STRONGER than EVER before.**
_(But, of course, if you can 't donate right now, don't feel pressured to. My goal is to make your life great again. I would never want you to incur a cost that you can't afford. Very soon, I'll be back in the White House, and America will come ROARING BACK!)_

subject: [WATCH] Why I am running for United State Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
As a leader on the field of battle, you need to think about the greatest impact you can make. During my military career, it was defending and protecting our great nation. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=96db76c058ba42be9597bfbe608d13e8&_t=5eesFsBJGXzREac9qCVlFo_mk24xaoxu1rzy3MFxosUdt9UqIsRwkqkDAaR55J6uuphwEvFuiIZNfbi9RsWjrDg3gvqW1xVO1EE17Tx7hFQ%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=96db76c058ba42be9597bfbe608d13e8&_t=5eesFsBJGXzREac9qCVlFo_mk24xaoxu1rzy3MFxosUdt9UqIsRwkqkDAaR55J6uuphwEvFuiIZNfbi9RsWjrDg3gvqW1xVO1EE17Tx7hFQ%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=96db76c058ba42be9597bfbe608d13e8&_e=LNJ2FWR-pExkS_qmPKSRtfAjthViY0ET0FgXov5Zv7VuWQyO-ydILNCSw_7gBpZZ_2FQvRc0kF5zkL84PwK6aIzm859SNLkQYN4U8QNZdyLJPLfTtF5iJBhsIfifCxW5fQAwBB4lEX1NMoABul-4qkiGCx4-ymwsD3A59CpJDk59dSs31x7F8oZwvbOljlmnSFU3KwrVOh3qni7Pm8YzPID1Z6vO8kaB-tcRY67hNx6_wL2oS-JkqP5qkk2vlVqvtj_4FW1N31-HtIx26tMTcoHLvPxBRNxbhmmnI-ox-_REecZYrR0dG6cj5EvgTSMhgOvFSJsvMh-vMzpIIgIBhb6IQcbUhIxWfalot8CX-FkoHSFkmJEF5TJlONWSBvaEHLwyobiBwXQmYa4F558Onw%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

I’m grateful for the opportunities that our nation has given me. With hard work, I was able to start my own business, employ other veterans just like me, and live the American dream with my family.

But I felt the pull to serve again - this time in the United States Senate. **That’s why I am running. **

[**WATCH NOW
**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=96db76c058ba42be9597bfbe608d13e8&_e=LNJ2FWR-pExkS_qmPKSRtfAjthViY0ET0FgXov5Zv7VuWQyO-ydILNCSw_7gBpZZ_2FQvRc0kF5zkL84PwK6aIzm859SNLkQYN4U8QNZdyLJPLfTtF5iJBhsIfifCxW5fQAwBB4lEX1NMoABul-4qkiGCx4-ymwsD3A59CpJDk59dSs31x7F8oZwvbOljlmnSFU3KwrVOh3qni7Pm8YzPID1Z6vO8kaB-tcRY67hNx6_wL2oS-JkqP5qkk2vlVqvIqNTpwqZ3iC42ass-L7S3VdQF1uZIX7GAuWMmz458Gz0qzZxW2Wcp5pWvF3mPK4u2L4zNn9O11EJTeoqk743mw2UHMNVLLk-JB3g-UBBGntiMiCeJ5Pnow1OSe8mDYAdjGlPpG2idiwbBNWVZtqiow%3D%3D)
As a leader on the field of battle, you need to think about the greatest impact you can make. During my military career, it was defending and protecting our great nation. **Now, I want to represent YOU in the United States Senate.**

[**JOIN THE MISSION
**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=96db76c058ba42be9597bfbe608d13e8&_e=LNJ2FWR-pExkS_qmPKSRtfAjthViY0ET0FgXov5Zv7VuWQyO-ydILNCSw_7gBpZZ_2FQvRc0kF5zkL84PwK6aIzm859SNLkQYN4U8QNZdyLJPLfTtF5iJBhsIfifCxW5fQAwBB4lEX1NMoABul-4qkiGCx4-ymwsD3A59CpJDk59dSs31x7F8oZwvbOljlmnSFU3KwrVOh3qni7Pm8YzPID1Z6vO8kaB-tcRY67hNx6_wL2oS-JkqP5qkk2vlVqvnX9Yyq-JgGDt2NHONVMsMFyLbIknx6395ModxwzKCesprg9w_Kw6vlQeAtms12D3XfgJl6_Ak2nb9rvB7vePehmygCWtYmgowc0X1GWB3T8yWw_1Z8fWib7ZCy1CPHqQNCOkGuE28F5p3ZgpIMwHtA%3D%3D)

American citizens are facing tough decisions right now. We’re dealing with a crisis at our border, inflation has a stranglehold on our families, and we must fix our education system.

**We have some serious challenges facing our nation. We need serious people to solve them.**

When I was asked to serve - it was a serious decision to do so - **but when your country calls and needs you, you MUST answer. **

Fellow Conservative,**[now I ask you to join this fight with me.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=96db76c058ba42be9597bfbe608d13e8&_e=LNJ2FWR-pExkS_qmPKSRtfAjthViY0ET0FgXov5Zv7VuWQyO-ydILNCSw_7gBpZZ_2FQvRc0kF5zkL84PwK6aIzm859SNLkQYN4U8QNZdyLJPLfTtF5iJBhsIfifCxW5fQAwBB4lEX1NMoABul-4qkiGCx4-ymwsD3A59CpJDk59dSs31x7F8oZwvbOljlmnSFU3KwrVOh3qni7Pm8YzPID1Z6vO8kaB-tcRY67hNx6_wL2oS-JkqP5qkk2vlVqvRUbgyHpLDbC5Pfh-nKK8HCePghBCZqOFahVXXYPKKPRcQ6DMMSDlYD1k95FXn0k0regpWEr-fycuAMN4tgVLl3w5wJd3T064TtTdKZW3deTTvsFAciRIckE_oUm_Aegtxt9frVU5GaPOVTMfcWHkSA%3D%3D) **

Hooyah,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL

clean_body: As a leader on the field of battle, you need to think about the greatest impact you can make. During my military career, it was defending and protecting our great nation. | | Fellow Conservative, I’m grateful for the opportunities that our nation has given me. With hard work, I was able to start my own business, employ other veterans just like me, and live the American dream with my family. But I felt the pull to serve again - this time in the United States Senate. That’s why I am running. As a leader on the field of battle, you need to think about the greatest impact you can make. During my military career, it was defending and protecting our great nation. Now, I want to represent YOU in the United States Senate. American citizens are facing tough decisions right now. We’re dealing with a crisis at our border, inflation has a stranglehold on our families, and we must fix our education system. We have some serious challenges facing our nation. We need serious people to solve them. When I was asked to serve - it was a serious decision to do so - but when your country calls and needs you, you MUST answer. Fellow Conservative, Hooyah, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. It's our time to Shyne, make a donation today. = ********= ******** Sepi Shyne For Congress 8149 Santa Monica Blvd #280 West Hollywood, CA 90046 United States

subject: We need to pass gun safety legislation NOW

body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=bwt1%2B9r1poiZrFbNWH%2FVBXroJ0e4DD0NJil9KdKw9kJ0bSoMEpnkUMmd8cUjsKbcmuoE5y3D1VD6orBvdQKS5%2FX2sgxDiQshu%2BiUnsQaSp8HYUbi1Ijg89eDa7l5Dp4R98ZaF3Kn%2B24c8dBccQV3Xes8iCpIsikcSyvI63qBPR9NNwao%2B6FztoZIOuciLB3j3aobFW8LPO5S3EsNdKUUQmMemBDo7SUSHNWUyETrSXQCEAIGc58B98Q3C%2FIQ1J55eMEmftCf7HvVuhl1etOpNlJvs48cRZA7Pn5juLFYiYwsXjJlW%2BeXyvYB0Rl%2FpUgY%2BmLHnEWuB12yMLAywvHWPA2tOzq0ADnfMoNHPRtyacuZlfKvkeaEaZrRQ52SyHD0nZs65L0Z5m2M41eggqjqbY0QOL9uFHyOn6PUN1Mr1Xx%2FvEUPsPkt6W%2FW2FMQ4y1F)

Peter,

We have a gun violence epidemic in this country, and it affects each and every community. If we want to see progress, we need to act — **and we need to act now.** This has been going on for far too long.

That’s why I’m so proud that Moms Demand Action Rhode Island has come out in support of my bill: **_The Keeping Gun Dealers Honest Act._**

This bill makes it harder for guns to be sold illegally, keeping them out of the hands of dangerous individuals. Peter, we must pass this legislation immediately if we want to see real progress toward making our country a safer place.

[I need you to stand with me. If you support passing common sense gun safety legislation as soon as possible, please sign on to our list of supporters.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66742913/417408681/-425200611?source=EM_NBI_SM_20230719_PT_gunviolence_0_1MO_SethMagaziner_NA_NA_gunviolence&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2ZmMDlkZC03YjI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2fgNsRfG09RKhNKnf0dqZWlcCnLeW0FNt_1-jwXt_u8=&emci=93c157d6-7b26-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=5cff09dd-7b26-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=15384964)

According to the Gun Violence Archive, there have been nearly 400 mass shootings in our country so far this year.1 This number represents countless lives lost and too many communities torn apart as a result of this senseless violence. **This is unacceptable.**

[We don’t have any more time to waste. If you are with us and support passing common sense gun safety legislation, please add your name.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66742916/417408684/-425200611?source=EM_NBI_SM_20230719_PT_gunviolence_0_1MO_SethMagaziner_NA_NA_gunviolence&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2ZmMDlkZC03YjI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2fgNsRfG09RKhNKnf0dqZWlcCnLeW0FNt_1-jwXt_u8=&emci=93c157d6-7b26-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=5cff09dd-7b26-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=15384964)

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cd1546cd4ce446378d036e7534538782&_e=1kckBuWxsMYde8xahznxd57MM80_5pEUkYZXHbCXXE5nnRmpKtvamUbMK7oyNo5zDYA2da8u52YXFKLOPtmt11RqAwxiL7W0C3s0Zqzagw-IqXFXjwntSmoC7x6g1S2F4cHnxrNBPXknzjz_deX5J4p-QvIVidPFewKJYsmrWjy2eeLuaEIOJfM6U3--JngZ1BGLd5S-H6bEotC3gX4DQvvOoSyD51d1eDZF3EvTNW8rJ1qRaRWdcJJ-UAazN3JqXX2CpeIjjj4FixkvTFGPKw%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cd1546cd4ce446378d036e7534538782&_e=1kckBuWxsMYde8xahznxd57MM80_5pEUkYZXHbCXXE5nnRmpKtvamUbMK7oyNo5zDYA2da8u52YXFKLOPtmt11RqAwxiL7W0C3s0Zqzagw-IqXFXjwntSmoC7x6g1S2FEuBdKe3c1WThC8NxPzYzDIeCkKFRB-aZz8pf-z0-NLAqVjdGGAplvASTSqGEEMapSjEEJbV4-6NzSRSRQAixnKCBQPiye0uy5yswNGpEwNn7XMXo03iCbYruDlIN8JYSg8ExVxNtYJFP7J1KgHHl3Q%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cd1546cd4ce446378d036e7534538782&_e=1kckBuWxsMYde8xahznxd57MM80_5pEUkYZXHbCXXE5nnRmpKtvamUbMK7oyNo5zDYA2da8u52YXFKLOPtmt11RqAwxiL7W0C3s0Zqzagw-IqXFXjwntSmoC7x6g1S2FrCajtHpMEpqESYhIYlJQP-1XaTDbzE-XXHEq24tjlNY_rYyTi_FDvxgqz1nRzml7oldt6TxWKN6Pv5Ti2L6UhLWXQ_RRovM1ksXa_AU4k4wX27jk7F-BrD0VEnmS_WlGBuhrL2_i6T6coHtOBzBTEA%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cd1546cd4ce446378d036e7534538782&_e=1kckBuWxsMYde8xahznxd57MM80_5pEUkYZXHbCXXE5nnRmpKtvamUbMK7oyNo5zDYA2da8u52YXFKLOPtmt11RqAwxiL7W0C3s0Zqzagw-IqXFXjwntSmoC7x6g1S2FfSXyHWfTyrvgyVLDqVqU7T_1jZoRZGXamTIgjujyJxJTjQ6wPWSkvAvvm_wrnfmYDNsBLzCiQTseNro40ybMOub3LpIQTo-JEPUhPAWM-yU8k8gsXtS0PTfLoSMjJLzNiga2nS2ZVSAL5OlLYdKzXA%3D%3D)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. clean_body: Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. For Freedom, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. Full Mag News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: A few moments of your time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I’m hoping you’ll read this all the way through.
| |
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=387de729e2d843c1aa25878e8a346f7d&_t=XiPIo9XrOHsKZhzLNzboVNhRxpldhUt3uZKqimGF9B4wByx6DXhORbIlj_ryy1ePUQElthyhs6bMG_LWl6tAzKZPXWs5323dU9YgaUAqJjo%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=387de729e2d843c1aa25878e8a346f7d&_t=XiPIo9XrOHsKZhzLNzboVNhRxpldhUt3uZKqimGF9B4wByx6DXhORbIlj_ryy1ePUQElthyhs6bMG_LWl6tAzKZPXWs5323dU9YgaUAqJjo%3D)

| This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. I wanted to take a few minutes today to share something personal with you, but it's going to take a bit of explaining. **If you get to the end and still don 't understand my commitment to America, then I'm just appreciative that you took the time to read this in its entirety.**

I wanted to take some time to discuss my background so you understand where I'm coming from when I'm fighting for the American people.
| | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=387de729e2d843c1aa25878e8a346f7d&_e=S0x5nDOZjjFa6Y9hOoG9Snekn2c1Xc-dCA2EihALJnApYPshm5Rwa3cRs70x11y3KJRiBEXHeD8orFxif-rrPe9-t34Ih70wMXDNn8JAOO7nonbeO7wPvw9HX5T1ULUGM4ABJBzZiBzDGy_w8VUpgzk3dKpuPLGGQpSTeCEVQlbJqbq33E3BkzrY8PEdBV7d2_8pP-UAqUUiHo1HRZjRly9wcKm65ok8vZBIbgycI9vrjmuuI1AJanuLoizQCmwvocM9VvUeSJMYy713K5RROUO8f4_5lM7ThSy0mXtT7dws2Q_5ebD-lS9Z3tKxge3WgvyOMbRsvBR4Wqd8t2JkTp5Kj8xTpIp_N_3Q_QhaQ_iLlrpPfe_amfilxv29kzMo "Kevin as a baby with his dad")
---
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=387de729e2d843c1aa25878e8a346f7d&_e=S0x5nDOZjjFa6Y9hOoG9Snekn2c1Xc-dCA2EihALJnApYPshm5Rwa3cRs70x11y3KJRiBEXHeD8orFxif-rrPe9-t34Ih70wMXDNn8JAOO7nonbeO7wPvw9HX5T1ULUGM4ABJBzZiBzDGy_w8VUpgzk3dKpuPLGGQpSTeCEVQlbJqbq33E3BkzrY8PEdBV7d2_8pP-UAqUUiHo1HRZjRl_wSaTsB0lQgANyzZpXmZwPczWs66o0Vs8jkr6vJ8hTaEiTRJePMtWOPGOuqD2qtUJruLSfr5mm32Et7htQzqPFRoaNwO2opLJiABkUhKS6mIZRx7bL7jXOq1xTt5nFsWwl8YjsDXyAyPBnH1rVY0mN1gVojYe7D1jewdfOA1o21 "Kevin with his siblings in 1968")
---
_My dad and I, circa 1966._| _My siblings, Shelly and Mark, and I, circa 1968._

I come from a working-class background. My grandparents were immigrants. My mom, Roberta, was a homemaker. My dad, Owen, was an assistant city fire chief. **They instilled a strong work ethic in me that I carry with me every day.**
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=387de729e2d843c1aa25878e8a346f7d&_e=S0x5nDOZjjFa6Y9hOoG9Snekn2c1Xc-dCA2EihALJnApYPshm5Rwa3cRs70x11y3KJRiBEXHeD8orFxif-rrPe9-t34Ih70wMXDNn8JAOO7nonbeO7wPvw9HX5T1ULUGM4ABJBzZiBzDGy_w8VUpgzk3dKpuPLGGQpSTeCEVQlbJqbq33E3BkzrY8PEdBV7d2_8pP-UAqUUiHo1HRZjRlzyL1NxrcEatOYhEmWn7F_b0UzzsAwQVY9TDgcyXLZdXdyVJjTNatWdN4WZhp_h3nBGI2x-rlXntg2D5j10h-K9FghKmg7XJOJN53tnU8nRcmO7TLzRQ7zVej8jDhurwtduxNgRECXHKBcsg7rFjvolHUbmSikKRCR2B3fY0gGcE "Kevin working the counter at Kevin O's Deli & McCarthy's Yogurt.")
---
_Working the counter at Kevin O's Deli & McCarthy's Yogurt. (Sorry for the image quality, but at least you'll know it's authentic!)_

When I was 19, I ran my first business, Kevin O's Deli, selling sandwiches out of the back of my uncle's yogurt shop. Eventually, I sold the deli to pay my way through college. It taught me a lot about personal responsibility, and **I quickly learned how overregulation by the government affects small businesses. **
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=387de729e2d843c1aa25878e8a346f7d&_e=S0x5nDOZjjFa6Y9hOoG9Snekn2c1Xc-dCA2EihALJnApYPshm5Rwa3cRs70x11y3KJRiBEXHeD8orFxif-rrPe9-t34Ih70wMXDNn8JAOO7nonbeO7wPvw9HX5T1ULUGM4ABJBzZiBzDGy_w8VUpgzk3dKpuPLGGQpSTeCEVQlbJqbq33E3BkzrY8PEdBV7d2_8pP-UAqUUiHo1HRZjRl8BFamBCFk1IaOSNS3oZ6j5mVc_20B6m34dWcbeDeDOyRxq0psL19rfxqMKQjNhdWnbvWcP2CEao9X2n2LGIN6zc9oyFasstxmIbb3wjM8uO1WIxQc1ZZ43FPC68wzl0LjWMASEkOpj4dn3sUvyHCtO9g32EN96IavI7zD5dfgYo "Kevin speaking with a farmer on the campaign trail in 2010")
---
_Speaking with a farmer on the campaign trail in 2010._

After Kevin O's Deli and my experience with government overreach, I decided it was time to make a change. I knew public service would be a positive way for me to channel my frustration as a former small business owner, while also helping others in similar situations. Little did I know that working in the California State Assembly would pave the way to holding one of the most prestigious roles in our country: _**Speaker of the House of Representatives.**_
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=387de729e2d843c1aa25878e8a346f7d&_e=S0x5nDOZjjFa6Y9hOoG9Snekn2c1Xc-dCA2EihALJnApYPshm5Rwa3cRs70x11y3KJRiBEXHeD8orFxif-rrPe9-t34Ih70wMXDNn8JAOO7nonbeO7wPvw9HX5T1ULUGM4ABJBzZiBzDGy_w8VUpgzk3dKpuPLGGQpSTeCEVQlbJqbq33E3BkzrY8PEdBV7d2_8pP-UAqUUiHo1HRZjRl6Z9SgSSpoVdVIK1G_hJYNSzeTEFZjtF_24lu3521O7gKX70nocH7DN5nxFnbbzmwlQbhm3avOwvkemWZDoWMf4dLuZyKLPcN0gjyf7fX_IourJUHJOP8347Jbk8IKlsYxhgnMNF58M2-HM-jwHDcAxas-BUBaEvlv7vtoXy5133 "Celebrating Republicans’ success in taking back the House in 2022.")

_Celebrating Republicans ' success in taking back the House in 2022_

This brings me to my main point: **my Commitment to America isn 't some political ploy - _it 's deeply personal._**

**As Speaker of the House, I promise to deliver on our commitment to America and the American people.

[If you support my efforts as Speaker, please chip in whatever you can afford - $5, $10, even $25 if you can - to help me continue this fight.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=387de729e2d843c1aa25878e8a346f7d&_e=S0x5nDOZjjFa6Y9hOoG9Snekn2c1Xc-dCA2EihALJnApYPshm5Rwa3cRs70x11y3KJRiBEXHeD8orFxif-rrPe9-t34Ih70wMXDNn8JAOO7nonbeO7wPvw9HX5T1ULUGM4ABJBzZiBzDGy_w8VUpgzk3dKpuPLGGQpSTeCEVQlbJqbq33E3BkzrY8PEdBV7d2_8pP-UAqUUiHo1HRZjRl3t9Hka08QbaqKGVwiONTZYO2E7coNfr0qZpq3fVeIFgNnNhAoX6z1JjZyKOgdentPRYK0gM4B0x-kN3q6-pjeVllmGL862t2beXkyIIdeZEOCT_ONjY3EyWEOynBV2BARR4QfPTjNlBsuzRs9akNUTIie-AVu1AvlqKkZY_0n7t "If you support my efforts as Speaker, please chip in whatever you can afford – $5, $10, even $25 if you can – to help me continue this fight.")**

clean_body: I’m hoping you’ll read this all the way through. | | | | | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. I wanted to take a few minutes today to share something personal with you, but it's going to take a bit of explaining. If you get to the end and still don 't understand my commitment to America, then I'm just appreciative that you took the time to read this in its entirety. I wanted to take some time to discuss my background so you understand where I'm coming from when I'm fighting for the American people. | | "Kevin as a baby with his dad" | "Kevin with his siblings in 1968" My dad and I, circa 1966.| My siblings, Shelly and Mark, and I, circa 1968. I come from a working-class background. My grandparents were immigrants. My mom, Roberta, was a homemaker. My dad, Owen, was an assistant city fire chief. They instilled a strong work ethic in me that I carry with me every day. | "Kevin working the counter at Kevin O's Deli & McCarthy's Yogurt." Working the counter at Kevin O's Deli & McCarthy's Yogurt. (Sorry for the image quality, but at least you'll know it's authentic!) When I was 19, I ran my first business, Kevin O's Deli, selling sandwiches out of the back of my uncle's yogurt shop. Eventually, I sold the deli to pay my way through college. It taught me a lot about personal responsibility, and I quickly learned how overregulation by the government affects small businesses. | "Kevin speaking with a farmer on the campaign trail in 2010" Speaking with a farmer on the campaign trail in 2010. After Kevin O's Deli and my experience with government overreach, I decided it was time to make a change. I knew public service would be a positive way for me to channel my frustration as a former small business owner, while also helping others in similar situations. Little did I know that working in the California State Assembly would pave the way to holding one of the most prestigious roles in our country: Speaker of the House of Representatives. | "Celebrating Republicans’ success in taking back the House in 2022." Celebrating Republicans ' success in taking back the House in 2022 This brings me to my main point: my Commitment to America isn 't some political ploy - it 's deeply personal. As Speaker of the House, I promise to deliver on our commitment to America and the American people. "If you support my efforts as Speaker, please chip in whatever you can afford – $5, $10, even $25 if you can – to help me continue this fight." | | "STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY" If you've read this through to the end, thank you so much for your time. I hope you understand why our commitment to America is so important. I'm so grateful to have your support. Thank you, | "KOM Signature" Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy | | "DONATE NOW" | | Paid for by McCarthy for Congress PO Box 12667 Bakersfield, CA 93389 %%=v(@unsubText)=%%

clean_body: I am reading you into a key mission if we want to win back the Senate majority. | I have a critical mission for you, Fellow Conservative. Combat veteran, Navy SEAL, and Bronze Star recipient Tim Sheehy just launched his campaign for U.S. Senate in Montana. Democrats are terrified of Tim. They're already attacking him, and he needs our help to respond ASAP. Fellow Conservative, this race is make or break for Republicans. If Tim wins, odds are we take back the majority. Simply put, I need Tim Sheehy with me in the Senate. He's a husband, father, fellow combat veteran, and entrepreneur. He shares Montana's values and will always put America first. And he's a tough conservative who won't let Montana down in the Senate. The Senate majority is at stake. In service, Tom Cotton P.S. body:
It’s no longer just said behind closed doors. They’re PUBLICLY admitting it now... | | | Friend,

---
A memo was LEAKED revealing that RINO special-interest donors are legitimately HOPING that I get put in JAIL for 400 YEARS so that they can install a puppet nominee who will make amends with the Deep State.

---
But now, it’s no longer only being whispered about in private. Now, they’re PUBLICLY ADMITTING it.
---
On the day our nation learned that Biden’s Department of Injustice is plotting to INDICT me yet again and possibly even _**_ARREST_**_ me – **one of our primary opponents tried to MAKE EXCUSES for the Biden DOJ’s abuses of power**.

---
Let me get this straight...

---
...The deeply unpopular sitting president is trying to jail his leading opponent like a communist dictator. Our freedom, our justice, and our rights are being ripped right out of our hands...

---
...But some disloyal Republicans are not rushing to my defense to unequivocally CONDEMN this abuse of power – **instead, they’re like VULTURES circling the skies, waiting and hoping to use our injustice and misfortune for their own personal gain, and even going so far as to**** _DEFEND_****the Deep State.**

---
These are not patriots. These are cowards, who would willingly sell out their country to the Deep State in exchange for even just a taste of power.

---
If they’d stab someone in the back who helped get them elected – all while our nation is on the brink of tyranny – then how could you _ever_ trust them to defend _YOU_?

---
Right now, RINOs are concocting a $370 MILLION scheme to try and defeat me so that they can install their own nominee who has now **PUBLICLY** decided to align with the Deep State.

---
**But fortunately for us, our movement is packed with over 74 MILLION** _**_courageous_**_**patriots who refuse to surrender our nation to tyranny.**

---
_Even a contribution of just $1 alongside your fellow patriots is enough to OUTRAISE these RINOs. _
---
[**So please, if you can, and only if you can, make a contribution of just $1 to our Primary Victory Fund to help me FIGHT BACK against the RINOs’ nefarious PLOT to stop us in the primary – for 1,500% impact.**](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=02fe988d88164b52b71bf654867c4c9b&_e=slXJgFubErC5qfV17LqDyC19nOkcLm8TlWtwY2ol8334gpjikv4IMPM1RcBeUfgJu6KCym7wpT-BzFcQ3Qf4UFShCVAiRHXfqOhK39xoNqqeqe6fkrhgNtTqPRG2xyfrAS0cbCVEt5-81ReoL7UU0ycA0QjvRY0Xdiol8vWRJoUjmzkcfZjp06pGGj94CBU1MgxiX4RRWMTSIUw8sVAwTJdC3eFlToH7REu6k6cyCgr640UPZV_hONulCqDYJ-bxwUUbuhV6TNQYGiqDX9zozuYTA0TZW437EJC8hUZNyu549ny4lSo7VTvRdtMs0SJtAbsXe1XqMvUPfL10HyP00JMvHrGtnXSR7SbyNa1A7djYl__s1CpjLmKWXIyFLeWCoxrNNTzDEm3jQJyztFt5EsajRu2MOH4vmXVebVgdoyHXN4DaGZj4nect0kMVM9IuYw3b6kzWhgOdQfVfBA3nOtJpAsEJvIBqXd9bdLdF7NwxDAEnHPk29S0pVZXvadu3)

clean_body: | | | | Oregon’s Most Extreme Liberal | Peter, Our 2022 opponent, an extreme, defund the police, climate crazy, tax and spend liberal just announced her intentions to run for OR-05 AGAIN . She is back and still attempting to pass as a level-headed Democrat while clinging to the same old extreme liberal policies The last time she ran against us, she outspent us and still lost, but this time will be different with your help. We can’t count on getting lucky this time around, Peter. | We've got a tough road ahead of us and we need your help. Thank you, Team Lori | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Team Lori 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 == \- ==

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, have you been watching what’s happening in Alabama? BAD NEWS: Alabama’s GOP majority redrew their maps and designed them to SILENCE Black voters. GOOD NEWS: The Supreme Court ruled that the maps violated the Voting Rights Ac t and ordered them to be redrawn with a second majority-Black congressional district. BAD NEWS: Alabama’s GOP majority has decided to just IGNORE the Supreme Court ruling, and is REFUSING to create another Black majority district. GOOD NEWS: This is not our first rodeo when it comes to dealing with racist legislators who want to silence Black voices (and votes!) andPeter, you can help us fix it. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Thank you for staying in the fight with us. The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. Every single grassroots supporter helps power our mission to elect state Democrats. That's why we’re calling on you to heed this call to action: Here are just a few ways your gift could help expand Democratic power in our statehouses: 1. A gift of $7 could buy 10 new clipboards for organizers 2. A gift of $25 could pay for 1,000 people to see our digital ads 3. A gift of $50 could fund our candidates' phone banks 4. And a gift of$100 could make or break our chances of victory in special elections across the map Every dollar you contribute fuels our efforts to elect state Democrats who will champion fundamental rights like abortion access, LGBTQ+ rights, access to affordable health care, and more, paving the way for transformative change in our statehouses. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Remember: The success of our movement depends on every person doing their part. subject: It’s about service

Fellow Conservative,

I’m grateful for the opportunities that our nation has given me. With hard work, I was able to start my own business, employ other veterans just like me, and live the American dream with my family.

But I felt the pull to serve again - this time in the United States Senate. **That’s why I am running. **

[**WATCH NOW
**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=81110e3bff0f4b3a96a67ce39aaa12d2&_e=oRVVzBRKXbKxwRj-xeo73Dz_4i9RZxrZxFQ2SsL1hjvRRM6vXY-str_oSW9r9SAurqyPh5XybOthXKmXlOKsWYM2n5GNZrFr987HpYzL5kbQyoZ6_9JjuL0GPgD4E3Cn2LfyyTZypE9WemdaI2-jeZq01iU2NFxtTGQAk8SY8AuYeVLHJtsCH4oZFki5qnZIonZ9urBoE4ayxnCvMumgjOwXX1COK7m08zp8ZfdCcYFmCSXQqas9KxI5FJKXh9IIi-Il7rnPtAhJJ2e2Ctm0aXmRj56KF8t7vlpTomksWt8z0NTagAL_YFhxx9aCyoI8w13nI6oz7qXxVcAtC2CVLZDkQ0B0OSj5_LtRTvWakCHiKlnSeeKZbHzbOlOJYzUmt0VXKHLYXhrJQrYfdNjoMQ%3D%3D)
As a leader on the field of battle, you need to think about the greatest impact you can make. During my military career, it was defending and protecting our great nation. **Now, I want to represent YOU in the United States Senate.**

[**JOIN THE MISSION
**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=81110e3bff0f4b3a96a67ce39aaa12d2&_e=oRVVzBRKXbKxwRj-xeo73Dz_4i9RZxrZxFQ2SsL1hjvRRM6vXY-str_oSW9r9SAurqyPh5XybOthXKmXlOKsWYM2n5GNZrFr987HpYzL5kbQyoZ6_9JjuL0GPgD4E3Cn2LfyyTZypE9WemdaI2-jeZq01iU2NFxtTGQAk8SY8AuYeVLHJtsCH4oZFki5qnZIonZ9urBoE4ayxnCvMumgjOwXX1COK7m08zp8ZfdCcYFmCSXQqas9KxI5FJKXh9IIJxLcJuIUbU4ogYxHGEymOQBEmXGgAOzusGI8tkASgsnfof9sLkYEZWveWWYqVN5HoW4o8KcXSWVZqwko2tYu7qkAeQqhFQZJnEJ0aTyCHiPpPVmpeNSxlGJloYhQl4k7jOrppC3rMwgzyQ4Nc0Czgg%3D%3D)

American citizens are facing tough decisions right now. We’re dealing with a crisis at our border, inflation has a stranglehold on our families, and we must fix our education system.

**We have some serious challenges facing our nation. We need serious people to solve them.**

When I was asked to serve - it was a serious decision to do so - **but when your country calls and needs you, you MUST answer. **

Fellow Conservative,**[now I ask you to join this fight with me.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=81110e3bff0f4b3a96a67ce39aaa12d2&_e=oRVVzBRKXbKxwRj-xeo73Dz_4i9RZxrZxFQ2SsL1hjvRRM6vXY-str_oSW9r9SAurqyPh5XybOthXKmXlOKsWYM2n5GNZrFr987HpYzL5kbQyoZ6_9JjuL0GPgD4E3Cn2LfyyTZypE9WemdaI2-jeZq01iU2NFxtTGQAk8SY8AuYeVLHJtsCH4oZFki5qnZIonZ9urBoE4ayxnCvMumgjOwXX1COK7m08zp8ZfdCcYFmCSXQqas9KxI5FJKXh9II__xoX_k8Xk84zHxIyMPdCJIxMrzWkdpJ6CJ2CKV6shTHTMXK_ftj9P8aQumASBFHVBKOwHc1LgwwGt6oAYBUbCstjhplM9e1r7sDC-W44-f2aGRoT-a26jxMvzDV_AIC1PQL3mxXo_ioD8ZnZm7fZQ%3D%3D) **

Hooyah,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican for U.S. Senate

[**SEND IN THE SEAL
CHIP IN TODAY **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=81110e3bff0f4b3a96a67ce39aaa12d2&_e=oRVVzBRKXbKxwRj-xeo73Dz_4i9RZxrZxFQ2SsL1hjvRRM6vXY-str_oSW9r9SAurqyPh5XybOthXKmXlOKsWYM2n5GNZrFr987HpYzL5kbQyoZ6_9JjuL0GPgD4E3Cn2LfyyTZypE9WemdaI2-jeZq01iU2NFxtTGQAk8SY8AuYeVLHJtsCH4oZFki5qnZIonZ9urBoE4ayxnCvMumgjOwXX1COK7m08zp8ZfdCcYFmCSXQqas9KxI5FJKXh9II-xU7CM3f4oyi0gQ1TNc8cvpEzDEyaNRreGQoSdpDXMGI7dpQxGXZR_I_bL5szbz0JlO6VYPVP-jwOzTZ1XhN_2LywZdFUVBpEbRHW720VKRUNTcKlw3c9tTXoRN9e8iOLZmw5nv3Hy4ZkNods_-NiQ%3D%3D)

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

name: Team Whitesides HQ
subject: ICYMI: George’s Plan to Tackle the Wildfire Crisis
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66744252/417414043/1224595648?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmQwZTYyNi04NDI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HrRGwkEgiTYxHEBfsxICysqLcw43N84-yi9wUs7ZUpk=)
Peter, this is a different email than we usually send.

Today, George’s plan to tackle the wildfire crisis _went live._

[**George has made addressing the wildfire crisis a cornerstone of his campaign, and in Congress, would continue to work with experts to combat this issue. Will you chip in $3 to elect a climate champion in CA-27?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66744253/417414044/-1766409733?refcode=em-7.19.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmQwZTYyNi04NDI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HrRGwkEgiTYxHEBfsxICysqLcw43N84-yi9wUs7ZUpk=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66744254/417414045/-169560246?refcode=em-7.19.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmQwZTYyNi04NDI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HrRGwkEgiTYxHEBfsxICysqLcw43N84-yi9wUs7ZUpk=) _Click here to watch!_
George knows that wildfire is a large and growing challenge in California and the American West. In his talk, George highlights the path forward:

**Adapting our communities to the wildfire crisis.** Improving upon our infrastructure with fire resiliency in mind would save countless lives, homes, and businesses.

**In order to solve the wildfire crisis, we need to balance our landscape.** Reducing overgrowth and brush is critical to halting the spread of fire.

**Innovation in technology that will rapidly detect and assess fire.** Speed is paramount in fighting fires, and this will help with quick responses.

[**In Congress, George will continue to make solving the wildfire crisis a priority. Only together will we make a sustainable future and control fires -- will you join George with a $3 donation today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66744255/417414046/-1766409733?refcode=em-7.19.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmQwZTYyNi04NDI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HrRGwkEgiTYxHEBfsxICysqLcw43N84-yi9wUs7ZUpk=)
| ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66744256/417414047/-1766409733?refcode=em-7.19.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmQwZTYyNi04NDI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HrRGwkEgiTYxHEBfsxICysqLcw43N84-yi9wUs7ZUpk=)****
---

Thank you,

Team Whitesides
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66744257/417414048/-2104984614?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmQwZTYyNi04NDI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HrRGwkEgiTYxHEBfsxICysqLcw43N84-yi9wUs7ZUpk=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66744259/417414049/-723877621?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmQwZTYyNi04NDI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HrRGwkEgiTYxHEBfsxICysqLcw43N84-yi9wUs7ZUpk=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66744262/417414051/1617125231?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmQwZTYyNi04NDI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HrRGwkEgiTYxHEBfsxICysqLcw43N84-yi9wUs7ZUpk=) George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. [Chip in to George's campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66744264/417414054/1224595648?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmQwZTYyNi04NDI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HrRGwkEgiTYxHEBfsxICysqLcw43N84-yi9wUs7ZUpk=)

name: Sherrod Brown HQ
subject: BREAKING: New GOP opponent enters neck-and-neck race in Ohio!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
The stakes just went up.
| BREAKING: NEW GOP OPPONENT ENTERS OHIO SENATE RACE AGAINST SHERROD BROWN
Sherrod needs your grassroots support now more than ever! | [DONATE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49742?t=6&akid=9237%2E878179%2EIbekMv)
---
**This news couldn’t have come at a worse time:**

After _The Cook Political Report_ called our race in Ohio a toss up, Mitch McConnell started coming after Sherrod as his top target for defeat. Now, a brand-new GOP opponent just jumped in the race to defeat Sherrod – and polls already show us in a dead heat.

With Senate control on the line, we need an immediate surge of grassroots support to pull ahead and win. That’s why we just set a $30k rapid-response goal to make sure we have the resources to defend this must-win seat, and we need your help to get there by midnight:

[_Please, friend, split $10, $20, or whatever you can spare between our campaign and the Voter Protection Project to help Sherrod Brown reach this critical goal so we can win in Ohio and defend our Democratic Senate majority!_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49742?t=7&akid=9237%2E878179%2EIbekMv)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sherrod Brown and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49743?t=8&akid=9237%2E878179%2EIbekMv)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49744?t=9&akid=9237%2E878179%2EIbekMv)

[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49747?t=12&akid=9237%2E878179%2EIbekMv)
Thanks for your support, folks.

– Team Sherrod
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=9237%2E878179%2EIbekMv). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=9237%2E878179%2EIbekMv).**

clean_body: The stakes just went up. | | | BREAKING: NEW GOP OPPONENT ENTERS OHIO SENATE RACE AGAINST SHERROD BROWN Sherrod needs your grassroots support now more than ever! This news couldn’t have come at a worse time, Peter: After The Cook Political Report called our race in Ohio a toss up, Mitch McConnell started coming after Sherrod as his top target for defeat. Now, a brand-new GOP opponent just jumped in the race to defeat Sherrod – and polls already show us in a dead heat. With Senate control on the line, we need an immediate surge of grassroots support to pull ahead and win. That’s why we just set a $30k rapid-response goal to make sure we have the resources to defend this must-win seat, and we need your help to get there by midnight: =** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be go through immediately: = = = = = = Thanks for your support, Peter. – Team Sherrod | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. body:
I'm just an American.

| [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=8aa95ee5fe1140c5be14e8346ff1c20a&_e=BXFZC-x93_h3tB_vNhdi6ofbx7LGWA8lXi1eqaRJJO3Bq_kwu97DwcgqiSwPy1cXHWgOzBnidQiBgShvlAyA4z-6fqDHXN1TjKY0IZn5CNR2geaST0qM6xXA-g5jI_N0aVy8evHRMaFIyml1roknZaK8skbnUXUeOfeYjrDYe4dLKE5qNLPQTUg8At3Wja9-qWZcvlCGglUj2Ukenp6Bmbp0w5grYmGijbZ2TMTUyUggXQCV4l8ybUHvVifzcEXWbq2vE8_WaTm_UVFaOJUmVr00xnFDrnAU7euX7SwAJlE8nISBy7Xumeao5ej1PCJIkQ-yekmU_5a-Zp9Zgpg3_A1QZJ442zYyr959LHayhraUZ-K50DrjSBjdormOmNkU)

**From the Desk of Ken Buck**

Friend,

I hope you're doing well today -- but I'm about to give you some bad news.

It's my duty not only as a concerned conservative but as an American to reach out to you and tell you that the GOP is in GRAVE danger in 2024.

Democrats have done almost irreversible damage to this country and continue to fill their war chests in preparation for the 2024 campaign season. **[It's more important than ever for us to unite and fight for this great nation.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=8aa95ee5fe1140c5be14e8346ff1c20a&_e=BXFZC-x93_h3tB_vNhdi6ofbx7LGWA8lXi1eqaRJJO3Bq_kwu97DwcgqiSwPy1cXHWgOzBnidQiBgShvlAyA4z-6fqDHXN1TjKY0IZn5CNR2geaST0qM6xXA-g5jI_N0aVy8evHRMaFIyml1roknZaK8skbnUXUeOfeYjrDYe4dLKE5qNLPQTUg8At3Wja9-qWZcvlCGglUj2Ukenp6BmekTG7rJoK_EEujRtJ_KvKTzjLKki5TY_iGPLg-zfoQUNHYVZJU4Q0osesFSkvyyyJfnZNjz6SotHI28xB_out5sk9aIT5V44iDICyO-j4odk0a5SjWmlD8eySpkpIx3-wHjXsJmc5d6xMcjrjx0oZUEh-bbMCOyi6aNOLf2nt5W)**

I know we may not agree on everything, and we could have some differences, but I genuinely believe we can make a real difference together. **[That's why I'm contacting you today, personally asking for your help.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=8aa95ee5fe1140c5be14e8346ff1c20a&_e=BXFZC-x93_h3tB_vNhdi6ofbx7LGWA8lXi1eqaRJJO3Bq_kwu97DwcgqiSwPy1cXHWgOzBnidQiBgShvlAyA4z-6fqDHXN1TjKY0IZn5CNR2geaST0qM6xXA-g5jI_N0aVy8evHRMaFIyml1roknZaK8skbnUXUeOfeYjrDYe4dLKE5qNLPQTUg8At3Wja9-qWZcvlCGglUj2Ukenp6Bma8OmDOf3GTIdVZRr20Qvq7PHNVPECAmd5NcGNEdj1l3h8716SP2e7FMoiiIJROtyiA2xlbpZLXxjTMdjQ-74c54mE6ndk-IAqIeV1VSRAjovLlgg15sDg5DABzqov8CBFxZAISEJbYEX1bMzBr8ghfl9ymL451BmxlKK9k41sXz)

So I'm reaching out to you as a fellow American, not a congressman or a politician, but someone who cares deeply about our country and future.

The GOP needs your help -- without our grassroots supporters, we won't be able to win in 2024, and we will have another four years of DISASTER.

Hi Peter,
Remember the phrase “max out” – the fundraising term for wealthy donors who have given so much money to a campaign they are no longer legally allowed to contribute more?
Well, we just found out one of our opponents raised over HALF of her contributions from MAX OUT donors. That’s the kind of wealth standing behind her campaign, and the power we are up against.
Our campaign relies on donors like you. Can you donate $10 today to ensure we have the resources to keep up and show what a real grassroots campaign looks like? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_071923_maxout&amount=10]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_071923_maxout&amount=10]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_071923_maxout&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_071923_maxout&amount=50]
We’ve always said this race is about our community and not any one person, and here in Arizona’s 3rd Congressional District and all over the country, we’re seeing the impact of policies driven by wealthy donors and special interests rather than what’s important to the rest of us. It’s clear now more than ever that it will take all of us working together to win this race.
So, if you’re ready to help elect a Congresswoman running a real grassroots movement to act on health care, the climate crisis, and so much more, would you please join our campaign with a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_071923_maxout&amount=10]
Thank you so much,
Team Terán

For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children.
She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake.
Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=x_subheader]

She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake. Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! | Peter,

Republicans are using every opportunity to throw working families under the bus.

Just last week, MAGA Republicans hijacked the National Defense Authorization Act, legislation that would have granted essential healthcare resources to service members and their families. This is yet another instance of Republicans pushing their extreme, far-right agenda ahead of millions of working families.

Diversity, equity and inclusion, and reproductive justice are non-negotiables. Republicans utilizing this historically bipartisan legislation to attack these fundamental rights and values is something I won’t stand for.

We need to send Republicans a clear message that we are done playing their games. Working families deserve leaders that won’t gamble with their livelihoods. name: Team Pramila
subject: Your voice matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Your voice matters, and we want to hear from you.
#
Peter,
We're now well into the third quarter of the year and Pramila is taking bold, progressive action in Congress for our values. Back here at Team Pramila HQ, we're taking some time to realign our goals to amplify our collective voice and continue driving our campaign to be successful for the rest of the year.
In order to create this we will need the most important factor to our campaign: you. **That's why we're asking you to take our Quarter Three Official Priorities Survey.**[**The survey will only take five minutes or less to complete. But your input will help us better understand what we want Pramila to focus on and how we can better fight for our progressive vision.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/2023-q3-priorities-survey/?source=em20230719-2716&t=1&akid=2716%2E420207%2EjMteiI)
**[Take our survey ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/2023-q3-priorities-survey/?source=em20230719-2716&t=2&akid=2716%2E420207%2EjMteiI)**
Pramila is dedicated and determined to continue showing up for her constituents, and communities like hers. Whether that is centered around issues like climate change, social justice, racial injustice, or healthcare, Pramila is ready to bring our voices to the halls of Congress to ensure that our issues are front and center, and our democracy doesn't leave a single person behind.
Unlike our competitors that focus only on their personal greed, Pramila understands the power of collaborative action and collective power. The only way a grassroots movement like ours can be successful is by working together to fight for solutions to the issues our country faces day in and day out.
A better tomorrow starts with fixing the issues of today, Peter, and that can only happen by listening to those who experience them and fighting for a better future. [**If you want your voice heard as part of a movement designed to suit your needs, please take the time to fill out this quick survey.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/2023-q3-priorities-survey/?source=em20230719-2716&t=3&akid=2716%2E420207%2EjMteiI)
Together,
Team Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230719-2716-footer&t=4&refcode2=2716_420207_jMteiI&akid=2716%2E420207%2EjMteiI)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=5&akid=2716%2E420207%2EjMteiI)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=2716%2E420207%2EjMteiI)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress
