name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: The war against Fentanyl. Help me fight.
body:
Peter,

We are defined by the choices we make.

That applies to government as much as it does to people. Our government has unfortunately chosen to play politics with Fentanyl instead of taking the war on drugs seriously.

You made a choice Peter to send me to Washington to speak up for common sense law enforcement & public safety priorities. That was your decision, and I take it seriously.

Which is why I have chosen to introduce legislation [https://www.foxnews.com/politics/house-republican-introduces-bill-permanently-upgrade-classification-fentanyl-related-substances] that will permanently designate combating Fentanyl a top priority of America's anti-drug efforts.

STAND WITH ANTHONY → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=first+button&utm_campaign=The+War+Agaist+Fentanyl+Please+Help+Email]

For reasons beyond figuring, Democrats are leaving Fentanyl only a temporary priority. It defies common sense.

When you fight a war, you need the authority to wage it.

In the war to protect our families from the ravages of a drug that kills in minuscule amounts and can be hidden in other drugs, we need the strongest possible authority backing it up. You can't fight a war based on authority that may not be there in a matter of months.

I need your help in this fight. You chose to help me before. I need you to do so again. When I speak up in Congress - when I call out the mealy mouthed moderation that passes for policy making these days - it helps to be in the strongest position possible. [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=The+War+Agaist+Fentanyl+Please+Help+Email]

That means asking for contributions to keep this seat Republican so that when reckless Democrats choose - or not - to challenge us, they'll know that you have my back while I have yours.

CHIP IN $10 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=10&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=The+War+Agaist+Fentanyl+Please+Help+Email] CHIP IN $25 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=25&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=The+War+Agaist+Fentanyl+Please+Help+Email] CHIP IN $50 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=50&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=The+War+Agaist+Fentanyl+Please+Help+Email] CHIP IN $100 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=100&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=The+War+Agaist+Fentanyl+Please+Help+Email] ANY AMOUNT → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=other+button&utm_campaign=The+War+Agaist+Fentanyl+Please+Help+Email]

Thank you,

Anthony

body:
| [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=aeaf7e8da95d4572aba1e4108a28ae2f&_e=VYJbd3eWdZ-Omeomgoxy-Rre_qnEnkc4RY5U8O5TPe8_k8JooEmVUEQD_BIzarnQy3OIDghgjFh-wYFBLPbvxsVCWwiCakWe80aJv__6VUGAWVN4hMmMq8_VVjlvJKu18R6pimBJ-KecvCElWRoOKOO3B_2JxXL0d4M8Dcnl2Qcszq-ruUGFxnv0echY4PVVxcD483dyKwv1rCkgJlraxOy08_W9RyotDE5bJ_zVuri-yf2OoKDK2mqhi3RmbcbvbArMZ0NA3gVsMGl6fNTcWgqvNiNxU4fzHbTEekiqMXJzG9Myk3uwO-lCZtlDI8Kr)
---
Peter, it's Senator JD Vance, and we need to talk about Ohio and the Senate.

It makes no sense that a red state like Ohio would have a failed leftist insider like Sherrod Brown as a Senator.

Ohio needs outsiders - folks like me and my friend, **Bernie Moreno** - to help take back the Senate majority and undo the damage of the Biden Administration.

****That 's why I'm proud to endorse Bernie Moreno to win Ohio's other Senate seat in 2024.** **

Bernie immigrated to the U.S. from Colombia at the age of five. His family believed so strongly in the American Dream that they picked up their lives and moved here to start again.

He's a businessman who has created thousands of jobs in Ohio. He's an outsider, not a career politician - which means he doesn't count on millions of dollars in special interest money; he needs the support of grassroots conservatives like you.

**[Will you join me in supporting Bernie Moreno to flip Ohio's other Senate seat and win back a GOP Senate majority by contributing to his campaign?](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=aeaf7e8da95d4572aba1e4108a28ae2f&_e=VYJbd3eWdZ-Omeomgoxy-Rre_qnEnkc4RY5U8O5TPe8_k8JooEmVUEQD_BIzarnQy3OIDghgjFh-wYFBLPbvxsVCWwiCakWe80aJv__6VUGAWVN4hMmMq8_VVjlvJKu18R6pimBJ-KecvCElWRoOKHsFNstou9EtO91cUlU9KF4V4BBq9B_ujUsmkmmdkoAKARroPVjmcjGr_6kcac8kAMPw2kV7HrHJYMhhQfMmMl6R2SgYgplFM0WEoQaDu2mXjS7of69FVfuq_UDzxuOC7rWdow1SkhJL6v2HKmkbJIvZxinK526rP9uubDmWEkb6)**

| [**JOIN SEN. VANCE >> SUPPORT BERNIE MORENO**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=aeaf7e8da95d4572aba1e4108a28ae2f&_e=VYJbd3eWdZ-Omeomgoxy-Rre_qnEnkc4RY5U8O5TPe8_k8JooEmVUEQD_BIzarnQy3OIDghgjFh-wYFBLPbvxsVCWwiCakWe80aJv__6VUGAWVN4hMmMq8_VVjlvJKu18R6pimBJ-KecvCElWRoOKHsFNstou9EtO91cUlU9KF6Ewg4GyOjl2ZD-KSN5BL4XZ-4BLa_u6byAK25S3-5EPypb3GilrVvdjTFLN5fJ6pLvoho3ZcWuYAZn2UWebwuGPO-DmSAyRGSt0BEbADlyV-5pwMUC7_DTqwXtOPfi1O0np628LhjfvLq7lcbNDxGT)
---

Bernie has lived the American Dream and will do whatever it takes to keep it alive. He's fighting against toxic leftist ideology, the Chinese Communist Party, and Mexican drug cartels - whatever it takes to protect our nation.

He's ready to give back to the country that has allowed him so much happiness, freedom, and success.

I'm proud to put my support behind Bernie Moreno, and I'm hoping you will too. **[Will you please join me in helping Bernie flip this seat red by making an investment in his campaign today?](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=aeaf7e8da95d4572aba1e4108a28ae2f&_e=VYJbd3eWdZ-Omeomgoxy-Rre_qnEnkc4RY5U8O5TPe8_k8JooEmVUEQD_BIzarnQy3OIDghgjFh-wYFBLPbvxsVCWwiCakWe80aJv__6VUGAWVN4hMmMq8_VVjlvJKu18R6pimBJ-KecvCElWRoOKHsFNstou9EtO91cUlU9KF7bAFQJ8rnfYMJ8htCbo6Z8wLIGnNQwBNudwV79vGike3e61k6nq6pY6x3C2caRuZ_VAKN4kQE9iQAB5u52QTsgUpy0Qe27zN9zKUWPrB8DpyYGn5br_WivaLMkANOnNZo-Vno9ZCkyldYYC8Qbpl6m)**

If we give all of our support to the right candidate, we can beat Sherrod Brown and take back the Senate majority - Bernie Moreno is that candidate.

Every American needs Bernie in the Senate. clean_body: | Peter, it's Senator JD Vance, and we need to talk about Ohio and the Senate. It makes no sense that a red state like Ohio would have a failed leftist insider like Sherrod Brown as a Senator. Ohio needs outsiders - folks like me and my friend, Bernie Moreno - to help take back the Senate majority and undo the damage of the Biden Administration. **That 's why I'm proud to endorse Bernie Moreno to win Ohio's other Senate seat in 2024. Bernie immigrated to the U.S. from Colombia at the age of five. His family believed so strongly in the American Dream that they picked up their lives and moved here to start again. He's a businessman who has created thousands of jobs in Ohio. He's an outsider, not a career politician - which means he doesn't count on millions of dollars in special interest money; he needs the support of grassroots conservatives like you. | Bernie has lived the American Dream and will do whatever it takes to keep it alive. He's fighting against toxic leftist ideology, the Chinese Communist Party, and Mexican drug cartels - whatever it takes to protect our nation. He's ready to give back to the country that has allowed him so much happiness, freedom, and success. I'm proud to put my support behind Bernie Moreno, and I'm hoping you will too. If we give all of our support to the right candidate, we can beat Sherrod Brown and take back the Senate majority - Bernie Moreno is that candidate. Every American needs Bernie in the Senate. Not only will he help take back the Republican Senate majority, but he will help clean up the mess left behind by the Biden Administration and Democrat insiders. Thank you, JD Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | ---|---|--- Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc. body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66745378/417418538/-1669222325?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzE2NjMwZi04YTI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WdO3vOM0BQhVFippRXoycGANv5ph7Lt0r-g-LOSEfRY=)
Peter, our campaign has generated a ton of early momentum, and that's credit to your incredible support over the last two months.

**With the help of over 4,300 supporters, our campaign ranked #2 in fundraising among all competitive House challengers in the United States -- and that goes for both Democrats and Republicans.**

Here's what I’m most proud of: **95%** of our fundraising total came in from individual donors like you, Peter.

Meanwhile, just over half of Calvert's fundraising total (52%) came in directly from individuals. In fact, over $200,000 of his total came from corporate PACs, the real estate industry, and his Freedom Caucus allies like Marjorie Taylor Greene.

**[Unfortunately, we were narrowly out-raised by Calvert thanks to the special interests pulling his strings. So before I go any further, please consider making your first donation of $10, $25, or whatever amount makes sense, to help us kickstart our July fundraising push.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66745381/417418541/-1669222325?refcode=em-7.19.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzE2NjMwZi04YTI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WdO3vOM0BQhVFippRXoycGANv5ph7Lt0r-g-LOSEfRY=)**

---

It’s no secret that our political system is broken when it comes to the way insider politicians like Ken Calvert fund their campaigns. I believe that a huge piece in making progress means funding our campaigns the _right way_ \-- free of corporate or special interests. _That's why I made a day-one pledge never to take a dime of corporate PAC money_.

Calvert may see that as a weakness for us, but I disagree. In fact, I think it's our biggest strength. When the vast majority of our support comes in from individuals -- pitching in what they can afford -- it sends the message that _real people_ are energized to bring change to our community.

That's what your donations mean to me, and it's why I'm so grateful for your support.

**[Let's keep our momentum going strong. Help us counter Calvert's special interest cash by chipping in $3 or more today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66745383/417418543/-1669222325?refcode=em-7.19.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzE2NjMwZi04YTI2LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WdO3vOM0BQhVFippRXoycGANv5ph7Lt0r-g-LOSEfRY=)**

clean_body: | = Peter, our campaign has generated a ton of early momentum, and that's credit to your incredible support over the last two months. With the help of over 4,300 supporters, our campaign ranked #2 in fundraising among all competitive House challengers in the United States -- and that goes for both Democrats and Republicans. Here's what I’m most proud of: 95% of our fundraising total came in from individual donors like you, Peter. Meanwhile, just over half of Calvert's fundraising total (52%) came in directly from individuals. In fact, over $200,000 of his total came from corporate PACs, the real estate industry, and his Freedom Caucus allies like Marjorie Taylor Greene. = | = It’s no secret that our political system is broken when it comes to the way insider politicians like Ken Calvert fund their campaigns. I believe that a huge piece in making progress means funding our campaigns the right way \-- free of corporate or special interests. That's why I made a day-one pledge never to take a dime of corporate PAC money. Calvert may see that as a weakness for us, but I disagree. In fact, I think it's our biggest strength. When the vast majority of our support comes in from individuals -- pitching in what they can afford -- it sends the message that real people are energized to bring change to our community. That's what your donations mean to me, and it's why I'm so grateful for your support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks, Will | = Democrat Will Rollins is a former national security and counter-terrorism prosecutor running for Congress in California's 41st Congressional District. | | Joe Biden is asking a lot of us, my friend... So far Biden has asked us to put up with record inflation, persistently high gas prices, an open border, and rising crime rates. Now, he's asking us to ignore his latest blunder...
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=eeaa479cc6304c918a27b35f0e1c5302&_e=waXivK4izIUQ3Jom2LoCmPRMRCUAFqoP8RmH7usL6sCNqtJ8lqxmKbz6i3lxX34uUjpmzFIfNNV_RBOGDDYfXbAzPXDTkfhjKjqosCxP7h0xyiSq5wDDrliqGsSULpxtGbp7sK__agVQ6zWbIqfF0oERr1smRweO-8EHYN7WvV7W8pwimms-YK0SCaeMVD9Pq3CauaXMuJmW0UzcNsvFc-cgtBd4S9P2ZsNHxwbv8L1Vc2g2Sz19wC6Zpx_I89IB)

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Millions More to Recruit Minorities for U.S. Jobless Benefits Amid Low Unemployment
body:
U.S. unemployment is low and stable, yet the Biden administration
keeps giving states millions of dollars to boost the number of
minorities—especially non-English speaking or limited-English
proficient—that sign up for government jobless benefits.

[alt_text]

[*****]
July 19, 2023

[article-image]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64222&L=29878&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcmVjcnVpdC1taW5vcml0aWVzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=985d1bffc3968b27c754ce03d6496fdc269e629d2015f3548293a46dad464104]

U.S. unemployment is low and stable, yet the Biden administration
keeps giving states millions of dollars to boost the number of
minorities—especially non-English speaking or limited-English
proficient—that sign up for government jobless benefits. The goal is
to address racial disparities and promote “equitable access” to
the program. The money—an unprecedented $260 million—started
flowing in early spring of 2022 to advance equity in state
unemployment insurance. COVID-19 inspired the controversial project,
according to the Department of Labor (DOL), the agency disbursing the
funds.

Read More
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64222&L=29878&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcmVjcnVpdC1taW5vcml0aWVzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=985d1bffc3968b27c754ce03d6496fdc269e629d2015f3548293a46dad464104]

clean_body: U.S. unemployment is low and stable, yet the Biden administration keeps giving states millions of dollars to boost the number of minorities—especially non-English speaking or limited-English proficient—that sign up for government jobless benefits. [alt_text] [*****] July 19, 2023 [article-image] [] U.S. unemployment is low and stable, yet the Biden administration keeps giving states millions of dollars to boost the number of minorities—especially non-English speaking or limited-English proficient—that sign up for government jobless benefits. The goal is to address racial disparities and promote “equitable access” to the program. The money—an unprecedented $260 million—started flowing in early spring of 2022 to advance equity in state unemployment insurance. COVID-19 inspired the controversial project, according to the Department of Labor (DOL), the agency disbursing the funds. I get constant homophobic hate for my support of LGBTQ+ communities.

I grew up in an America that denied me the right to marry.

**And I’m not going back.** That’s why I introduced the Equality Act to Congress.

But Republicans are dead set on seeing this bill FAIL! So, along with my reintroduction of the Equality Act, _**I need a groundswell of support from folks like you to prove to Republicans that they’re on the wrong side of this issue.**_

name: Team Cori
subject: Cori Bush boycotted Israeli President’s speech to Congress today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Cori won’t be silenced when it comes to human rights abuses. | |
---
Peter, Today, Cori Bush boycotted the Israeli President’s speech to Congress. She made it clear that Congress should not be giving a platform to the President of a country that keeps violating human rights. Cori continues to speak the truth about the apartheid enforced on the Palestinian people by the Israeli government. Although there is clear international consensus on this issue, **U.S. leaders, including many establishment Democrats, are acting like Cori’s truth-telling is worse than the human rights abuses that she’s calling out.** This is in addition to the attacks Cori faced last week after speaking forcefully against Israel’s bombing of a refugee camp. It’s shameful that because of her leadership on Palestinians’ human rights, she’s been condemned by Republicans, Democrats, reporters, and anti-Palestinian organizations instead of praised. Far too many in Washington DC, would rather support Israel’s apartheid than human dignity, respect, and equality. [**It’s up to us to have Cori’s back. clean_body: Cori won’t be silenced when it comes to human rights abuses. | | Peter, Today, Cori Bush boycotted the Israeli President’s speech to Congress. She made it clear that Congress should not be giving a platform to the President of a country that keeps violating human rights. Cori continues to speak the truth about the apartheid enforced on the Palestinian people by the Israeli government. Although there is clear international consensus on this issue, U.S. leaders, including many establishment Democrats, are acting like Cori’s truth-telling is worse than the human rights abuses that she’s calling out. This is in addition to the attacks Cori faced last week after speaking forcefully against Israel’s bombing of a refugee camp. It’s shameful that because of her leadership on Palestinians’ human rights, she’s been condemned by Republicans, Democrats, reporters, and anti-Palestinian organizations instead of praised. Far too many in Washington DC, would rather support Israel’s apartheid than human dignity, respect, and equality. Cori won’t be silenced. She believes it is lawmakers’ moral responsibility to stand up and fight against human rights abuses wherever they occur. Even when it’s not popular to do so, Cori has boycotted speeches to Congress by abusers of human rights -- including government leaders of India and Israel. Cori’s consistent leadership on the human rights of all people scares those in power. That’s why this week, the House of Representatives also passed a resolution affirming unequivocal and never-ending support for Israel’s government and denying the Israeli government’s human rights violations. The resolution was in direct response to progressives naming Israel as racist -- and too many Democratic lawmakers were all too happy to vote with the GOP. Cori was one of the few members of Congress who voted against the resolution, which again led to backlash by those who want to maintain the unjust status quo. We need more members of Congress who are willing to speak up against racism and oppression in the U.S. and around the world. Especially when Congress is arming the oppressors, including sending nearly $4 billion of our tax dollars to Israel’s military every year without any accountability or oversight. Fellow American,

A strong, constitutionally-minded judicial system is one of the pillars of American society.

Just this year, the Supreme Court was responsible for overturning affirmative action, protecting religious freedoms, and standing up to Biden’s outrageous plan for forgiving student debt.

Our courts remain the last line of defense against the overreach and weaponization of the federal government. That’s why I’ve already announced by hand-picked lists of Judicial appointments for the U.S Supreme Court and federal Courts of Appeals.

_**Take a look at the list below:**_

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=dd04a6814d4a4802a4a7aa3c5c223b64&_e=EawdwZ2JrGc_n71qumROYGIK4jr7OY9rJzpucyBkWUe9lCka3orcfudFwA4COApkPeuN1DDi6kjmoxzJMrqODapi1EAnrRZCL8putgZaRxDuePqKYDFxtbtRqjvltGy8XDPOXrHgVQpuHppGRODInxOAk3abT_JL2xMxJUNlGuU1TafdvXYtFmA73LvzzzLRxCeQkpUewqFvr93Q9HJqLX5ObZzGSzW4hh_l6thZdX_KWxNl2XmzaQtnE9KK-Ob-OKZmT4JKVDD-C0Mnnum_8q6rgZVJVQ61ns2MqrkRZ4mgB108X0UkyXG-3YwFO0f_qJveN9504EDV01ujJg3aa8Q_hqwKrKk6MRnqjHmK7YvrddMQB2q8pa34f-DhI1BLRwUccbnwLVlow_oaQUXOil9WR5Agb3wLpE6LQkm4PAI%3D)
Joe Biden might be more concerned with the race and gender of his judicial nominees, but my sole criterion was to select candidates with an unwavering commitment to an originalist understanding of the United States Constitution.

**As President I will appoint judges who will protect the integrity of our constitutional Republic. And I will do it without apology.**

Fellow American, I will continue to be transparent when it comes to these important decisions I must make as president. **[If you like the direction, can I count on your support today? Even $5 will help make sure Americans can hear our message!](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=dd04a6814d4a4802a4a7aa3c5c223b64&_e=EawdwZ2JrGc_n71qumROYGIK4jr7OY9rJzpucyBkWUe9lCka3orcfudFwA4COApkPeuN1DDi6kjmoxzJMrqODapi1EAnrRZCL8putgZaRxDuePqKYDFxtbtRqjvltGy8XDPOXrHgVQpuHppGRODInxOAk3abT_JL2xMxJUNlGuU1TafdvXYtFmA73LvzzzLRxCeQkpUewqFvr93Q9HJqLX5ObZzGSzW4hh_l6thZdX_KWxNl2XmzaQtnE9KK-Ob-OKZmT4JKVDD-C0Mnnum_8urugziiawbSFiPedc8hJLDMYTFQWxt2YPT3-guYn1NmYYSFvhatPmR1GrDIPUaHZ4Yjh1cq22XXDc_U8LvtGZjnhnf3d2w7dbSl4EEiWWdNC_u-mgvZWCqGpQQ7v4HrjQhRJ8cyvzXqZnReORuW1lQ%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Lucas Kunce HQ
subject: Here's what we learned from Josh Hawley’s latest FEC filing:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
The national GOP is trying its hardest to bail him out
#
We got some big news over the weekend, Peter.
On July 15, every Senate candidate across the country was required to submit their second quarter fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission. **Here’s how it shook out in Missouri’s U.S. Senate race:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35157?refcode=em20230719-3421&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3421%2E614464%2EN_turG)
**Our campaign set another fundraising record — $2.3 million raised since January, all thanks to real people just like you. That’s the most ever raised in the first 6 months by a U.S. Senate challenger in Missouri.**
Lucas + our whole team are blown away by the support you’ve shown this campaign over the last six months and we’re so proud to be a truly people-powered movement.
But here’s the rub: **Over these last six months, national GOP insiders and mega-donors have done everything in their power to bail out Josh Hawley.**
**FIRST:** After a poll showed Hawley’s approval underwater with Missouri voters — at just 42% — insiders at the National Republican Senatorial Committee have now spent months attacking Lucas.
**THEN:** National Republican groups transferred hundreds of thousands of dollars into Hawley’s campaign to bail him out after our grassroots movement outraised him.
**AND NOW:** GOP mega-donors have launched a brand new Super PAC to prop up Hawley’s flailing campaign and fund _even more_ attacks against Lucas.
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35157?refcode=em20230719-3421&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3421%2E614464%2EN_turG)**
**We already knew that national Republicans view the movement we’re building together as a threat, but this makes it clearer than ever: They know Lucas Kunce can defeat Josh Hawley.**
If these are the kind of resources they’re willing to spend in the off-year to make Josh Hawley look strong, it’s only a matter of time before they start spending even more to ramp up their attacks.
**That’s why we need your help today, Peter.** Lucas launched this campaign in January so we’d have time to raise the money we need to mount a serious challenge to a corrupt, incumbent politician like Hawley — and the best way we’ll be able to do that is by keeping up our record-breaking grassroots momentum.
We don’t need our grassroots supporters to match these giant mega-donor checks. But we do need the resources to get Lucas’ message in front of voters and continue building a winning campaign. Any amount makes a difference.
**[So please, will you rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford to our grassroots movement to elect Lucas Kunce? clean_body: The national GOP is trying its hardest to bail him out We got some big news over the weekend, Peter. On July 15, every Senate candidate across the country was required to submit their second quarter fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission. Here’s how it shook out in Missouri’s U.S. Senate race: Our campaign set another fundraising record — $2.3 million raised since January, all thanks to real people just like you. That’s the most ever raised in the first 6 months by a U.S. Senate challenger in Missouri. Lucas + our whole team are blown away by the support you’ve shown this campaign over the last six months and we’re so proud to be a truly people-powered movement. But here’s the rub: Over these last six months, national GOP insiders and mega-donors have done everything in their power to bail out Josh Hawley. FIRST: After a poll showed Hawley’s approval underwater with Missouri voters — at just 42% — insiders at the National Republican Senatorial Committee have now spent months attacking Lucas. THEN: National Republican groups transferred hundreds of thousands of dollars into Hawley’s campaign to bail him out after our grassroots movement outraised him. AND NOW: GOP mega-donors have launched a brand new Super PAC to prop up Hawley’s flailing campaign and fund even more attacks against Lucas. We already knew that national Republicans view the movement we’re building together as a threat, but this makes it clearer than ever: They know Lucas Kunce can defeat Josh Hawley. If these are the kind of resources they’re willing to spend in the off-year to make Josh Hawley look strong, it’s only a matter of time before they start spending even more to ramp up their attacks. That’s why we need your help today, Peter. Lucas launched this campaign in January so we’d have time to raise the money we need to mount a serious challenge to a corrupt, incumbent politician like Hawley — and the best way we’ll be able to do that is by keeping up our record-breaking grassroots momentum. We don’t need our grassroots supporters to match these giant mega-donor checks. But we do need the resources to get Lucas’ message in front of voters and continue building a winning campaign. Any amount makes a difference. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: This is our chance to defeat Josh Hawley and finally take Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat back for everyday people — and we can’t afford to waste it. Thanks for all your help, — Team Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

name: Working Families Party
subject: UPS workers could go on strike
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
We stand with UPS workers. | | | It’s Hot Strike Summer, Peter — with workers across industries joining together to demand better pay and better working conditions for all. The next group of workers to join this historic moment are UPS workers — who despite delivering record profits for the company, are still denied a living wage. **On August 1st, UPS workers will stop all deliveries unless UPS negotiates a new agreement with their workers. With 1 in 4 packages delivered by UPS workers, this would be the largest work stoppage in the US since 1959! 1** We firmly stand with UPS workers who are demanding a fair wage for part-time workers and more full-time jobs. **[If you agree, then sign the petition standing in solidarity with striking UPS workers. We'll share your signatures and messages of support with UPS workers in advance of their Day of Action this Friday.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ7g42mZEHAhnbBTfMrlONpnzVHL4jMp9QkV15-kNHuiDO4sftm6cUj2olCYbgHgst8WRtQ6bye-ifjd6Pa7jpdzLVHxEfuWbCT-QC5WBBKJxb5ZlD6xbNeeVlaRjz8aJVVVYmF2oIP9bDyM5aJmHXxBqR6ovQRal9svZY82e0NiS5i0RcVmRW2BAV1etIgWuJy3yyxwAV0LidBYdsgCAHtzCORnj1Z_x7C2S0VrbKasJzYIXB0eyZzBQpyE1CrpSxhYqOpPMEJfe8tqqy3CnvyC/3y0/1tOw8jU7QkKMQrxB0MYdbA/h0/SlrT5j3o2Z4n4lAEb5VaZq9W0vi2dvzZNItoyQCsv-8)** **[Add your name](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ7g42mZEHAhnbBTfMrlONpnzVHL4jMp9QkV15-kNHuiDO4sftm6cUj2olCYbgHgst8WRtQ6bye-ifjd6Pa7jpdzLVHxEfuWbCT-QC5WBBKJxVuhDcx9retQdWYqiU4lZVZZgJ6d0MBscfIP7iXXD3z66aD1CwFBDFQGESpEmynPLJd3tQurXWnwvMnZ_3ETopzsrIk4X93npl0hvIcu-HSSG2XbBGiAPap0KSmYrmKDzm2Lbb1vt7yqSo0L7VR2AkSRWyPXMluDoek0fYl4Fl3E/3y0/1tOw8jU7QkKMQrxB0MYdbA/h1/NKXyyGEHwR1TFD-EcctZVsodjdiyjLhHnkCtPknBsZE)** Despite taking in more than $13 billion in profits a year, more than half of all UPS workers are part-time and are paid as little as $15.50 an hour. UPS workers are standing together to end part-time poverty at UPS by demanding a fair wage for all and more full-time positions. But UPS has refused to negotiate — walking away during previous attempts to come to an agreement. With the current contract with the Teamsters Union set to expire on July 31st, UPS workers are prepared to strike on August 1st if a fair agreement is not reached. We need to show the executives at UPS that we have the workers’ backs. That’s why we are helping collect as many signatures as we can before Friday’s Day of Action. **[Will you add your name to the petition to stand in solidarity with UPS workers?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ7g42mZEHAhnbBTfMrlONpnzVHL4jMp9QkV15-kNHuiDO4sftm6cUj2olCYbgHgst8WRtQ6bye-ifjd6Pa7jpdzLVHxEfuWbCT-QC5WBBKJxYlTrpmSxz90mQCAb1lPauzBUDjlqEeKzpO7H23lA2IhkUf95g_GL7GkCOzlFapGTwr8g8t5kxGgcOu8x-EPmi-xhoJdCB1A9s15-UTbXLQDYlEiZTVsvAb5JlTD-cCdobUw7CHhkaT0NnH_0xLJ0D4dQhyFUPs7xARWk5v9kkyP/3y0/1tOw8jU7QkKMQrxB0MYdbA/h2/xy-kdJ4PelwOejaFjLNWIsJ8zKiVXyeoA3sNgccxFDE)** **Already signed? Share this email with 5 of your friends to help us collect more signatures before Friday.** In solidarity, Working Families Party Source:
1\. [UPS workers vote to strike, setting stage for biggest walkout since 1959](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDOD8i7QwzRxtiKV0LARcM9bqkYYIxCBFCK18_YdsWQMWgyvuUgFTsdznopx-r-a2_EEbQNXSe1AK-NOTXkikAhAvdcTXI4LmoHmiL_gouq_Ph8khZbIAKZA1I_1ytYlcPT-i4XP4FdPhDH5DDdSaoIgJgytE_wj1oQZxnMbMoHbnnFLqIY1dSBR6aXFo_aEGHoYczp_A6WS6h3KQ9kD9ACWLSXLeplnIf1oocNwtts87_F1lujXK0qmyfTz2WwR9jK2jh1MKkX0m-qhfUe5rXXMdq8Omcmq9pi6G_1QnmNenr08xBcRpG-0b3BtlT2YCxg/3y0/1tOw8jU7QkKMQrxB0MYdbA/h3/ZkRolkffBaPDcsf3fEJUCfzFB7M1m3XCVAQ73gCnY7I), _CBS News,_ June 16, 2023 [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/mRshnjzLbfRUAJcmEcvG0z7LbPfEzyUQoTxoFfOCLCVbR0YoP-dpRE5F5UEI-u5cpDFCXQ5YJMHwADLrTbgyUHLLdN_oEEK9LV2-0nNeNn1D-lwirisw0Qd28U7IbtJ7Tg_9877dDHlq2bTjFrBOj1It9RAGbf0-BXauWpVHg8jQ5gJOX0ZEBM3jLPi9owlYuFbshzv3MKgPYRw_GFAy0ZljJneDKxZ719sHyIbnb0hq64dzlNyOSzTPWOVMscsb3N-jy7G6CFlzn-xt4tUJ8A/3y0/1tOw8jU7QkKMQrxB0MYdbA/h4/ZZvNW7RfkKx5_G7PL5EybuG7uWVX6kFCTDsiUgjOVZI)[](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhpI1kLPEGRW4KnFarPJtxfN9U9y0YeH5CaLF3DG4soQcsX680AK8XgMZoR9w2oikxzpMIM6G3ID53fJiWEXJz8S52kkX3zBzTml8JA81hYCm_rihT1hj-0yWT53x4kf-fA36k7mCzP22Xuc8mmKknBSrv0c3KNJPBY7PGITCkodSsIUpSiWmec2sv9gI_fnG-ggeebLbumCGXakXvzbtjTXE5UBJ6_VIwZFsdJMJA056Eobbz0NggtpZ5sZV-0FVrA/3y0/1tOw8jU7QkKMQrxB0MYdbA/h5/kd_f13q2qAbt2kEtuwKMfoBielaa_mbRruHmllSO9n4)[](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDE-osrDsyUs4KS0eRiq-k7Q-xOI-kLyL5jO9OnnCBTuKLI72HnpboZEX7Pkks7WPmBNyY2izLWH271knHOEmcPwcz2LI1_GYW5ZHSko6DaYQkvwE7Aoqoe7tRoJVI-qRJfHrtW54QuMniyUzuMmJ4G9UnXvfzk7aWo5hgtf_cxnq8DooHF98kh5YvFfvEpjaQarfP8emGJc26pc6ZqsJleerxY-8l4RdLUxliCeSv8WyqCRc-Di6u0CJWmNgsLzCh5g3yGjb9r01xn4dZF0mbPE/3y0/1tOw8jU7QkKMQrxB0MYdbA/h6/uLwyTrYop6BjSsE6w-rrK5s_mgwCQyJJ-7HvgGPmdo8) Thoughts? clean_body: We stand with UPS workers. | | | It’s Hot Strike Summer, Peter — with workers across industries joining together to demand better pay and better working conditions for all. The next group of workers to join this historic moment are UPS workers — who despite delivering record profits for the company, are still denied a living wage. On August 1st, UPS workers will stop all deliveries unless UPS negotiates a new agreement with their workers. With 1 in 4 packages delivered by UPS workers, this would be the largest work stoppage in the US since 1959! 1 We firmly stand with UPS workers who are demanding a fair wage for part-time workers and more full-time jobs. Despite taking in more than $13 billion in profits a year, more than half of all UPS workers are part-time and are paid as little as $15.50 an hour. UPS workers are standing together to end part-time poverty at UPS by demanding a fair wage for all and more full-time positions. But UPS has refused to negotiate — walking away during previous attempts to come to an agreement. With the current contract with the Teamsters Union set to expire on July 31st, UPS workers are prepared to strike on August 1st if a fair agreement is not reached. We need to show the executives at UPS that we have the workers’ backs. That’s why we are helping collect as many signatures as we can before Friday’s Day of Action. Already signed? Share this email with 5 of your friends to help us collect more signatures before Friday. In solidarity, Working Families Party Source: 1\. , CBS News, June 16, 2023 Thoughts? Feedback?
